product.title: L-Glutamine
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in supporting your muscle and immune health

The nutrient in L-Glutamine can:

  • Help maintain healthy muscle mass

  • Support energy levels under heavy stress

  • Promote healthy gut and immune function

Glutamine is the most abundant free amino acid found in the body. Supplements are often associated with serious athletes, but they can be beneficial for anyone who wants to not only maintain muscle health, but also immune and gut health.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is glutamine? It is the most abundant free amino acid within the human muscle and blood. It can be found circulating in the blood, as well as stored in the skeletal muscles and liver, in concentrations ranging from 10- to 100-fold higher than any other amino acid. (1)Glutamine is a building block for protein and involved in many vital functions. It is required for rapidly dividing cells, including those of the gut, and is a precursor of the brain neurotransmitter glutamate.Certain factors such as heavy exercising can lower the glutamine levels in the body. Glutamine supplements cause a rapid rise in cellular glutamine levels and glutamine stores in muscle.

Why it works:Glutamine is utilized in a number of vital functions, including protein synthesis and production of the nucleotide units that make up DNA and RNA. It is an important energy source for cells lining the gut and immune cells and critical for healthy gut and immune function. (1,2) It is also a precursor of the brain neurotransmitter glutamate. (3,4)Because of its importance in many cellular functions, glutamine is consumed at especially high rates during activities involving intense exercise. (1) People who engage in heavy exercise can affect their glutamine levels, causing stress to their body and immune systems. (5,6)Supplementing with glutamine can be important to a serious athlete, someone challenged with muscle loss or someone who wants to help maintain optimal immune function and energy level under heavy stress. (6,7)Glutamine can also act as a fuel for some tissues as well as for components of the immune system such as lymphocytes and macrophages.

The science behind the product:The function of glutamine in stimulating glycogen synthase, the enzyme that controls the synthesis and storage of glycogen fuel in muscles and liver, may provide a mechanism by which glutamine supplements promote enhanced fuel stores. (5)Studies indicate supplementing with glutamine can effectively raise glutamine concentrations in circulation and in muscle tissue, promote a healthy inflammatory response and support antioxidant defenses to maintain muscle health. (8,9)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per serving: % RI L-Glutamine (free form amino acid) 500 mg *
product.ingredients: Amount per serving: % RI L-Glutamine (free form amino acid) 500 mg *

product.title: Branched Chain Amino Acids
product.description:
For you, if you want to support energy and faster recovery after exercise

Branched Chain Amino Acids (BCAAs) can:

  • Strengthen exercise performance (both mental & physical)

  • Contribute to faster recovery after training

  • Encourage protein synthesis in muscle & liver

  • Promote healthy brain function & immunity

  • Support cellular energy production

Branched Chain Amino Acids (BCAA) – L-valine, L-leucine, and L-isoleucine – can support protein synthesis and help you recover physically and mentally after exercising, providing energy for your body.

Health benefits at a glance: BCAAs (Branched Chain Amino Acids) are a group of three essential amino acids that must be obtained through diet since the body cannot produce them. They are needed to support protein synthesis after breaking down muscles.Life Extension's Branched Chain Amino Acids is a great choice for active individuals who want to take a natural supplement to improve their sports performance. It can promote better recovery after exercise, both mentally and physically, and provide energy for the body.

Why it works:If you are following a rigorous exercise program, chances are that your need for physical and mental recovery will become greater over time. This is where BCAAs come into the picture. There are a variety of amino acids, but only L-leucine, L-isoleucine and L-valine are called “branched chain amino acids". BCAAs are obtained through protein-rich foods like meat, dairy, and legumes or supplements. BCAAs can help enhance protein synthesis in both liver- and muscle cells. Because they can be oxidized in the powerhouse of the cell, the mitochondria, these amino acids can also promote energy and serve as fuel sources for skeletal muscles. While they are a popular supplement for athletes and exercise enthusiasts, their muscle-supporting and cognitive benefits can be had by anyone.

The science behind the product:Supporting muscle strength, endurance & recoveryAthletes rely on BCAAs for a reason! Research shows they can help: (1,2)Maintain & build muscle strengthEnhance endurance & muscle functionPromote physical performanceSupport cognitive functionEncourage muscle recoveryHowever, BCAAs aren’t just for strength or endurance athletes – they can benefit anyone looking to support their health.Supporting a strong immune systemA healthy immune system is essential for peak performance, and BCAAs play a key role in maintaining immune function. (3,4) Again, their benefits go beyond athletics: BCAAs can promote immune health for everybody. (5) Branched Chain Amino Acids can help keep you at your best by supporting muscles, brain & immune defenses!

How to use: To be used by adults 18 years and older.Take four (4) capsules daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: L-Leucine 1200 mg L-Isoleucine 600 mg L-Valine 600 mg
product.ingredients: L-Leucine 1200 mg L-Isoleucine 600 mg L-Valine 600 mg

product.title: Taurine Powder
product.description:
For you, if you want to make sure your taurine intake is sufficient

The formula of Taurine Powder can:

  • Support overall cardiovascular health 

  • Promote healthy nervous system function 

  • Support skeletal muscle health 

  • Encourage optimal exercise performance

The amino acid taurine is known for supporting heart health. But taurine has a range of health benefits, from promoting cell membrane stability to encouraging healthy nervous system function. Taurine may also help maintain already healthy blood pressure and blood glucose levels, promote muscle recovery after exercise, and more. 

This product also comes in capsules.

Health benefits at a glance:Taurine can support the cardiovascular- and nervous systems and promote cognitive and liver health (encouraging bile salt production in the liver). It can also encourage water and calcium movement across cell membranes, which can help maintain cell membrane stability. A daily serving of 1/4 level teaspoon mixed in juice or water can provide benefits. This product also comes as capsules

Why it works:Taurine is one of the body’s most abundant free, intercellular amino acids and is produced by the body itself. Produced from the amino acid L-cysteine, researchers have described it as “one of the most essential substances in the body.” Taurine is found many places in the body but especially in the tissues of the central nervous system, where it appears to play a regulating role. However, taurine is lacking in many diets and, in case of illness, may not be sufficiently produced by your body. In fact, the levels drop by as much as 80% with age! Therefore, adding this nutrient to your dietary regime, can help restoring youthful taurine blood levels.According to published research, taurine has been shown to: Support insulin sensitivity and healthy glucose metabolismHelp maintain intracellular electrolytes balance (particularly calcium)Support eye/vison health and hearing functionHelp maintain central nervous system healthEncourage cell membrane stability & water balance (osmoregulation) Promote optimal liver function and healthy bile salt formation Help maintain cognitive function and neuron integrity Encourage heart health and function Promote skeletal muscle health Boost exercise capacity Reduce chronic inflammationHelp prevent diabetic problems

The science behind the product:Taurine for heart healthStudies suggest that taurine promotes cardiovascular health in a variety of ways. It can help maintain already healthy blood pressure, heart rhythm, and vascular function and encourages healthy heart muscle contractions. Dietary taurine can also help promote normal insulin response and support already healthy blood glucose levels. Nervous system health and taurine Taurine is especially concentrated in the excitable tissues of the central nervous system. It plays an important neuroprotective role, in part through its ability to maintain water and electrolyte balance across cell membranes, inhibit oxidative processes and promote a healthy inflammatory response. Supplementation with this nutrient can also promote healthy cognitive function, retinal health, and support hearing. It can protect inner ear cells from damage by normalizing the flow of calcium ions they require for proper function. Muscle health, aging and taurineTaurine may support skeletal muscle health and has been shown to support exercise performance and help maintain muscle mass and function as we age. Evidence indicates that taurine supports healthy aging and promotes longevity.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per serving: % RI Taurin 750 mg *
product.ingredients: Amount per serving: % RI Taurin 750 mg *

product.title: Arginine Ornithine Powder
product.description:
For you, if you want to support muscle strength and recovery after exercise

The formula of Arginine Ornithine Powder can:
  • Support healthy muscle recovery 
  • Help promote muscle mass 
  • Encourage a healthy immune response 
  • Promote healthy endothelial function 
  • Help maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels

Exercising regularly promotes whole-body health and longevity, but muscle soreness can make it difficult to maintain an exercise routine. Theamino acids

L-Arginine and Ornithine BenefitsThe amino acids drginine and ornithine have been found to support muscle mass and strength, and promote healthy body composition in exercising adults. (1-3) But that’s not all they can do:L-arginine is a semi-essential amino acid known for its role in the production of nitric oxide (NO). Arginine is converted to nitric oxide by your immune cells and the endothelial cells that line your blood vessels. Because of this, arginine can promote vascular relaxation, help maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels, and encourage a healthy immune response. (4,5)L-ornithine is a non-essential amino acid that the body actually makes out of arginine. Our cells use ornithine to produce proline, which is needed for collagen formation, as well as nitrogen-based compounds called polyamines that help support gene expression and promote healthy cell growth, division and survival. (6-8)Both arginine and ornithine can help your cells convert ammonia, an unwanted byproduct of protein metabolism (such as after exercise), into urea, a compound that can be safely excreted via the kidneys. (7)

Supplement facts: Amount per serving: % RI L-Arginine hydrochloride 2,25 g * L-Ornithine hydrochloride 750 mg *

product.title: L-Carnitine
product.description:
For you, if you want to ensure optimal mitochondrial function, important for healthy aging
The carnitine in L-Carnitine can:

  • Encourage cellular metabolic activity
  • Support already-healthy blood pressure
  • Help maintain the brain's defenses against age-related memory & cognitive decline
  • Promote healthy body composition

Mitochondria, the cell's powerhouses, produce the energy needed to keep us vibrant and healthy. Healthy levels of carnitine support optimal functioning of mitochondria and your body’s energy production.

Mitochondria are the energy factories of the human cells needed to keep us vibrant, healthy, and young. Optimal functioning of mitochondria is dependent on normal levels of carnitine. However, over time these levels go far down and, as a consequence, cells produce less energy and less metabolic activity. (1)That means that our body ages much faster. The answer to this problem is carnitine supplementation because carnitine can help:To maintain activity at the cell level, that fosters the process of fat being turned into energy within the mitochondria (2)To prevent excess accumulation of cellular debris, that is responsible for cell death (3)To support a healthy concentration of nitric oxide, which helps endothelial cells relax and maintain blood flow, supporting proper blood pressure (4)To maintain healthy body fat composition, which in turn supports insulin sensitivity and healthy blood sugar levels already within normal range (5-6)To support brain cells’ natural defences against age-related memory and cognitive de-cline (7)

Supplement facts: L-Carnitine (from L-Carnitine tartrate) 500 mg
product.ingredients: L-Carnitine (from L-Carnitine tartrate) 500 mg

product.title: N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine (NAC)
product.description:
• Respiratory health: Promoting optimal breathing function & bronchial comfort
  • Liver support: Encouraging natural detoxification & healthy liver function
  • Immune function: Helping to maintain robust immune system defenses
  • Antioxidant protection: Boosting glutathione levels to guard against free radicals
  • Cellular defense: Shielding cells from oxidative stress & environmental toxins
  • Energy & well-being: Enhancing vitality & overall quality of life

N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine (NAC) delivers 600 mg of this highly absorbable nutrient per vegetarian capsule.

Health benefits at a glance:N-acetyl-L-cysteine (NAC) can support immune function, bronchial, respiratory health, and liver health. This nutrient also serves as a precursor to glutathione, a potent antioxidant in the body that protects the cells from oxidative stress.

Why it works:All-round health benefits N-acetyl-L-cysteine is a highly absorbable nutrient known for its powerful benefits for whole body health. (1,2)It plays a key role in replenishing your body's glutathione levels. N-acetyl-L-cysteine and glutathione have powerful antioxidant effects, helping to protect cells from free radicals.Respiratory, bronchial, liver & immune healthNormal liver, immune, and breathing functions are all essential to your well-being. Without a good breathing function, your body will not get the oxygen it requires to function normally. N-acetyl-L-cysteine can promote healthy respiratory function as well as bronchial health. (3,4) Furthermore, it's shown to support liver health and boost immune system health. (5,6)

The science behind the product:N-acetylcysteine is derived from the simple amino acid cysteine which can offer significant protection against a broad number of toxins. (7) These include acrolein (found in cigarette smoke and auto exhaust), paraquat (a toxic herbicide). Moreover, N-acetylcysteine helps the body synthesize glutathione. Glutathione is one of the body’s most important antioxidants because of its location within the cell, which enhances its potential to scavenge free radicals. Boosted glutathione levels have shown particularly positive effects on those people with weak immune systems. (7) Numerous placebo-controlled studies suggest that supplementing with N-acetyl-L-cysteine can positively impact energy production, well-being and quality of life. (8) Each capsule of Life Extension's N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine delivers 600 mg of this fast-absorbing nutrient.

How to use: Take one (1) capsule one to three times daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: N-acetyl-L-cysteine 600 mg
product.ingredients: N-acetyl-L-cysteine 600 mg

product.title: Glutathione, Cysteine & C
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a powerful antioxidant blend and protection from free radicals
The ingredients in Glutathione, Cysteine & C can:

  • Prevent free radicals from doing harm to your cells
  • Support collagen formation and glutathione, the master detoxifier
  • Support normal immune function

Glutathione, Cysteine & C is a blend of antioxidants and vitamin C which works synergistically to help prevent free radicals from damaging your cells while providing the health benefits of Vitamin C.

Health benefits at a glance:Glutathione, Cysteine & C is a mix of antioxidants and vitamin C, which works together in preventing free radicals from damaging your cells, and provides detoxifying agents. Furthermore, Glutathione can also help neutralize free radicals. Simultaneously, it also provides all of the many health benefits of essential Vitamin C, which supports proper iron absorption, collagen formation and more.

Why it works:Oxidative stress is believed to be a key cause of bodily aging. Toxins from the environments we as humans live and work in can be metabolized into compounds known as free radicals. Free radicals can react with normal cellular structures which in turn can cause damage and cell death. One of nature’s best defences against free radicals are antioxidants. These compounds sacrifice themselves when reacting with free radicals, preventing them from damaging your cells.Glutathione, Cysteine & C are all antioxidants and can provide a good defense against free radicals by working together, while simultaneously providing you with the health benefits of the essential vitamin C.Glutathione is one of the body’s most important and powerful antioxidants [1]. It is a multifunctional molecule which is naturally produced by your body. Glutathione is composed of three amino acids (L-glutamic acid, L-cysteine and glycine) and can be found in every cell. It can protect the cells by neutralising free radicals. Glutathione works closely together with vitamin C, which keeps glutathione in its reduced form so that it can continue to provide free radical-quenching effects [2-5].Cysteine also helps synthesize glutathione [6-9]. Cysteine plays a crucial role in many bodily functions and acts as a detoxifying agent, promoting a normal functioning immune system.Vitamin C is a vital cofactor to the formation of collagen, the connective tissue which supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth [10-12]. Vitamin C can be found in citrus fruit, and also has antioxidant properties as it can eliminate free radicals from your body and help protect tissues from oxidative stress.

The science behind the product:L-cysteine is a conditionally essential amino acid, one of only three sulfur-containing amino acids. Taurine and L-methionine are other two sulfur-containing amino acids. Cysteine plays a role in the sulfation cycle, acting as a sulfur donor in phase II detoxification and as a methyl donor in the conversion of homocysteine to methionine [13-15].Glutathione is a peptide molecule synthesized in the body from the three amino acids known as L-glutamic acid, L-cysteine and glycine. Vitamin C plays an important role to keep glutathione in its reduced form so that it can continue to provide free radical-quenching effects [2-5].Vitamin C is a white, crystalline, water-soluble substance found in citrus fruits. Vitamin C is an antioxidant which scavenges free radicals in the body and protects tissues from oxidative stress [10-12,16-20]. Vitamin C also supports the absorption of iron, while preventing its oxidation [21,22].

How to use:Take one (1) capsule one to three times daily on an empty stomach, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 500 mg Setria ® L-Glutathione (reduced) 50 mg L-Cysteine Hydrochloride 200 mg
product.ingredients: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 500 mg Setria ® L-Glutathione (reduced) 50 mg L-Cysteine Hydrochloride 200 mg

product.title: L-Arginine Caps
product.description:
You, if you want to ensure you get enough of this semi-essential amino acid 

The formula of L-Arginine Caps can:
  • Promote arterial health
  • Support healthy tissue & bones
  • Help maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels
  • Support a healthy immune system

The human body naturally produces L-arginine, and it is also obtained through diet. But some people struggle to get enough of this semi-essential amino acid through either of those routes. Life Extension's L-Arginine Caps provide 700 mg of L-arginine along with 10 mg of vitamin C to support arterial health and more. 

L-arginine is a semi-essential amino acid. It is involved in numerous areas of human biochemistry/body activities that contribute to overall health, including ammonia detoxification, hormone secretion, and immune modulation. Arginine is also well known as a precursor of nitric oxide (NO), a component that delivers messages between body cells and partly controls blood circulation. As a result, when nitric oxide is synthesized by L-arginine, the arterial system is able to retain its youthful elasticity. At the same time, the immune system becomes stronger and Arginine also helps in maintaining your bones and tissues healthy. L-ornithine, a metabolite of arginine may contribute to the latter purpose too.Some studies suggest that arginine and ornithine stimulate growth hormone (GH) evidenced by an increase in muscle strength during intense workouts. Other studies show the same effect for Ornithine alone. Some studies confirm that a combination of ornithine with acetyl-L-carnitine enhanced the GH release, while a low dose of the given combination is insignificant. The minimum dose required seems to be 5-9 grams.

Supplement facts: L-Arginine 700 mg Vitamin C (as ascorbyl palmitate) 6 mg
product.ingredients: L-Arginine 700 mg Vitamin C (as ascorbyl palmitate) 6 mg

product.title: Glycine
product.description:
• Sleep quality support: Can promote deeper, more restful sleep without daytime drowsiness
  • Calming brain effects: Encouraging relaxation & balanced nervous system function
  • Cognitive wellness: Can help maintain attention, memory & positive mood
  • Detoxification support: Helping to convert toxic substances into easily excretable forms
  • Metabolic health: Can encourage healthy glucose & fructose metabolism
  • Cellular protection: Promoting antioxidant processes & regulated oxidative stress

Glycine is the simplest yet most versatile amino acid in your body, functioning as both a protein building block and a neurotransmitter that influences brain activity. 

The simplest amino acidGlycine is the simplest and most omnipresent amino acid in your body and provides many and varied benefits. It can help maintain a healthy function of the central nervous system and promote relaxation and the normal function of muscles. Most of the glycine in the body becomes incorporated in proteins, but free glycine acts as a neurotransmitter involved in regulating appetite, behavior, and general homeostasis. Glycine has fundamental rolesThis amino acid has crucial roles in support of:Healthy gene expressionCellular antioxidant processes and regulated oxidative stress Immune system functionGrowth, developement, and survivalDetoxification, by combining with toxic substances and converting them to easy-to-excrete harmless formsGlycine for sleep, memory & moodResearch shows that, when taken before bed, this amino acid may promote healthy quality sleep without causing daytime drowsiness.While being involved in growth, glycine can have a calming effect on your brain and positively impact attention, cognition, memory, mood and mental health. Glycation, metabolism, blood pressure & moreGlycine has been demonstrated to inhibit protein glycation and production of advanced glycation end-products (AGEs). Evidence from laboratory and clinical trials shows that glycine may help support healthy glucose and fructose metabolism.Research also shows glycine may help maintain normal blood pressure. A study that included more than 4,000 subjects found higher glycine levels were correlated with cardiovascular protection and better metabolic health.Moreover, glycine has been shown to support health of the gastric and intestinal lining. And, like other one-carbon molecules, glycine has been linked to longevity.High dose glycine for optimal benefitsFor optimal effects the recommended intake for adults is one (1) to three (3) grams of glycine. Studies suggest that even much higher doses are safe to take. However, most glycine products are only available in 500 mg capsules, making them costly. For that purpose, Life Extension introduced glycine supplements in easy-to-swallow 1000 mg capsules.

Supplement facts: Glycine 1000 mg
product.ingredients: Glycine 1000 mg

product.title: D, L-Phenylalanine Capsules
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for natural support for a positive mood

The active ingredients in D, L-Phenylalanine can:

  • Promote L-tyrosine production, which is used to generate dopamine, norepinephrine & epinephrine

  • Support a healthful mood and sleep

  • Encourage a well-functioning cognitive function

  • Offer brain cells protection

D, L-Phenylalanine is a mood support supplement that contains 100 vegan capsules. Perfect for mood and stress management.

Health benefits at a glanceFirst of all, what is phenylalanine? It's an essential amino acid, which means your body can’t produce enough of it on its own, so it must come from external sources. Phenylalanine supports the production of important neurotransmitters such as dopamine, norepinephrine, and epinephrine. These hormones are often reduced by age, stress, and certain drugs and need to be replenished. Supplementing with phenylalanine can therefore offer a wide range of cognitive health benefits.Why it worksD,L-Phenylalanine is a 50/50 blend of its two forms, the stereoisomers D-phenylalanine and L-phenylalanine. These stereoisomers are converted to L-tyrosine in the liver.The process continues in the brain and adrenal glands, where L-tyrosine is converted into neurotransmitters called catecholamines, which are the healthy hormones dopamine, norepinephrine, and epinephrine (adrenaline), which again can promote mood and neurotransmitter health.

The science behind the product:The brain chemistry supportCatecholamines are a class of molecules that act as neurotransmitters and hormones in various body regions. These chemical messengers include dopamine, norepinephrine (noradrenaline), and epinephrine (adrenaline), which are derived from the amino acid tyrosine. These tyrosine-derived neurotransmitters play diverse roles in the brain and body: Epinephrine: This is made (from tyrosine) in the adrenal medulla and functions as a neurohormone and is known as adrenaline. (1)Norepinephrine: In addition to acting as a neurotransmitter that can promote healthy mood and sleep, it's known to protect brain cells by promoting a healthy inflammatory response, inhibiting oxidative stress and supporting healthy neuronal growth and connectivity. (2)Dopamine: While this hormone is often linked to reward and motivation, it's also recognized as mediator of higher-level cognitive capacities. (3,4) Phenylalanine supplementationThe decline in brain catecholamine production that occurs with aging may be a contributing factor in normal age-related cognitive decline. (3,5) Providing catecholamine precursors such as phenylalanine can promote and protect brain health. (6) The enzyme that catalyzes the conversion of tyrosine to dopamine may work more efficiently if its co-factors vitamins B6 and C are included. (7,8) Phenylalanine supplementation can promote healthy neurotransmitter synthesis, and clinical trials have demonstrated that it can encourage positive moods. (9,10) Since both norepinephrine and epinephrine can cause smooth muscle (arterial) contraction, care with blood pressure should be taken when supplementing with phenylalanine.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: D,L-phenylalanine 500 mg
product.ingredients: D,L-phenylalanine 500 mg

product.title: L-Lysine
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for an essential amino acid to fight against age-related factors

L-Lysine supplementation can:

  • Increase calcium absorption and retention

  • Promote a healthy stress response

  • Support healthy nitrogen levels

  • Inhibit glycation, which can support age-related factors

Lysine or L-Lysine is a building block for proteins, which is not produced by our body. That means that it needs to be integrated through our diet. Some people need Lysine supplementation to support calcium metabolism, which can impact bone and vascular health, and to encourage a healthy stress response, among other benefits.

What is lysine, or L-lysine? It's an essential amino acid that the body can’t produce on its own and must obtain through the diet. It plays a vital role in protein synthesis and works together with other essential amino acids to support growth, maintain lean body mass, and help preserve the body's nitrogen balance. While most people consume adequate amounts of lysine, intake may be lower in some plant-based diets, particularly if foods such as beans and lentils are not consumed regularly. Athletes and highly active individuals may also have increased requirements for essential amino acids. Research shows that supplementation with lysine can support healthy calcium metabolism, helping the body use calcium effectively to maintain strong bones and healthy blood vessels. Lysine has also been studied for its role in promoting eye health and protecting tissues from the effects of glycation. Moreover, lysine may help promote a healthy stress response. Studies have shown that lysine, especially when combined with arginine, can help support normal hormonal responses to stress and contribute to overall well-being.

Supplement facts: L-Lysine (as L-Lysine HCl) 620 mg
product.ingredients: L-Lysine (as L-Lysine HCl) 620 mg

This hormone cares for the connection between nerve cells and is naturally found in the brain and digestive tract. Serotonin positively impacts your mood and sleep. To produce and maintain optimum serotonin levels your body requires tryptophan, an amino acid your body cannot produce. The basis for Optimized Tryptophan Plus is premium L-tryptophan that has undergone significantly more rigorous manufacturing processes than regular tryptophan material. This is to ensure the highest quality – to powerfully support healthy tryptophan levels in your body. In addition to an optimal amount of high-quality L-tryptophan, this formula has been enriched with nutrients that assist in maintaining your body's tryptophan activity.

product.title: Alpha-Lipoic Acid with Biotin
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a universal antioxidant with many validated benefits

The Powerful Nutrients in Alpha-Lipoic Acid with Biotin can:

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is alpha-lipoic acid? Alpha-lipoic acid is an antioxidant produced naturally in the body. It can also be obtained from healthy foods like spinach, broccoli and beets. (1)Being successfully used in Europe, Alpha-lipoic acid can support energy production and sugar metabolism and, by binding to metals, help your body get rid of ingested toxins. According to research, damage caused by free radicals is a major issue that leads to the aging of our organs. Alpha-lipoic acid can be very effective in eliminating free radicals and, by extension, delaying the aging process.

Why it works:Alpha-lipoic acid has been called the universal antioxidant due to its ability to act in both, the extra-cellular fluid and the cell, and can boost glutathione levels (2). This antioxidant may also provide benefits for the liver, nerves and can protect against oxidation. It can also promote healthy function of mitochondria, your cells’ energy generators. Research indicates that lipoic acid supplementation can help support the body’s ability to process blood sugars and insulin, and support nerve health. (3)This formula also contains biotin, a B-vitamin that complements lipoic acid’s role in supporting metabolic health. (4)

The science behind the product:One of the most beneficial activities of alpha-lipoic acid is to enhance the functions of other essential antioxidants, by recycling them. This seems to be achieved by, for example, quenching tocopherol radicals or by reducing vitamin C, or increasing the levels of ubiquinol (a derivative of CoQ10) and glutathione. These steps help to regenerate vitamin E. In clinical studies there have been no reported serious side effects, even at high doses. Some patients have experienced allergic skin reactions and possible hypoglycaemia in diabetics. R-lipoic acid is biologically more active than alpha-lipoic acid, with slightly higher costs.Lipoic acid is a tried-and-true supplement that has been around a long time. Many clinical studies have validated its benefits. For instance, it’s been shown to improve markers of metabolic health and to support the health of the delicate cells that line the inside of blood vessels called endothelial cells. (5,6)Get the antioxidant benefits of alpha-lipoic acid with the added support of biotin in a twice-a-day capsule form to promote liver and nerve health and protect against oxidation.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Buffered Vitamin C Powder
product.description:
For you, if you want a higher dose of vitamin C that is non-irritating to the stomach and intestinal lining

The nutrients in buffered Vitamin C Powder can:
  • Help reduce oxidative stress
  • Support collagen formation and promote proper iron absorption
  • Use essential minerals (calcium, zinc, magnesium and potassium) to produce a reduced-acid and non-irritating solution

Buffered Vitamin C powder contains essential Vitamin C which can help reduce oxidative stress, support collagen formation and support the immune system, while it simultaneously brings essential minerals calcium, magnesium, zinc and potassium into the mix.

Health benefits at a glance:Buffered Vitamin C powder contains the essential Vitamin C nutrient which can help reduce oxidative stress, support collagen formation, promote iron absorption and support the immune system.Simultaneously Buffered Vitamin C also contains the essential minerals calcium, magnesium, zinc and potassium to produce a reduced-acid solution that is non-irritating to the stomach and intestinal lining.

Why it works:Vitamin C is an essential mineral that the body cannot produce, and is required at higher-than-normal levels during times of stress [1-4]. Vitamin C is a white, crystalline, water-soluble substance found in citrus fruits. As an antioxidant, vitamin C can scavenge free radicals in the body and helps protect tissues from oxidative stress as well as support the immune system [5-12]. Vitamin C also promotes the absorption of iron, while inhibiting its oxidation in the body [13,14]. Furthermore, Vitamin C is a vital cofactor to the formation of collagen, the connective tissue that supports arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth [8-10]. It can also help aid physical stresses on the body such as ingestion of heavy metals [15-20] cigarette smoking [21-24] and extreme temperatures [25-30] also signal the need for increased vitamin C intake [31].Vitamin C Powder contains four buffering minerals, in addition to ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) which promotes whole-body health. When mixed with water, Buffered Vitamin C powder produces a reduced-acid solution that is non-irritating to the stomach and intestinal lining. The minerals make this solution a more pleasant-tasting and healthful drink. The substances used in this product make it effervesce for a short while when mixed with water.

The science behind the product:The human body does not produce vitamin C which must be received from foods and supplements [32]. Vitamin C levels may drop during stress situations [32], why higher vitamin C intake can be necessary during times of stress [1-4]. A lack of vitamin C has been linked to duration of colds along with immune system problems [32]. A lack of vitamin C can broadly affect various key aspects of maintaining a proper immune function [32].Studies suggest that vitamin C is crucial for normal formation of bone proteins. And it also shows that intake of the vitamin C plays a role in preventing bone loss [32].

How to use:Mix one (1) teaspoon of BUFFERED VITAMIN C POWDER into a glass of water.Wait for the fizz to stop before consuming.The minerals buffer out the normally acidic vitamin C to make a pleasant tasting drink.To ensure product consistency store tightly closed in a cool, dry place.When mixed with water, the substances used in this product give bubbles off for a short while.

product.title: Citicoline (CDP-Choline)
product.description:
• Cognitive function: Can help maintain youthful mental clarity & processing
  • Memory support: Promoting optimal recall & attention throughout the day
  • Neurotransmitter production: Encouraging acetylcholine synthesis for brain communication
  • Brain barrier access: Can readily cross into brain where cells utilize it
  • Mood balance: Can help maintain positive emotional well-being
  • Cell membrane health: Supporting phosphatidylcholine production for nerve function & repair

Citicoline (CDP-Choline) delivers a highly absorbable form of choline that readily passes through the blood-brain barrier.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is CDP-choline? CDP-choline stands for cytidine-5’-diphosphate choline and is an essential nutrient involved in many physiological processes such as communication within and between our cells. Choline is also required for the structural integrity of cell membranes.Despite the fact that our body can produce the substance in small quantities, a substantial portion of the population consumes inadequate amounts of choline, and dietary intake of the nutrient becomes increasingly important for brain health as we age. (1,2)

Why it works:Choline is a substance needed by our brains to produce acetylcholine, a major brain/motor neurotransmitter that facilitates communication between neurons – a basic part of healthy brain function. This neurotransmitter is essential to healthy cognition, attention, memory function and more. Unfortunately, our brain cells absorb less choline as we age.Citicoline (CDP-Choline) can provide a form of choline that readily passes through the blood-brain barrier (BBB) directly into the brain, where cells can easily use it to nourish cellular membranes and support neurotransmitter production.

The science behind the product:CDP-choline can promote the synthesis of neurotransmitters, particularly acetylcholine, in the brain, which is believed to explain many of its beneficial effects. (3)In the brain, choline serves as a precursor to acetylcholine, a major neurotransmitter that is important for signal transmission between nerves and implicated in cognitive processing.CDP-choline is also a neuroprotectant and a promoter of neuroplasticity, with a track record of supporting healthy cognition, memory and overall function in numerous clinical trials. (3-5)In addition to its clinically studied brain power benefits in older adults, low doses of citicoline have been shown to support a healthy mood. (6)CDP-choline can also support phosphatidylcholine production, an important phospholipid for nerve growth, function, and cellular membrane repair. (3)

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: PS Caps
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in nutrients to support brain health, memory, focus and attention

The nutrients found in PS Caps can:
  • Promote healthy cognitive function
  • Support healthy memory, focus, attention and concentration
  • Encourage cognitive performance
Phosphatidylserine (PS) is a key component of healthy nerve cell membranes and is a particularly essential part of the brain cell membranes. Supplemental PS can cross the blood-brain barrier and support optimal structure and function of brain cells.

What is phosphatidylserine? Phosphatidylserine (PS) is an essential component of healthy nerve cell membranes and is an especially important part of the membranes of brain cells. (1) Why PS supplement works Supplemental PS is shown to cross the blood-brain barrier and support the optimal structure and function of brain cells. In this way, phosphatidylserine can promote healthy memory, focus, attention, concentration, and cognition. (2) It has been demonstrated in clinical trials that PS supplementation can support cognitive performance, as well as memory and attention. (3,4)

product.title: Acetyl-L-Carnitine
product.description:
• Cellular energy: Converting dietary fats into usable energy for cells & muscles
  • Brain & memory: Can promote youthful cognitive function & mental clarity
  • Mitochondria: Helping to maintain optimal structure & function of cellular powerhouses
  • Nerve health: Supporting comfort & central nervous system health
  • Mood: Can help maintain positive mood & overall well-being
  • Anti-aging: Fighting oxidative damage & restoring key enzyme activity

Acetyl-L-Carnitine is a specialized form of L-carnitine that can cross the blood-brain barrier, making it particularly effective for cognitive and neurological support.

What is acetyl-L-carnitine?Acetyl-L-carnitine is a form of L-carnitine that can help to decrease the effects associated with aging. L-carnitine a derivative of amino acids, is found in nearly all body cells. Its main role is to turn fat into energy by assisting in the transport of fatty acids into the mitochondria, the energy powerhouses of our cells. Under normal circumstances, it is produced by our bodies. However, aging causes a decline in the production of cell energy. Acetyl-L-carnitine and L-carnitine are absorbed into the bloodstream efficiently. Both of them are effective at promoting the burning of fatty acids for energy production and are efficiently used by cells. (1-5)This form of carnitine can also cross the blood-brain barrier and guard against oxidative damage and against toxins, like amyloid-beta peptide, in the brain. The benefits of acetyl-L-carnitineIt may support youthful memory function, improve mitochondrial structure and function, inhibit age-related oxidative damage and restore the activity of key enzymes.Acetyl-L-carnitine can also have wide-ranging benefits for nervous system wellness, including the central and peripheral nervous systems, and cognitive health, as well as positive mood. (6-11) It has been shown to promote peripheral nervous system comfort and support healthy mood, energy, and overall well-being. (12-17)

product.title: DMAE Bitartrate
product.description:
For you, if you wish to support the body's production of the neurotransmitter involved in memory and learning

The active ingredients in DMAE Bitartrate can:

  • Support memory and learning

  • Encourage cell building and rejuvenation

  • Promote the rejuvenation of mitochondrial membranes

  • Help maintain youthful brain function

  • Promote free radical scavenging activity

DMAE (2-dimethylaminoethanol) is a compound that the body uses to make choline, needed for the production of acetylcholine, the main neurotransmitter needed for memory and learning. DMAE can also encourage the protection of cell membranes by supporting the production of phosphatidylcholine.

DMAE for Memory, Learning & Brain functionDMAE (2-dimethylaminoethanol) is a precursor, a compound the body uses to make choline. Choline is needed for optimal production of acetylcholine, which is the main neurotransmitter involved in memory and learning.Choline is also needed to synthesize the phospholipid phosphatidylcholine. Phosphatidylcholine concentrates in the brain, and maintaining healthy levels of brain phospholipids may be an important strategy for youthful brain function during aging. (2-4)DMAE for Cell & Mitochondrial MembranesCell membrane integrity is crucial to every structure and function in your body. Phosphatidylcholine, supported by DMAE, is used to build and rejuvenate cell and mitochondrial membranes. DMAE has also shown the ability to neutralize free radicals, which may add to its ability to protect cell membrane integrity. (1)

product.title: Bifido GI Balance
product.description:
For you, if you want to promote a healthy intestinal environment for whole-body health

What are Probiotics?Probiotics are live microorganisms, and the name literally means “for life”. Traditional diets (like the Mediterranean diet) with foods that contain probiotics have been shown to promote health and longevity. They are key role in promoting healthy digestion and supporting the optimal functioning of a wide range of body systems. (1) Extensively Studied for Gut HealthDifferent probiotics have distinct functions and need to be carefully formulated to target specific health concerns. (2) Bifidobacteria, a specific group of probiotic bacteria, offer many positive effects on the gastrointestinal (GI) tract and overall body health. (3-4) This formula includes the strain Bifidobacterium longum BB536®, which has been shown in multiple clinical studies to promote a healthy intestinal environment and balance of microorganisms in the gut, known as the microbiota, which benefits overall health. (6-9) Other Great Health BenefitsB. longum BB536® is one of the most studied probiotics for its positive effects on immune health, including supporting the body's defense against seasonal immune challenges. (7) Moreover, B. longum BB536® is also shown to support a healthy inflammatory response. Each capsule of Bifido GI Balance contains two billion colony-forming units (CFUs) of viable, healthy bacteria.

product.title: Extraordinary Enzymes
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a healthy digestion supplement to facilitate optimal nutrient absorption

The unique blend of 12 clinically-studied enzymes contained in Extraordinary Enzymes can:

  • Support healthy digestion and optimal nutrient absorption

  • Facilitate the digestion of foods that cause discomfort

  • Assist the conversion of food into energy

  • Minimize post-meal issues

Extraordinary Enzymes consists of a powerful blend of 12 clinically-studied enzymes, that can facilitate healthy digestion, especially after large meals. It can tackle foods that are hard to digest, helping in the digestion of proteins, fibers, carbohydrates, and fat.

Please note that this product has a limited shelf life. The product is sold with a minimum shelf life of 6 months and a maximum of 12 months.Human studies suggest that supplementary enzymes may improve digestion and help minimize post-meal issues. Since proteins, plant fibres, and fats are broken down differently, a proper spectrum of enzymes is necessary for optimal digestion.Extraordinary Enzymes provides a potent array of enzymes, formulated to adapt to a variety of stomach acid pH conditions and support digestion. With a total of twelve different enzymes, this unique formula supports the digestion of any food that causes you discomfort. It also assists in converting food into energy and absorbing nutrients more efficiently. Unlike commercial supplements, Extraordinary Enzymes does not contain amylase. The reason is that amylase breaks down starches into glucose, which is rapidly absorbed into the bloodstream.Extraordinary Enzymes facilitates the digestion of healthy vegetables that are often avoided because of digestive discomfort.Most people need one capsule before the two heaviest meals, which provides 400 mg of natural digestive enzymes each day.

product.title: Esophageal Guardian
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in protecting your esophagus from stomach acids

The ingredients in Esophageal Guardian (Berry) can:
  • Protect your delicate esophageal tissues against harsh stomach acid
  • Fast acting and long lasting support against gastric distress
  • All-natural, clinically validated approach

Many individuals have tried different remedies in an attempt to soothe their digestive tracts. Some still have an issue with gastric distress, resulting in discomfort along the oesophagus. A novel solution is now available in the form of what scientists call raft-forming alginate. This blend of natural ingredients in Oesophageal Guardian protects the oesophagus against stomach acids in a unique way. The mechanism behind Oesophageal Guardian involves the formation of a temporary physical barrier between the stomach and the oesophagus. Alginic acid forms a gel with a foam layer that sits above the contents of the stomach.Two other natural ingredients in this formula, calcium carbonate and magnesium carbonate‚ create lift in the foam and make it firmer. This foam barrier has been proven to offer maximum support to the oesophagus, while neutralising stomach acid.The foam barrier develops in less than a minute after chewing and swallowing two natural berry flavour tablets of Oesophageal Guardian. The relief it provides lasts for up to 4 hours. Quite simply, Oesophageal Guardian Natural Berry Flavour delivers the fastest-acting, longest-lasting and most advanced technology available to support delicate oesophageal and stomach tissues against gastric distress.

product.title: Eye Pressure Support with Mirtogenol®
product.description:
• Eye pressure: Can help maintain pressure already within normal range
  • Blood flow: Bilberry & pine bark supporting circulation to eyes
  • Vision health: Plant nutrients protecting delicate eye vessels & tissues

This vegetarian formula features Mirtogenol®, combining European bilberry and French maritime pine bark extracts. Studies show up to 24% reduction in already-healthy eye pressure.

The importance of eye health supportThe eye is one of the most sensitive organs in the human body. As you grow older, the fluid contained within the chambers of your eyes may gradually and imperceptibly increase.This has been shown to contribute to many unwanted age-related vision issues. Get help maintaining healthy eye pressure with targeted support!An advanced eye nutrient formulaAt the core of Mirtogenol®’s eye health-promoting power are two plant-based ingredients: Mirtoselect® European bilberry extractPycnogenol® French Maritime Pine bark extractIn a study, this Mirtogenol® extract blend showed up to a 24% reduction in already-healthy eye pressure. (1)Eye Pressure Support with Mirtogenol® benefitsThe premium extract Pycnogenol® is known to promote endothelial nitric oxide synthase (eNOS), the enzyme responsible for producing nitric oxide. Nitric oxide can help relax blood vessels, enable efficient blood flow throughout the body.The combination of European bilberry and French maritime pine bark can:Support healthy blood flow throughout the body, including the the tiny vessels of your eyes.Promote healthy fluid pressure inside the ocular chamber, helping to maintain eye pressure already within the normal range. (1-5)

product.title: Vitamin B3 Niacin
product.description:
• Cardiovascular health: Maintains cholesterol levels already within normal range for heart health
  • Energy conversion: Supports efficient transformation of food into cellular energy & vitality
  • Metabolism support: Promotes breakdown of carbs, fats & alcohol for optimal nutrient use
  • Blood lipid balance: Encourages healthy lipid profiles already within the normal range

Vitamin B3 Niacin delivers 500 mg of this essential B vitamin per capsule.

Health benefits at a glance: Niacin is known as vitamin B3 because it was the third B vitamin identified. Since the 1950s, it has been recognized for its ability to help maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels, making it one of the most researched nutrients for cardiovascular support. Each capsule of our Vitamin B3 Niacin delivers 500 mg of this vital nutrient.

Why it works: Niacin, or vitamin B3, offers a wide range of health benefits. Research shows it supports the metabolism of glucose, fats, and alcohol, helps maintain cholesterol levels already within the normal range, and promotes cellular energy production.

The science behind the product: Niacin is the sole B vitamin that can be synthesized in the liver from the amino acid tryptophan. On average, 1 mg of niacin can be synthesized from the ingestion of 60 mg of tryptophan. Key benefits of vitamin B3 (niacin): Cell energy – as a vitamin B coenzyme, niacin is central to the metabolic pathways that produce energy at the cellular level. Efficient metabolism – B3 is required for breaking down dietary fat, carbohydrates, and alcohol. (1,2) Cholesterol – the beneficial effects of niacin on blood lipids are also well-documented, helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range. (3,4)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: D-Ribose Powder
product.description:
For you, if you wish to support cellular energy production and heart health

The carbohydrate molecule found in D-Ribose Powder can:

  • Help speed energy recovery

  • Promote increased energy reserves

  • Maintain healthy energy levels in heart and muscle tissue

  • Promote cellular energy production

ATP (adenosine triphosphate) is a key molecule for the promotion of cellular energy flow. D-ribose is a carbohydrate molecule found in every living organism, essential to support the production of ATP. In studies of healthy athletes, supplying fatigued muscle cells with D-ribose quickly restored cell energy to normal levels.

The primary source of energy for all cellular processes is a molecule known as ATP (adenosine triphosphate). Healthy active cells constantly replenish their supply of ATP to produce vital cellular energy.However, under conditions of stress, injury, or aging, critical body tissues, such as the heart and skeletal muscles, cannot produce ATP quickly enough for optimal performance. D-ribose, a carbohydrate molecule found in every living organism, facilitates the production of ATP.In studies conducted on healthy athletes, supplying cells with D-ribose quickly restored ATP levels to normal. By helping to rapidly refill depleted energy, it may be especially beneficial for heart health.D-Ribose Powder and D-Ribose Tablets can help speed up energy recovery, increase energy reserves, and maintain healthy energy levels in heart and muscle tissue

  • Help speed energy recovery

D-ribose is a carbohydrate molecule found in every living organism, essential to support the production of ATP. In studies of healthy athletes, supplying fatigued muscle cells with D-ribose quickly restored cell energy to normal levels.

The primary source of energy for all cellular processes is a molecule known as ATP (adenosine triphosphate). Healthy active cells constantly replenish their supply of ATP to produce vital cellular energy.However, under conditions of stress, injury, or aging, critical body tissues, such as the heart and skeletal muscles, cannot produce ATP quickly enough for optimal performance. product.title: TMG Powder
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in supporting cardiovascular health

The innovative formula of TMG Powder can:

  • Encourage healthy homocysteine levels

  • Help inhibit inflammatory factors to promote cardiovascular health

  • Support already-healthy blood pressure levels

  • Promote whole-body health

  • Support healthy mitochondrial function

Trimethylglycine (TMG) has been known as a heart-healthy amino acid compound since the 1950s. That’s more than 50 years of scientific research to rely upon.

If you want capsules instead of powder, you can find it here

Health benefits at a glance:First of all; what is TMG? Trimethylglycine (TMG), also known as glycine betaine, refers to three methyl groups attached to each molecule of glycine.When a TMG methyl group is donated to a molecule of homocysteine, it becomes a beneficial amino acid, methionine.Wheat bran is the main dietary source of TMG, with smaller amounts available in other cereal grains. (1) TMG can also be made in the body from choline, an essential nutrient found in eggs, soybeans, and many other foods. (2,3)While working to promote healthy levels of homocysteine, alone or in conjunction with other nutrients, TMG has been attested as an important nutrient for cardiovascular health.

Why it works:TMG has been linked to heart health by supporting already-healthy homocysteine levels to promote healthy cardiovascular function. (7,9)By having a positive impact on your homocysteine levels, TMG can help you stay healthy by supporting multiple systems throughout your body.TMG has also been associated with healthy blood pressure and mitochondrial function. (2,10-12) Moreover, it has also been found to promote healthy liver function. (13)

The science behind the product:In the 1950s, TMG was discovered to be beneficial to the heart, and it seems to function similarly as some of the B vitamins (B6, B12, and folate). And like B vitamins, TMG is a methyl donor, providing extra methyl groups to hasten the conversion of homocysteine back to methionine. (4-6)When a TMG methyl group is donated to a molecule of homocysteine, it converts it to the non-toxic amino acid, methionine. (7)The role of TMG in healthy homocysteine metabolism is even more important when B vitamin levels are low. (8) Some evidence suggests TMG may be more efficient at regulating homocysteine levels than folate. (9)Research showing TMG's ability to promote healthy levels of homocysteine already within normal range, alone or in conjunction with other nutrients, confirms its status as an important nutrient for cardiovascular and overall health. (7,9)Studies show TMG can support a healthy inflammatory response by inhibiting the expression of NFkappaB, TNF-alpha, and other inflammatory proteins, which may partially explain its positive impacts. (14)Because intestinal microbes can make various by-products from TMG, the health of the gut microbiome influences the effects of TMG in the body. (15,16)If you want TMG capsules instead of powder, you can find it here

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: No Flush Niacin
product.description:
For you, if you want the benefits from a niacin supplement, but without the potential flushing

The nutrients in No Flush Niacin can:

  • Provide niacin activity with no flush experience

    Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is niacin? It's a coenzyme that is called “B3” because it was the third B vitamin to be discovered.Niacin has many benefits, among others to help metabolize the foods you eat and promote healthy cellular energy production.No-Flush Niacin can allow true niacin activity without the characteristic niacin flush.

    Why it works: Niacin (vitamin B3) is an essential nutrient with important functions for maintaining cardiovascular, neurological and overall health.Niacin supplements containing nicotinic acid can cause uncomfortable flushing, though. The special form of niacin used in No Flush Niacin, inositol hexanicotinate, can help deliver the niacin in a way that it doesn't cause the flushing many people experience.

    The science behind the product:How inositol hexanicotinate worksNo Flush Niacin contains inositol hexanicotinate, a special form of niacin. Inositol hexanicotinate consists of six molecules of niacin chemically linked to an inositol molecule. Some of the ingested inositol hexanicotinate is hydrolyzed in the body to slowly release free niacin and inositol. (1,2)However, because much of it remains intact in the body, it's thought that inositol hexanicotinate may exert direct effects in addition to those of its constituent inositol and niacin fractions, without causing the characteristic niacin flush. (2)More facts about vitamin B3 niacinMetabolism: Niacin is a water-soluble nutrient crucial to energy transfer reactions, particularly the ones that help your body metabolize glucose (sugar), fat and alcohol. (3,4) Vitamin B3 is required for the body to utilize dietary fats and carbohydrates and to metabolize alcohol. (3,4)Cellular energy:Vitamin B coenzymes (such as niacin) are crucial to the metabolic pathways that generate cellular energy. (4) Niacin helps metabolize the foods you eat and promotes healthy cellular energy production.Cholesterol: Niacin can have beneficial effects on blood lipids, helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range. (5,6) This attribute was identified in the 1950s. This makes niacin one of the most-studied nutrients for this purpose.

    How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Advanced Lipid Control
product.description:
For you, if you want to nurture your heart health by being proactive about cholesterol and triglyceride levels

The Powerful Formula of Advanced Lipid Control can:

  • Help maintain healthy cholesterol & triglyceride levels

  • Promote a healthy inflammatory response, important for cardiovascular health

  • Provide antioxidant protection to help fight oxidative stress to support your cardiovascular system

  • Encourage healthy endothelial function

Advanced Lipid Control contains 500 mg of amla, an extract of Indian gooseberry that can promote overall heart health and help maintain healthy cholesterol as well as triglyceride levels.

Healthy benefits at a glance:Heart health should be on everyone’s mind, and when we become older, it is more difficult for us to keep our blood lipid levels under control.Researchers have studied amla fruit extract, an extract of Indian gooseberry, and found it to support endothelial function, as well as help maintain healthy cholesterol and triglyceride levels.Amla is also shown to fight oxidative stress, which in turn can support a healthy vascular endothelium, the delicate inner lining of your arteries and veins.

Why it works:Each dose of Advanced Lipid Control contains 500 mg Capros® amla.This standardized extract contains tannins that have been shown to promote healthy endothelial function, support a healthy inflammatory response, fight oxidative stress, and help maintain healthy levels of all three key blood lipids, LDL, high-density lipoprotein (HDL), and triglycerides, as well as C-reactive protein. (1-7)Science behind the product:In a 12-week clinical trial, individuals were divided into three groups. One group took a placebo twice daily, another took 250 mg of amla extract twice daily, and the third group took 500 mg of amla extract twice daily. In the group taking 500 mg twice daily of amla extract, reported (5). LDL cholesterol decreased 21,8% Protective HDL increased 22,2% Triglycerides decreased 19,2% Total cholesterol decreased 11,1%

product.title: Forskolin
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in supporting cell energy, metabolism, and heart health

The formula of Forskolin can:

What Is forskolin? It's a compound extracted from Coleus forskohlii, an ancient medicinal plant. Forskolin's basic mechanism of action is the activation of an enzyme, adenylate cyclase. This enzyme increases cyclic adenosine monophosphate (cAMP) in cells. The cAMP compound is crucial for healthy cellular function, perhaps the most important cell-regulating compound in your body. This is because cAMP supports communication between cells in response to extra-cellular stimuli.Cellular cardiovascular, and metabolic health Activating cAMP and maintaining healthy levels and function of cAMP has been shown to help maintain cellular signaling and healthy cell energy, promote cardiovascular and metabolic health, support healthy cell division in skin and other tissues.It may also help maintain a healthy weight. Cellular nutrient with clinical studies In clinical and laboratory research, forskolin has been shown to support cardiac muscle strength, normal blood vessel dilation and healthy cerebral blood flow.Extracts of Coleus forskohlii have also been found to support healthy fat metabolism and body composition, support normal immune activity in skin and stabilize airway openness.

product.title: CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract
product.description:
For you, if you want to support maintaining healthy glucose and insulin levels 

People who try to limit carbohydrate exposure can still experience higher-than-desired blood sugar levels throughout the day. The reason is that blood sugar can surge to high levels after meals. This high level can last for hours, even a day!Studies show that in people with normal fasting glucose levels, maintaining healthy glucose levels after meals may provide additional support for cardiovascular and metabolic health. CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract is a non-GMO supplement that can help maintain already-healthy glucose and insulin levels after meals.Green coffee extract addresses this widespread problem, by limiting the blood sugar rise after a meal. This is made possible by a green coffee compound, chlorogenic that inhibits the release of an enzyme responsible for excess glucose in the blood. Another means by which chlorogenic acid helps is by inhibiting an intestinal enzyme that breaks apart complex sugars and enhance their absorption into the bloodstream. Studies show that gaining control of after-meal surges may provide additional support for cardiovascular and metabolic health.Why CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract? Coffee originates from a berry grown on trees. Its green seeds become coffee beans that have a higher amount of phenolic acids than the berry. Many benefits of the coffee beans are destroyed during the roasting process. CoffeeGenic® Green Coffee Extract (GCA®) is produced from organically grown green Arabica coffee beans through a patented extraction process. The resulting GCA® (green coffee extract) is standardised to 50% chlorogenic acids for maximum potency, maximum effect in helping to maintain healthy glucose levels. A 200 mg clinical dose of this extract was shown to induce a 14% drop in glucose spikes within 30 minutes after meals. This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program. Results may vary.

product.title: Optimized Garlic
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in product with multiple health benefits for the body

Garlic has been valued for centuries for its many beneficial abilities. Garlic is known throughout the world as an amazing flavor enhancer, but it also boasts multiple health benefits for the body. As an important cell detoxifier, it contains compounds that prevent the formation of blood clots in your body. Among other health benefits are stimulating immunity and lowering inflammatory activity. Clinical studies show that as much as 5-10 grams of garlic extract is effective in enhancing human immune responses. Optimised Garlic capsules contain 10,000 ppm allicin, a key health-promoting component of non-aged garlic. In fact, studies have highlighted allicin’s involvement in immune response and oxidative stress.

product.title: Super Bio-Curcumin® Turmeric Extract
product.description:
• Immune & inflammatory balance: Can regulate your body's inflammatory response & support immune function
  • Brain & cognitive health: Can promote healthy brain function with neuroprotective benefits
  • Joint comfort: Can encourage joint mobility & overall physical well-being
  • Antioxidant protection: Can fight free radicals & support cellular health
  • Digestive wellness: Can promote healthy bowel function & digestive system support
  • Hormone balance: Can maintain stable hormone levels & protect against estrogen-mimicking chemicals

Super Bio-Curcumin® Turmeric Extract delivers high-potency curcumin with up to 7 times better absorption than conventional supplements.

Health benefits at a glance:Use the curcumin extract in Super Bio-Curcumin® to help support your immune- and inflammatory response regulation and benefit from the many other health benefits that extracts from the superfood turmeric can bring to your body.Super Bio-Curcumin® Turmeric Extract contains unique curcumin extract that is absorbed up to 7 times more easily and stays twice as long in your bloodstream as conventional curcumin supplements.

Why it works:Turmeric, where curcumin comes from, is no less than a true superfood. Curcumin extracts can inhibit inflammatory factors in the body, support your digestive function, and encourage healthy cell division. It can also contribute to maintaining normal, healthy brain (1-11), platelet, and pancreatic function. (12-17)And while doing all of this, it can also help to fight free radicals (12,18) and encourage the maintenance of a stable hormone balance.Life Extension's ultra-potent curcumin formula contains the highly-absorbable BCM-95® extract, which brings out the maximum health benefits of curcumin.

The science behind the product:Curcumin promotes your body's healthy response to inflammation by inhibiting key inflammatory factors such as NF-kappaB. This is a protein molecule that acts like an "on-switch" in genes governing the body's pro-inflammatory responses. In relation to this, curcumin has been shown to exert powerful inhibitory effects on NF-kappaB activation. (19-24)Furthermore, clinical trials suggest that curcumin can promote healthy bowel function and joint health. (10, 25-34)Moreover, curcumin can also benefit your mind. Curcumin extract can promote the health of the immune system by inhibiting histamine release from mast cells. (18,35-38) In some studies, curcumin supported healthy brain function and offered neuroprotective benefits. (1-11)Curcumin also supports pancreatic function by encouraging pancreatic islet health. Curcumin's multifaceted benefits even include antioxidant (39-40) protection as well as hormone balance support.Finally, research indicates that curcumin can help protect against estrogen-mimicking chemicals (41-46), inhibit free radicals, and promote normal cell growth.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Rhodiola Extract
product.description:
• Cellular energy: Can promote ATP production in mitochondria for natural vitality
  • Physical performance: Can enhance endurance & resilience for active lifestyles
  • Mental clarity: Can support memory, focus & cognitive function under stress
  • Stress adaptation: Can help your body manage physical & mental stressors effectively
  • Fatigue relief: Can fight tiredness by optimizing cellular energy metabolism

Rhodiola Extract features authentic Rhodiola rosea standardized to 3% rosavins and 1% salidroside, matching the concentrations used in clinical research. 

Health benefits at a glance:Rhodiola (Rhodiola rosea) can help optimize ATP production in the mitochondria. Clinical studies show it can increase both physical and mental performance.This formula uses only authentic rhodiola rosea species, two potent compounds found in the rhodiola extract used in clinical trials.Why it worksA common complaint among older adults is the loss of physical and mental energy. As people age, their cells produce less energy, and cientists believe it to be a critical factor behind many health problems. (1,2)Rhodiola has demonstrated a remarkable ability to promote production of cellular energy and fight fatigue. This is made possible by enhancing the activity of mitochondria, the powerhouses of the cells, providing more of the energy the whole body requires for everyday function. (3)

The science behind the product:Physical & mental performanceClinical trials suggest that Rhodiola rosea can promote both physical capacity and cognitive function. (4-8) This includes enhancing endurance and resiliency, associative thinking, memory, focus, calculation, and audio/visual perception speeds. (7,9) A healthy stress responseRhodiola is an adaptogen, which means that it can impact the body's stress response in a healthy way. (6,8,10-12). Research shows that it can help handle daily physical and mental stressors more effectively. Clinically studied, standardized extractRhodiola Extract contains an extract standardized to 3% rosavins and a no less of 1% salidroside, matching the concentrations used in research. (7)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Venotone
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a way to combat leg discomfort caused by water retention

Thehorse chestnut extract in Venotone can:
  • Encourage healthy vascular function
  • Fight water retention
  • Promote leg comfort
  • Offer veno-protective properties

Scientific studies on escin, a bioactive compound found in horse chestnut, have shown its veno-protective properties and its ability to help combat water retention. This horse chestnut seed extract contains escin to help maintain healthy vascular function and promote healthy fluid balance.

Venotone is an extract of horse chestnut, which has been standardized to ensure the highest quality, consistency, and biological activity. Horse chestnut extract can support a healthy fluid balance, help the veins, and protect the other blood vessels as well. Moreover, it has also antioxidant properties. The key active ingredient in horse chestnut is a substance, called escin.

product.title: Melatonin, 3 mg
product.description:
• Restful sleep: Can help you fall asleep faster & promote regenerative sleep cycles.
  • Cellular protection: Powerful antioxidant that can combat harmful free radicals effectively.
  • Immune support: Can help activate T-helper cells & strengthen immune response.
  • Cognitive health: Can protect brain cells from oxidative stress & age-related decline.
  • DNA protection: Can shield cellular DNA from damaging free radicals throughout your body.
  • Circadian rhythm: Can help balance your internal clock for optimal sleep patterns.

Melatonin, 3 mg delivers an immediate-release formula that can help you establish healthy sleep patterns and support overall wellness.

Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Your sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports.Natural production of this hormone declines with age. (1-3) This can disturb your circadian rhythm and, as a result thereof, your quality of sleep. (4-6) Research shows that it does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health.

Why it works:Melatonin is a hormone that is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock”. (7,8) Melatonin is primarily synthesized in your pineal gland and is released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, studies show that it also has many other health advantages: Sleep support The body’s own production of melatonin is reduced with the natural aging process. That’s why supplementation with this hormone can be a natural solution for people in advanced age who have trouble sleeping. Supplementing with this hormone can help people who deal with sleep trouble and help them balance their circadian rhythm. Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl), and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it also supports other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it provides protection against a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11) Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin can therefore support the immune system as a whole. (12,13) Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20)

The science behind the product:Melatonin can be delivered in a variety of ways, from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery.This melatonin product contains a high 3 mg dose of immediate-release melatonin. The immediate-release form of melatonin can help initiate sleep faster and induce more restful and regenerative sleep.

How to use:Take one (1) capsule 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Melatonin is naturally secreted from the pineal gland at night, and should be taken at night for optimal results.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders).Use caution if combining with alcohol.This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant.Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Supplement facts: Melatonin 3 mg
product.ingredients: Melatonin 3 mg
