product.title: Optimized Fucoidan with Maritech® 926
product.description:
For you, if you want the Japanese diet's traditionally daily amount of fucoidan served in a single capsule

The fucoidan in Optimized Fucoidan with Maritech® 926 can:

  • Promote a healthy immune function

  • Provide a product extracted with water to preserve the seaweed’s nutritional benefits

  • Offer standardized fucoidan to deliver consistent amounts

Maritech® 926 fucoidan is sourced from hand-harvested, wild seaweed from the pristine ocean waters of Patagonia. An innovative water extraction process ensures fucoidan’s delicate molecular structure is delivered intact to provide the critical nutritional benefit of Undaria pinnatifida, the species of seaweed used in many studies of fucoidan.

Fucoidan is a little-known molecule, found in edible seaweeds. Native to the Japanese diet, it has been the subject of research attention.Almost 900 published studies confirm its potential for a healthy immune function, cell communication, and maintenance of tissue. Fucoidan is considered to be one of the key nutrients behind the exceptionally long, healthy lives enjoyed in Okinawa, Japan. Maritech® 926 fucoidan is sourced from hand-harvested, wild seaweed from the pristine ocean waters of Patagonia. A cutting-edge water extraction process ensures the provision of the critical nutritional benefit of Undaria pinnatifida. This is the species of seaweed used in the majority of scientific fucoidan studies. A single vegetarian capsule of Optimised Fucoidan with Maritech® 926 provides the same amount of fucoidan typically consumed daily by the Japanese. Most people require just one capsule per day, yet ageing individuals seeking to enhance the benefit may choose two.

Highly absorbableMushroom extracts have been used for years. Reishi Extract Mushroom Complex is standardized for triterpenes and polysaccharides. This ultra-bioavailable formula includes spores to enhance your body's natural defenses and support a healthy immune system. Comprehensive mushroom extract This full-spectrum extract contains compounds that stimulate the body's hematopoietic stem cells, T cells, and other critical immune factors. (1-7)Reishi’s triterpenes, polysaccharides, and other constituents can promote the activation of cell surface receptors that regulate immune cell function. (8-10)Powerful antioxidant supportMoreover, reishi mushrooms have been demonstrated to encourage the production of antioxidant enzymes such as superoxide dismutase (SOD), catalase, and glutathione. These antioxidants can help fortify the body’s natural defenses against free radicals and oxidative stress. (11)

product.title: Peony Immune
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in improving your overall immune system 

White peony extract in Peony Immune can:
  • Help maintain normal immune balance
  • Limit production of inflammatory molecules
  • Promote normal inflammatory response by balancing inflammation-suppressing cells and proinflammatory cells

Health benefits at a glance:A healthy immune system is essential to the health of your body. However, many people fail to make sure that their immune-system is always functioning normally, which may not be the case as the body ages. Being used in China for more than a millennium, from White Peony offer a component (paeoniflorin) that is now highly regarded as being important for your immunity.Peony Immune White Peony Root Extract is a standardized product that contributes to a balanced responsiveness, sensitivity, and strength of the immune system. While naturally helping with inflammation (proven by research), the compounds in this product promote immune homeostasis (optimal immune health).Peony extracts in Peony Immune can support normal immune-system function, thereby contributing to securing normal immune system responses.

Why it works:A healthy and normal functioning immune system is absolutely essential to staying young and vital. The fact is that the body depends on balanced immune-cell activity to maintain effective, responsive, and capable of modulating immunity [1].White peony root extract found in Peony Immune is a standardized extract of active white peony compounds which have been shown to help maintain immune system balance, which is needed to stay healthy and help maintain a young, vital lifestyle. In fact, extracts from the white peony root have been used in China for supporting immune balance for more than 1,200 years [2].When talking about your immune system it is always a good idea to be proactive. White peony extracts in Peony Immune can contribute to normal over-all immune health if taken in accordance with the recommended use, and help enhance immune-system preparedness.

The science behind the product:Researchers now emphasize a bioactive white peony extract component called paeoniflorin which can support your immune system [3-5].Peony Immune White Peony Root Extract is a standardized extract of active white peony compounds. Furthermore, a host of human clinical trials have showed that these compounds promote a healthy and balanced inflammatory response [6-10].Glucoside extract from the white peony root has shown an ability to bring an over-excited immune system back to normal.

How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Specially-Coated Bromelain
product.description:
• Joint comfort: Can maintain comfortable, flexible joints & support ease of movement
  • Inflammation balance: Natural pineapple enzyme promoting a healthy inflammatory response
  • Enhanced absorption: Enteric-coated to bypass digestion & maximize bioavailability

This formula delivers natural enzymes from pineapple stems for joint health. 

Health benefits at a glanceFirst of all, what is bromelain? It's a group of natural enzymes found in the stem of the pineapple that are shown to help calm inflammation in the body.The vegetarian tablets in Specially-Coated Bromelain can provide optimal absorption of bromelain, promoting joint health and mobility.

Why it works:Bromelain propertiesBromelain can help regulate fluid balance by inhibiting inflammatory cytokine production and stopping neutrophil migration, which is the movement of certain immune cells (white blood cells) that can worsen inflammation.Research also shows that bromelain can promote healthy circulation by supporting blood thickness (viscosity) and platelet activity. (1,3)Enteric-coated to bypass the stomachHowever, bromelain has to be enteric-coated so that it will not be activated in the stomach and used as a digestive enzyme. Such specially coated bromelain tablets pass into the small intestine, where they are absorbed into the bloodstream to provide benefits, such as a healthy inflammatory response to support comfort and function of the joints. (4)

The science behind the product:Backed by clinical studies for joint healthAccording to research, enteric-coated bromelain is at least as effective as other approaches in supporting joint comfort, function, and health, and is well tolerated. (5)One study even found that bromelain is more effective than other methods for maintaining joint function at rest (41 percent for bromelain vs. 23 percent for other methods). Another clinical trial showed that specially coated bromelain resulted in an overall increase in general well-being, along with improvement in comfort and physical function. (6-7)

For you, if you are interested in promoting your brain health, memory, and cognition

The active ingredients in Huperzine A can:
  • Promote memory and attention

    This standardized extract from the Chinese club moss has potent beneficial effects on the metabolism of acetylcholine, a neurotransmitter well known for its importance to memory, cognition, and attention, with additional implications for brain aging and longevity. (1-4) In fact, Huperzine A powerfully modulates the activity of acetylcholinesterase, the enzyme that destroys acetylcholine. Huperzine A can cross the blood-brain barrier, indicating its excellent oral bioavailability, and it has a long duration of bioactivity. This makes Huperzine A both powerful and promising as a neuroprotectant. (1-4) Multiple clinical trials show that huperzine A can promote cognitive and memory function, in both the elderly and younger individuals. (5-8)This supplement is standardized for maximum efficacy.

Black cumin seed oil is known for helping maintain a balance of immune and inflammatory responses. This becomes more and more important with age. By supporting the factors that contribute to these systems, it can help your body stay balanced.

As we age, a balanced immune and inflammatory response becomes critical to guarding our health. Research has shown Black Cumin Seed Oil to be particularly effective. Scientists have determined that black cumin seeds contain a broad spectrum of active compounds. When combined, they provide powerful and wide-ranging immune support and help with inflammation. Black Cumin Seed Oil has been proven to support the normal effectiveness of a number of biological factors involved in inflammation.An aging healthy immune system needs to orchestrate the activity of macrophages and helper T-cells. Black Cumin Seed Oil was also shown to support the optimal function of this vitally important defensive activity. By acting on both immune and inflammatory factors, Black Cumin Seed Oil supports a healthy immune system, so important in our elderly years, and facilitates a healthy inflammatory response.

product.title: Milk Thistle (Silymarin-Silibinins-Isosilybin A &/ B)
product.description:
For you, if you want to help keep your liver healthy and ensure your overall well-being

The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions and keeps it clean of harmful substances. It is also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body. Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever. In Europe and Asia, herbal liver tonics have been in common use for centuries. Being validated through research, the benefits of these herbs contain compounds that assist in antioxidant activities, in stabilising cell membrane, enhancing bile secretion. Protecting your liver is beneficial for the overall health and vitality of the body. Milk thistle (one of the herbs) extract has been long valued for supporting healthy liver function and is also a powerful antioxidant. (1-3)Silibinins, one of its compounds, received until recently most attention from research. Advanced extraction technology enables now to isolate and test other constituents too. Among the tested compounds, a silymarin constituent called isosilybin B proved to be the most efficient in maintaining healthy cell division. (4-10)Milk Thistle (Silymarin-Silibinins-Isosilybin A &/ B) contains standardised, top-grade potencies of silymarin, silibinins, isosilybin A and isosilybin B, providing the full spectrum of milk thistle’s liver- and prostate- supportive compounds. (8-13)The botanical extract in Milk Thistle (Silymarin-Silibinins-Isosilybin A &/ B) is a triple standardised milk thistle extract. In addition to an optimal 80% standardisation of the main active compounds, silymarin flavonolignans, this formula is further standardised to three highly active isomers (silibinins and isosilybin A and B).

product.title: Magnesium Caps
product.description:
• Heart health: Helps maintain cardiovascular function & blood pressure balance
  • Bone strength: Essential mineral promoting strong, dense bones
  • Brain function: Supports cognitive performance & balanced mood
  • Energy metabolism: Helps convert nutrients into usable daily energy

Magnesium Caps delivers 500 mg of elemental magnesium in three forms. This vegetarian formula can support over 300 biochemical reactions in your body.

Health benefits at a glance:Magnesium is one of your body’s most important minerals. It is required as a cofactor in numerous of enzymatic processes within cells, and we need it for more than 300 biochemical reactions.Magnesium Caps contains three different forms of magnesium: oxide, citrate, and succinate. This delivers the daily dose of magnesium your body needs to support heart and bone health, healthy energy metabolism, brain function, and much more.

Why it works: Cardiovascular health & blood pressure: Magnesium helps relax the smooth muscles in blood vessels, reducing vascular resistance and promoting healthy blood flow and cardiovascular function. Magnesium promotes a healthy inflammatory response and healthy endothelial function and helps inhibit oxidative stress to support cardiovascular health. (1) Magnesium also helps maintain healthy blood pressure levels. (2) Brain & nervous system: Magnesium plays a key role in the nervous system and encourages healthy brain function. Magnesium can also regulate the signaling of serotonin and other neurotransmitters, and adequate magnesium intake may promote a healthy mood. (3,4) Bone health & density: Along with calcium and other minerals, magnesium is an essential component of a healthy bone matrix. A well-mineralized bone matrix helps maintain strong, healthy bones. (5); Metabolic health & more: Magnesium intake promotes many healthy metabolic factors, serum lipid profiles, and more. (6,7) Moreover, magnesium helps protect against free radical production. (8)

The science behind the product: Magnesium Caps provides one of the highest concentrations of elemental magnesium per capsule available on the market. Due to it being inexpensive, it is recommended for everyone to supplement with at least 500 mg of magnesium per day.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Magnesium (as magnesium oxide, citrate, succinate) 500 mg

product.title: Zinc Lozenges
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in powerful support for immune health and function

The zinc in Zinc Lozenges can:

  • Provide powerful immune system support

  • Encourage healthy protein synthesis

  • Help maintain the biochemical activity of over 300 essential enzymes

Zinc is an essential mineral in the body. We can get it from food, but many do not consume or absorb enough to reap all of its benefits. Zinc Lozenges formula is based on clinical studies and provides 18.75 mg of zinc as zinc oxide and zinc gluconate.

Zinc is an essential mineral needed for many of your body’s functions, such as healthy protein synthesis and the biochemical activity of over 300 essential enzymes.Among these functions are antioxidant properties, promoting healthy immune and reproductive organs, and taste sensitivity. Besides, zinc supports proper development during pregnancy and childhood.Maintaining adequate levels of zinc is equally important to aging adults. As people grow older, their immune function declines, partly due to the decreasing size and function of the thymus gland.Evidence suggests that zinc may help maintain the thymus gland's healthy function in elderly people. Moreover, a zinc deficiency in elderly adults may contribute to age-related immune decline and immunosenescence.Zinc Lozenges provide premium-grade zinc in a pleasant citrus-orange naturally flavored tablet. It delivers 18.75 mg of high quality zinc in the forms of zinc oxide and zinc gluconate to offer powerful support for immune health and function.

product.title: Boron
product.description:
• Bone health: Promoting optimal mineralization & strength for active living
  • Immune function: Can help maintain robust immune system defenses
  • Hormone balance: Encouraging optimal estrogen & testosterone metabolism
  • Joint comfort: Can help maintain ease of movement & flexibility
  • Nervous system: Supporting optimal nerve function & communication
  • Antioxidant activity: Guarding against oxidative stress throughout the body

Boron delivers 3 mg of this essential trace mineral per vegetarian capsule. Despite its prevalence in fruits, vegetables, legumes, and nuts, many people don't get the minimum 1 mg daily needed for optimal health, making supplementation increasingly important as we age.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is boron? Boron is a trace mineral needed for optimal health. It doesn't get the attention that other more recognized nutrients receive, but it plays an important role in supporting healthy aging. For instance, as we get older, supporting bone health needs to become a higher priority in order to maintain a healthy and active lifestyle. Boron is shown to have beneficial effects on supporting bone health and nervous system function. (1,2)

Why it works:Boron can help maintain optimal bone metabolism, as well as promote optimal immune function, nervous system health, and antioxidant activity. (1-4) Research suggests humans require a minimum of 1 mg of boron per day to maintain optimal health, but despite its prevalence in fruits, vegetables, legumes, and nuts, it appears many people don’t get this amount on a regular basis. (1,5) A daily intake of 3 mg boron per day is recommended to support bone health. (6)

The science behind the product:A lack of boron can result in the limited absorption of calcium and this mineral can often be underutilized. Boron encourages healthy bone growth and mineralization.This effect appears to be due in part to the activation and stabilization of vitamin D and positive impacts on supporting estrogen metabolism. (5-7) In healthy men, boron was found to encourage free testosterone levels. (8) Boron supplementation has been shown to help maintain joint comfort and maintain healthy hormone activity. (1) In a randomized controlled trial, boron supplementation was found to inhibit discomfort at the beginning of the menstrual cycle, presumably by helping to promote a healthy inflammatory response. (9)

How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

It is an essential component of proteins involved in oxygen transport and the regulation of cell growth and differentiation. (1)An iron deficiency limits oxygen delivery to cells, resulting in fatigue, poor work performance, and decreased immunity. Conversely, excess amounts of iron can result in toxicity and even death.Iron SupplementationTo supplement with iron protein succinylate has been shown to promote healthy red blood cell formation and support healthy oxygen-carrying capacity of blood, hemoglobin. Iron Protein Plus includes the iron protein succinylate. This form of iron is not only well-tolerated in people with sensitive stomachs, but it’s also highly absorbable. (2) That one-two combination makes Iron Protein Plus an ideal formula for anyone who needs to supplement their iron intake.

product.title: Bone Restore, 120 caps
product.description:
For you, if you desire a comprehensive support for healthy bone density and strength

The powerful formula of Bone Restore, 120 caps:

  • Offers 3 types of easily absorbed calcium in a capsule that ensures full breakdown during digestion 

  • Provides patented Fruitex B® OsteoBoron® for bone & joint strength

  • Contains zinc, manganese & silicon to promote healthy bones

  • Includes vitamin D3, essential for absorbing calcium

Most people don't take enough calcium to make up for the amounts of calcium that are lost when we age. Bone Restore is a powerful formula that provides three types of highly absorbable calcium, along with a variety of nutrients that help to absorb calcium properly, such as vitamin D3, magnesium, manganese, boron, zinc and silicon.

Health benefits at a glance:The natural aging process can lead to a deficiency in calcium. Many people don't obtain enough calcium to offset the calcium deficit that normal aging can spur on. Bone Restore can help you maintain strong and healthy bones by providing three forms of calcium: dicalcium malate, calcium fructoborate, and calcium bisglycinate chelate, plus extra nutrients for strong bones. Moreover, this supplement is delivered in a capsule that ensures full breakdown during digestion.

Why it works:The calcium carbonate and calcium citrate in Bone Restore are ideal for calcium supplementation. However, for calcium to be effective, it's not enough to just supplement with just this mineral.Dietary calcium has to be accompanied by sufficient amounts of other nutrients such as magnesium, vitamin D3, manganese, boron, silicon, and zinc to have the highest possible impact on bone health. These nutrients are essential cofactors for maintaining normal bone health.

The science behind the product:Many forms of calcium are not well-absorbed. (1) Bone Restore provides 700 mg of easily absorbed calcium. It also contains 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 and trace minerals for bone health support:Vitamin D is essential for absorbing calcium from the digestive tract into the bloodstream, thus it is vital for helping maintain healthy bones and teeth. Magnesiumis needed to maintain strong bones and a healthy vascular system. (2) Bone Restore delivers 300 mg of magnesium from magnesium oxide. Zinc, manganese, and silicon are essential for healthy bone maintenance and connective tissues (manganese). You have to have sufficient intake of these elements to support healthy bone formation. (3-5) Boron is a trace mineral that supports bone and joint strength. This formula contains patented Fruitex B® OsteoBoron®, made from a novel calcium/carbohydrate/boron complex. (6)

How to use:Take four (4) capsules daily. Scientific studies suggest calcium supplementation in divided doses, with food in the morning and evening, may yield the best results. Maintaining an optimal vitamin D blood level also helps to maximise calcium absorption.

  • Calcium absorption: Features three highly absorbable calcium forms for optimal utilization

  • Tooth strength: Can encourage robust dental health & structural integrity
  • Comprehensive support: Combines 700 mg calcium with essential cofactors for bone maintenance

Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 delivers a comprehensive bone health formula that goes beyond standalone calcium supplementation.

Health benefits at a glance:Most people are aware that calcium supports your bones. But what you might not realize is that dietary calcium requires adequate amounts of other vital nutrients to be most effective.Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 can help maintain bone health and strength with highly absorbable calcium, vitamins K2 and D3, and important minerals like magnesium, boron, zinc, manganese, and silicon.

Why it works:Although calcium is the most abundant mineral in the body and is a key component in building bone and teeth, most people don’t get enough calcium to offset the amount being lost over the course of aging.Postmenopausal women commonly experience loss of bone mineral density but older men can also face this issue.Moreover, many forms of calcium are not well-absorbed. Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 provides three types of calcium that are easy for the body to absorb. Loss of bone density is not just associated with calcium deficiency alone. Vitamin D3 and K2 are essential for helping maintain strong, healthy bones and teeth.Also adequate amounts of important minerals like magnesium, zinc, manganese, silicon, and boron must be available in the body so that calcium and phosphorus can be used to build bone strength.

The science behind the product:Three types of calciumSome forms of calcium supplements are better absorbed than others. (1) Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 provides a total of 700 mg of three types of easily absorbed calcium: Calcium carbonateCalcium citrate malateCalcium bisglycinateThese are delivered in a capsule that ensures better utilization by the body. Vitamins K2 & D3Vitamin D is essential for absorbing calcium from the digestive tract into the bloodstream. (2,3) And vitamin K2 helps maintain bone density by promoting calcium transport from the bloodstream into bone. (4-6) Hence, vitamins D3 and K2 are essential for maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Magnesium, zinc & other bone-healthy mineralsMagnesium is necessary to maintain strong bones. (7) Bone Restore with Vitamin K2 offers 300 mg of magnesium from magnesium oxide. Zinc, manganese and silicon are essential for healthy bone maintenance. (6,8,9) You have to have sufficient intake of these elements to encourage healthy bone formation. (6,10) Boron is a trace mineral with beneficial effects for bone and joint strength. (9,11) This formula contains patented Fruitex B® OsteoBoron® made from a calcium/carbohydrate/boron complex similar to what’s found in fruits and vegetables.

How to use:Take four (4) capsules daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Scientific studies suggest calcium supplementation in divided doses with food in the morning and evening may yield the best results.Maintaining an optimal vitamin D blood level also helps maximize calcium absorption.

product.title: Super Selenium Complex & Vitamin E
product.description:
• Cellular health: Can protect cells from oxidative damage & premature aging
  • Three selenium forms: Provides sodium selenite, L-selenomethionine & Se-methyl L-selenocysteine for comprehensive coverage
  • Antioxidant protection: Promoting glutathione peroxidase production for powerful cellular defense
  • Thyroid & immune function: Can help maintain normal thyroid activity & immune system response
  • Heart & brain health: Encouraging cardiovascular wellness & cognitive function throughout aging
  • Synergistic vitamin E: Enhanced with vitamin E to work together with selenium for optimal results

Super Selenium Complex & Vitamin E combines three unique forms of selenium with vitamin E to deliver comprehensive cellular health support.

Health benefits at a glance:Selenium is trace mineral essential to normal bodily functioning.Sodium selenite, L-selenomethionine, and selenium-methyl L-selenocysteine found in Super Selenium Complex & Vitamin E are forms of this mineral that supports longevity, heart- and brain health, and is vital in forming certain antioxidants. This formula also contains vitamin E for synergetic health promoting effect.

Why it works:Selenium is an important factor to fight one of the primary causes of premature aging: oxidative damage. Levels of several health-promoting minerals, including selenium, have been shown to be high among some of the world’s longest-living people. (1)Selenium comes in many different forms. Super Selenium Complex & Vitamin E provides the body with three unique forms of selenium together with vitamin E for health and longevity support. Each form of selenium acts differently to support healthy cell division, and vitamin E has been shown to work synergistically with selenium. (2)

The science behind the product:Antioxidant, thyroid & immune support Selenium plays a crucial role in safeguarding your body against oxidative damage. This is due to its role in the production of glutathione peroxidases, a group of powerful antioxidant enzymes. (3)Moreover, selenium can contribute to maintaining normal thyroid and immune function in healthy individuals. (4,5)Healthy cell division, heart & brain healthSelenium is a vital nutrient for supporting healthy cell division. (6) However, its ability to promote a healthy inflammatory response and quench free radicals has led researchers to explore its beneficial effects related to other conditions involving oxidative damage, particularly for heart and brain health. (7,8)

How to use: Take one (1) capsule per day with food, or as recommended by your healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Tri Sugar Shield™
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in maintaining healthy blood sugar levels

The plant extracts in Tri Sugar Shield® can: 
  • Promote healthy glucose metabolism
  • Support a balanced sugar production in the liver
  • Help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels
  • Help inhibit sugar-digesting elimination

Tri Sugar Shield® contains sorghum bran extract, to help balance sugar production in the liver and support insulin sensitivity. It also contains phloridzin, a polyphenol compound from apple root bark which can inhibit glucose absorption, and mulberry leaf extract, which promotes insulin sensitivity.

Many ageing individuals experience rising blood sugar levels. Despite a healthy diet and exercise, it can happen due to many factors, such as the rapid conversion of starch into glucose. The result affects even health-conscious, active people, as they age.An all-natural approach has been designed to support the natural balance of key glucose pathways. Tri Sugar Shield provides three plant-derived nutrients that offer unrivalled optimal support for healthy glucose metabolism in ageing individuals. Life Extension Tri Sugar Shield™ contains the following three nutrients: Sorghum Bran Extract - a grass plant found in Southern Asia that helps maintain healthy blood sugar levels, by regulating four different mechanisms:Balancing the rate of sugar manufacture in the liver (gluconeogenesis);Promoting insulin sensitivity;Regulating PPAR-gamma, a metabolic thermostat that controls glucose metabolism;Regulating the enzyme alpha-amylase, which in turn controls the release of sugar found in starch. Mulberry leaf extract - used in Chinese traditional medicine for centuries. It targets three different mechanisms:Targeting the alpha-glucosidase enzyme to regulate conversion of starch into glucose;Supporting glucose transporter GLUT4 that moves glucose out of the bloodstream and into muscle and liver cells;Promoting insulin sensitivity.Phloridzin - a natural polyphenol found in various fruit trees. It helps to maintain healthy blood sugar levels, by:Targeting carrier protein SGLT1, in turn helping to block the absorption of glucose into the bloodstream;Targeting carrier protein SGLT2, which supports glucose elimination via urine.By targeting these diverse glucose pathways, Life Extension® Tri Sugar Shield™ delivers the widest possible support to help to naturally stabilise already healthy glucose levels.

product.title: Enhanced Stress Relief
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in an innovative, dual-action supplement for stress

The formula of Enhanced Stress Relief Benefitscan:

  • Enhance mood, memory, and attention

  • Provide compounds to help promote sleep and relaxation

  • Deliver relaxing L-theanine, an amino acid found in green tea

  • Offer a nourishing botanical nutrient that helps relieve stress

L-Theanine is an amino acid found in green tea. It's shown to encourage a calming effect in the brain, modulating neurotransmitter signaling (including GABA) and more. Lemon balm (Melissa officinalis) is an herb whose active compounds can help support a healthy stress response, mood and healthy sleep patterns.

Lemon balm extractStress is pervasive in modern society. It can have real physiological effects on your body, and it's hard to find a natural antidote. The encouraging news is that lemon balm (Melissa officinalis), an herb in the mint family, has been shown in several studies to support a healthy stress response, mood and healthy sleep patterns. (1-3)As a perennial herb in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region, it induces calming effects while enhancing memory and attention.Relaxation-promoting effects of L-theanine Green tea has long been thought to help relieve stress. (4) Modern science indicates that L-theanine, one of the key compounds in green tea, is responsible for this effect. (5-7) L-theanine can encourage a calming effect in the brain. This amino acid can modulate signaling of several neurotransmitters, including GABA, an inhibitory neurotransmitter involved in calming pathways in the brain. (8)A wealth of health-enhancing benefits Research shows that L-theanine has numerous health-enhancing effects, including promoting healthy cognitive function. (9)L-theanine has been shown to inhibit glutamate signaling in the brain. (5) Glutamate is an excitatory neurotransmitter.

product.title: Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin
product.description:
For you, if you want to support restful sleep and promote a healthy response to stress

The active ingredients in Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin can:
  • Support normal sleep patterns
  • Contribute to reducing stress
  • Help maintain a normal skin complexion

Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin can promote a good night’s rest and contribute to reducing stress with the ingredients bioactive milk peptides and a proprietary blend of ashwagandha and amla (Indian gooseberry)

Health benefits at a glance:Make sure that you get the quality of sleep you deserve with Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin, which contains the active ingredients bioactive milk peptides and Sendara®, a proprietary blend of ashwagandha and amla (Indian gooseberry). These ingredients can help you support normal sleep and contribute to reducing stress, respectively.

Why it works:Scientists attribute high stress levels in today’s everyday life as being a major culprit when it comes to sleep-related difficulties. And to add insult to injury, the quality and duration of sleep is declining as we grow older — and that at a time when we need the health benefits of a good night's rest more than ever.Decades of clinical research documents that a good night’s rest supports nearly all systems of the body, including: skin health and youthful appearance [1-4] healthy collagen formation [5-8] insulin levels already within normal range [9-11] healthy body weight [12,13] glucose levels already within normal range [14,15] blood pressure already within normal range [16,17] healthy cell division [18-20] cardiovascular health [21-24] and mood improvement [25-27]. That’s why Life Extension has developed Enhanced Sleep without Melatonin, which contains two natural compounds shown to support restful sleep, promote a healthy response to stress, and target sleep debt-related factors associated with skin aging.

The science behind the product:Enhanced Sleep® without Melatonin contains two natural compounds that can promote better sleep and youthful appearance. First compound is bioactive milk peptides are popularly used in Europe to promote good and restful sleep patterns. Published studies present that this compound can also promote relaxation, support daytime cognition and help with stress [28-30]. Researchers published a study about women who experienced sleep-related difficulties. Sixty-three women participated in the study. It was revealed that 65,5% of women experienced improvement in their symptoms with 150 mg per day of bioactive milk peptides [31]. In another similar study men and women who took 150 mg per day of bioactive milk peptides for one month experienced a 50% improvement in sleep quality [32]. Additionally, study participants needed 30% less time to fall asleep after 4 weeks [32].Sendara® is a nutrient complex that consists of ashwagandha and Indian gooseberry extracts. These plant-based compounds acquired essential clinical validation. Indian gooseberry can provide antioxidant support and was used to maintain youthful skin health and appearance in many skin care products [33-36]. Ashwagandha can also promote a healthy response to stress. One clinical study reported that it can provide a 62% relaxation support with just 125 mg per day [37].

How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.May be taken during daytime for stress or before bed to help with sleep.

Supplement facts: Sendara® [proprietary blend of Ashwagandha ( Withania somnifera ) extract (root and leaf) standardised to withanolide glycoside conjugates and Amla ( Phyllanthus emblica ) extract (fruit) standardised to low molecular weight hydrolysable tannins] 200 mg Casein decapeptide† (Bioactive Milk Peptides) 150 mg
product.ingredients: Sendara® [proprietary blend of Ashwagandha ( Withania somnifera ) extract (root and leaf) standardised to withanolide glycoside conjugates and Amla ( Phyllanthus emblica ) extract (fruit) standardised to low molecular weight hydrolysable tannins] 200 mg Casein decapeptide† (Bioactive Milk Peptides) 150 mg

product.title: Bioactive Milk Peptides

For you, if you are interested in supporting restful and healthy sleep

  • Encourage a healthy response to stress

  • Support healthy cortisol levels (in response to stress)

    Bioactive Milk Peptides (Lactium®) are a cutting-edge nutrient complex consisting of patented bioactive peptides, naturally found in milk. Used widely in Europe to promote sustained and restful sleep patterns, these bioactive milk peptides seem to promote relaxation, help with stress and support daytime cognition.A group of 63 women with sleep-related difficulties experienced 65.6% improvement in their symptoms with just 150 mg per day. In another study, the same 150 mg dose induced substantial improvements of sleep quality and stress response in 165 healthy adults. And in a third study, a group of healthy men and women taking daily 150 mg experienced sleep improvement after two weeks and after 4 weeks they needed less time to fall asleep.Use Bioactive Milk Peptides daily to help deal with the stress and pressures of every-day life, or before bedtime, to support relaxation. Each capsule contains the very same patented Lactium® formula Europeans have used for years to help with sleep and stress-related issues.

product.title: Optimized Saffron with Satiereal®
product.description:
For you, if you want support to fight the urge to snack

Optimized Saffron can:

  • Help reduce snacking by supporting healthy neurotransmitter activity

  • Support healthy weight management by curbing unplanned eating

  • Promote appetite control, without caffeine

Do you snack between meals? Frequent snacking can be difficult to control. Optimized Saffron can encourage healthy neurotransmitter activity to help curb cravings and reduce unnecessary snacking, making it easier to stay on track with your weight management goals.

Health benefits at a glance First of all; what is saffron? It’s a spice made from the dried red stigmas (the thread-like parts) of the saffron crocus flower, Crocus sativus. Its naturally occurring plant compounds have been studied for their ability to support mood, appetite control, and healthy weight management. Optimized Saffron features a novel extract of saffron stigma that can help support weight management goals in just 8 weeks. The supplement is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian. How it works Sticking to healthy eating habits to maintain a healthy weight isn’t always easy. Everyday stress, emotional factors, and bad habits can lead to unnecessary snacking, even when you eat well and exercise regularly. Optimized Saffron can impact neurotransmitter signals to help you fight the urge to snack between meals or eat late at night, so you can stay on track with your weight management goals. This clinically studied, caffeine-free saffron stigma extract can promote satiety – the feeling of fullness – helping curb cravings. The science behind the product Controlling cravings naturally Saffron extract is shown to help reduce between-meal snacking, late-night cravings, and stress eating, making it easier to manage your appetite. (1) Clinically studied saffron extract In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study, researchers evaluated Satiereal®, a patented saffron stigma extract, in healthy, mildly overweight women. Participants had similar ages, body weights, and snacking habits at the start of the eight-week trial. (2) The women took either Satiereal® or a placebo twice daily while continuing their usual diets without calorie restrictions. Compared with the placebo, the Satiereal® group reported significantly fewer snacks and achieved greater weight loss after just eight weeks. (2) Take control of cravings – start today! How to use Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts. Intended for adults aged 18 years and older. To get the most from this supplement, use it alongside a healthy diet and regular exercise. Individual results may vary.

product.title: Mega Lycopene
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a powerful antioxidant with a multi-targeted impact on your health

The nutrients in Mega Lycopene can:

  • Promote prostate health

  • Help maintain healthy LDL oxidation

  • Help protect against free radicals

  • Offer a high concentration of lycopene

Lycopene is a well-known nutrient for prostate health. But it's also known to support arterial health, longevity, and more. Typically, only small amounts of lycopene get absorbed through the diet, so it's important to supplement.

Lycopene can show a wide range of health-supportive properties, many of which may stem from its function as a powerful antioxidant.In fact, lycopene's multi-targeted impact on human health has led to its being described as among the most important nutrients for a long life.Lycopene has been shown to play a vital role in maintaining cardiovascular health, including the function of the lining of arterial blood vessels (the endothelium), promoting a healthy inflammatory response, and helping to maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels. (1-3)Studies indicate that greater lycopene consumption may help maintain prostate health, and may also help support normal cellular proliferation. (4,5) In addition, lycopene has been shown to help support healthy insulin sensitivity and to encourage longevity. (6,7)

product.title: HepatoPro
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a PPC supplement to support healthy liver cell function

The PPC soybean extract found in HepatoPro can:
  • Support liver health and function
  • Help protect against oxidative stress
  • Promote healthy liver cell membrane integrity
  • Help inhibit inflammation to support live health

HepatoPro is made with PPC (phosphatidylcholine) from a highly purified soybean extract. PPC can provide phospholipids, an essential part of the cell membranes in the liver, and support the creation of healthy cell membranes and healthy liver cell function & integrity.

The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions and keeps it clean of harmful substances. It is also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body. Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever. Endogenous phospholipid is an integral part of all cell membranes and essential for their structural and functional integrity. The chemical structure of a soybean extract, called PPC (polyenylphosphatidylcholine), corresponds to that of endogenous phospholipid. It integrates in the cell membrane and becomes the cell’s constitutive element. PPC has antioxidant, cytoprotective and fluid-regulating effects and has been shown to enhance cell membrane function throughout the body.It is believed that PPC’s beneficial effect is based on its ability to be incorporated into liver cell membranes to restore its structure. This results in an increase in membrane fluidity and transport activity across the membrane. PPC is also incorporated into blood lipoproteins, helping to extend its benefits beyond the liver, to promote arterial health. Mounting evidence suggests that its supplementation beneficially supports the critical process of reverse cholesterol transport. This process is a well-documented function of high-density lipoprotein (HDL), that involves the transport of cholesterol from the arterial walls to the liver for processing. Research also supports PPC’s critical role in helping to reduce LDL oxidation. In fact, a growing body of research shows that PPC can help maintain healthy lipoprotein profiles. HepatoPro contains PPC (polyenylphosphatidylcholine). Each 900-mg PPC softgel is well-absorbed when taken orally and has no known contraindications, side effects, or drug interactions.

product.title: 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex®
product.description:
• Joint comfort: Promoting comfortable mobility & helps maintain optimal joint function
  • Arterial health: Encouraging healthy arterial integrity & cardiovascular wellness
  • Cellular support: Helping to maintain balanced cell division & overall vitality
  • Inflammatory balance: Targeting 5-LOX enzyme to encourage optimal inflammatory response
  • Superior absorption: AprèsFlex® can deliver 52% better bloodstream uptake than standard extracts
  • Convenient dosing: Most people need only one 100 mg capsule daily

5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® features a standardized Boswellia serrata extract that delivers 100 mg per vegetarian capsule.

Health benefits with a glance:Boswellia serrata is an Indian plant containing compounds that can inhibit inflammatory factors to promote joint, arterial, and cellular health. 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian.

Why it works:The Boswellia extract contains compounds shown to directly target 5-LOX, an enzyme responsible inflammatory reactions. 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® provides a standardized, highly absorbable Boswellia extract, AprèsFlex®. Each capsule delivers 100 mg of this innovative extract, and most people need only one capsule a day.

The science behind the product:5-lipoxygenase (5-LOX) is an enzyme that converts fatty acids into leukotrienes. (1) Since 5-LOX levels increase over time, excess 5-LOX has been connected to some of the common effects of normal ageing. (2) Boswellia extract can inhibit 5-LOX Boswellia Serrata extract is shown to inhibit 5-LOX at the cellular level. Research reveals that the compound AKBA (3-O-acetyl-11-keto-ß-boswellic acid) is crucial for this beneficial action. (3) However, boswellia compounds are poorly absorbed into the bloodstream. To address this issue, the formula uses AprèsFlex®, which is a standardized form of Boswellia extract. AprèsFlex® absorbs into the blood 52% more than previously available Boswellia extracts. (4) Increase 5-LOX levels due to diet The typical Western diet is rich in omega-6 fatty acids like red meat, poultry, eggs, and dairy products, along with high-glycemic carbohydrates.These foods add to 5-LOX levels by triggering the production of arachidonic acid. The body produces 5-LOX enzymes in response to arachidonic acid. (1) The benefits of inhibiting 5-LOX 5-LOX creates compounds like leukotriene B4 out of arachidonic acid. Inhibiting leukotriene B4 can help support joint, arterial, and overall health. (5) It is also demonstrated to promote healthy cell division in studies. (6) Each 100 mg vegetarian capsule of 5-LOX Inhibitor with AprèsFlex® is standardized to provide 20% of active AKBA from Boswellia.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol
product.description:
• Prostate function: Can promote optimal prostate health & comfortable urinary flow
  • Saw palmetto extract: Provides standardized Serenoa repens berry extract for men's wellness
  • Beta-sitosterol boost: Features additional beta-sitosterol from pine for enhanced urinary comfort
  • Hormone metabolism: Can support balanced hormonal activity for men's vitality
  • Urinary flow: Encouraging comfortable urination & normal bladder function
  • Boron enriched: Includes boron to support optimal hormonal balance

PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol combines clinically studied saw palmetto berry extract with an added boost of beta-sitosterol from pine and boron to comprehensively support men's prostate wellness.

Health benefits at a glance:This formula can promote prostate health by combining saw palmetto, beta-sitosterol, and boron.

Decades of research have demonstrated saw palmetto as a key nutrient for prostate health. The standardized extracts of saw palmetto and beta-sitosterol in PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol have been clinically studied for their ability to support prostate function and promote healthy hormone metabolism.The science behind the productBeta-sitosterol from palmetto and pinePalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol combines saw palmetto extract with an added boost of beta-sitosterol (from pine) and boron to support a healthy prostate: Extracts of the saw palmetto berry (Serenoa repens) have been found to support men’s urinary flow and comfort. (3,4) Boron has been added to support healthy hormonal metabolism. (5)

product.title: Soy Isoflavones
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in soy's wide array of benefits

The active ingredients in Soy Isoflavones can:
  • Promote heart, bone, metabolic & cellular health
  • Support already-healthy blood pressure
  • Provide soy isoflavones such as genistein, daidzein & glycitein

After menopause, it's very important for women to maintain cardiovascular and bone health. Soy isoflavones are shown to help by mimicking estrogen-like effects in the body. This makes the supplement Soy Isoflavones an excellent daily choice for postmenopausal women.

Menopause and SoyWhen estrogens and other hormones decline during menopause, women start to experience a variety of symptoms such as hot flashes along with more serious complications such as bone loss.After menopause, it therefore becomes especially important for women to support heart health, bone strength, and metabolism. Soy can play a helpful role!For decades, research has highlighted the benefits of soy, have been proven to have many beneficial effects in postmenopausal women. (1)Soy Isoflavones BenefitsSoy contains phytoestrogens, which are plant compounds with estrogen-like effects, known as isoflavones. Soy isoflavones, such as genistein, daidzein, and glycitein, have shown a range of positive effects. (1-4)Compounds like genistein and daidzein selectively activate estrogen receptors, primarily targeting Erβ in bone, urogenital tissue, and the cardiovascular system, rather than Erα, which is found mainly in breast and uterine tissues. (5)This selective action makes soy isoflavones beneficial for postmenopausal women by helping to (1-9): Maintain bone densityPromote heart healthSupport metabolismEncourage healthy cellular signallingKeep healthy blood lipid and glucose levelsMoreover, soy isoflavones can also help fight oxidative stress, contributing to wellness and longevity no matter what stage of life you are in.

product.title: Liver Efficiency Formula
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a liver health supplement with botanical extracts to promote healthy mitochondrial energy output in liver cells

The botanical extracts in Liver Efficiency Formula can: 
  • Support liver function
  • Encourage healthy mitochondrial energy output in liver cells
  • Protect the liver against oxidative stress
  • Encourage the production of the body's most potent antioxidant compounds (glutathione and super oxide dismutase)

Liver Efficiency formula can help your liver cells produce the energy they need. This formula contains schisandra extract, which can promote liver health and inhibit oxidative stress, and SOD (superoxide dismutase), a potent antioxidant that can help inhibit the effects of oxidative stress.

The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions to keep it clean of harmful substances. It is also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body. Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever.Liver Efficiency Formula features two state-of-the-art molecular energisers shown to promote healthy liver function. Schisandra chinensis is one of them and is native to Asia where numerous studies have validated its system-wide benefits. Researchers have discovered that the lignans in Schisandra fruit support healthy levels of glutathione, the cell’s own antioxidant defence system. Schisandra’s bioactive compounds have been shown to be readily absorbed in the intestine.Extramel® is the second compound, a fruit concentrate derived from non-GMO muskmelon (Cucumis melo). Cucumis melo is a natural source of superoxide dismutase (SOD), one of your body’s most powerful free radical neutralisers. Extramel®’s efficacy and safety are backed by published research, according to which, it led to better energy levels, physical performance and mood, after only four weeks.

product.title: CinSulin® with InSea2® and Crominex® 3+
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in supporting your blood sugar health

The active ingredients in CinSulin® can:
  • Support already-healthy blood sugar levels

    Many ageing people are exposed to excess glucose calories that can affect even those who are health-conscious. Life Extension offers an enhanced natural approach: CinSulin® with InSea2® and Crominex® 3+. CinSulin® - Scientists worldwide are excited over a novel form of cinnamon that supports healthy glucose metabolism. Scientists at the US Department of Agriculture have been quietly studying it for more than a decade. The cinnamon extract contained in this CinSulin® formula has proven to experienced decline in fasting blood glucose after only two months. This novel cinnamon extract also produced a significant decrease in after-meal glucose spikes after ingestion of carbohydrates.Cinnamon polyphenols have been found to assist in supporting healthy blood glucose and inhibit overconsumption. The bad news is that cinnamon naturally contains fat-soluble compounds, known as aldehydes. The good news is that Life Extension has identified a purified water-soluble cinnamon extract. InSea2® - Researchers have long known of the many health benefits of seaweed extracts. Recently a form of seaweed extract, called InSea2®, has been discovered that blocks the action of glucosidase and amylase. They are enzymes that your body uses to break down carbohydrates into glucose, facilitating its transport into the bloodstream.Crominex® 3+ - Long known for its role in maintaining healthy glucose metabolism, chromium has been optimised with Indian gooseberry extract and a form of the adap-togen shilajit. The name of this advanced chromium complex is Crominex® 3+, which helps to support:Normal cellular glucose absorption;Healthy endothelial function;Healthy lipid and triglyceride levels;Normal cellular energy production.Combined with CinSulin® and InSea2®, it creates an unrivalled formula that affords optimal support for healthy glucose metabolism in ageing individuals.

product.title: Ginseng Energy Boost
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in fighting fatigue with a stimulant-free boost of energy

The fermented ginseng extract in Ginseng Energy Boost can:

  • Help your body produce cellular energy

  • Promote positive mood and ability to manage stress

  • Support healthy antioxidant activity

  • Provide ginseng with improved bioavailability

The authentic fermented Panax ginseng extract used in Ginseng Energy Boost encourages better absorption of ginseng’s active Compound K that can fuel your cells with real energy - no caffeine required.

Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is ginseng? It is an adaptogenic herb that can promote healthy energy, but only fermented ginseng extract gets the most out of ginseng’s biologically active components. The fermented bioavailable Panax ginseng extract used in Ginseng Energy Boost can deliver a stimulant-free “Get up and go”-boost of healthy energy and can also support positive mood and the stress response.

Why it works: Ginseng has been used for health support for centuries. Panax ginseng (also known as Asian, Chinese, or Korean ginseng) is highly respected and popular for its abilities (supported by evidence) to manage stress and balance oxidative processes. (1,2) Ginseng is also reported to help your body produce cellular energy—and the better quality the ginseng, the more energy there will be. Ginseng Energy Boost uses the best of the best.

The science behind the product: Panax ginseng extract and ginsenosides Pre-clinical research indicates Panax ginseng extract can support positive mood by helping to regulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis responsible for stress responsiveness, balance hormone levels, preserve healthy levels of brain growth factors, protect against oxidative stress and encourage a healthy inflammatory response. (3-5) Other studies suggest ginseng may promote exercise endurance. (6) It is indicated by a growing body of research that ginsenosides, compounds from ginseng, can support mitochondrial energy production and healthy glucose metabolism. (7-9) Studies also show ginseng and ginsenosides may support healthy neurological function. (10,11) Fermented ginseng and Compound K Fermented ginseng is a process shown to support availability and absorption of the biologically active compound made from ginsenosides, Compound K. (12-14). In one study, Compound K levels were more than 15 times higher with fermented ginseng (compared to the unfermented kind). (15) A placebo-controlled trial with healthy men and women showed that taking a fermented ginseng supplement for 14 days, promoted moderation of the exercise-induced stress response and supported healthy antioxidant activity in the body. (16) Ginseng Energy Boost uses the best For enhanced potency and maximum effectiveness Ginseng Energy Boost uses Panax ginseng that has been fermented. This supplement can provide 200 mg of fermented Panax ginseng extract per dose to encourage production of ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the fuel your cells use for energy.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Creatine Capsules
product.description:
• Muscle strength: Promoting upper & lower body power for better performance
  • Exercise endurance: Helping to maintain energy during physical activity & training
  • Body composition: Encouraging lean muscle mass for optimal fitness goals
  • Cellular energy: Supporting ATP production for efficient muscle fuel
  • Cognitive function: Promoting brain health & mental clarity
  • Healthy aging: Guarding against age-related decline in muscle performance

Creatine Capsules deliver 500 mg of creatine monohydrate per serving in convenient vegetarian capsules.

What is creatine?Creatine is a compound derived from amino acids, naturally present in meat and seafood. The human body also produces it, primarily in the liver and kidneys, using the amino acids L-arginine, glycine, and S-adenosylmethionine. Once produced, creatine is transported through the bloodstream to support energy production in cells across the body.Each serving of Creatine Capsules contains 500 mg of easily absorbed creatine monohydrate.Creatine in the skeletal muscles95% of the body’s creatine is stored in skeletal muscles, with smaller amounts found in the brain and testes. Around two-thirds of this intramuscular creatine is converted into phosphocreatine, which serves as a phosphate reserve for the production of cellular energy (ATP). In healthy individuals, muscle creatine is continuously broken down and replenished at a rate of about 1 to 3 grams per day. (1,2)Research shows that creatine supplementation can enhance muscle mass, strength, and performance across various age groups and types of physical activity. (1,2) It has been shown to improve both upper and lower body muscle strength. (3,4) Creatine influences muscle tissue in several ways, and multiple mechanisms have been suggested to explain the enhanced exercise performance observed after creatine intake:Optimizing energy metabolism by maintaining higher levels of the body's energy currency, adenosine triphosphate or ATP (5) Promoting protein metabolism in muscle cells (6,7) Inhibiting tissue damage by inhibiting oxidative stress (2,6,8)Creatine benefits with agingMultiple clinical studies have shown that creatine positively impacts strength, body composition, and muscle performance in older adults, particularly when combined with resistance training. (1,2)A systematic review found improvements in upper and lower body strength, physical performance, and body composition after 12 weeks of creatine supplementation alongside resistance exercise in healthy older individuals. (9) Creatine has even been shown to benefit non-exercising seniors. (10) Research reveals that the advantages of creatine extend beyond muscle health. Evidence suggests that creatine supplementation can support neurological and cognitive health, promote a healthy mood, and offer neuroprotective effects. (11,12)Additionally, creatine has been reported to support healthy metabolism of lipids, glucose, bone, and homocysteine in older adults. (1)

product.title: Super Absorbable Tocotrienols
product.description:
For you, if you want antioxidants that promote healthy cells throughout the body

Super Absorbable Tocotrienols can:

  • Inhibit oxidation damage

  • Help shield DNA & protect cellular membranes

  • Encourage healthy brain function

  • Promote whole-body health

  • Support healthy hair growth and cell division

Life Extension's Super-Absorbable Tocotrienols soft gels deliver high-quality vitamin E tocotrienols extracted from red palm oil from the Elaeis guineensis tree. Because of their specific chemical structure, tocotrienols can provide potent antioxidant benefits throughout the body.

Health benefits at a glance:Cells are the central organism in any living thing, but few people think about protecting their body at the cellular level.Super-Absorbable Tocotrienols can do exactly that by protecting cell membranes and the DNA in cells against oxidative damage. Furthermore, it can also contribute to overall body health by supporting healthy cell division.

Why it works:Many people do not know that vitamin E contains eight different compounds. Commercial vitamin E supplements only focus on four of these compounds, while leaving out the other four compounds called tocotrienols, which are actually rich in therapeutic and antioxidant benefits.Super-Absorbable Tocotrienols softgels contain tocotrienols that are extracted from red palm oil from the Elaeis guineensis tree. Because of their unique structure, tocotrienols provide potent antioxidant benefits throughout the body. The fact is that tocotrienols shield DNA from oxidative damage while protecting cellular membranes.Moreover, scientists have discovered that tocotrienols support healthy cell division, promote a healthy lipid profile protect brain function and even support healthy hair growth.Through a highly absorbable and patented delivery system Super-Absorbable Tocotrienols provides the most bioavailable red palm oil tocotrienols available on the European supplement market today.

The science behind the product:Research has shown that tocotrienols have the ability to support a wide range of organ systems such as the bones, the heart, the liver and the brain. It was found that tocotrienols play a role in promoting new artery formation, improving insulin sensitivity, protecting vital brain circuitry.Human research reports that tocotrienol supplementation can improve the lipid profile and promote healthy levels of total and LDL cholesterol. At the same time, tocotrienols protect the lipids in the blood against oxidation which can lead to arterial damage.

How to use:Take one (1) softgel two times daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Vitamine E (as D-alpha tocopherol) 13 mg Mixed tocotrienols (from EVNol SupraBio™) 50 mg
product.ingredients: Vitamine E (as D-alpha tocopherol) 13 mg Mixed tocotrienols (from EVNol SupraBio™) 50 mg

product.title: Biotin
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in helping produce the structural protein keratin

The nutrient in Biotin can:

  • Support healthy hair, skin and nails

  • Help maintain cellular energy production

  • Encourage healthy gene expression

As we get older, our bodies produce less of the structural proteins that we need to maintain healthy hair, skin, and nails. Biotin can help produce keratin, an important protein.

Health benefits at a glance:Biotin, sometimes referred to as vitamin B7, is a member of the water-soluble B-complex family, normally only required in small amounts. It is essential for healthy skin, hair and nails, supporting healthy hair and nails in people who are deficient.

Why it works:Biotin is used as a cofactor of enzymes involved in fatty acid metabolism, gluconeogenesis, and amino acid catabolism, and is essential in maintaining internal balance.It is essential for production of the protein keratin, and can therefore support healthy hair, skin and nails (1-4). Biotin is also needed for cellular energy production as a cofactor for the TCA-cycle, or Krebs cycle, enzymes (5,6).A growing body of evidence further suggests biotin may play an important role in gene expression (6).

The science behind the product:Biotin is used as a cofactor in the body, supporting the activities of enzymes involved in fatty acid synthesis, gluconeogenesis (the generation of glucose from non-carbohydrate sources) and amino acid breakdown. Biotin plays an important role in metabolic functioning as a coenzyme carrier of activated carbon dioxide in the TCA cycle (also known as the Krebs cycle). In its coenzyme form, biotin synthesises glucose from non-carbohydrate sources, and synthesises and breaks down certain fatty acids and amino acids.

How to use:It is important to note that biotin supplements can interfere with certain hormone and other lab tests (7,8). Be sure to consult your health care provider if you take supplemental biotin and need lab tests.

product.title: Ascorbyl Palmitate
product.description:
For you, if you want to help promote longevity by maintaining optimal levels of vitamin C

The fat-soluble vitamin C in Ascorbyl Palmitate can:

  • Offer fat-soluble antioxidant protection

  • Reach tissue areas where conventional vitamin C (ascorbic acid) cannot

  • Ensure optimal levels of circulating ascorbic acid longer than ordinary ascorbic acid

This form of vitamin C, Ascorbyl Palmitate, can cross cell membranes and other biological barriers, delivering free radical-scavenging ascorbic acid to regions that would otherwise be unreachable.

What is ascorbyl palmitate? Ascorbyl palmitate (AP) is a unique fusion of ascorbic acid and palmitic acid, creating a fat-soluble form of vitamin C, which means it can interact with lipid-based molecules. While ascorbic acid makes 40% of the ascorbyl palmitate molecule by weight, their activities cannot be directly compared since these two molecules function differently within the body. Benefits of ascorbyl palmitate This lipid solubility sets it apart from the water-soluble ascorbic acid found naturally in foods, enabling ascorbyl palmitate to penetrate cell membranes and other biological barriers that standard vitamin C cannot easily cross. This distinctive property allows it to deliver free radical-scavenging ascorbic acid to parts of the body that would otherwise remain out of reach. (1,2) Research shows that ascorbyl palmitate can (3-7): Protect red blood cells, endothelial cells, and delicate brain and nerve tissue against free radical damageKeep high levels of circulating ascorbic acid for extended periods compared to standard ascorbic acid Promote maintenance of intracellular ascorbic acid concentrations Enhance the capacity to protect lipids and DNA from oxidative stress and free radical damage Better inhibits protein glycation within human cells when compared to ascorbic acid

Supplement facts: Vitamin C (from 500 mg ascorbyl palmitate) 200 mg
product.ingredients: Vitamin C (from 500 mg ascorbyl palmitate) 200 mg

product.title: Inositol Caps
product.description:
• Mood & emotional wellness: Can help maintain balanced mood & mental well-being
  • Neurotransmitter health: Encouraging serotonin activity regulation for emotional stability
  • Metabolic support: Can promote healthy insulin response & glucose metabolism
  • Hormone balance: Helping to maintain already-healthy hormone levels & reproductive system wellness
  • Cell health: Supporting optimal cellular communication
  • Calcium & insulin signaling: Encouraging vital cell signaling throughout your body

Inositol Caps delivers myo-inositol, a naturally occurring molecule your body produces from glucose that acts as a key component of cell membranes and cellular signaling systems.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is inositol? It's is a biomolecule the body makes from glucose and a key intermediate of secondary messengers and a primary component of cellular membrane phospholipids, involved in several biological processes. It has been found to be essential for calcium and insulin signal transduction, and serotonin activity regulation.

Why it works:Inositol (also known as myo-inositol) is involved in neurotransmitter modulation, which may promote mood and emotional health.It's also found in plant foods such as legumes, whole grains and vegetables, and inositol is thought to be one of the reasons these foods confer their health benefits. But because phytates are indigestible by human enzymes, getting inositol requires microbial digestion — or supplementation.

The science behind the product:Inositol is a primary component of cell membrane phospholipids. Both membrane-bound and free inositol are important for supporting many cell functions and participate in maintaining cellular responses to external signaling. (1)For example, inositol can help support insulin responsiveness, which in turn support healthy lipid and glucose metabolism. (2,3) Meta-analyses of clinical trials in women have shown inositol supplements can help encourage healthy insulin response and glucose metabolism, as well as support already-healthy hormone levels and reproductive system health. (4-6)Inositol-based compounds are involved in neurotransmitter activity modulation, giving inositol potential benefits in promoting mental and emotional health. Some research indicates inositol may be beneficial for supporting stable moods. (7-9)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Effervescent Vitamin C Magnesium Crystals
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for an immediate relief formula for occasional constipation

The formula of Effervescent Vitamin C Magnesium Crystals can: 

  • Offer immediate relief from occasional constipation

    Relief from constipationOccasional constipation is a common gastrointestinal issue, particularly affecting women and older adults. (1,2) Lifestyle factors can contribute to this, including low dietary fiber intake, lack of exercise, and stress. (3-5) Even changes in daily routines can disrupt gut motility and lead to temporary digestive discomfort. (6) Effervescent Vitamin C Magnesium Crystals provides a dose-adjustable nutritional solution for immediate relief from occasional constipation. How it worksVitamin C is an antioxidant nutrient that helps protect against oxidative stress. Unabsorbed vitamin C acts as an osmotic agent, drawing water into the intestines and stimulating gut motility. (7,8) Magnesium is a trace mineral and cofactor in over 300 of enzymatic processes within cells. It helps maintain bone and muscle health, cognitive function and already-healthy blood pressure. (9,10) Like vitamin C, unabsorbed magnesium hasosmoticeffects in the intestines. (7,11) Effervescent Vitamin C Magnesium Crystals doses can be adjusted for individual needs and used up to three times a week. Since it’s not a fiber, it never creates more fecal bulk than you can easily evacuate.

product.title: L-Theanine
product.description:
• Calming: Can promote alert relaxation without drowsiness or sedation
  • Mood: Balanced emotional well-being & positive mental state
  • Stress response: Encouraging a healthy reaction to daily stressors
  • GABA neurotransmitter: Supporting brain chemicals that regulate dopamine & serotonin
  • Cognitive function: Can promote mental clarity & alert attentiveness

This formula provides 200 mg of pure L-theanine per serving.

What is L-theanine?Theanine is an amino acid primarily found in tea. Studies show it can cross the blood-brain barrier, and it's found to reduce anxiety by blocking excitatory stimuli at glutamate receptors in the brain while stimulating the production of the inhibitory, relaxing neurotransmitter GABA. (1) The calming effects and benefits of L-theanineIts benefits have been known around the world for centuries, particularly in East Asia. While ancient civilizations may have referred to L-theanine by different names, they understood and utilized its impact. (2)L-theanine is shown to produce calming, mood-enhancing effects by encouraging electrical brain activity commonly present when you are very relaxed, which sets you in a better mood.Moreover, L-theanine can modulate the formation of gamma amino butyric acid GABA (gamma amino butyric acid), a neurotransmitter that regulates the levels of two other neurotransmitters, dopamine and serotonin, and also promotes relaxation. (3) A pure theanine supplementLife Extension® L-Theanine contains only the pure L-theanine form of this amino acid. This formula provides 200 mg of soothing L-theanine in a convenient product.

product.title: Calcium D-Glucarate
product.description:
• Detoxification support: Helping flush unwanted compounds from your body naturally
  • Hormone balance: Can maintain optimal hormone levels & encourage clearance
  • Cellular health: Promoting balanced cell division in laboratory studies
  • Inflammatory response: Encouraging healthy inflammatory balance & antioxidant protection
  • Cholesterol support: Helping to maintain already-healthy cholesterol & lipid levels
  • Natural compound: Found in grapefruit, apples, oranges & cruciferous vegetables

Calcium D-Glucarate delivers the calcium salt of D-glucarate, a compound naturally made in your body through glucose metabolism.

Health benefit at a glance:First of all, what is Calcium D-glucarate? It is the calcium salt of D-glucarate, a compound made in the body through the oxidation of glucose. D-glucarate is also found naturally in grapefruit, apples, oranges, and cruciferous vegetables. Calcium D-glucarate is also made in the body.In order to keep you healthy, your body needs to go through the process of detoxification. D-glucarate can help inhibit enzymes that reverse the detoxification process, helping your body detox the way it should.

Why it works:By supporting effective detoxification, calcium D-glucarate can: Help maintain optimal hormone levels and promote clearance. (1-3) Encourage a healthy inflammatory response and offer antioxidant protection. (4-6) Support normal cell division in laboratory studies. (7-9) Help maintain already-healthy levels of cholesterol and other lipids. (2)

The science behind the product:A byproduct of the oxidation of glucose, calcium D-glucarate plays an important role in the body’s healthy detoxification process (and -system).D-glucarate can be converted into another compound that helps the body clear steroid hormones and various toxins through a detoxification process called glucuronidation. This active D-glucarate metabolite works by inhibiting an enzyme that reverses glucuronidation.Your body uses glucuronidation to make a large variety of substances more water-soluble, and, by extension, allow for their subsequent elimination through urine or feces (via bile from the liver).

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Calcium (from 200 mg Calcium D-Glucarate) 24 mg
product.ingredients: Calcium (from 200 mg Calcium D-Glucarate) 24 mg

product.title: Biosil, 30 caps

Silicon is an essential trace element that can promote the normal growth, development and integrity of hair, skin, nails, arteries, bones and joints. Biosil is a silicon supplement that can offer the benefits of this trace element.
