product.title: Advanced Olive Leaf Vascular Support with Celery Seed Extract
product.description:
For you, if you want to enjoy the benefits of heart-healthy olive leaf extract and the vascular health support of celery

Health benefits at a glance:Advanced Olive Leaf Vascular Support with Celery Seed Extract is designed to support optimal cardiovascular health by a unique, dual-action formulation containing two bioactive compounds.

Why it works:Olive Leaf extract contains a compound called oleuropein, which is a natural polyphenol with a multitude of health benefits. (1) It can help maintain already healthy blood pressure.It can also provide the distinctive tangy, pungent, almost bitter flavor found in high-quality extra virgin olive oils. (2)Celery seed extract contains a substance called 3-n-butylphthalide (3nB), which is shown to support a healthy inflammatory response that is essential to maintaining a healthy circulatory system.It’s also a potent antioxidant that can benefit vascular health by promoting healthy platelet function and helping to relax blood vessels, both of which promote healthy circulation. (5-10)

The science behind the product:Olive Leaf extract, Oleuropein: Two clinical trials documented that supplementation with 1.000 mg per day of olive leaf extract resulted in an average 11.5 mm Hg decline in systolic readings and a 4.8 mm Hg drop in diastolic readings after eight weeks. (3,4)Celery seed extract (Apium graveolens): In a small clinical trial scientists using an equivalent amount of active compounds as found in this celery seed extract reported an average 8.2 mm Hg decline in systolic readings and 8.5 mm Hg drop in diastolic readings — after just six weeks. (11)While olive leaf and celery seed extracts demonstrate impressive support individually, Advanced Olive Leaf Vascular Support with Celery Seed Extract provides a combination of two bioactive compounds for dual-action vascular support.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Heart Health
product.description:
For you, if you want to promote heart health with a powerful probiotic supplement

The innovative formula of FLORASSIST® Heart Health can:

  • Help maintain healthy total and LDL cholesterol levels

  • Promote normal C-reactive protein levels

  • Encourage healthy levels of apolipoprotein B-100 within the normal range

  • Help maintain healthy levels of fibrinogen, a protein involved in healthy clot formation

FLORASSIST® Heart Health contains the probiotic strain Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 which can promote cardiovascular health.

Health benefits with a glance:Probiotics are known for helping keep your digestive system balanced.FLORASSIST® Heart Health provides the probiotic Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 which has been shown in scientific studies to promote heart health by supporting already healthy levels of cholesterol, CRP, and fibrinogen.FLORASSIST® Heart Health offers easy-to-swallow capsules with no unpleasant aftertaste, a great addition to maintaining a heart-healthy lifestyle.

Why it works:In clinical trials, L. reuteri 30242 has been demonstrated to support healthy cholesterol levels already within the normal range. Moreover, this novel probiotic has been shown to promote healthy levels already within the normal range of: ApoB-100, a protein found in LDL cholesterolC-reactive proteinFibrinogen, a protein involved in healthy clot formationScience behind the product:Supporting already-healthy cholesterol Probiotics have been part of traditional diets for thousands of years, such as fermented milk and vegetable products in form of yogurt and pickles. These foods are known to contribute to the optimal health and longevity of some studied populations. Today, scientific research has discovered heart health benefits for a specific probiotic organism, Lactobacillus reuteri 30242. This strain has been shown in clinical trials to help maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels, including the important LDL cholesterol. (1,2) Encouraging healthy levels of apoproteinsIt's important to maintain already healthy levels of cholesterol and so is LDL cholesterol. However, you may not have heard about the importance of molecules called apoproteins that are part of cholesterol. Apolipoproteins B100 and A1 are, according to medical research, as important as cholesterol itself. (3) Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 has been demonstrated to encourage a healthy balance of apolipoproteins B100 and A1 for levels already within the normal range. (1,2)Promoting healthy levels of CRPC-reactive protein (CRP) is a powerful predictor of overall cardiovascular health. Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 is shown to promote healthy CRP levels already within the normal range. (2)Maintaining normal fibrinogen levelsFibrinogen is a protein and important contributor to blood clotting, and fibrinogen levels are often used as an indicator of cardiovascular wellness. Lactobacillus reuteri 30242 has been shown to help maintain fibrinogen levels already within the normal range. (2)

product.title: Enhanced Zinc Lozenges

For you, if you need a solid immune response right now!

  • Be taken at the first signs of immune challenges

  • Deliver widespread support of the immune system

  • Offer naturally flavored peppermint lozenges

Do you need a strong immune response right now? Go for Enhanced Zinc Lozenges. These large lozenges are designed to dissolve slowly, releasing 100% of their zinc as ionic zinc. This can help fortify vulnerable mucous membranes in your mouth and throat.

Health benefits at a glance: The content of Enhanced Zinc Lozenges can look "intimidating", but these lozenges really are the “ace up your sleeve” when it comes to enhancing your immune system here and now. The size of these advanced, vegetarian, and peppermint-flavored zinc lozenges allows for them to dissolve slowly, releasing ionic zinc to support your body against immune challenges and to mount a robust immune response.As such, Enhanced Zinc Lozenges are not for daily use.

Why it works:Zinc is a trace mineral that stimulates around 300 enzymes in the body and simultaneously fortifies the immune system.There’s more than one type of zinc preparation. The zinc acetate in this formula releases 100% of its zinc as ionic zinc, which is positively charged zinc ions. (1)This is the preferred kind of zinc, because it provides enhanced immune support, encouraging a strong immune response. (2,3)

The science behind the product:How to choose the right zinc supplementLife Extension® Enhanced Zinc Lozenges are filled with zinc acetate and have no other ingredients that could reduce the delivery of these immune-supportive, positively charged zinc ions, making this a great immune-support supplement.The right dose of zinc acetateOne lozenge of Enhanced Zinc Lozenges provides 18.75 mg of zinc, as zinc acetate.Only a few are required for immune response support, therefore these special lozenges are not meant for daily use.So, make sure you have the bottle close by for immediate access!

How to use:Completely dissolve in mouth one (1) lozenge every 2 wakeful hours, not to exceed 8 lozenges per day, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Do not use for more than 3 consecutive days.Do not chew or swallow lozenge.May cause nausea if taken on an empty stomach.

product.title: EnergyGain™
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in fighting general fatigue and energy management

The ingredients in EnergyGain™ can:

  • Help maintain energy levels

  • Support vital body activities affected by energy metabolism

  • Minimize fatigue-related decline associated with aging

  • Promote a positive mood

Common complaints about fatigue include low energy, unrefreshed sleep, head or muscle discomfort, and weakness. Stimulants such as caffeine offer only short-term relief with possible health consequences. EnergyGain™ can help maintain healthy energy.

Health benefits at a glance:Millions of people are affected by fatigue. Common complaints include low energy, unrefreshed sleep, head or muscle discomfort, and weakness. Stimulants such as caffeine offer only short-term relief with possible health consequences.EnergyGain™ was developed to provide a more effective solution to general fatigue and maintain healthy energy levels with bioactive polyphenol compounds called roburins that support healthy ribosomes, the small molecular factories in your cells that create proteins.

Why it works:Support for cellular factoriesIn each of your cells, there can be as many as 10 million ribosomes, each creating proteins that are essential to cellular function and structure, including energy metabolism. (1)EnergyGain™ is a proprietary extract of French oak (Quercus robur) wood, and studies indicate that oak wood extract can promote ribosomal biogenesis, the body's natural way of producing new ribosomes to rejuvenate ribosome function. (2,9)One mechanism involved is the upregulation of important genes.Targeting general fatigueBy targeting complaints of general fatigue at the cellular level, this product can be an ideal option for those who would like to:Maintain energy levelsPromote ribosomal production of functional and structural proteinsSupport vital body activities affected by energy metabolismMinimize fatigue-related decline associated with aging

The science behind the product:In clinical studies, French oak wood extract has been shown to help relieve effects caused by general fatigue – to help combat weakness, promote healthy and refreshing sleep, support a positive mood, encourage energy levels, and relieve discomfort in the head, joints, and muscles. (4-6,8)The studies also indicated that French oak wood extract can help protect against oxidative stress often increased by general fatigue. (3,4,7)The following benefits were found:18% reduction in exhaustion and weakness44% reduction in unrefreshing sleep33% reduction in head discomfort51% reduction in joint discomfort63% reduction in muscle discomfort

product.title: Tear Support with MaquiBright®
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in healthy tear production and eye comfort

The ingredients in Tear Support with MaquiBright® can: 
  • Help keep you eyes comfortable and lubricated during the day
  • Promote eye health and healthy tear production
  • Offer studied maqui berry extract

Environmental factors, using a computer, wearing contact lenses and aging can all affect eye health and cause discomfort. Tear Support with MaquiBright® is an innovative formula that can promote eye health from within and support the body’s natural ocular lubrication all day long.

A commonly experienced problem with advancing age is the onset of eye discomfort. Contanct lenses, environmental factors, and computer use also increase the chances of dry, irritated, itchy eyes.Tear Support with MaquiBright® is a unique oral supplement that can support eye health from the inside out for systemic, continuous comfort. The formula can promote your body's natural mechanisms to facilitate the production of your own natural tears.The secret lies in the proprietary maqui berry extract and its supply of compounds called delphinidins. They can encourage natural defenses against chemical and light stimulation and ultraviolet (UV) light. (1,2)Research with healthy volunteers taking 60 mg of this extract per day experienced:A 45% increase in the production of tear fluid in both eyes (3)A 72% improvement in dry eye symptoms after 60 days (4)To support eye health, comfort, and lubrication all day long you can now take one vegetarian capsule in the morning instead of adding artificial tears in the form of drops throughout the day. Tear Support with MaquiBright® can in this way support you to get your eyes back to feeling and looking their best!

product.title: Carnosine
product.description:
• Anti-aging support: Combating glycation processes that contribute to age-related decline
  • Muscle cell protection: Can promote muscle health & optimal function throughout aging
  • Heart health: Encouraging efficient cardiac muscle contraction & calcium signaling
  • Exercise recovery: Can support post-workout recovery & physical performance
  • Longevity promotion: Helping maintain youthful cellular function as you age
  • Protein preservation: Can inhibit formation of advanced glycation end products (AGEs)

Carnosine delivers 500 mg of this potent dipeptide compound composed of beta-alanine and L-histidine to support healthy aging and vitality.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is carnosine? It's a dipeptide, a natural antioxidant in the body as well as available through food. Carnosine is made of the two amino acids beta-alanine and L-histidine. Although carnosine is naturally present, levels decrease with age. This anti-aging supplement contains 500 mg of carnosine to support longevity and exercise recovery.

Why it works:Carnosine has the ability to suppress various aspects of aging and, as a result, delay some of the age-related conditions. It can promote overall health and recovery after workout, help the heart muscle contract more efficiently and inhibit glycation.

The science behind the product:Carnosine: A key player in healthy agingThe dipeptide carnosine can help counteract glycation, a process linked to aging that damages proteins in the body. Glycation occurs when proteins or lipids bind with sugars in an uncontrolled, non-enzymatic way, leading to the formation of non-functional structures in the body.The process of glycation can contribute to wrinkled skin. Research shows that carnosine can inhibit the formation of advanced glycation end products, AGEs. (1)Protecting the membranes of muscle cellCarnosine levels in muscle cells are closely linked to lifespan. (1,2) While muscle cells (myocytes) naturally contain high amounts of carnosine, these levels drop significantly with age – declining by 63% from age 10 to 70. (4) This reduction may contribute to age-related muscle loss and decreased function. Moreover, carnosine plays a role in heart muscle health by helping regulate calcium signaling in heart muscle cells. (5) Given these benefits, Carnosine is a valuable addition to any comprehensive nutritional regimen.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Taurine
product.description:
• Cardiovascular support: Can help maintain normal blood pressure, heart rhythm & vascular function
  • Nervous system: Promoting neuroprotection, cognitive function & mental clarity throughout aging
  • Vision & hearing: Can encourage retinal health & protect inner ear cells from damage
  • Liver function: Helping maintain bile salt production & optimal liver health
  • Muscle health: Supporting skeletal muscle strength & exercise performance capacity
  • Cellular balance: Can promote electrolyte balance, membrane stability & water regulation in cells

Taurine delivers 1000 mg of this semi-essential amino acid per capsule to support multiple vital body systems.

Health benefits at a glance:Taurine can support the cardiovascular- and nervous systems and promote cognitive and liver health (encouraging bile salt production in the liver). It can also encourage water and calcium movement across cell membranes, which can help maintain cell membrane stability. A daily capsule of 1000 mg of taurine can provide multiple benefits. This product also comes as powder.

Why it works:Taurine is one of the body’s most abundant free, intercellular amino acids and is produced by the body itself. Produced from the amino acid L-cysteine, researchers have described it as “one of the most essential substances in the body.” Taurine is found many places in the body but especially in the tissues of the central nervous system, where it appears to play a regulating role. However, taurine is lacking in many diets and, in case of illness, may not be sufficiently produced by your body. In fact, the levels drop by as much as 80% with age! Therefore, adding this nutrient to your dietary regime, can help restoring youthful taurine blood levels.According to published research, taurine has been shown to: Support insulin sensitivity and healthy glucose metabolismHelp maintain intracellular electrolytes balance (particularly calcium)Support eye/vison health and hearing functionHelp maintain central nervous system healthEncourage cell membrane stability & water balance (osmoregulation) Promote optimal liver function and healthy bile salt formation Help maintain cognitive function and neuron integrity Encourage heart health and function Promote skeletal muscle health Boost exercise capacity Reduce chronic inflammationHelp prevent diabetic problems

The science behind the product:Taurine for heart healthStudies suggest that taurine promotes cardiovascular health in a variety of ways. It can help maintain already healthy blood pressure, heart rhythm, and vascular function and encourages healthy heart muscle contractions. Dietary taurine can also help promote normal insulin response and support already healthy blood glucose levels. Nervous system health and taurine Taurine is especially concentrated in the excitable tissues of the central nervous system. It plays an important neuroprotective role, in part through its ability to maintain water and electrolyte balance across cell membranes, inhibit oxidative processes and promote a healthy inflammatory response. Supplementation with this nutrient can also promote healthy cognitive function, retinal health, and support hearing. It can protect inner ear cells from damage by normalizing the flow of calcium ions they require for proper function. Muscle health, aging and taurineTaurine may support skeletal muscle health and has been shown to support exercise performance and help maintain muscle mass and function as we age. Evidence indicates that taurine supports healthy aging and promotes longevity.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Super Omega-3 Plus EPA/DHA Fish Oil, Sesame, Olive, Krill & Astax
product.description:
For you, if you want synergistic benefits from high-quality fish oil & complementary ingredients 

Super Omega-3 Plus EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans, Olive Extract, Krill & Astaxanthin can:

  • Promote cardiovascular & cognitive health

  • Provide the body with critical omega-3 fatty acids

  • Offer heart-healthy Mediterranean olive & sesame extracts

  • Support already-healthy LDL & HDL cholesterol & triglyceride levels

  • Deliver a formula fortified with Antarctic krill oil & super-antioxidant astaxanthin

Omega-3 EPA/DHA and complementary ingredients in this fish oil supplement can promote heart and brain health, enhance mitochondrial function, offer inflammation health support, and maintain adequate levels of important fatty acids. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid a fishy aftertaste.

Health benefits at a glance:The omega-3 acids EPA and DHA can support your cardiovascular system, brain health, help reduce chronic inflammation, and more.The fish oil used in this formula has been gently purified by a proprietary process to rule out contamination with environmental pollutants.Moreover, this bestseller goes beyond fish oil. It's a comprehensive omega-3 formula with synergistic nutrients that enhance the omega-3 benefits.

Why it works:Researchers have long known the health benefits of omega-3 fatty acids, which are abundant in the Mediterranean diet. Omega-3s can be obtained from a variety of sources, and studies also shows that omega-3 from different sources can have complementary benefits throughout the body, enhanching the health impact. DHA and EPA are the two most essential omega-3s. Super Omega-3 Plus provides the body with EPA and DHA from premium quality fish oil and concentrated oil from krill. The formula also include olive extract, sesame lignans, and astaxanthin. Together, all these nutrients can provide enhanced support of the omega-3 benefits. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid the fishy aftertaste some people experience when taking omega-3 supplements.

The science behind the product:What are the benefits of omega-3s from fish oil?The essential omega-3 fatty acids can help: (1-4)Keep your heart and blood vessels functioning optimally Support healthy circulation and maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels Counteract inflammatory factors, promoting overall wellness.Promote already-healthy levels of LDL, HDL, and triglycerides. Higher omega-3 levels have also been linked to: (5-8) Healthy brain functionBalanced moodGraceful agingClean fish oil & concentrated krill oilLife Extension makes Super Omega-3 formula with pure, high-quality fish oil. Concentrated Antarctic krill oil (Euphausia superba) is added, delivering an advanced omega-3 supplement. Both fish oil and krill oil can help restore the omega-6/omega-3 balance in the body. What are the health benefits of astaxanthin? Astaxanthin is a red-orange carotenoid pigment naturally found in microalgae and krill oil. It's a powerful antioxidant shown to have widespread health benefits such as support joint, DNA, brain, heart, the immune system and mitochondrial health.Furthermore, it has also been shown to encourage healthy blood glucose levels for those already in the normal range and can protect sensitive cells in the eye.Polyphen-oil™ olive extract & sesame lignans The Mediterranean diet, full of olive oil and seafood, is associated with heart health and a healthy life span. (9-11) This has inspired Life Extension to combine a pure fish oil with sesame lignans and unique polyphenols from olive extract (fruit and leaf) and sesame lignans. The polyphenol-rich olive extract is concentrated and standardized to provide the benefits of olives’ heart health-promoting polyphenols. This olive extract provides a healthy dose one might find in a high-quality Mediterranean diet, providing the polyphenol equivalent of just over 4 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil. The role of sesame lignans is to augment the benefits of fish oil by several mechanisms such as guarding the unsaturated fatty acids in the body against oxidation and directing them towards pathways that help with inflammatory reactions.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics
product.description:
• Digestive enzyme blend: Helping break down proteins, fats, carbs & plant-based foods
  • Plant-based diet support: Can promote comfortable digestion of veggies, legumes & leafy greens
  • Probiotic inclusion: Encouraging balanced gut microbiome & gastrointestinal comfort
  • Reduced bloating: Can minimize discomfort after eating large or fiber-rich meals
  • Nutrient absorption: Supporting optimal breakdown & utilization of nutrients from food

Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics can promote optimal digestion and nutrient absorption through a scientifically formulated blend of 10 vegetarian enzymes.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all; what are enzymes? Digestive enzymes break down food, and they are essential to the absorption of nutrients from food and used in many bodily processes.However, the natural aging process can inhibit the production of digestive enzymes, making it harder for the body to absorb and use the nutrients from food. This can result in feeling bloated and other digestive discomforts after eating a large meal, as well as causing imbalances in the digestive system.Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics is good for anyone trying to up their intake of hard-to-digest veggies, legumes, fruit, or leafy greens.This innovative vegetarian and non-GMO formula can promote healthy digestion of hard-to-digest starches, sugars, and cellulose from vegetables, as well as proteins, fats, carbohydrates, and lactose. (1,2)

Why it works:Research has shown that supplementing with digestive enzymes can promote optimal digestion and absorption of nutrients from the foods you eat. (1-3)The vegetarian-friendly Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics contains a scientifically formulated blend of 10 carefully chosen vegetarian digestive enzymes to help digest plant-based diets – veggies, legumes, fruit, or leafy greens – as well as macros such as protein, dairy, starches, and fatMoreover, the enzymes are combined with a beneficial probiotic strain B. coagulansthat can support the digestive tract and health, promoting a healthy microbiome and GI balance while suppressing less-beneficial bacteria at the same time, for overall better intestinal health, function, and digestivecomfort.

The science behind the product:Supporting optimal health starts with optimal digestionThis digestive health formula contains a blend of 10 powerful digestive enzymes like alpha-galactosidase, protease 3.0 and lipase, and others to promote optimal digestion of main types of foods: Plant-derived carbohydrates & starches: Alpha galactosidase promotes carbohydrate digestion and supports GI comfort by breaking down oligosaccharides found in foods such as legumes (beans) and cruciferous vegetables, such as cauliflower, broccoli, cabbage, and others, which are notorious for causing occasional abdominal bloating and discomfort. Dietary fiber: Hemicellulase, xylanase, and pectinase help break down plant cell components to promote optimal digestion and nutrient absorption. Protein: Protease 3.0 helps digest proteins at acidic pH, like in the stomach. This enzyme helps break down stubborn protein and promotes the digestion of gliadin (a compound found in wheat). Protease SP helps break down most soluble proteins into smaller molecular weight peptides and free amino acids. Fats: Lipase is an enzyme that helps break down dietary fats. Dairy: Lactase is essential for digesting lactose from dairy products.Beneficial probiotic for better GI balance Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes and Probiotics also delivers the added benefits of the probiotic B. coagulans. Probiotics such as this one support digestive health and inhibit less beneficial bacteria, which in turn promotes digestive comfort. (4>

How to use:Take one (1) capsule one to two times daily before the heaviest meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. For maximum benefit, take one capsule before you eat.

product.title: Arterial Protect
product.description:
• Arterial plaque stability: Can enhance the structural integrity of arterial plaques through collagen synthesis
  • Endothelial function: Promoting healthy blood vessel lining for optimal circulation
  • Antioxidant protection: Can combat oxidative stress affecting cardiovascular tissues
  • Anti-inflammatory support: Encouraging balanced inflammatory responses in blood vessels

Arterial Protect can help maintain cardiovascular wellness through a clinically tested blend of French maritime pine bark extract and gotu kola.

The importance of plaque stabilityWith advancing age, plaque builds up in the walls of our arteries. Plaque is made up of lipids, proteins, white blood cells, cellular waste products, and calcium. (1) While the gradual accumulation of plaque causes the blood vessels to narrow over time, plaque can also become unstable and rupture, potentially damaging the inner lining of the arteries (endothelium) and blocking blood flow.The stability of this plaque plays a crucial role in maintaining proper cardiovascular health and function. Arterial Protect combines targeted extracts that can help stabilize plaque and combat oxidative stress.A clinically backed formulaArterial Protect offers a clinically tested combination of two extracts shown to support the health, structure, and function of arteries:Pycnogenol® French maritime pine bark extract has been shown to improve endothelial function and arterial blood circulation. Additionally, it's known to inhibit oxidative stress, inflammation, and platelet aggregation to promote arterial health. (2)Centellicum® Gotu Kola extract was found in placebo-controlled studies to enhance the stability of arterial plaque. (3,4) Stable plaque is characterized by a fibrous cap rich in collagen that holds the plaque in place. (1) This extract can also help inhibit inflammation and oxidation to support vascular health. (5)

product.title: Dopa-Mind
product.description:
For you if you are interested in nurturing the cognitive function and brain health

The ingredients in Dopa-Mind™ can:
  • Support youthful brain dopamine levels 
  • Promote mental acuity, measurable using standardized cognitive testing
  • Help maintain cerebral artery dilation for healthy brain blood flow

Dopamine affects mood and cognition, and over time, dopamine levels decline due mostly to an enzyme called MAO-B. Dopa-Mind™ contains wild green oat extract with compounds that can act as MAO-B inhibitors. Lower MAO-B helps increase dopamine levels.

Health Benefits at a Glance: First of all; what is dopamine? Dopamine is an essential neurotransmitter that helps support mood and cognition. However, dopamine levels decline with age, corresponding to a decrease in mental performance. Dopa-Mind™ can help promote healthy dopamine levels. Why it Works:The wild green oat extract in Dopa-Mind™ has been shown to encourage more youthful cognitive performance in those where it is showing signs of waning, help maintain cognitive function in those whose minds are still healthy, and it may also support longevity.The Science Behond the Product:Dopa-Mind™ contains an extract of wild green oats that is demonstrated to help inhibit the monoamine oxidase-B (MAO-B) enzyme. This is important because age-related decline in dopamine is largely caused by rising levels of MAO-B. Published studies show that by inhibiting MAO-B, this bioactive wild green oat extract promotes healthy dopamine levels.This MAO-B inhibiting mechanism has been shown to support mental acuity and longevity. (1) In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial in aging volunteers with below-average cognition, researchers demonstrated that 1,600 mg of the same wild green oat extract found in Dopa-Mind™ produced a 74% improvement on a standard test of mental acuity. (1)Morover, research shows that 800 mg of the same extract supported mental processing time and speed. (2) In other research, this extract was found to promote cerebral artery dilation, encouraging the healthy blood flow vital to brain health. (3)How to Use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Thyroid Support Complex
product.description:
For you, if you are looking to get comprehensive thyroid support and reach optimal thyroid function

 The formula of Thyroid Support Complex can:

  • Support already healthy thyroid hormone levels

  • Encourage healthy thyroid activity and function

  • Promote energy levels

  • Support motivation and concentration

  • Promote healthy metabolism and fat-burning for energy

The thyroid gland acts as the body’s thermostat and is one of the major regulators of metabolism. The thyroid produces hormones that are critical for energy, metabolism, weight management and brain health. Thyroid Support Complex with ashwagandha combines potent nutrients that can support healthy thyroid function.

The thyroid functionThe thyrod gland acts as the body’s thermostat and is one of the major regulators of metabolism. The two main hormones it produces are T3 and T4, which travel through the bloodstream to reach almost every cell in the body.Optimal thyroid function can help improve energy levels, metabolism, healthy weight management, motivation, and concentration.Life Extension's Thyroid Support Complex formula combines critical nutrients that have been shown to support healthy thyroid function.Comprehensive thyroid supportThyroid Support Complex provides:Ashwagandha, an adaptogenic herb, demonstrated by research to support production of the thyroid hormone T4 in our body.Korean Ginseng, clinically shown to reduce the inactive, thyroid hormone-inhibiting reverse T3 form, and support healthy levels of T3 and T4.For further enhanced benefitsThe following additional nutrients are included in Thyroid Support Complex:Iodine and tyrosine, which are needed for the production of thyroid hormones.Vitamin A, an important nutrient for supporting healthy serum T3 levels.Vitamin B12, which is required in sufficient amounts for healthy thyroid activity.

product.title: X-R Shield
product.description:
For you, if you want targeted nutrition for supporting cell health

The formula of X-R Shield can:
  • Help maintain cellular integrity

    Ionizing radiation such as cosmic radiation or X-rays from medical diagnostic imaging procedures can cause harm to human body tissues by mechanisms including direct DNA damage and the production of toxic free radicals. In addition to limiting and/or avoiding excessive ionizing radiation exposure from various sources (e.g. frequent medical diagnostic imaging procedures like CT and/or PET scans, recurrent transcontinental plane travel) whenever reasonable, additional cellular support during radiation exposure and subsequent free radical generation is helpful for optimal health.Research indicates that certain nutrients may help support the body’s cellular integrity in the context of ionizing radiation.The new X-R Shield provides the following protective nutrients:Lemon balm supports the production of 3 bodily enzymes that form a natural defense system against free radical and DNA damage: superoxide dismutase, glutathione peroxidase, and catalase.Ginkgo biloba supports the body’s capacity to counteract reactive oxygen species, which can interact with DNA. Spirulina supports the production of white blood cells in the bone marrow. These immune cells are essential for a healthy immune response. At least five days prior to ionizing radiation exposure (e.g. medical diagnostic imaging procedures or transcontinental plane travel) consider taking three capsules of X-R Shield one to three times daily and continue taking until the bottle is finished.

product.title: Super Ubiquinol CoQ10, 60 softgels
product.description:
• Cellular energy: Can power mitochondria for vital energy production throughout the body
  • Heart health: Promoting cardiovascular function & optimal heart muscle performance
  • Antioxidant protection: Can shield cells from oxidative damage & free radicals
  • Superior absorption: Ubiquinol form can absorb up to 8x better than standard ubiquinone
  • Anti-aging support: Helping replenish CoQ10 levels that naturally decline with age

Super Ubiquinol CoQ10, 60 softgels features the highly bioavailable ubiquinol form in a patented delivery system.

Health benefits at a glance:Mitochondria are the energy factories of the human cells and coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) is an essential component for healthy cell function. CoQ10 is required to extract energy from fats and sugars. However, the production of CoQ10 in our body declines as we age and we need to supplement the daily need. That is because CoQ10 in sufficient quantities helps the cells work efficiently and protect proteins, lipids and DNA from oxidation.

Why it works:More people are supplementing with CoQ10 than ever before due to increased awareness about cholesterol lowering statin drugs. Many doctors, though, do not know that ageing can be a greater cause for CoQ10 decrease than statin drugs. What is even more worrying is the deficit caused by the dual effects of aging and statin drug use that can severely weaken the vitality of our cells. Another issue is that CoQ10 is difficult to absorb. When it comes to choosing a CoQ10 supplement, the primary factor is how many swallowed milligrams actually make it into your bloodstream. In severely ill patients conventional ubiquinone CoQ10 has been proven hardly detectable, while ubiquinol led to clinical improvements.

The science behind the product:Scientific studies show that ubiquinol absorbs up to 8 times better than ubiquinone and higher levels of ubiquinol remain in the blood. Studies measuring exercise-induced fatigue have shown a 90% greater potency of ubiquinol compared to ubiquinone. In middle-aged mice, ubiquinol was shown to be 40% more effective in slowing ageing processes. Life Extension Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 offers the highly bioavailable ubiquinol form of CoQ10 in a patented delivery system with a superior absorption level.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Calories 5 Calories from fat 5 Total Fat 0.5 g Ubiquinol (as Kaneka Ubiquinol ™ ) 100 mg
product.ingredients: Calories 5 Calories from fat 5 Total Fat 0.5 g Ubiquinol (as Kaneka Ubiquinol ™ ) 100 mg

product.title: BioActive Folate & Vitamin B12
product.description:
• Heart health: Helping maintain normal homocysteine levels for cardiovascular wellness
  • Brain & cognition: Can promote cognitive function, memory & neurological health throughout aging
  • DNA & cell health: Encouraging optimal DNA synthesis & new cell formation
  • Digestive system: Can support GI tract health & immune system function
  • Bioactive forms: Features 5-MTHF folate & methylcobalamin B12 for superior absorption
  • Red blood cells: Supporting normal red blood cell production & formation

BioActive Folate & Vitamin B12 provides clinically studied, biologically active forms of these essential B vitamins that your body can use directly without conversion.

Health benefits at a glance: Maintaining adequate folate- and vitamin B12 levels is crucial. BioActive Folate & Vitamin B12 provides clinically studied, biologically active forms of folate and vitamin B12 that your body can use directly. This is to maximize their benefits in supporting heart, brain, digestive health, and more.Note: A diet rich in folate may help lower the risk of brain or spinal cord defects in newborns. Women of childbearing age are advised to get 600-800 mcg of folate daily.

Why it works:The vitamin B family is complex and provides numerous health benefits. What is folate? Folate is a form of B vitamin that plays an essential role in DNA health, red blood cell formation, vascular function, cognition, and more. Vitamin B12 supports the brain and promotes heart health and nerve cell growth by helping to keep homocysteine levels within the normal range.

The science behind the product: Biologically active folate & vitamin B12 Bioactive Folate & Vitamin B12 capsules deliver folate as methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF) and vitamin B12 as methylcobalamin. 5-MTHF is the metabolically active form of folic acid. Unlike folic acid, it doesn’t need to be converted by the body before use. Research shows 5-MTHF is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid and can cross the blood-brain barrier, making it especially beneficial for neurological health. (1) Methylcobalamin is the bioactive form of vitamin B12, efficiently absorbed and utilized by the body and central nervous system. How folate supports the body Folate is found in abundance in leafy green vegetables. It plays a central role in the DNA synthesis needed for cell growth and new cell formation, and it also helps convert vitamin B12 to one of its bioactive forms. The health benefits include supporting healthy DNA function, helping maintain normal homocysteine levels for heart support, and promoting skin, GI tract, and immune system health. Folate also encourages a healthy endothelial function and can improve mild memory loss associated with aging. (2-6) Because folate is essential for cell division and protein synthesis, maintaining optimal levels is especially important for digestive health. Certain medications, such as long-term pain relievers, can interfere with folate metabolism. The important role of vitamin B12 Vitamin B12 is naturally present in animal-based foods such as dairy and eggs. Because of this, vegans and vegetarians are at risk of deficiency. In addition, the body’s ability to absorb B12 from food typically decreases with age. (7) Vitamin B12 promotes brain and cognitive health. It supports heart health by helping regenerate the amino acid methionine, which in turn helps maintain normal homocysteine levels. B12 also plays a role in nerve cell growth, methylation, and metabolism. And when combined with folate, it helps maintain the production of red blood cells (erythropoiesis) within normal range. (7)

How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Folic acid (as L-5-methyltetrahydrofolate calcium salt) 400 mcg Vitamin B12 (as methylcobalamin) 300 mcg
product.ingredients: Folic acid (as L-5-methyltetrahydrofolate calcium salt) 400 mcg Vitamin B12 (as methylcobalamin) 300 mcg

product.title: Advanced Milk Thistle, 60 gels
product.description:
• Liver protection: Helping fight oxidative stress & support liver function
  • Enhanced absorption: Phosphatidylcholine complex can deliver up to 10-fold greater bioavailability
  • Detoxification: Promoting natural cleansing processes & cellular defense mechanisms
  • Silymarin & silybin: Powerful compounds can stabilize cell membranes & neutralize free radicals
  • Full-spectrum protection: Isosilybin A & B for comprehensive liver health support
  • Overall vitality: promoting wellness benefits throughout the entire body

Advanced Milk Thistle combines silybin with phosphatidylcholine and other phospholipids to enhance absorption of milk thistle's active compounds, providing powerful liver support.

Health benefits at a glance:Liver health formulas made with milk thistle have been in use for centuries. Advanced milk thistle extract contains phytonutrients that can fight oxidative stress and support liver health. The formula of Advanced Milk Thistle is combining silybin with phosphatidylcholine and other phospholipids, and it can enhance the absorption of milk thistle's active compounds, providing powerful liver health support.

Why it works:Protecting your liver is beneficial for the overall health and vitality of the body. Milk thistle extract is one of nature's most potent weapons to support liver health. Its bioactive compounds are known to stabilize cell membranes, assist in detoxification activities and neutralize a wide range of free radicals.Milk thistle contains powerful compounds that are beneficial not only for the liver, but for the overall health and vitality of the entire body. But the active compound in milk thistle, silybin, does not dissolve well in water, making it difficult for the body to absorb. Life Extension's milk thistle formula can overcome this roadblock by mixing silybin with a nutrient called phosphatidylcholine to boost uptake. Advanced Milk Thistle may provide advanced milk thistle benefits of silymarin, silibinins, and isosilybin A and B, as well as phospholipids to aid and promote absorption for enhanced health support. These compounds can deliver full-spectrum support for liver health.

The science behind the product:Modern living puts a heavy load on the liver, making it critical to proactively maintain liver health. That’s where hepato-protective herbs such as milk thistle come in. The powerful formula of Advanced Milk Thistle:Milk thistle contains antioxidants that support not only liver health, but overall health. (1-3)Silymarin is extracted from milk thistle. This extract is a powerful free radical scavenger that promotes healthy liver function in its own right. (4-10) Advanced extraction technology has now allowed us to isolate other constituents within the silymarin extract itself and test their ability to support liver health and beyond. Silibinin is another compound present in our high-quality milk thistle extract. Made up of silybins A and B, it is the most biologically active flavonolignan component found in milk thistle extract. Its beneficial effects on the liver have been shown in pre-clinical and clinical studies. (8,11)Isosilybin: Other milk thistle extracts called isosilybin A and B have proven to be the most efficient at helping to maintaining healthy cell division. (12,13)Phosphatidylcholine and other phospholipids can enhance milk thistle’s delivery.Until recently the technology did not exist to harness the plant's full benefits. The problem had to deal with the main bioactive component of milk thistle, called silybin, which does not dissolve well in water. (14) This makes it difficult for the body to absorb all of it. (14,15) Scientists have overcome silybin’s poor bioavailability by integrating it into a phytosome. A phytosome is a tiny sphere made out of plant-derived phosphatidylcholine.Phosphatidylcholine is an ideal "carrier molecule" for silibin and facilitates its transport across the intestinal lining into the bloodstream. The silybin-phosphatidylcholine complex is absorbed much better than silibin aloine and its bioavailability to the liver is 10-fold greater. (8,15,16) Scientists believe that phosphatidylcholine molecularly bonds to silybin, helping to steer it through the cell membranes in the intestinal tract. (15) This can improve the delivery of the benefits of milk thistle extracts for liver health.Preclinical and clinical evidence showed that this silybin-phosphatidylcholine complex resulted in almost 5-fold greater concentrations of silybin in the bloodstream than silymarin alone, and its ultimate bioavailability to the liver, its target organ, is up to 10-fold greater than pure silymarin. (17-19)The milk thistle extract with phosphatidylcholine in Advanced Milk Thistle contains standardised concentrations of silybin and isosilybin A and B which are typically not found in other milk thistle extracts.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

  • Full-spectrum formula: Delivers silymarin, silibinin & isosilybin A & B compounds

Advanced Milk Thistle combines standardized silymarin, silibinin, and isosilybin extracts with phosphatidylcholine for superior absorption.

Health benefits at a glance:Milk thistle-based liver health formulas have been used for centuries. Milk thistle contains compounds that provide powerful liver support.However, the active compound in milk thistle, silybin, does not dissolve well in water, making it difficult for the body to absorb. Advanced Milk Thistle overcomes this by mixing silybin with a nutrient called phosphatidylcholine to boost uptake.

Why it works:Protecting your liver is beneficial for the overall health and vitality of the body, and milk thistle extract is one of nature's most potent weapons to support liver health.Advanced Milk Thistle provides the milk thistle benefits of silymarin, silibinins and isosilybin A and B, as well as phospholipids for absorption. These compounds deliver full-spectrum support for liver health. Milk thistle can promote normal liver function, encourage the natural detoxification pathways, and is safe for daily use.

The science behind the product:A healthy body requires a healthy liverModern lifestyles can put a strain on the liver, making it essential to proactively support liver health. This is where hepato-protective herbs like milk thistle come in. Milk thistle is rich in antioxidants that promote both liver health and well-being. (1-3)The active compound extracted from milk thistle, silymarin, acts as a powerful free radical scavenger, supporting healthy liver function. (4-10) Advanced extraction technology has enabled the isolation and testing of other key constituents within silymarin extract to further support liver and overall health. Other key compounds in this formulaSilibinin, composed of the biologically active flavonolignan silybins A and B, is another component in Life Extension's premium milk thistle extract. Research has demonstrated beneficial effects on the liver. (8,11) Additionally, other extracts like isosilybin A and B have proven effective in promoting healthy cell division. (12,13) Enhanced delivery with phosphatidylcholine & other phospholipidsSilybin, the primary bioactive compound of milk thistle, has low water solubility, making it difficult for the body to absorb effectively. (14,15) The solution has been to incorporate silybin into a phytosome, a microscopic structure formed with plant-derived phosphatidylcholine. This phosphatidylcholine-based delivery system facilitates transportation across the intestinal lining into the bloodstream, making it an ideal carrier molecule for silybin. (8,15,16)Scientists believe that phosphatidylcholine molecularly bonds to silybin, helping to steer it through the cell membranes in the intestinal tract. (15) This improves the delivery of the benefits of milk thistle extracts for liver health.Preclinical and clinical showed that this silybin-phosphatidylcholine complex achieved almost 5 times higher bloodstream concentrations of silybin and up to 10 times greater bioavailability to the liver compared to unformulated silymarin. (17-19)

product.title: Pomegranate Complete
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a comprehensive superfood supplement for whole-body health

The pomegranate fruit extract, flower, and seed oil in Pomegranate Complete can:

  • Help maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels

  • Promote cardiovascular health

  • Deliver potent polyphenol antioxidants

Pomegranate is loaded with polyphenol, some of nature's most potent antioxidants. This formula uses the entire pomegranate plant, including fruit extract, flower extract, and pomegranate seed oil, to offer the widest range of health benefits. One softgel provides equivalent polyphenol content of approximately 24-30 pomegranates, which makes it a more convenient way to get the benefits of pomegranate!

A large body of scientific researchFew nutritional sources have gained as much scientific validation as the superfood pomegranate! While the majority of research has focused on extracts from the fruit alone so far, the synergistic benefits of compounds specific to other parts of the plant – notably the seeds and flowers – now receive attention as well.A surprising number of benefitsThe advantages attributable to pomegranate include everything from supporting healthy prostate and breast tissue to promoting a healthy heart, joints, liver, and kidneys. Moreover, according to studies, pomegranate is one of nature’s most powerful antioxidants.Pomegranate can also help with inflammatory factors and combat age-related metabolic changes.Pomegranate CompleteThe healthy compounds in pomegranate aren’t all in the juice, which comes only from the pomegranate fruit.To support the health of the entire body, Pomegranate Complete combines pomegranate fruit polyphenols with biologically active compounds from other parts of the pomegranate plant: Punicanolic acid, a member of the triterpene family of essential oils and pomegranatate – two compounds that help deliver full spectrum pomegranate benefits.This superior formula therefore supplies the complete nutritional profile of the entire pomegranate plant. Just one softgel of Pomegranate Complete provides polyphenols equivalent to 30 pomegranates!

product.title: Silymarin
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in high-quality silymarin for liver support and more
The ingredients of Silymarin can:

  • Help maintain a healthy liver function
  • Encourage a healthy inflammatory response at the cellular level
  • Offer powerful antioxidant support

Silymarin is a compound extracted from milk thistle (Silybum marianum). It's well-known to support healthy liver function. Life Extension’s Silymarin supplement contains high-quality silymarin.

Health benefits at a glance:Silymarin is the major active compound from milk thistle extract ( Silybum marianum ), a member of the Compositae or daisy family. It's considered a flavonolignan mixture, a unique type of bioflavonoid, and an antioxidant that fights against damaging free radicals ― and in this way offers powerful antioxidant support for the liver. Scientific studies show that oral supplementation with silymarin can help support liver function and promote healthy liver cells. Silymarin has been shown to combat lipid peroxidation in the liver.

Why it works:The liver is a large organ that performs many of your body’s vital functions and keeps it clean of harmful substances. It's also responsible for processing vitamins and nutrients into a form that can be used by the body, recycling compounds (such as iron) from red blood cells, synthesizing plasma proteins, producing important hormones, secreting bile, and converting sugars into glycogen. The liver is also responsible for the body’s natural detoxification processes.Modern living imposes a heavy load on the liver. Thus, maintaining its health becomes more crucial than ever. In Europe and Asia, herbal liver tonics have been in common use for centuries. Being validated through research, the benefits of these herbs contain compounds that assist in antioxidant activities, in stabilizing cell membrane, enhancing bile secretion. Protecting your liver is beneficial for the overall health and vitality of the body.Life Extension's Silymarin is formulated with the same ingredients as clinical studies to help support healthy liver function.

The science behind the product:Hepato-protective compounds such as silymarin are beneficial not only for the liver but also for the overall health and vitality of the body. (1-3) Silymarin, a mixture of flavonolignans extracted from the milk thistle, can help inhibit oxidative stress, which supports healthy liver function. (4-10) Pre-clinical evidence suggests that silymarin can also promote a healthy inflammatory response at the cellular level. (11,12)Life Extension formula also contains a citrus complex from the peel and fruit of bitter orange rich in bioactive flavonoids. (13,14) Flavonoids are polyphenol compounds that inhibit oxidation to promote a healthy liver. (15)

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Uric Acid Control
product.description:
For you, if you want to help maintain uric acid levels already within a healthy range

The ingredients in Uric Acid Control can:
  • Support uric acid levels already within normal range
  • Inhibit xanthine oxidase enzyme, thus modulating uric acid synthesis
  • Offer a botanical ingredient with antioxidant properties

Ayuric® is a clinically studied, vegan, water-soluble product and a standardized extract from a tannin-rich extract derived from the edible fruit of the Terminalia bellerica. It has antioxidant properties that can support healthy uric acid levels.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Uric acid is formed when the body breaks down purines, which are organic compounds serving functions in our genetic material and other activities such as neurotransmission. Most purines are made naturally in the body, and the rest come from the diet. Ayuric® is a clinically studied, vegan, water-soluble product from a tannin-rich extract derived from the edible fruit of the Terminalia bellerica tree that can help keep uric acid levels within a healthy range. Why it Works:The standardized extract, Ayuric® , has been shown to support healthy concentrations of two critical enzymes involved in uric acid metabolism: Xanthine oxidase and inducible nitric oxide synthase (iNOS).One capsule of Uric Acid Control provides 500 mg of the same patent-pending Terminalia bellerica extract. The suggested dose is one capsule twice daily.The Science Behind the Product:In a 24-week randomized placebo-controlled trial, volunteers with elevated uric acid levels who received twice-daily capsules of 500 mg T. bellerica extract demonstrated a notable 9.8% average decrease in uric acid levels after only 4 weeks. At the end of the study, uric acid levels were reduced by a remarkable 28,4%, with no reported adverse side effects. (1)This decrease in uric acid levels enabled 89% of the participants who were taking the extract to achieve targeted uric acid serum levels. Further, evidence from pre-clinical studies suggest that the bioactive compounds in T. bellerica may also help support a healthy response to inflammatory factors and has antioxidant properties. (2,3)How to Use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.

product.title: Shade Factor™
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in protecting your skin from UV exposure from the inside out

The ingredients in Shade Factor™ can:

  • Protect your skin from UV rays from within

  • Protect all elements of your skin, even hard-to-cover areas of one’s skin, like eye and mouth area

  • Support natural immune response to ultraviolet exposure

  • Promote healthy DNA before, during and after UV exposure

  • Encourage cellular energy

Shade Factor™ is a supplement that can support the body's natural immune response to ultraviolet exposure thanks to three ingredients, niacinamide, Polypodium leucotomos extract and Red Orange Complex®. This oral formula won't wash off when you swim or sweat and can be a complimentary product to sunscreen.

Safeguard your skin from the inside outLife Extension offers an oral supplement to help protect against harmful solar radiation. Shade Factor combines three unique ingredients to support the body’s natural immune response to UV exposure: Nicotinamide, Polypodium leucotomos extract, and Red Orange Complex®.These nutrients can complement topical sunscreens – which are useful and effective at skin cancer prevention – by protecting even hard-to-reach areas of one’s skin. And unlike lotions and sprays, Shade Factor won't wash off when you swim or sweat.Nicotinamide & fern extract promote healthy DNA function after UV exposureOur bodies have multiple systems that can repair damage to our genetic material inflicted by ultraviolet radiation. Nicotinamide plays a significant role in boosting the production of cellular energy that these systems require to function properly. In addition, nicotinamide has been shown to support the natural immune response needed to protect against the age-related effects of ultraviolet exposure.During a decade of research, an extract of the fern Polypodium leucotomos has been demonstrated to inhibit cellular changes in the skin that can lead to premature aging from outdoor activity.Red Orange Complex® can support natural photo-protectionShade Factor also contains Red Orange Complex™, an extract obtained from three red orange varieties. This unfiltered, cold-pressed olive oil comes from hand-picked and fresh milled olives from California and has an exceptionally high content of potent polyphenols. The heart-healthy olive oil polyphenols Not all olive oil is the same. Life Extension's unfiltered, cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil comes from hand-picked olives at the peak of ripeness and milled within hours of harvest. Olive oil is rich in monounsaturated fatty acids, primarily oleic acid, which are less prone to oxidation compared to other fatty acids. This is a key reason behind olive oil’s numerous health benefits.Research has shown that consuming two tablespoons of olive oil daily can improve markers of cardiovascular health. (2)Polyphenols, the potent antioxidant compounds in olive oil, contribute significantly to its beneficial effects. (3) Hydroxytyrosol, a polyphenol found in olive oil, has been shown to promote cardiovascular health. (6,7) Its polyphenols may also help prevent the oxidation of LDL cholesterol, supporting overall blood vessel health. (8) Promoting healthy endothelial function Olive oil polyphenols can support cardiovascular health by maintaining the health of endothelial cells, which line the inside of blood vessels. (9,10)Evidence suggests that these polyphenols encourage healthy endothelial function after meals, particularly in individuals with a hereditary gene variant affecting their endothelium. (11) Maintaining healthy blood pressure Research shows that the polyphenol content in olive oil may benefit blood pressure health. (12,13)A one-year study found that increased consumption of extra virgin olive oil, as part of a Mediterranean diet, supported healthy blood pressure levels already within the normal range. (14)

(4,5) Moreover, factors like diet, biology, and the environment can lead to excess estrogen. That's why a comprehensive men's health supplement should also support healthy estrogen balance.This advanced men’s health formula can encourage youthful testosterone levels by combining potent plant extracts shown to impact testosterone with zinc, a mineral associated with healthy amounts of free testosterone. (6-8)Chrysin: A flavonoid found in plants, honey, and bee propolis, known to stop the enzyme aromatase, which converts testosterone into estrogen. (9,10)HMRlignan™ Norway spruce extract: A source of lignan compounds, which are converted to enterolactone in the digestive tract. Enterolactone is then absorbed into the bloodstream. (13,14)Stinging & dwarf nettle root extracts: As men age, they develop a higher ratio of estrogen to testosterone, and both of these hormones play a vital role in men’s prostate health and function. MacuGuard Ocular Support with Saffron combines lutein, trans-zeaxanthin, meso-zeaxanthin, alpha-carotene, and saffron extract with phospholipids.

Health benefits at a glance:The natural aging process can lead to a loss of essential nutrients that maintains healthy eyes. MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron contains three key carotenoids and an extract to help prevent light damage and promote vision health.

Moreover, our bodies can sometimes lose the ability to synthesize these nutrients as we age.MacuGuard® Ocular Support contains the cartenoids lutein, trans-zeaxanthin, and meso-zeaxanthin, plus alpha-carotene. Furthermore, a saffron extract is added to promote sharp vision.

The science behind the product:Vital cartenoids for healthy visionThe density of the macular pigment is vital to healthy vision. However, the density of macular pigment naturally declines with age, and some people lose the ability to synthesize meso-zeaxanthin from lutein over time.That's why MacuGuard® Ocular Support with Saffron contains lutein and trans-zeaxanthin and meso-zeaxanthin, as well as alpha-carotene, another eye health carotenoid that has been associated with protection of the macula and retina.Lutein and the two types of zeaxanthin are very well-known to help preserve the health of the macula and act as defenders against excessive oxidative stress. They help keep eyes functioning well, even over time, including night vision. Evidence also suggests that alpha-carotene helps support the macular pigment.Phospholipids for carotenoids: optimal absorptionGetting these eye-healthy nutrients where you need them most is a huge part of supporting your vision health. This formula contains phospholipids, which are an important part of every cell membrane in the body. These phospholipids can help promote absorption and accumulation of lutein and zeaxanthin. Good absorption is crucial for these nutrients to make it into the retina of the eye. Vision-enhancing benefits of saffron Multiple studies have shown that individuals with age-related vision concerns, experienced improved visual acuity supplementing with saffron. This was measured both by advanced technical testing and on the Snellen eye chart that is commonly used by doctors to test vision.

product.title: Se-Methyl L-Selenocysteine
product.description:
• Antioxidant defense: Can protect cells from oxidative stress & free radicals
  • Immune system: Promoting healthy immune cell activity & function
  • Thyroid health: Can encourage optimal thyroid hormone synthesis & metabolism
  • Cellular protection: Supporting healthy cell function & division throughout the body
  • Bioavailable formula: Plant-based selenium compound for enhanced absorption & utilization

Se-methyl L-selenocysteine is a plant-based form of selenium, one of the most bioavailable sources of this essential trace mineral.

A key micronutrient for selenproteinsSelenium is an essential trace mineral involved in numerous biological functions. In the body, it's incorporated into enzymes and proteins to form selenoproteins, such as the antioxidant enzyme glutathione peroxidase. This enzyme uses four units of selenocysteine to neutralize free radicals through glutathione. (1,2)By balancing cellular oxidation and reduction reactions, glutathione peroxidase and other selenoproteins help safeguard tissues and cells from oxidative stress and promote healthy cell function and division. (1-3)Selenium & thyroid functionSelenium, as selenocysteine, is also a component of enzymes involved in activating thyroid hormones. Selenium can support metabolism, mood, and cognitive health by protecting thyroid gland function and optimizing thyroid hormone synthesis and activity. (2,4,5)Immune health & vitamin synergyKeeping an optimal selenium status contributes to immune regulation by stimulating T cells, natural killer (NK) cells, and other immune cells. Selenium also encourages healthy inflammatory immune activity and works synergistically with vitamin E to protect lipids and promote immune health. (2,6-9) Its bioavailability and absorption are enhanced when taken with vitamins A, C, D, and E. (2)An organic compound Se-methyl L-selenocysteine (MSeC) is a plant-based selenium compound found in garlic and broccoli and has demonstrated positive effects on cell function. (1) It's more bioavailable than inorganic selenium salts typically used in supplements. Unlike selenomethionine, MSeC is closely related to the physiologic form, selenocysteine, that is needed to produce selenoproteins such as glutathione peroxidase. (11,12)

Because of this, CoQ10 is most concentrated in high-energy organs such as the heart and the brain.Maintaining adequate levels of CoQ10 can be a key part of supporting overall health. Unfortunately, CoQ10 levels in our body decline as we age, which can result in diminished cellular vitality of vital organs such as the heart. Sufficient quantities of CoQ10, on the other hand, help the cells work efficiently and protect proteins, lipids, and DNA from oxidation. Liposomal Methyl B-Complex can provide comprehensive support for energy production, cognitive function, detoxification, and whole-body health with all 8 essential B vitamins in bioavailable forms.

The importance of B vitaminsB vitamins are a group of 8 water-soluble vitamins such as B1 (thiamin), B2 (riboflavin), B3 (niacin), B5 (pantothenic acid), B6, B7 (biotin), B9 (folate), and B12 (methylcobalamin). They play an essential role in many metabolic reactions such as releasing energy from carbohydrates, fat, and protein. This energy is needed in every cell in the body. The body does not store them, so they need to be replaced daily. A deficiency of one B vitamin can affect the optimal functioning of organ systems throughout the body. Vitamin B12 and B2, in particular, are crucial for maintaining healthy brain and cognitive function.An innovative B complexLiposomal Methyl B-Complex provides folinic acid which can be utilized even by those who are not able to properly metabolize regular folate along with bioavailable forms of the vitamins. This formula also includes TMG (trimethylglycine), which serves a vital role in methylation and whole-body health. Furthermore, it contains and milk thistle to support the liver and detoxification.Efficient liposomal delivery The Quicksilver Delivery Systems can provide rapid nutrient absorption and unparalleled bioavailability.Age, low stomach acid, and genetic variation can weaken absorption of B complex vitamins, and this liposomal formula can therefore deliver, for instance, B12 faster and more efficiently.

product.title: Liposomal Methyl B-12
product.description:
• Energy production: Can help maintain steady energy levels & reduce tiredness throughout your day
  • Brain & mood: Supporting memory, focus & mood regulation through neurological function
  • Red blood cell formation: Promoting optimal blood health & oxygen transport throughout the body
  • Heart health support: Can encourage normal homocysteine levels for cardiovascular wellness
  • Superior absorption: Liposomal delivery begins absorbing in the mouth, bypassing digestive barriers
  • Active methylcobalamin: 1000 mcg biologically active form your body can use directly

Liposomal Methyl B-12 delivers 1000 mcg of methylcobalamin, the biologically active form of vitamin B12, using cutting-edge liposomal technology for dramatically enhanced absorption.

Health benefits at a glance Vitamin B12 is an essential nutrient for many body systems. But vitamin B12 is notoriously difficult to absorb by the gut. The cutting-edge delivery technology in this formula can dramatically boost the absorption. Each dose of Liposomal Methyl B-12 delivers 1000 mcg of methylcobalamin. Why it works Vitamin B12 is important to keep your energy levels steady and required for proper neurological function and DNA synthesis – both critical for memory, focus, and mood regulation. Together with folate, vitamin B12 helps in the formation of red blood cells and the maintenance of normal homocysteine levels, thereby supporting heart health. In some people, the liver can’t convert cyanocobalamin (which is the common supplemental form of vitamin B12) into adequate amounts of methylcobalamin (methyl B-12), one of the biologically active forms of B12. Liposomal Methyl B-12 contains this active form that your body can use directly. However, age, low stomach acid, and certain genetic variations can reduce the body’s ability to absorb B-complex vitamins, especially vitamin B12. To address this, this liposomal formulation is designed to deliver B12 more efficiently into the bloodstream. The science behind the product More about B12 Vitamin B12 is present in foods of animal origin, including dairy products and eggs. Thus, vegans and vegetarians are more prone to a deficiency of this important nutrient. In addition, older adults and those with reduced levels of stomach acidity have difficulty absorbing vitamin B12 from dietary sources. As a result, vitamin B12 deficiency is common. The metabolically active form of vitamin B12, methyl B-12, plays a crucial role in supporting methylation, a fundamental biochemical process that influences everything from energy production to DNA regulation. It also contributes to the body’s natural production of glutathione, the body’s “master” antioxidant, essential for cellular protection and detoxification. Superior liposomal delivery Quicksilver’s unique delivery system uses tiny, stable liposomes that begin absorbing right in the mouth. This helps the nutrients absorb quickly, bypassing the absorption barriers in the digestive tract, avoiding being broken down by the digestive system. This delivery technology can help your body make the most of this powerful vitamin, supporting your mood, memory, healthy methylation, detox, and more.

Supplement facts: Vitamin B12 (as methylcobalamin) 500 µg

  • Energy production: Can help energize mitochondria for cellular vitality & performance

  • Superior absorption: Micellized into tiny droplets for immediate effect & enhanced bioavailability

Micellized Pure PC® delivers phosphatidylcholine, a primary building block of cell membranes, in an exclusive micellized form for superior absorption.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is PC? It stands for phosphatidylcholine, a naturally occurring substance and a primary building block in the body. It's one of several so-called phospholipids that are structural elements of all cell membranes, facilitating membrane integrity and healthy cell function.Sufficient levels of phosphatidylcholine have been shown to support many bodily processes and enhance physiology.

Why it works:Micellized Pure PC® can nourish the very foundation of optimal wellness, the cell. It can offer the ultimate building block to cell membranes, support cognitive sharpness, and help energize mitochondria.It can also help maintain liver detox, bile movement, toxin flushing, and cholesterol metabolism.

The science behind the product:Phosphatidylcholine — an acetylcholine precursorPhosphatidylcholine (PC) is known to replenish cell membrane structure and function. It's also a normal constituent of bile and promotes fat emulsification, absorption, and transport.Its metabolism provides choline to the body which is needed by the brain to produce acetylcholine, a major neurotransmitter (involved in memory and alertness) that transmits signals between nerve cells. Due to its status as a acetylcholine precursor, phosphatidylcholine can be especially effective for supporting cognitive function.Exclusive absorption enhancement procesMicellized Pure PC® can provide immediate effect with superior delivery. This direct-access PC is micellized into extremely small droplets that are more easily absorbed into the bloodstream and cell membranes, after ingestion.

product.title: Dr. Shade’s Bitters No.9
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in keeping on hand fast-acting digestive and detox support

The elixir of Dr. Shade’s Bitters No. 9 can:

  • Provide a herbal blend that complements any meal

  • Promote healthy digestion

  • Support bile flow and liver function

  • Offer a gentler version than Dr. Shades BitterX

Bitters No. 9 is a premium blend of nine bitter herbs and essential oils that orchestrate digestion and detoxification via the liver, gallbladder, and kidneys. From the moment this elixir hits the bitter receptors in the mouth, it can help stimulate digestion and promote GI harmony. The blend contains dandelion, milk thistle, gentian, burdock root, solidago, and essential oils of sweet orange, myrrh, juniper, and clove.

Store at room temperature.

Healthy digestion and bitter herbsHealthy digestion is essential to the body's absorption and utilization of food. The process of digestion is accomplished in the GI tract using secretions from accessory glands such as the liver and the pancreas.Herbal bitters have been used in many cultures to promote digestion and appetite. One of their mechanisms of action is to stimulate bitter receptors in the mouth and GI tract to increase saliva, bile, and other digestive secretions. The blend of Dr. Shade’s Bitters No.9 This is a proprietary, liposomal blend of liposomal bitters herbs can complements any meal, and it is specially formulated to promote healthy gall bladder/bile flow and robust liver function. While bile is an extremely important digestive substance, good bile flow is also essential for detoxification.The blend contains:Dandelion has been shown to support detoxification by upregulating antioxidant pathways, aiding in healthy kidney function, helping enhance urinary elimination of toxins, and having hepatoprotective properties. This bitter herb has also been shown to support a balanced inflammatory response, another critical aspect of optimal detoxification. Milk thistle is a traditional Western herb that contains a powerful bioactive compound called Silymarin. In addition to supporting a healthy liver and bile flow, silymarin has been shown to support phase II detoxification by activating the Nrf2 pathway, promoting glutathione production.Gentian is a full-bodied bitter botanical, containing the bioactive compounds gentiopicroside and gentiolactone. These compounds have been shown to be hepatoprotective in endotoxicity, supporting healthy bile flow and upregulating antioxidant enzyme activity.Burdock root is a hearty root vegetable with long use in Traditional Chinese Medicine and Western herbalism. This root has been shown to restore healthy inflammatory response as well as demonstrate hepatoprotective activity.Solidago, a flowering plant with tiny, bright yellow blossoms, is known for supporting urinary tract health. It aids in healthy excretion and toxin elimination while supporting the activity of glutathione S-transferase, a critical enzyme in phase II detoxification. The bioactive polyphenols in Solidago have also been shown to offer antimicrobial benefits.Essential oils of sweet orange, myrrh, juniper, and clove: The essential oil of myrrh, a resinous substance derived from the Commiphora mukul tree, supports healthy bile flow by increasing the expression of the human bile salt export pump and promotes a healthy microbial balance. Juniper and Clove essential oils support microbial balance in the GI, and sweet orange essential oil supports antioxidant activity.

product.title: Nanoemulsified DIM

    DIM (Diindolylymethane) is a compound typically created in the body after eating cruciferous vegetables such as broccoli, cabbage and Brussels sprouts. The published effects on hormonal balance, immune function, and detoxification make DIM an exiting nutrient. DIM has been shown to lead to the preferential formation of estrogen metabolites that are correlated with healthy breast, endometrial, and cervical tissues. It also helps the liver neutralize potentially harmful estrogen metabolites and estrogen-like environmental chemicals.However, DIM is difficult to absorb and metabolize. This is why we created a liposomal DIM—for improved absorption. Our Golden Particle Delivery™ system ensures that DIM lives up to its full potential, giving your body the maximum benefit.

product.description:

Do you spend long hours sitting at a desk or traveling? A sedentary lifestyle can negatively impact circulation and cardiovascular health.

Why circulation mattersHealthy blood flow is powered by your heart, but regular physical activity also plays a vital role in keeping your circulatory system functioning optimally. A sedentary lifestyle, whether due to a lack of exercise or healthy individuals who sit for hours at work (or long travels), can negatively impact circulation and cardiovascular health. (1-4)Nattokinase for clotting, circulation & heart healthNattokinase is a naturally occurring enzyme derived from natto, a traditional Japanese food made from fermented soybeans. Research shows that nattokinase can support the body’s natural clotting processes, promote healthy circulation, and help maintain blood pressure already within the normal range. (5-12)Pycnogenol® for endothelial & vascular healthPycnogenol®, a French maritime pine bark extract, is rich in procyanidin flavonoids, which are phytonutrient compounds with strong antioxidant properties. They can encourage healthy endothelial function and blood flow by protecting the delicate vascular walls from oxidative stress. (13-17)Pycnogenol® can also support healthy nitric oxide levels in the arteries, promoting optimal circulation, healthy platelet function, and a balanced inflammatory response. (15,18,19)A smart choice for your lifestyleWhether you're a frequent traveler, desk-bound professional, or simply someone seeking better circulation, VenoFlow™ is a smart addition to your daily wellness routine. Pycnogenol® is a registered trademark of Horphag Research Ltd.Support Circulatory Health with VenoFlow™.
