product.title: Pantothenic Acid
product.description:
For you, if you want a quality product of pantothenic acid critical for human health

The vitamin B5 in Pantothenic Acid is:
  • Crucial to lipid, amino acid & glucose metabolism
  • Important for the synthesis of hemoglobin & neurotransmitters
  • Essential for mitochondrial energy production
  • Has a central role in cholesterol & steroid hormone  synthesis

Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) is a component of coenzyme A. It assists in several metabolic pathways and is necessary for the transfer of fats to and from cells.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is pantothenic acid? It's vitamin B5, a water-soluble vitamin from the B group of 8 vitamins. This essential nutrient is the most important component of coenzyme A, which assists in several metabolic pathways and is necessary for the transfer of fats to and from cells.Vitamin B is naturally present in some foods, added to others, and available as a dietary supplement.

Why it works:Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) is critical for human health. It plays a central role in lipid, amino acid, glucose metabolism, and mitochondrial energy production, as well as in the synthesis of hemoglobin, neurotransmitters, cholesterol and steroid hormones, and other proteins and lipids. (1-4)

The science behind the product:The main function of pantothenic acid is the synthesis of the ubiquitous cofactor called coenzyme A (CoA) and acyl carrier protein. (5-6)The importance of coenzyme A regulating cell signaling and gene expression has also been recognized. (2,7)Pantothenic acid is only mildly acidic but is often available in combination with calcium to neutralize its acidity and increase its preservation stability. Its calcium salt has a more neutral pH and longer storage life. (8)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Calcium (as D-calcium pantothenate) 44 mg Pantothenic Acid (as D-calcium pantothenate) 500 mg

product.title: GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in encouraging cell rejuvenation

The four geroprotectors in GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ can help:

Health Benefits at a Glance:GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ is the cellular longevity breakthrough you've been waiting for. It helps rejuvenate aging cells and encourages the body's response process for cells that have already aged. Formulated by a partnership between Life Extension® and Insilico Medicine, Inc., GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ can help turn back the clock at the cellular level. GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ can activate anti-aging pathways, promote youthful cellular metabolism, and combat aging at the cellular level. Why it Works:Cell aging, or cellular senescence, is part of the natural aging process. However, when healthy cells begin to age, they no longer function optimally. Many of the factors that have to do with overall bodily aging can be directly attributed to the effects of cellular senescence.When combatting cellular senescence, we encourage cellular energy production, support a healthy, system-wide response to inflammation and promote organ vitality. GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ inhibits this natural part of aging at the cellular level, by providing compounds that have an impact on the biological pathways that are associated with the normal aging process. The Science Behind the Product:LE and the medical technology company Insilico Medicine, Inc. has established a unique partnership to develop the GEROPROTECT™ Ageless Cell™ formula.Insilico Medicine, Inc. used a highly innovative algorithm to create a database of 200+ so-called geroprotectors, which have been shown to prolong lifespan, by targeting certain pathways in the body that can affect the natural aging process. Each compound in the database got a score, signifying its ability to impact pathways associated with cell aging. Looking at the scores in the database, Insilico Medicine's computerized algorithm identifiedN-acetyl-L-cysteine (NAC), Myricetin (an antioxidant naturally found in berries, fruits, and herb), the polyphenol EGCG found in green tea, and Gamma-tocotrienol as being especially powerful "geroprotector" nutrients which can help protect the body from the effects of cellular senescence. (1, 2)These compounds were then scientifically tested and demonstrated efficacy at inhibiting signs of cellular senescence. How to Use:Take one (1) softgel daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.CautionConsult your healthcare provider before use if you have a bleeding disorder, are taking anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications, or beta-blockers.

product.title: Nanoemulsified D3K2
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for super-absorbable vitamin D & K

The ingredients in D3K2 can:

  • Promote bone and muscle health

  • Support immune health and mood

  • Help maintain healthy arteries

  • Deliver super-bioavailable forms of vitamin D and K

Quicksilver Scientific's D3K2 contains vitamin D and vitamin K with unsurpassed absorption due to liposomal delivery. These nutrients work together to maintain and support healthy arteries and the normal density of the bone matrix. Moreover, they promote the immune function and more. This liquid product is vegetarian, sugar-free, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Store at room temperature.

Health benefits at a glance: Vitamin K and vitamin D deficiency can lead to less calcium being deposited in the bone matrix and the calcification of tissue. D3K2 contains two super-absorbable forms of vitamin D and vitamin K, which can work together to support normal, healthy bones and counteract calcification of tissues. This liquid supplement contains 2,500 international units (IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per spray and 90 µg of vitamin K2.

Why it works: Vitamin D3 for the immune system, bones, muscles & teeth Vitamin D is one of the most important vitamins in the body and is essential for overall health and mood. It contributes to the normal function of the immune system, supports muscle function, and helps maintain healthy bones and teeth.It is also essential for the absorption and utilisation of calcium and phosphorus, which in turn contribute to normal blood calcium levels. Vitamin D also plays an important role in cell division . Vitamin K2 complements vitamin D3 Vitamin K is a group of fat-soluble vitamins that contribute to maintaining healthy bone density, promoting arterial health, and supporting heart health . Both vitamins are essential for the body, and they are also dependent on each other to function optimally. A deficiency in vitamin K and vitamin D has been linked to the calcification of soft tissue and reduced bone mineral density. This is because vitamin D promotes the absorption of calcium, while vitamin K plays a role in directing calcium into the bones. D3K2 by Quicksilver Scientific offers an effective way to replenish these vitamins. By using an advanced nanoemulsion system for maximum absorption, this formulation combines ideal ratios of vitamin D (cholecalciferol D3) and vitamin K2 (menaquinone MK-7) to support and maintain healthy levels year-round.

The science behind the product: Vitamin D is mostly recognized as being essential to the function of the human immune system and to maintaining healthy bones. However, the health benefits of vitamin D stretch much further than covering these two areas of concern. Vitamin D receptors can be found in at least 36 types of body tissue and can also influence the gene expression of thousands of genes. Some of these genes include those that are associated with detoxification enzymes in the body. Research has indicated that vitamin D3 is better at raising the body’s serum 25(OH)D concentration than vitamin D2 (calciferol).Liposomal delivery bypasses GI absorption barriers and begins circulating the body as soon as it hits the tongue.

How to use:Take 1 to 2 pumps by mouth once daily.Hold in the mouth 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a healthcare professional.Take on an empty stomach, at least 10 minutes before meals.Use within 6 months of opening.If pregnant, consult a physician before use.

  • Promote healthy neurotransmitter levels in the brain

  • Help you stay comfortable throughout the day

Physical discomforts can be spurred on by disturbances in the nerve cells, such as inflammation. ComfortMAX™ contains PEA (palmitoylethanolamide) and honokiol that can help calm the nerve cells, balance neurotransmitters in the brain, and thereby reduce discomfort.

Health benefits at a glance: If nerve cells experience disturbances, it can harm how the brain perceives physical discomfort. ComfortMAX™ contains PEA and honokiol, which can inhibit inflammation of the nerve cells, promote healthy neurotransmitter levels in the brain, and thereby help reduce discomfort.

Why it works: Many people experience different kinds of physical discomfort. Such discomfort can affect mood, mobility, and overall life quality. The reasons for physical discomfort may vary a great deal, but all people experience it in the same way. Peripheral nerves deliver sensory information, such as itches, changes in temperature, and physical pressures, directly to the brain.If the peripheral nerve cells are disturbed, it can enhance physical discomfort. ComfortMAX™ has a breakthrough formula that contains PEA (palmitoylethanolamide) and honokiol, which is an extract from magnolia bark. These compounds can inhibit inflammation in the nerve cells and promote healthy neurotransmitter levels in the brain. Because they promote nerve comfort in two complementary ways, the ComfortMAX™ formula entails a pioneering step in maintaining calm and healthy nerve cells.

The science behind the product:The ComfortMAX™ formula contains two active ingredients that can help calm nerve cells. Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) is a unique type of fatty acid that is produced by the body. The body’s own production of PEA occurs as part of maintaining a healthy inflammatory and immune response. PEA plays a role in inhibiting the secretion of inflammatory compounds from certain types of white blood cells called mast cells. As the body ages, the amount of mast cells decreases. This causes the remaining mast cells to work even harder. The added workload can, in turn, make them overly sensitive. Such sensitivity can activate inflammatory processes that are linked to nerve discomfort. PEA inhibits inflammatory compounds from being released by the mast cells. At the cellular level, PEA can therefore promote the body's own response to uncomfortable nerve stimuli.In a randomized, controlled trial study, 636 patients were followed over three weeks. Each patient was given 600 mg of PEA daily. Three weeks later, scores that measured comfort and quality of life in relative terms had improved dramatically. Honokiol is a natural lignan compound derived from many different types of magnolia. Many of these have been used in traditional Asian medicine for hundreds of years. Scientists have recently discovered that honokiol can support nerve health and comfort. Honokiol can support GABA receptors, which have a “calming effect” in the brain. This in turn, affects the way that the brain perceives discomfort.

How to use:Take one (1) AM tablet in the morning and one (1) PM tablet before bed, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Calcium (calcium carbonate) 60 mg Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) 600 mg
product.ingredients: Calcium (calcium carbonate) 60 mg Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) 600 mg

product.title: FLORASSIST® Prebiotic

For you, if you are interested in improving your intestinal health

Prebiotic fiber (Xylooligosaccharides) in FLORASSIST® Prebiotic Chewable can:
  • Promote intestinal, colon & digestive health
  • Provide fuel for bifidobacteria, a probiotic that breaks down carbs
  • Support immune system health & function

Health Benefits at a Glance:FLORASSIST® Prebiotic Chewable is a prebiotic fiber supplement in an easy-to-eat chewable tablet form with a delicious strawberry flavor. The formula provides fuel for a kind of good bacteria in your GI tract called bifidobacteria (a probiotic). It can stimulate the growth of these beneficial microorganisms by supplying xylooligosaccharides (prebiotics). Bifidobacteria occur naturally in the human gastrointestinal tract and use this type of prebiotic as fuel. Thus, this prebiotic fiber supplement can enhance the effectiveness of beneficial bacteria and support a balanced gastrointestinal tract.FLORASSIST® Prebiotic Chewable is also the perfect complement to your probiotic supplement. Why it Works:Probiotic bacteria are excellent at promoting a healthy digestive environment. In order to work, the probiotics also need to have fuel in the first place. The FLORASSIST® Prebiotic Chewable formula contains scientifically validated PreticX™ prebiotic fiber which helps probiotics thrive. PreticX™ contains 70% xylooligosaccharides which can help optimize the growth potential of beneficial bifidobacteria. (1)Bifidobacteria are beneficial to the digestive system because they help metabolize the dietary carbohydrates that the body itself is unable to digest. Moreover, bifidobacterial can promote health by providing critical energy for the cells in the colon lining, and by modulating specific components in the immune system. (2, 3)Although bifidobacterial occur naturally in the human gastrointestinal tract, they tend to be most abundant in younger people. They also decrease rapidly with progressing age.A good way to address this issue is to take a prebiotic supplement, which provides fuel for probiotics. The xylooligosaccharides in this prebiotic fiber supplement are an ideal prebiotic source. At a low dose, they can support the growth of bifidobacteria. The Science Behind the Product:Many prebiotics require very large doses for full effect, but too many prebiotics in your system may cause digestive issues such as bloating and other types of gastrointestinal discomfort. (4) By having a low dose of xylooligosaccharides, one will have a lower risk of developing these gastrointestinal issues as a result of prebiotic supplementation.This highly purified prebiotic is derived from non-GMO corn cob.

Estrogen for Women is a comprehensive botanical formula featuring soy isoflavones, hops, licorice, broccoli, Dong quai, and chasteberry extracts.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Menopause can lead to both physical and mental discomforts for women. Menopausal symptoms include hot flashes, night sweats, and mood issues. Estrogen for Women has a specially designed formula that includes a blend of soy isoflavones and potent botanicals such as broccoli, licorice and chaste berry extracts, Dong quai, and more, all in just a single tablet. These extracts can support healthy estrogen metabolism and reduce menopausal discomforts. Why it Works:Many women experience both physical and mental discomforts when they hit menopause. The root cause of menopause is rapidly changing estrogen levels. This hormone is predominant in the female body and is responsible for a large number of processes. The onset of menopause can lead to hot flashes, night sweats, increased agitation, and even depression, and are all too common for menopausal women.Now however, research has indicated that extracts from plants such as hops, licorice, and broccoli may reduce menopausal discomforts. Moreover, these extracts can also support a healthy estrogen metabolism, which is under stress both during and after menopause. (1-8)Estrogen for Women is based on a formula which includes a patented hops extract as well as extract from licorice, broccoli, the Dong quai plant, and chasteberry. Furthermore, the formula has been enhanced and with standardized lignans, which has been clinically shown to block some of the undesirable effects that estrogen may have on the body. The Science Behind the Product:The Natural Estrogen formula contains the following ingredients:Standardized Soy Isoflavone Extract: Soy compounds called phytoestrogens are demonstrated to offer a variety of health benefits. Lignan Extract has been clinically shown to block some of the unwanted effects of estrogen. (3)Licorice Extract has been clinically shown to reduce the severity and frequency of hot flashes related to menopause. (4)Broccoli Extract has been found to maintain healthy cell division as well as modulating estrogen. (5)Dong Quai is in Chinese traditional medicine believed to help with menopausal and menstrual discomforts. (6)Chasteberry Extract (Vitex Agnus-castus) has been shown to support the hormonal balance and the balance of neurotransmitter, both of which are important for menopausal discomforts relief. (7,8)

How to use:Take one (1) tablet in the morning, with or without food, or as recommended by your healthcare practitioner.Those taking any estrogenic product should include as part of their diet cruciferous vegetables such as broccoli, brussels sprouts, cabbage, and/or cauliflower.Women should also use a natural progesterone cream when taking this product.Caution:Do not take in case of pregnancy, lactation, or estrogen-dependent tumors.

product.title: Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support™
product.description:
• Cellular energy: Can power energy creation in brain & muscle tissues

This potent formula unites highly absorbable ubiquinol CoQ10 with shilajit. Together they can revitalize cellular energy generation supporting your wellness.

Health benefits at a glance:CoQ10 and Shilajit found in Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support can help support cellular energy production by supporting the mitochondria, the “powerhouse” of the cell. It can also contribute to maintaining normal heart, brain, and kidney health as well as that of other cells. The formula has been designed for enhanced absorption of CoQ10 in the body.

Why it works:The body has a lot of organs, such as the heart, brain, and kidneys, which require lots of energy to maintain normal function. Unfortunately, cell energy production is known to decrease with age. Super Ubiquinol CoQ10 with Enhanced Mitochondrial Support is truly unique in that it supports the mitochondria, the “powerhouse” of the cell, directly, thereby supporting highly energy demanding organs such as the heart, brain, and kidneys.CoQ10 is required to play an important role in maintaining normal cell energy production levels, as it converts fats and sugars into energy which is useful for all cells in your body. Sustaining adequate levels of CoQ10 is therefore crucial as the body's production of CoQ10 declines significantly with advancing age (1). Ubiquinol CoQ10 is used in this formula, because it absorbs up to 8 times better than ubiquinone CoQ10.Shilajit has been clinically shown to further increase CoQ10 absorption, promote cardiovascular health, and help restore youthful cellular energy.

The science behind the product:CoQ10 has been shown to have powerful antioxidant properties. It can protect important proteins (2) and mitochondrial DNA (3) from oxidative damage. (1)Research done with middle-aged mice showed that ubiquinol was shown to be 40% more effective in slowing measurements of aging, compared to ubiquinone. (4)A combination of CoQ10 and shilajit showed a 56% increase in energy production in the brain, so 40% better than CoQ10 alone. Additionally, it was shown that a 144% increase in energy production in muscle cells, so 27% better than CoQ10 alone. (5)Researchers have demonstrated that combination of ubiquinol CoQ10 and shilajit can provide unparalleled effect and support heart health and youthful cellular energy production better than CoQ10 alone.

product.title: Calcium Citrate with Vitamin D
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a supplement with easily absorbed calcium

The ingredients in Calcium Citrate with Vitamin D can:

  • Support bone health

  • Promote optimal calcium intake due to super absorbable capsule

  • Help maintain blood vessel contraction and expansion

  • Encourage healthy bone density

Calcium is abundant in our bodies, especially in bones and teeth, and is essential for bone health. Calcium can also support healthy muscle function and a healthy nervous system. Vitamin D is included to encourage calcium absorption to help maintain healthy bone density and promote overall bone health.

The essential & abundant calciumCalcium is the most abundant mineral in the body and an essential mineral. It's primarily found in bones and teeth, and in bone formation, calcium forms crystals that provide strength to maturing bone. Calcium is for more than bonesCalcium is needed for more than just healthy bones; it's also important for muscle contraction, blood vessel contraction and expansion, the secretion of hormones and enzymes, and sending messages through the nervous system.Studies have proven its impact on heart health as a result of increased calcium intake. In addition, scientific evidence suggests that increased intake of calcium may help to maintain optimal weight as well.The best absorption of calcium Calcium is often inadequately supplied, inefficiently absorbed, or excreted faster than it is being assimilated. The citrate salt of calcium has been documented to be well absorbed and utilised by the body. This is the form recommended by many doctors and nutritionists.Calcium citrate dissolves easily even if stomach acid is low. Many people naturally produce less acid as they age, so calcium citrate is a good choice for older adults. The addition of vitamin D3 is also critically important, because it stimulates calcium absorption and promotes healthy bone density. However, as people age, they often lose the ability to make vitamin D3.Recommendations regarding calcium intakeIt's recommended to not take calcium and other minerals with fibre, because fibre can interfere with their absorptionThere is evidence that calcium from supplements and dairy foods may inhibit iron absorption. However, it has been very difficult to distinguish between the effects of calcium on iron absorption and other inhibitory factors, such as phytate. Although current understanding of this suggests that the inhibition of calcium on absorption of iron is of short duration and the body has adaptive mechanisms.Calcium supplements are best taken during meals. They should always be taken with a full glass of water, juice or other liquid to enhance solubility.If calcium-containing formulas are taken only once per day, they may be best taken in the evening.

Supplement facts: Vitamin D3 (as cholecalciferol) (100 IU†) 2,5 µg Calcium (as calcium citrate) 200 mg

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Immune & Nasal Defense
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a focused probiotic formula for a healthy immune response

The ingredients in FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense can:
  • Promote the body’s healthy immune response
  • Support production of immunoglobulin A (IgA), an essential part of immune defenses
  • Encourage healthy nasal airflow and response to things in the environment, such as pollen

FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense contains the unique combination of EpiCor®, a yeast fermentate S. cerevisiae, and L. rhamnosus CRL1505, a probiotic strain, that together can help you promote healthy immune cell activity, maintain comfortable nasal airflow, and encourage the production of secretory IgA.

Health benefits at a glance:Seasonal changes can increase the number of microscopic stimuli like the amount of pollen, dust, or pet dander in the air. This can, in turn, cause your immune system to overreact which can result in discomforts in the eyes, airways, and skin.Our immune system is our body’s built-in line of defense. Coincidentally, it also reacts to harmless things in your environment such as those mentioned above.This supplement contains EpiCor®, a yeast fermentate of S. cerevisiae, and L. rhamnosus CRL1505, a probiotic strain, that can encourage multiple aspects of a healthy immune response, so you can also stay comfortable when seasonal changes occur.EpiCor® was discovered when factory workers at a yeast fermentation plant had better work attendance than their office counterparts. Moreover, FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian.

Why it works: Our immune system operates with the best interests of our body at heart. However, sometimes "things" in environmental factors like pollen and other seasonal challenges, test out immune system. We want our immune system to produce immunoglobulin A (IgA) in order to help protect us. At the same time, our immune system should ignore harmless things in our environment, otherwise it may produce an excess of histamine — a compound that affects airflow in nasal passages. So to prepare for any immune system challenge, we need to promote a healthy immune response to the world around us. That’s where FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense comes in.

The science behind the product: FLORASSIST® Immune & Nasal Defense contains a unique combination of ingredients that can help balance your immune system during seasonal changes:From Brewer's yeast: EpiCor® of S. cerevisiae Scientific discoveries can happen when you least expect it. For instance, factory workers at a yeast fermentation plant took fewer sick days compared to their colleagues in office settings. Research revealed that those on the factory floor had heigher levels of secretory IgA and natural killer cell activity than those working than those working in a cubicle. Secretory IgA and natural killer cells both play vital roles in maintaining a robust, healthy immune system.EpiCor® is a fermentate of from S. cerevisiae, a microorganism more commonly recognized as brewer's yeast. Its discovery was purely coincidental as mentioned above, and since then EpiCor® has been the subject of a half-dozen clinical studies.EpiCor® serves to enhance the body's natural immune response. Curiously, EpiCor® also lends a hand to the immune system in dealing with innocuous environmental factors like pollen. In one study, subjects took either 500 mg of EpiCor® a day or a placebo for five weeks.Subjects in the EpiCor® group who normally experienced an immune response to changes in their environment reported none of those same effects while taking EpiCor®. (1) In two additional studies, individuals taking EpiCor® reported reduced duration and intensity of immune reactions compared to those receiving a placebo. (2,3) EpiCor® appears to work by promoting natural killer cell activity as well as the production of secretory IgA, two little-known but absolutely essential parts of your body’s immune defenses. In one study, subjects taking 500 mg of EpiCor® a day for 8 weeks saw an increase in secretory IgA. (1) In another study, EpiCor® increased markers of natural killer cell activity, after just a single 500 mg dose. (4)The probiotic strain Lactobacillus rhamnosus CRL-1505Lactobacillus rhamnosus CRL1505 stands out as a unique probiotic strain originally isolated from goat's milk and discovered in the northwestern region of Argentina. This particular strain, L. rhamnosus CRL1505, plays a significant role in promoting a robust immune response, to the extent that it is administered annually to more than 300,000 school children in Argentina for this very purpose. (5,6)In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial involving hundreds of Argentinian school children, subjects receiving L. rhamnosus 5 days a week for 6 months had nearly 50% less recorded instances of immune challenge compared to those taking a placebo.This same study found that the L. rhamnosus group also had 47% higher levels of secretory IgA, which supports a healthy immune response. (5)

How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

When chewed, rather than swallowed, calcium carbonate has minimum effect on stomach acid, which allows that acid to do play its important role in digestion undisturbed. Research indicates, that chewable calcium also supports the muslce movement of swallowing and helps to block the backwards flow of fluid from the stomach. Magnesium carbonate adds further support for esophageal comfort and provides supplementary magnesium to the body.GutGard® DGL deglycyrrhizinated licorice root extract eases gastric discomfort in the esophagus by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory factors such as leukotrienes, prostaglandins, and interleukins. Licorice has also been shown to raise the production of protective mucous, which serves as a barrier between the delicate lining of the esophagus and the acid stomach contents.This unique, natural on-the-go formula provides fast-acting relief from gastric discomfort. product.title: Thrivagen

For you, if you are a woman looking to support your health

  • Support normal menstrual cycles and female reproductive organs

Health Benefits at a Glance:Chronic stress can have a deep impact on the female hormone balance and upset women's health. This can lead to disturbances in the female body such as an imbalanced menstrual cycle, lower libido, mood swings, and trouble sleeping. Thrivagen is a liposome supplement specifically designed with a unique combination of sixteen different herbal extracts to support the female hormone balance and help lower the impact of stress on the female body. Why it Works:The draining effect of chronic stress on the female body can increase the need for supplementing with antioxidants and nutrients in order to keep healthy.Adaptogens are a type of nutrients that are particularly well-suited for supporting the woman’s body in times of stress. The adaptogens in Thrivagen help promote processes that help the body deal better with stress. It does so, by helping the body to deliver a balanced response to stressors as well as promote sleep quality and inhibit mood swings. As it helps provide natural phytoestrogens, it can help promote a normal hormonal function in women and may help prevent mood swings induced by hormonal imbalances, as well as support women's health in general.Wild Celery extract (Angelia Archangelica) can promote a regular and normal menstrual cycle and can also help reduce menstrual discomforts. Furthermore, since it is a bitter, it also helps promote a healthy digestive system function.This herbal formula can also help enhance women’s libido. The Science Behind the Product:The herbal extracts in this product are carefully calibrated in special ratios so that their potential effect can be maximized.The herbs in this product are encapsulated in liposome spheres. These spheres are made of lipids, which are the same material the cell membranes are made from. Since all 16 herbs in this product are delivered in single microscopic liposome spheres, they can readily be transported directly into the cells for delivery of the active ingredients.This means that you only have to supplement with a much lower amount of the active ingredients compared to a traditional, similar herbal formula. Furthermore, because the herbal extracts are delivered with the Quicksilver Delivery Systems®, the potency of the herbal nutrients are also higher than conventional herbal formulas. In other words; this highly absorbable liposomal adaptogenic tonic offers fast uptake and equal or greater potency than standard dry herbs or tinctures, for results you can feel. product.title: Fast-Acting Liquid Melatonin
product.description:
• Rapid sleep onset: Liquid format can help you fall asleep faster than capsules
  • Circadian rhythm support: Helping regulate your body's natural sleep-wake cycle
  • Cellular health: Melatonin provides powerful antioxidant protection for cells
  • DNA protection: Can shield cellular DNA from oxidative damage & free radicals
  • Immune system: Helping activate T-helper cells for a balanced immune response
  • Cognitive health: Can promote brain function, memory & mental clarity naturally

Fast-Acting Liquid Melatonin delivers 3 mg of melatonin per 1 ml serving in a convenient liquid format for rapid absorption.

Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Your sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports. Natural production of this hormone declines with age. (1-3) This can disturb your circadian rhythm and as a result thereof your quality of sleep. (4-6) Research shows that it does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health.

Why it works:Melatonin is a hormone which is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock”. (7,8) Melatonin is primarily synthesized in your pineal gland and is released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, studies show that it also has many other health advantages: Sleep supportThe body’s own production of melatonin is reduced with the natural aging process. That’s why supplementation with this hormone can be a natural solution for people in advanced age that have trouble sleeping.Supplementing with this hormone can help people who deal with sleep trouble and helping them balance their circadian rhythm.Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl) and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it also supports other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it provides protextion againt a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11)Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin can therefore support the immune system as a whole. (12,13)Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20)

The science behind the product:Scientific research has in recent years demonstrated that there is more to melatonin than it merely being helpful in promoting high-quality sleep. What is also interesting about melatonin, is that it can be delivered in a variety of fashions, ranging from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery. This melatonin product contains a high 3 mg dose of melatonin per serving (1 ml).

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Melatonin 3 mg
product.ingredients: Melatonin 3 mg

product.title: Optimized Resveratrol Elite™
product.description:
• Longevity support: Can activate genes associated with healthy aging & extended lifespan
  • Cardiovascular health: Promoting heart function, blood flow & endothelial cell protection
  • Brain & cognition: Can enhance mental clarity, memory & neurological function naturally
  • 10x bioavailability: Advanced hydrogel coating delivers superior absorption compared to standard resveratrol
  • Dual phytonutrients: Combines trans-resveratrol with quercetin for synergistic antioxidant effects
  • Metabolic wellness: Helping maintain insulin sensitivity & support balanced blood sugar

Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ delivers highly bioavailable trans-resveratrol from Japanese knotweed combined with quercetin for comprehensive anti-aging support.

Health benefits at a glance: Resveratrol is a phytonutrient, a polyphenol compound, found in several plants, most notably red grapes, some berries, and Japanese knotweed. This "multi-tasker" anti-aging nutrient is good for your heart, mind, and cellular health.Quercetin is a bioflavonoid nutrient that can support your heart and immune system. Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ gives you a healthy dose of both, and this supplement is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Why it works:Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ can help you take advantage of resveratrol's longevity properties without having to drink seven glasses of red wine to reap its benefits! A wide range of studies have revealed numerous benefits associated with resveratrol intake, including: (1-3)Promoting longevityProtecting heart healthEnhancing brain functionEncouraging immune and anti-inflammatory effectsSupporting healthy insulin sensitivityImproving metabolic healthHowever traditional resveratrol has low bioavailability. This advanced formula contains a highly bioavailable trans-resveratrol, so it's absorbed more easily by your body.The trans-resveratrol is combined with a high-bioavailability form of the phytonutrient quercetin that can promote healthy cellular function and cardiovascular health and has also been shown to encourage a healthy immune response.Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ allows your body to make the most of the health benefits of these super-nutrients.

The science behind the product:Resveratrol is a widely recognized longevity and anti-aging supplement. (4) Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ contains trans-resveratrol, the form known for its beneficial biological effects. (1,5-7) Enhanced bioavailability of resveratrolIn its free form, resveratrol has poor bioavailability. To solve this problem and maximize its benefits, the trans-resveratrol (from Japanese knotweed) is combined with a hydrogel coating of galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds. This protects resveratrol once you have ingested it. As a result the resveratrol’s bioavailability is shown to increase an amazing 10x than traditional, unformulated resveratrol. It can circulate longer throughout the body, delivering much more of this longevity nutrient's multiple benefits to your cells. (8)Resveratrol's positive impact on heart healthProtecting cells from oxidative stress is one of the ways resveratrol can promote heart health. (9) By reducing oxidative stress in the cardiovascular system, resveratrol can contribute to improve endothelial health and function, which is vital for a long and healthy life. (10)Resveratrol's influence on brain healthMoreover, resveratrol has shown promising potential in supporting brain health and cognition. In a randomized controlled trial, it demonstrated positive effects on neurological and metabolic function, as well as brain blood flow. These additional benefits further emphasize how resveratrol can enhance essential aspects of healthy aging and longevity. (11)Complementing resveratrol with quercetinThe Optimized Resveratrol Elite™ formula also contains quercetin, a phytonutrient that complements resveratrol's actions. Quercetin is an important bioflavonoid that also can help inhibit oxidative stress and promote a healthy inflammatory response. Furthermore, it can support cardiovascular health and help maintain already healthy blood pressure levels. Quercetin can also promote neurological health and proper cell division. (12-15)

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: The One®
product.description:
• Mitochondrial energy: CoQ10, PQQ & resveratrol can boost cellular power production naturally
  • New mitochondria: PQQ can encourage biogenesis for increased cellular energy capacity
  • Stress adaptation: 13 adaptogenic herbs can help your body respond to physical demands
  • Antioxidant protection: Tocotrienols & CoQ10 can shield mitochondria from free radical damage
  • Brain & heart: PQQ can promote neuron protection & cardiovascular wellness simultaneously
  • Liposomal delivery: Advanced absorption technology for superior bioavailability & rapid cellular uptake

The One® is a unique liposomal formula featuring mitochondria-boosting PQQ, CoQ10, resveratrol, tocotrienols, and 13 adaptogenic herbs.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what are mitochondria? They are the energy-generating factories of your cells.However, mitochondria can be worn down because of stress, infections, toxins, and aging, resulting in a lower energy output which can leave you fatigued and deprived of energy. The One® from Quicksilver Scientific contains a powerful and unique mitochondria-supporting formula for optimal cell performance, proliferation, and energy output.

Why it works:Being the powerhouses of the cells, mitochondria convert food into nearly all of the energy that the body uses for all functions. This type of energy is called ATP (Adenosintriphosphat), and up to 95% of the energy that the body uses is ATP. That’s why making sure that you have healthy mitochondria cannot only help your cells perform effectively but also help increase the energy output of the mitochondria — leaving you both energized and revitalized.The One® from Quicksilver Scientific contains a proprietary herbal formula in liposomal form. It contains CoQ10, PQQ, resveratrol, and DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols which can all help protect and promote healthy mitochondria. In turn, this increases the energy output of them and helps increase mitochondrial biogenesis, which is the natural formation of new mitochondria.Moreover, The One® also contains a mix of 13 adaptogenic herbs that can support the body’s response to stress and sudden high demands of energy, like when one has to perform physically.

The science behind the product:The nutrients in this product are delivered using the patented liposomal delivery system called Quicksilver Delivery Systems™ from Quicksilver Scientific.Liposomes are tiny vesicles that contain nutrients. These microscopic spheres are made of lipids, the same material that the cell membranes are made of. When nutrients are delivered this way, they can bypass the cell membrane and deliver nutrients directly inside the cell. This helps to increase bioavailability considerably.Moreover, when nutrients are delivered like this, it simultaneously nourishes the cell membrane and helps the cell absorb nutrients, as well as ridding itself of toxins.The One contains a carefully crafted combination of active ingredients that can all contribute to enhancing mitochondrial energy production and cell performance:Adaptogenic herbsThe One® contains a mix of adaptogenic herbs that can support the body's response to stress or help the cells produce more energy on occasions when the body suddenly needs more energy than normal, such as when the body is under intense physical stress (e.g. when exercising).The liquid herbal blend in this product includes maple sap syrup and extracts from: Acai BerryGynostemma Rhizome (Jiaogulan)Goji BerryMaca RootAmerican Ginseng RootSchisandra FruitChinese Licorice RootRhodiola RootAstragalus RootReishi Fruiting BodyCatuaba BarkGuarana SeedAshwagandha RootPyrroloquinoline Quinone (PQQ) PQQ can encourage mitochondrial biogenesis, the natural formation of new mitochondria. Moreover, PQQ can also help protect the neurons (brain cells) and promote cardiovascular health.ResveratrolResveratrol can stimulate certain pathways that lead to mitochondrial biogenesis. Furthermore, it has also been demonstrated to mimic beneficial caloric restriction effects on the metabolism.Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) CoQ10 is known as an antioxidant which is particularly suited for protecting mitochondria against free radicals. Such free radicals can break down the cells gradually. By binding to free radicals, CoQ10 can inhibit free radicals from wreaking havoc on the mitochondria.Moreover, CoQ10 also plays a central role in the generation of cellular energy why CoQ10 is also a part of this formula.DeltaGOLD® TocotrienolsDelta tocotrienols support the body’s antioxidant levels together with PQQ. They do so, by promoting Nrf2, which regulates cellular antioxidant production.Read more about the product here

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Melatonin IR/XR
product.description:
• Dual-action: Combines immediate & extended-release melatonin for sustained sleep support
  • Faster sleep onset: Can help you fall asleep more quickly at bedtime
  • All-night rest: Promoting uninterrupted sleep for approximately seven hours
  • Cellular & immune health: Melatonin offers powerful antioxidant protection for cells
  • Cognitive function: Can support brain health, memory & mental clarity
  • DNA protection: Helps shield cellular DNA from oxidative stress

Melatonin IR/XR offers a unique dual-action approach combining both immediate-release and extended-release melatonin in one convenient formula.

Health benefits at a glance:Melatonin, know as the "sleep hormone" is is naturally produced in the body, primarily during the night. It's derived from tryptophan and plays a key role in regulating the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock” and sleep-wake cykle. However, people who struggle with sleep may not produce enough melatonin at the right time. (1-3) Melatonin IR/XR provides a dual-action formula to help you fall asleep quickly and stay asleep all night long. It combines immediate-release and extended-release melatonin for approximately seven hours of healthy sleep support.

Why it works:Natural production of this hormone declines with age. Excessive screen use and daily stress can all also interfere with your circadian rhythm and as a result your quality of sleep.A lack of quality, restful sleep can impact cognitive function, metabolic health, and more. (4-6) Sleep difficulties may involve trouble falling asleep, or waking up in the middle of the night and being unable to fall back asleep.Melatonin IR/XR is an ideal sleep support supplement for people who have previously tried melatonin but still struggle with either falling asleep or staying asleep.Moreover, research shows that melatonin does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other health benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health. (7-17)

The science behind the product:Each capsule of Melatonin IR/XR delivers 1.5 mg of MicroActive® Melatonin, a unique combination of immediate- and extended-release melatonin. Studies on immediate-release melatonin An analysis of 15 clinical studies shows that standard melatonin can help fall asleep faster, sleep longer, and enhance overall sleep quality compared to a placebo. (18) In one study, participants took 0.1 mg, 0.3 mg, or 3 mg of melatonin or a placebo 30 minutes before bed for three days. All three melatonin doses supported restorative sleep. (19)In a more recent randomized placebo-controlled trial, subjects who took 0.5 mg of fast-release melatonin for four weeks fell asleep faster and experienced healthy, restful sleep compared to a placebo. (20) Research on controlled-release melatoninIn a study examining controlled-release melatonin, 2 mg taken two hours before bed promoted healthy sleep compared to a placebo, while also reducing the time spent awake after falling asleep. (21) Another placebo-controlled study found that participants reported improved sleep quality after taking 2 mg of extended-release melatonin before bed. (22) Fall asleep and wake refreshedFor those who have struggled with other melatonin supplements, Melatonin IR/XR can promote the deep, restful, and uninterrupted sleep your body needs.So don’t lose valuable sleep – try Melatonin IR/XR today!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders). Use caution if combining with alcohol. This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant. Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Supplement facts: Melatonin (as MicroActive ® ) 1.5 mg

product.title: Nanoemulsified Milk Thistle
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a natural ingredient that can both support liver and gut health

The active ingredients in Nanoemulsified Milk Thistle can:

  • Support and protect the liver and provides support for glutathione, a potent antioxidant in the body

  • Help maintain healthy digestion and gut health

  • Support healthy bile flow

Nanoemulsified Milk Thistle helps keep your liver healthy. It also helps keep your gut in balance by supporting healthy bile flow and digestion. It also supports healthy antioxidant levels, which fight free radicals.

Health benefits at a glance:Milk thistle, or Silybum marianum, has been utilized worldwide for over 2,000 years for its remarkable ability to protect and support the liver and can promote healthy digestive function.

Why it works:Milk thistle contains three phytonutrients (silybin, silydianin, and silychristin) together known as silymarin. Silymarin may prevent the absorption of toxins into the liver’s cells. It can support healthy digestive function and bile flow, thereby supporting gut health. It can help protect the body’s stores of glutathione, our primary endogenous antioxidant, which fights free radicals.

The science behind the product: The key constituent of silymarin, silybin, has poor bioavailability in a typical oral formulation. In Nanoemulsified Milk Thistle, the extract is encapsulated in tiny, highly absorbable liposomes. The result is a formula with rapid uptake and optimal cellular delivery. With the world’s most advanced phospholipid (liposomal) delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific supplements actually nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently.

How to use: Take 1-4 pumps as needed. Hold in the mouth for 30 seconds before swallowing.May be mixed into water. Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a health care professional. Best taken on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before meals. Use within 60 days of opening. Refrigerate upon receipt.

product.title: Liposomal Glutathione Complex
product.description:
• Master detoxifier: Glutathione can bind & eliminate toxins, heavy metals & free radicals
  • Liver protection: Milk thistle & TMG can support healthy liver function & glutathione stores
  • Antioxidant recycling: Helping regenerate vitamins E & C for extended cellular protection
  • Immune function: Glutathione can promote optimal immune system response & cellular defense
  • B vitamin support: Bioavailable B-complex can enhance metabolism & energy during detoxification processes
  • Superior absorption: Liposomal delivery bypasses digestion for rapid uptake & enhanced bioavailability

Liposomal Glutathione Complex can provide comprehensive detoxification support with the body's most potent internal antioxidant.

Health benefits at a glance:Glutathione is the centerpiece of this elegant formula designed to enhance detoxification. This molecule is our most potent internal antioxidant and is present in almost every cell of the body with high concentrations in the liver. It's produced in the body from the three amino acids cysteine, glutamic acid, and glycine.Milk thistle can support the liver and B vitamins promote metabolism and energy.

Why it works: Glutathione is known as our body's master detoxifier and is constantly processing and removing toxins through the phase II detoxification pathway. This antioxidant and its associated enzymes can efficiently bind a wide range of toxins, including reactive oxygen species, peroxides, lipid peroxides, and heavy metals.Once captured and neutralized by glutathione, these toxins can be safely eliminated through the liver and gut. It can also recycle important antioxidants such as vitamins E and C can promote proper immune function.Nanoparticle milk thistle and trimethylglycine (TMG) can support and protect the liver. Both may support the liver’s stores of glutathione. B-complex vitamins are offered in highly bioavailable forms to meet the metabolic demand during detoxification, as well as help the body convert the food we eat into energy. The liposomes in this formula contain pure phosphatidylcholine, a lipid that is the primary building block of all cell membranes.

The science behind the product:Dr. Shade has designed Quicksilver Scientific products around a groundbreaking detoxification concept that identifies the inhibition/elimination of toxicity, allergy, and infection as the key to a body in a natural and healthy state.Exceptional absorption & circulationBecause both glutathione and milk thistle have low bioavailability when taken orally, Dr. Christopher Shade, Ph.D., developed this product. Liposomal delivery systems have been shown to lead to more immediate effects and more stable plasma concentrations.In addition to unsurpassed absorption rates, small liposomal and nanoemulsified particles can enhance lymphatic circulation, helping to bypass digestive enzymes and breakdown in the liver.The Quicksilver Delivery Systems®This delivery system can provide product with clear consistency only achieved with liposomes that are small (20-100 nanometers) and stable enough to pass between cells. These small vesicles begin absorbing as soon as they hit your mouth, so you can get high absorption of the product before it is altered by the harsh processes in the digestive system.Get ready for detox optimization at its finest!

product.title: Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint
product.description:
For you, if you want to promote D3's whole body health benefits with a tasty flavor

Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint can:
  • Support healthy bone density and bone health
  • Encourage healthy cell differentiation
  • Promote cognitive and immune health
  • Is easy to swallow because of its liquid form

Sustain adequate vitamin D

Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D found in Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint, can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce, especially during the winter. A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint offers a great taste and is ideal for people who have trouble swallowing pills.

Why it works:When the skin is exposed to ultraviolet-B (UVB) rays from sunlight, the body starts synthesizing vitamin D3. Because of the winter season and application of sunblock during summer, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels may be inhibited. These factors underline the value of taking a daily vitamin D supplement. The convenient, mint-flavored liquid vitamin D formula in Liquid Vitamin D3, Mint can help maintain normal levels of vitamin D throughout the year.Moreover, since this vitamin D supplement comes in an easy-to-use bottle, receiving a daily supplement of vitamin D has never been easier.Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)

The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 50 µg/mcg (2000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per drop.Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Vitamin D3 (as Cholecalciferol) 2000 IU

Grape seed extract has been shown to support cardiovascular health and help guard against oxidation. This blend also contains trans-resveratrol, which can work synergistically for powerful longevity and anti-aging properties.

product.title: Mega GLA Sesame Lignans
product.description:
For you, if you want the right omega-6 supplement for numerous health benefits

The ingredients in Mega GLA Sesame Lignans can
  • Encourage a healthy inflammatory response
  • Offer highly concentrated GLA from borage oil
  • Help the formation of prostaglandin E1 (PGE1), which support vascular health
  • Promote healthy levels of biologically active dihomo-gamma-linolenic acid
  • Provide a product with sesame lignans for augmented (or similar) effects

Gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), healthy omega-6 acid, plays a role in healthy prostaglandin (PGE1) formation and inhibiting inflammatory factors, both of which can promote vascular and whole-body health. Enhancing GLA supplement with sesame lignans can enable GLA to work much better in the body.

Your body needs fatty acids to survive, though it is able to make all but two of them: linoleic acid (LA), in the omega-6 family, and alpha-linolenic acid (ALA) in the omega-3 family. These two fatty acids must be supplied from dietary sources and are therefore considered essential fatty acids (EFAs). Omega-6 fatty acids are well-supplied via the consumption of meat and vegetable oils. However, not all omega-6 fatty acids are of equal value. Arachidonic acid (AA), prostaglandin E2 (PGE2), thromboxane A2, and leukotriene B4 promote inflammation. In contrast, gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), found in evening primrose oil, borage oil, and black currant oil, benefits healthy prostaglandin (PGE1) formation reduces inflammation.Health-conscious people have been swallowing many borage oil supplements to obtain GLA, the parent of the biologically active DGLA (dihomogamma linolenic acid). Life Extension adds 10 mg of sesame lignans to each softgel of Mega GLA borage oil. Sesame lignans increase beneficial DGLA and decreases inflammation. Numerous studies document GLA’s multiple health effects. Enhancing this supplement with sesame lignans leads to more efficiency in the body, which means more people can use it.

Supplement facts: Calories 5 Calories from fat 5 Total Fat 0.5 g Saturated fat 0 g Gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) [from borage oil (seed)] 400 mg Sesame seed lignan extract 10 mg
product.ingredients: Calories 5 Calories from fat 5 Total Fat 0.5 g Saturated fat 0 g Gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) [from borage oil (seed)] 400 mg Sesame seed lignan extract 10 mg

product.title: Menopause Relief
product.description:
• Hot flash relief: Can reduce frequency & intensity of hot flashes naturally
  • Night sweat reduction: Helping minimize nighttime perspiration for better sleep quality
  • Mood balance: Can ease irritability & mood swings during menopause transition
  • Hormone-free formula: Natural Siberian rhubarb extract can mimic estrogen without actual hormones
  • Comprehensive comfort: Addressing multiple menopausal discomforts in one daily tablet
  • Clinically studied: Research shows up to 83% reduction in total menopausal discomforts

Menopause Relief features a standardized Siberian rhubarb extract that can naturally address common menopausal symptoms without hormones.

Health benefits at a glance:Menopause is caused by natural aging and is caused by an age-induced decrease in natural estrogen levels in the female body, offsetting a hormone imbalance in the female body. This sudden change in the estrogen balance can cause discomfort and signs of menopause such as hot flashes night sweats, and mood swings. The active ingredient in this product is a powerful Siberian rhubarb extract (Rheum rhaponticum L.) that can mimic estrogen. This helps to inhibit the effects of changing estrogen levels and can relieve common menopausal discomforts such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. (1-5)Menopause Relief offers comprehensive menopause relief in a soy-free, hormone-free, once-daily, enteric-coated vegetarian tablet.

Why it works:Although menopausal discomforts vary from woman to woman, they are usually accompanied by discomforts such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. Other discomforts also include irritability, sleep disturbances, exhaustion, joint and muscle discomfort, vaginal dryness, issues with urinary health, and sexual function. These are all caused by a hormonal imbalance in estrogen hormone levels in the female body.Menopause Relief is a natural menopause supplement that contains a powerful standardized extract of Siberian rhubarb. Although this extract is not a hormone, it can simulate estrogen reactions in the body. Menopausal discomforts are offset by a rapid drop in estrogen hormone levels in the female body. However, research shows that the rhubarb extract in this product mimics estrogen activity in the female body. This can inhibit the intensity of common menopausal discomforts.Studies indicate that the active ingredient in Menopause Relief can produce up to 83% reduction in total menopausal discomforts! (3)

The science behind the product:The Siberian rhubarb extract found in Menopause Relief is standardized for two unique compounds called rhaponticin and desoxyrhaponticin. Pre-clinical studies show that the Siberian rhubarb extract: Selectively activates a specific estrogen receptor, ER-β.Simultaneously, it leaves another estrogen receptor known as ER-α undisturbed (6)Scientists believe that this is why the Siberian rhubarb extract in this product can mimic the effect of estrogen, which in turn helps quell menopausal symptoms.Furthermore, the standardized extract in this product has been studied in randomized, placebo-controlled clinical trials in more than 400 women. The clinical studies of the rhubarb extract lasted between 12 weeks and two years. (1, 2, 5)After the trials had ended the women involved in the studies were asked to answer standardized research questionnaires which were designed to evaluate menopausal discomforts as well as their mood and emotional health. After examining the research results, researchers found that the Siberian rhubarb extract produced: Up to 83% reduction in total menopausal discomforts (3)Towards an 83 % reduction in hot flashes (5)Up to 66% reduction in irritability and mood swings (2)

How to use: Take one (1) tablet daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Caution:Do not take if you have, or have a history of, estrogen-dependent tumors.

Supplement facts: Siberian rhubarb ( Rheum rhaponticum L . ) extract (root) [std. to > 54% rhaponticin, > 27% desoxyrhaponticin] 4 mg
product.ingredients: Siberian rhubarb ( Rheum rhaponticum L . ) extract (root) [std. to > 54% rhaponticin, > 27% desoxyrhaponticin] 4 mg

This elegant formula can provide support for seasonal sufferers through an innovative blend of flavonoids, Vitamin C, antioxidants and Diindolylmethane (DIM).

Why it works:Because the uptake of the molecules in this formula can be limited by a breakdown in the digestive tract, or in the case of vitamin C, by gastrointestinal saturation, Dr. Shade developed Nanoemulsified Hista-Aid®.Liposomal delivery systems have been shown to lead to more immediate effects and more stable plasma concentrations. In addition to exceptional absorption rates, small liposomal and nanoemulsified particles enhance lymphatic circulation, helping to bypass digestive enzymes and breakdown in the liver.Mast cells play a powerful role in allergies. Flavonoids are polyphenolic plant compounds that can inhibit mast cell activity and result in histamine release. Two of the most effective flavonoids are quercetin and luteolin.A centrepiece of this innovative formula is its novel focus on Nrf2, our body’s master antioxidant switch, which regulates over 200 genes involved in detoxification. Both DIM (Diindolylmethane) and quercetin, which this formula also contains, have been shown to help support Nrf2 activity.

product.title: Ultra Energy®
product.description:
For you, who are looking for an extra energy and endurance booster

The ingredients in Ultra Energy® can:

  • Help keep you energized

  • Promote vitality, endurance & resilience

  • Support mental clarity & calmness

Do you need energy? Ultra Energy® can help shift the feeling of burnout or unfocused energy to sustainable productivity. The product delivers a carefully balanced combination of 13 adaptogenic herbs known to help modulate the body’s daily stress and help regulate cortisol levels. It features favorites like ashwagandha, rhodiola, and reishi, along with lesser-known treasures such as catuaba and guarana seed.

Store at room temperature.

Health benefits at a glance:Ultra Energy® is a natural energy supplement and contains a balanced blend of adaptogenic herbs, hand-tailored by expert herbalist Dan Moriarty of Sun Horse Energy®. This unique formula can help your body respond to high demand with resilience and vitality, not fight, flight, or exhaustion. With daily use, this product helps support resilience and a clear, balanced mind.It's packaged in Quicksilver's advanced liposomal delivery system for optimal bioavailability and absorption.

Why it works:Ultra Energy® provides a proprietary liquid adaptogenic herbal mix that can support adrenal gland function and then spread its action through the entire body. It's gentle enough for everyday use.The blend's 13 herbs are known to help modulate the body’s daily pressures and cortisol response, including: Aacai berryGynostemma rhizome (Jiaogulan)Ggoji berryMaca rootAmerican ginseng rootSchisandra fruitChinese licorice rootRhodiola rootAstragalus rootReishi fruiting bodyCatuaba barkGuarana seedAshwagandha root

The science behind the product:A celebrated reputation Adaptogens (or adaptagenic) are substances, often herbs or plant compounds, that for a long time have been recognized to promote: The body’s ability to handle stressRestoration of internal balance (homeostasis)Resilience to physical, emotional, or environmental challengesSustained energy: Instead of a quick boost, they support more stable, long-lasting energy throughout the day.The powerful botanicals in this supplement are sourced globally, from Russia, America, South America, Asia, and the Indian subcontinent. This is to create a formula that draws on the best adaptogenic traditions in each region.Efficient delivery and rapid uptakeBecause bioavailability and absorption of herbs vary, Dr. Shade developed this herbal blend. All thirteen herbs in Ultra Energy® are encapsulated in tiny, highly bioavailable liposomes. These small vesicles begin absorbing as soon as they hit your mouth, so you can get a high uptake of the product before it's altered by the harsh processes in the digestive system.A serving size of 1 ml (2 pumps) delivers 400 mg herbal blend, and each bottle contains 50 (400-mg) servings.

product.title: Nanoemulsified Cat's Claw Elite™
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a liposomal immune health booster
The active ingredients in Nanoemulsified Cat's Claw Elite™:

  • Can support the immune system and defend against invaders
  • Ingredients are instantly absorbed into the body
  • Provide Ideal immune protection because of its innovative liposomal formula

How to strengthen your immune system? Cat’s Claw has been used in traditional medicine for more than 2000 years. The formula in Nanoemulsified Cat's Claw Elite™ contains a combination of cat's claw extract, lemon balm oil and extract, Vitamin D and the fatty acid monolaurin that simultaneously provides support for the immune system and offers protection against invaders. Liposomal delivery ensures that the active ingredients are more readily available to the body.

Health benefits at a glance:Cat’s Claw (Uña de gato) is the centerpiece of this innovative immune supportive formula, which is enhanced with plant-derived essential oils and extracts, Vitamin D and the fatty acid monolaurin, all designed to maximally protect the immune system.

Why it works:How to boost your immune system? It's an age-old question. Plants all over the world protect themselves from pests by developing volatile oils that permeate their leaves, bark, or peel. These can offer many benefits to humans.Cat’s Claw is a climbing vine that thrives in the Peruvian rainforest—stretching as tall as a thousand feet. Medicinal use of the inner bark dates back 2000 years to the Inca civilization, and to this day South American Ashaninka priests regard the plant as sacred, using it for healing and in religious ceremonies.The most widely utilized strain of cat’s claw, Uncaria tomentosa, boasts a treasure trove of phytonutrients thought to be responsible for the vine’s reputed healing powers and the ability to strengthen immune defenses.Each 1 mL of Nanoemulsified Cat’s Claw Elite delivers 1000 IU of Vitamin D3 and 350 mg of a proprietary blend of Liquid Cat’s Claw bark extract (Uncaria tomentosa), phospholipids (from purified sunflower seed lecithin), monolaurin, Lemon Balm leaf extract, Lemon Balm leaf oil, Rose flower oil, Natural Mint oil. All of these ingredients offer a solution to the question of how to boost your immune system naturally.The fatty acid monolaurin is derived from lauric acid and is formed naturally in the human body in small quantities. Monolaurin works by binding directly to the envelope of invaders, preventing them from attaching and entering cells. Vitamin D is added to aid normal immune system function and bone health.

The science behind the product:Because many herbs have low bioavailability when taken orally, Dr. Shade developed Nanoemulsified Cat's Claw Elite™. Liposomal delivery systems have been shown to lead to more immediate effects and more stable plasma concentrations. In addition to exceptional absorption rates, small liposomal and nanoemulsified particles enhance lymphatic circulation, helping to bypass digestive enzymes and breakdown in the liver. The liposomes in this formula contain pure phosphatidylcholine, a phospholipid that is the primary building block of all cell membranes.Quicksilver Delivery Systems®Utilizes modern science to unleash the curative power of nature. With the world’s most advanced phospholipid delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific supplements can help to nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently.The Quicksilver Scientific Health SystemThe Quicksilver Health System is the result of Dr. Christopher Shade’s extensive research on liposomal detoxification methods. Dr. Shade has designed Quicksilver Scientific products around a groundbreaking detoxification concept that identifies the inhibition/elimination of toxicity, allergy, and infection as the key to a body in a natural and healthy state.The road to inhibition of these factors has three steps: Restore, Maintain, and Advance.You can read more about The Quicksilver Scientific Health System here.

How to use: The correct directions can be found on the label which can be found on the QS product website.
