product.title: Wellness Code® Muscle Strength & Restore Formula
product.description:
For you, who are looking for a formula that can help preserve healthy muscle function

Wellness Code™

Health benefits at a glance:As we age, muscle mass naturally diminishes, leading to decreased strength, mobility, and overall health. Muscle Strength & Restore Formula can help combat this! The formula provides 3,000 mg of HMB (a bioactive leucine metabolite) and 1,000 IU of vitamin D3 per serving, is supporting muscle maintenance and growth. Incorporate this convenient, flavorless powder into your daily routine by mixing it with water, your preferred beverage, or any of our protein shake mixes.

Why it works:Maintaining skeletal muscle health requires keeping a balance between muscle growth (anabolism) and muscle breakdown (catabolism). As we age, our ability to rebuild muscle slows down, even when all the right amino acids (muscle-building blocks) are present.It is, however, possible to counteract such age-induced loss of muscle mass and strength by dietary supplementation. And this is where HMB (β-hydroxy β-methylbutyrate) and Vitamin D3 come into play:HMB amino acid leucine. HMB has been shown to help maintain muscle function and support muscle growth, especially for those over age 65. HMB has beneficial effects on muscle mass by helping to preserve the structural integrity of your muscles and supporting muscle growth. Furthermore, it also supports performance for both resistance and endurance training.Vitamin D3 also has well-documented benefits for muscle health and healthy bone density. Moreover, vitamin D3 promotes both the metabolism and healthy muscle function. Vitamin D also supports healthy mitochondrial function and energy consumption, which can also contribute to promoting muscle strength. Furthermore, vitamin D helps inhibit inflammatory factors that affect muscle health as well.Wellness Code™ Muscle Strength and Restore Formula is an excellent addition to your daily health regimen, regardless if you exercise regularly or not. Because keeping your muscles strong is important for everyone, the formula fits people of all ages.

The science behind the product:Researchers have carried out several studies on HMB's muscle-building abilities.HMB's effect on muscle recoveryIn one such study, researchers tested if HMB played a role in preventing loss of muscle mass. As it happens, prolonged bed rest can result in a loss of muscle mass. Researchers, therefore, tested this by examining how quickly test subjects recovered muscle mass after they had been confined to their bed for ten days.The study was a randomized placebo-controlled study of both men and women. After the ten days of bed confinement, test subjects had to conduct eight weeks of rehabilitation training in the form of resistance training. Each group took either 3g a day of HMB or a placebo for 5 days before bed rest, up until the end of the study. The placebo group lost lean mass (that's muscle) during bed rest, but those given HMB during bed rest showed no such decline.HMB's effect on resistance trainingIn another randomized placebo-control trial, men and women received 3 g a day of HMB, or a placebo and trained for 4 weeks.At the end of the study, the HMB group had a greater increase in upper body strength than the placebo group. In another clinical study, supplementation with 3 g a day of HMB for 9 weeks provided a substantial benefit to lower-body strength when combined with resistance training.HMB's effect on muscle health in advanced ageStudies also indicate that HMB is useful to older people. In a 24-week, randomized, placebo-controlled study, adults 65 years and older were divided into two groups: one that exercised regularly and one that didn’t exercise at all.Both groups took either 3 g of HMB twice a day or a placebo. The non-exercise group that took HMB showed signs of improved muscle health. However, the exercise group's results were even better; they improved measurements of muscle function and lean mass.

How to use: Mix one scoop with approximately 8 oz cold water or beverage of choice in a shaker cup or blender (preferably with your protein shake).Drink one shake daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Vitamin D3 (as cholecalciferol) 1000 IU Calcium (from MyHMB ® Calcium ß-Hydroxy-ß-Methylbutyrate Monohydrate) 360 mg HMB (MyHMB ® Calcium ß-Hydroxy-ß-Methylbutyrate Monohydrate) 3000 mg
product.ingredients: Vitamin D3 (as cholecalciferol) 1000 IU Calcium (from MyHMB ® Calcium ß-Hydroxy-ß-Methylbutyrate Monohydrate) 360 mg HMB (MyHMB ® Calcium ß-Hydroxy-ß-Methylbutyrate Monohydrate) 3000 mg

product.title: Circadian Sleep
product.description:
For you, if you want to your natural circadian rhythm for better sleep and overall health

The active ingredients in Circadian Sleep can:

  • Support a natural and healthy sleep-wake cycle

  • Help reset both your central and peripheral body clock (circadian rhythm)

  • Promote overall health through quality sleep and circadian rhythm support

The innovative Circadian Sleep formula combines melatonin with a unique citrus-peel extract, which supports both “central” and “peripheral” body clock (circadian) function. This can help enhance high-quality sleep and promote overall health.

Health benefits at a glance:Circadian rhythms influence every aspect of health – from sleep patterns and heart rate to blood pressure, hormone release, brain function, and even weight regulation. Nearly every cell in our body has an internal “clock” that responds to changes in light perception and exposure, helping create our circadian rhythm and our own inner body clocks. 'When the circadian rhythm is brought out of balance, you not only have trouble sleeping. A circadian balance that is “out of tune” for longer periods of time can also affect your overall health negatively because good sleep and a healthy circadian rhythm are so essential to good health. Circadian Sleep is a formula that uses a specially developed mix of melatonin and citrus peel extract to support normal circadian rhythms that help you sleep well and promote whole body health.

Why it works:Your body clock (circadian rhythm) is best known for being an internal timekeeper that regulates your sleep-wake cycle. The body has two types of clocks that respond to this circadian rhythm, and they work together to manage all of the body’s systems:1) The central clock in the brain controls sleep, wakefulness, body temperature, and hormones according to the time of day.2) In addition, our individual cells contain a peripheral clock that regulates many critical biological processes, including liver function, blood pressure, new cell growth, and the release of hormones.However, aging, a hectic lifestyle, and many other factors can contribute to the disruption of both of your circadian cycles. Over time, this can affect your overall health. Circadian Sleep has been developed to help restore and reset both types of circadian rhythms, using two ingredients. While MicroActive® Melatonin targets the central body clock in your brain, nobiletin citrus peel extract can promote a healthy peripheral circadian rhythm in your organs. By using these two ingredients, Circadian Sleep can promote a body clock (circadian rhythm) in balance. Healthy sleep-wake cycles promote brain health and contribute to overall health.

The science behind the product: Melatonin for central clock support The central clock in the brain operates on light detected through the eyes. With the first light of day, our body turns on the systems, ready for activity. With the arrival of nightfall, our systems begin to shut down and prepare for sleep. This activity is regulated in part through secretions of the sleep hormone melatonin from your brain’s pineal gland. This release of melatonin helps normalize hormone and neurotransmitter functions controlled by the brain and its central clock. Science has shown that the hormone melatonin plays a critical role in keeping the central clock in sync with the environment and can restore our circadian rhythms through healthful sleep. The central clock, in turn, aligns the peripheral clock, which thereby also supports whole-body health. When melatonin output is inadequate, it can result in sleep trouble. Nobiletin for healthy peripheral circadian rhythms Almost all cells in your body have their own circadian rhythm. The cellular circadian rhythm is also known as the peripheral circadian clock. Its pace is being set by the central circadian rhythm because it regulates your sleep-wake cycles.Nobiletin (a polyethoxylated flavone) is a compound that has been derived from the peel of young citrus fruits. Nobiletin is an interesting compound in relation to circadian rhythm support because it can activate a unique set of bodily regulators.It has also been shown to offer antioxidant protection to brain cells, which promotes brain health. Furthermore, it has also been shown to promote a healthy inflammatory response in the body. Pre-clinical studies have shown that nobiletin can help regulate peripheral circadian rhythms. It does so by activating unique receptors, which are known to play a role in regulating circadian rhythms, that exist throughout the body. Nobiletin has also been shown to promote whole-body health. In another pre-clinical study, nobiletin helped regulate the expression of a certain set of genes. This particular set of genes helps control the expression of other genes that control circadian rhythms in almost every cell in the body. This, in turn, supports a healthy metabolism, as well as liver, kidney, and brain health. It also helps maintain healthy blood pressure, cholesterol, and triglyceride levels.

How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, before bedtime, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Melatonin is naturally secreted from the pineal gland at night and should be taken at night for optimal results.

Supplement facts: Nobiletin [from young citrus fruit (peel)] 50 mg Melatonin (as MicroActive® 1.5 mg
product.ingredients: Nobiletin [from young citrus fruit (peel)] 50 mg Melatonin (as MicroActive® 1.5 mg

product.title: Senolytic Activator®
product.description:
• Anti-aging support: Helping remove senescent cells that accumulate with age
  • Cellular rejuvenation: Can support the body's natural processes for clearing dysfunctional aging cells
  • Inflammation balance: Helping reduce chronic inflammation caused by senescent cells
  • Sirtuin activation: Fisetin can promote youthful cellular function & longevity
  • Bioavailability: Ultra-absorbable quercetin & fisetin can deliver 50x & 25x better absorption
  • Once-weekly dosing: Convenient intake with just three capsules weekly

Senolytic Activator® contains a unique combination of black tea theaflavins, plant-derived apigenin, and ultra-absorbable forms of quercetin and fisetin to target senescent cells.

Health benefits at a glance:Every person in the world has senescent (aeging) cells in their body. The older you get, the more senescent cells you have. The senescent cells can gradually affect the functioning of healthy and youthful cells around them.Senolytic Activator® contains a unique mix of black tea theaflavin, the plant-derived flavonoid apigenin, and ultra-absorbable forms of the bio-flavonoids quercetin and fisetin.

Why it works:When cells become old or dysfunctional, they are supposed to die off to make room for new cells. But as we age, many cells become senescent instead. Cellular senescence is other words a natural part of the aging process.However, senescent cells can accumulate over time, affecting the day-to-day function of the healthy cells around them. They pump out toxic compounds that degrade nearby cells and incite chronic inflammation that causes systemic damage. Cellular senescence has become a major target for anti-aging research, and studies show that compounds called senolytics can remove senescent cells and slow down or even reverse aging processes. (1)The senolytics black tea theaflavins, apigenin, quercetin, and fisetin all target different biological pathways, helping to manage senescent cells. (2-4)Moreover, senolytic research indicates that intermittent dosing in pre-clinical studies is effective at improving healthspan. (4) That’s why Senolytic Activator instructions call for taking just three vegetarian capsules, once a week!

The science behind the product:Senolytic Activator contains a unique combination of ingredients that offer a strategy for fighting senescent cells.Theaflavin – reducing the senescent cell burdenTheaflavins are compounds derived from Camellia sinensis (tea plant). Theaflavins have widespread health benefits, supporting healthy cell division and healthy inflammatory response. (5, 6)New research indicates that theaflavins may be especially helpful for reducing senescent cell burden. In pre-clinical models, theaflavins helped powerfully inhibit the accumulation of particular cell senescence biomarkers. (2)Quercetin – promoting cellular healthQuercetin can support endothelial and cardiovascular health, promote healthy immune function and more. (7, 8) The value of quercetin has been recognized for some time. But its potential to meaningfully impact whole body rejuvenation is just starting to be uncovered through its senolytic activity.The discovery that quercetin is a senolytic compound has drawn significant attention to this unique approach to combat aging. (4)Standard quercetin is hard to absorb. But this formulation features our new quercetin phytosome, a phospholipid sphere that encases the quercetin, aiding in its absorption and making it up to 50 times more bioavailable.Easy-to-absorb fisetin – boosting longevity at the cellular levelFisetin is terrific for whole-body health. It’s a powerful senolytic compound, meaning it can actively target senescent cells, the ones that no longer function optimally.Fisetin can help encourage the body’s natural pathways for clearing senescent cells, which allows healthy cells to flourish. (9)Another important aspect of cellular longevity is sirtuin function. Sirtuin proteins keep your cells performing at their best, but sirtuin activity declines with age. (10) Fisetin has been shown in preclinical studies to encourage youthful, healthy sirtuin function. (11-15)But during digestion, much of fisetin is rapidly converted into other compounds by a process called conjugation. That’s why we protected fisetin by combining it with galactomannans, a type of fiber derived from fenugreek seed.Doing so makes it up to 25 times more readily available than standard fisetin. (16) That means it circulates in your system longer and your body has more time to access fisetin’s many health benefits.Apigenin – a powerful additionApigenin, a natural flavonoid, is a powerful addition to Senolytic Activator® formula. Quercetin, fisetin, and theaflavins from black tea target senescent cells, but not all of them.The remaining senescent cells create compounds known collectively as the Senescence Associated Secretory Phenotype, or SASP. (17) Apigenin can help inhibit remaining senescent cells from making SASP to support cellular and tissue health, a critical aspect of healthy aging. (18)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per week (3 capsules): %RI* Bio-Fisetin® proprietary blend Providing 18% fisetin (56 mg) [from wax tree extract (stem)], 35% galactomannans (109 mg) [from fenugreek (seed)] 312 mg ** Theaflavins [from decaffeinated black tea extract (leaf)] 275 mg ** Bio-Quercetin phytosome 25 mg quercetin [from Japanese sophora concentrate (flower bud)], phosphatidylcholine complex [from sunflower]) 74 mg ** Apigenin 50 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per week (3 capsules): %RI* Bio-Fisetin® proprietary blend Providing 18% fisetin (56 mg) [from wax tree extract (stem)], 35% galactomannans (109 mg) [from fenugreek (seed)] 312 mg ** Theaflavins [from decaffeinated black tea extract (leaf)] 275 mg ** Bio-Quercetin phytosome 25 mg quercetin [from Japanese sophora concentrate (flower bud)], phosphatidylcholine complex [from sunflower]) 74 mg ** Apigenin 50 mg **

Cognitex® Alpha GPC is a foundational brain health formula combining three essential nutrients for cognitive support.

product.title: Bio Quercetin
product.description:
• Cardiovascular support: Can promote heart health & maintain already-healthy blood pressure
  • Immune function: Encouraging healthy immune response during seasonal challenges
  • Superior absorption: Up to 62x higher bioavailability compared to standard quercetin
  • Antioxidant protection: Can inhibit oxidative stress & support cellular health
  • Inflammatory balance: Promoting a healthy inflammatory response throughout the body

Bio Quercetin delivers a highly absorbable form of this versatile bioflavonoid, combined with fenugreek fibers to dramatically enhance uptake.

Health benefits at a glance: Quercetin is a highly versatile bio-flavonoid that can promote a wide variety of health aspects. But, like many phytonutrients, quercetin is difficult for the body to absorb. By combining it with fenugreek seed fibers, the bioavailability is significantly improved, compared to standard, unformulated quercetin. Why it works Quercetin has a long tradition of being used for relieving the effects of seasonal immune challenges. It is shown to promote heart health and offer support for the immune system and inflammatory response. The science behind the product Clinically backed for better bioavailability In a randomized clinical trial, bio-quercetin formulated with fenugreek fibers was compared to standard, unformulated quercetin. Results showed serum levels of total quercetin were up to 62 times higher, while free (unconjugated) quercetin reached levels up to 18 times greater. (1) Promoting cardiovascular & endothelial health Quercetin is shown to support cardiovascular health, promote endothelial function, and help maintain already-normal blood pressure. (2,3) It is also a strong antioxidant, inhibiting oxidative stress and promoting a balanced inflammatory response. (4,5) Strong immune system support Quercetin can promote a healthy immune function during seasonal challenges. In a clinical study, it helped physically fit older adults maintain a healthy immune response. (6)

Supplement facts: Bio-Quercetin® Proprietary Blend 30 mg providing 35% quercetin (10 mg) [from Japanese sophora concentrate (flower bud)], 30% galactomannans (8 mg) [from fenugreek (seed)]
product.ingredients: Bio-Quercetin® Proprietary Blend 30 mg providing 35% quercetin (10 mg) [from Japanese sophora concentrate (flower bud)], 30% galactomannans (8 mg) [from fenugreek (seed)]

product.title: ArthroMax® Advanced with NT2 Collagen™ & AprèsFlex®
product.description:
• Joint comfort & mobility: Relieving discomfort & enhancing freedom of movement naturally
  • Cartilage & tendon support: Undenatured type II collagen can promote healthy connective tissue structure
  • Inflammation balance: AprèsFlex® boswellia can inhibit inflammatory factors at cellular level
  • Structural joint health: Glucosamine can maintain comfortable function & support long-term joint integrity

ArthroMax® Advanced with NT2 Collagen™ and AprèsFlex® combines four clinically studied nutrients for comprehensive joint support.

Healthy joints with boswellia, collagen, glucosamine & boronThis comprehensive and innovative formula includes four clinically studied nutrients for joint support: AprèsFlex® BoswelliaThe compounds in Boswellia extract are demonstrated to bind directly to 5-LOX, an enzyme that transforms fatty acids into inflammatory factors like leukotriene B4. (1,2) Boswellia can inhibit 5-LOX activity at the cellular level. In a placebo-controlled clinical trial, Boswellia extract supported freedom of movement and helped relieve joint discomfort in just 8 weeks. (3) Another randomized clinical study found similar results with the benefits continuing for another four weeks. (4) Undenatured NT2 Collagen™NT2 Collagen™ is a form of undenatured type II collagen that can support a healthy inflammation response in tendons and cartilage. Research concludes that undenatured collagen helps relieve minor joint discomfort and encourages healthy, comfortable joint function. (5-7)One placebo-controlled, double-blind study found that undenatured type II collagen provided relief by 33% and increased joint comfort scores by 40% in just 90 days. (7) Glucosamine & BoronRandomized controlled clinical trials have shown that glucosamine helps maintain comfortable joint function and, used long-term, helps support healthy joint structure. (8,9) ArthroMax® Advanced with NT2 Collagen™ & AprèsFlex® also provides boron, a mineral that can promote healthy bones and joints.Moreover, this formula uses a special form of boron, calcium fructoborate, that in a clinical trial promoted joint function and comfort. (10)

product.title: Fast-C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for an ultra-absorbable form of Vitamin C and quercetin antioxidant support

The active ingredients in Fast-C®

Health benefits at a glance:Fast-C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome provides a very potent antioxidant formula that can amplify all the positive health impacts that vitamin C has on the body. The ingredients are delivered in an ultra-absorbable formula containing quercetin for extra antioxidant support. Moreover, a calcium-magnesium blend offers protection for sensitive stomachs, making this an ideal product for anyone wanting a super-charged vitamin C or antioxidant formula.

Why it works:Vitamin C is a potent natural antioxidant that has a profound impact on whole-body health benefits. This essential nutrient supports immune health, heart health, iron uptake, collagen formation, and more. Moreover, Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome also contains quercetin which helps inhibit oxidative stress caused by free radicals and also inhibits inflammation [4,5].Quercetin also promotes both cardiovascular and endothelial health and helps maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range [6-11].The fact that Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome contains both quercetin and vitamin C, makes it an ideal vitamin C supplement since quercetin complements vitamin C’s whole-body health benefits.Furthermore, our innovative bio-quercetin ingredient in this supplement is encased in a phytosome - a tiny phospholipid sphere that makes it up to 50 times more bioavailable than traditional quercetin [12].Our Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome also contains calcium and magnesium which neutralizes acid. This makes Fast C® the ideal vitamin C supplement for people with acid-sensitive stomachs.Lastly, Fast C® and Bio-Quercetin Phytosome also contains piperine which is a substance found in black pepper that augments the absorption and bioavailability of nutrients like vitamin C [13].

The science behind the product:Research has been done on vitamin C and it has shown that vitamin C can be a powerful antioxidant [15-22]. It can scavenge free radicals, can provide protection from oxidative stress [3-10]. Vitamin C can also stimulate iron absorption [23, 24]. Furthermore, it can also participate in the formation of collagen that supports arterial walls, skin, bones and teeth [17-19]. Vitamin C also plays a role in protection against environmental and physical stresses such as ingestion of heavy metals [24-29], cigarette smoking [30-33], compromised immunity [34-41] and extreme temperatures [29, 42-44].There is a scientific evidence that specialized compounds in fruits and vegetables provide critical protection against free radical assault [45]. Quercetin is a bioflavonoid found in grape skins, onions, apples, buckwheat and other food sources.Quercetin has a long tradition of use relieving the effects of seasonal immune challenges, and has been shown in clinical trials to encourage a healthy immune response in physically fit adults [46, 47] Quercetin helps inhibit oxidative stress and inflammation [48,49]. Quercetin also promotes both cardiovascular and endothelial health and helps maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range [50-55].

How to use: Take one (1) tablet once or twice daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Caution: Do not take more than 15 mg per day of Bioperine®.

Supplement facts: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 500 mg Calcium (as calcium carbonate) 79 mg Magnesium (as magnesium hydroxide) 8 mg Bioperine ® piperine [from black pepper extract (fruit)] 3 mg Bio-Quercetin phytosome 15 mg (providing 5 mg quercetin [from Japanese sophora concentrate (flower bud)], phosphatidylcholine complex [from sunflower])
product.ingredients: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 500 mg Calcium (as calcium carbonate) 79 mg Magnesium (as magnesium hydroxide) 8 mg Bioperine ® piperine [from black pepper extract (fruit)] 3 mg Bio-Quercetin phytosome 15 mg (providing 5 mg quercetin [from Japanese sophora concentrate (flower bud)], phosphatidylcholine complex [from sunflower])

product.title: Discomfort Relief
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a product that can help relieve minor pain

The active ingredients in Discomfort Relief can:
  • Help inhibit occaional physical discomfort
  • Deliver a delicious berry-flavored chewable tablet

Health benefits at a glance:Millions of people experience periods of physical discomfort (1). Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) is a unique fatty acid shown help inhibit occasional discomfort. (2)This compound naturally produced by your body. Discomfort Relief provides 600 mg of PEA into a easy-to-use, chewable tablet.

Why it works:When you experience physical discomfort, your body is telling you that something is wrong. Repeated occasional physical discomforts can be debilitating and lower the quality of life. So while one should always pay close attention to such discomforts, there are two things that one can do to inhibit them. One can always address the underlying cause of physical discomforts as well as turn off discomfort signaling in the body.Discomfort Relief combines PEA in convenient chewables with a berry flavour. Simply eat one or two tablets per day if you experience occasional physical discomfort and minor pain.

The science behind the product:The efficacy of PEA has been demonstrated in multiple clinical trials (3-5). For example: In a controlled trial that randomized 636 patients to placebo or PEA for three weeks, 600 mg of PEA every day significantly improved scores on assessments of relative comfort. (6)

How to use: Chew one (1) tablet once or twice daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Do not swallow tablets whole.

product.title: Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium
product.description:
• Blood pressure support: Can help maintain already-healthy blood pressure levels naturally
  • Cardiovascular health: Promoting optimal heart function & healthy blood vessel relaxation
  • Dual-action absorption: Extended-release magnesium for immediate & sustained mineral delivery throughout the day
  • Mineral synergy: Potassium & magnesium work together supporting circulation & heart rhythm
  • Nutritional gap solution: Can fill common dietary deficiencies in essential minerals

Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium combines two heart-friendly minerals in one convenient formula.

Health benefits at a glance:Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium delivers a powerful combo of heart-friendly minerals that work in synergy to promote cardiovascular health and help maintain already healthy blood pressure levels.Get a healthy dose of both in one convenient supplement.

Why it works:Supporting healthy blood pressure levels is a common health goal. Both magnesium and potassium, having been studied intensely studied, are vital for this purpose. However, many people don’t get enough of these essential minerals through their daily diet. (1-4)Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium combines the nutrients to help fill nutritional gaps and support heart health.

The science behind the product:Magnesium for both immediate & sustained absorptionMagnesium plays a vital role in numerous biological processes throughout the body. It supports the health of your heart, arteries, bones, muscles, and more. (5-8) One of magnesium’s key functions is helping to maintain already healthy blood pressure by relaxing blood vessel walls and promoting optimal vascular function.It also helps inhibit inflammation to support arterial health.(2,8) Additionally, magnesium aids in the transport of potassium and calcium across cell membranes, important for maintaining a steady heart rhythm and overall cardiovascular function. (9) Potassium with Extend-Release Magnesium combines magnesium oxide and magnesium citrate, delivering both fast-acting and extended release to support optimal absorption and long-lasting benefits.Potassium: Magnesium’s complement in heart healthPotassium plays a vital role in many of the same biological functions as magnesium. As a natural counterbalance to sodium, potassium promotes vasodilation, the widening of blood vessels, which supports healthy circulation. (10-12) It also helps the body eliminate excess sodium through urine, further benefiting cardiovascular health. (13) A comprehensive review of scientific evidence shows that potassium supplementation helps maintain blood pressure already within the normal range. (3,14) It’s also essential for transmitting electrical signals in the heart, supporting a steady and healthy heartbeat. (13,15)

How to use: Take one (1) capsule once or twice daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner

Supplement facts: Magnesium (as ZümXR ® magnesium oxide, magnesium citrate) 250 mg Potassium (as potassium chloride) 99 mg
product.ingredients: Magnesium (as ZümXR ® magnesium oxide, magnesium citrate) 250 mg Potassium (as potassium chloride) 99 mg

For you, if you want to promote a state of calm and restful sleep

The active ingredients in LipoCalm® can:

  • Allay tension & promote physical relaxation

  • Relieve a restless mind & support a healthy mood

  • Provide melatonin-free sleep support

  • Offer fast & efficient absorption for optimal effect because of liposomal technology

LipoCalm® is a premium blend of PharmaGABA® and powerful botanicals perfectly calibrated to calm the mind, relax the body, and promote sleep.

Take it whenever you need a moment of peace – day or night.

Health benefits at a glance:LipoCalm® is a refined blend of botanicals and pure plant-based ingredients that can support your body’s natural relaxation response, helping create a calm mind and relaxed body.

Why it works:The neurotransmitter GABA (gamma-aminobutyric acid) inhibits or slows down nerve impulses, and supplementation has been found to increase calming alpha-wave patterns during challenging mental tasks.Naturally sourced GABA has been shown to promote relaxation and reduce the time to fall asleep, as well as increase the time spent in deep sleep. Furthermore, it also promotes a healthy sleep cycle.LipoCalm® is a botanical-rich blend of skullcap extract, passionflower, pure Blue Egyptian chamomile oil, and the calming neurotransmitter GABA (as PharmaGABA®). For those who are sensitive to melatonin, this melatonin-free formula can be very helpful in promoting a calm mind, a relaxed body, and a restful night’s sleep.Because traditional oral formulations of botanicals may have low bioavailability, Quicksilver Scientific® developed liposomal LipoCalm®. Liposomal delivery systems protect molecules from breakdown while enabling more rapid uptake.

The science behind the product:Quicksilver Delivery Systems® uses modern science to unleash the curative power of nature.With the world’s most advanced phospholipid delivery systems, Quicksilver Scientific® supplements can help to nourish your cells with phosphatidylcholine as they deliver their core effective ingredients faster and more efficiently.Each 2 mL of liposomal LipoCalm® delivers 350 mg of a proprietary blend of gamma-aminobutyric acid (as PharmaGABA®), liquid skullcap herb extract (scutellaria lateriflora), Liquid Passion Flower extract (passiflora incarnata), and blue chamomile flower oil.A serving size is 4 pumps. Each bottle contains 25 servings.Enjoy day or night when relaxation is needed.

product.title: Super K

Super K combines vitamin K1 and two forms of vitamin K2 (MK-4 and MK-7) for comprehensive cardiovascular and bone support.

(1-5) If you are on a diet which limits your intake of vitamin K rich food sources such as meat, egg yolks, dairy, and leafy green vegetables, taking a Vitamin K supplement is essential to your health.Furthermore, Super K can make it easier to get enough vitamin K. Combining these two forms of vitamin K2 provides both rapid and sustained absorption of this critical nutrient, so your healthy blood levels are maintained throughout the day. This K2 complex, plus a strong dose of K1, makes this comprehensive formula an excellent way to get your vitamin K.

The science behind the product:Sometimes it can be challenging to obtain enough vitamin K2 through the diet. However, the effects of getting sufficient amounts of vitamin K should not be underestimated. product.title: BioActive Complete B-Complex, EU
product.description:
• Energy metabolism: Converting carbohydrates, fats & proteins into usable cellular fuel
  • High potency: Scientifically studied dosages of all essential B vitamins
  • Bioactive forms: Utilizing the most absorbable & biologically active B vitamin forms
  • Heart health: Can promote cardiovascular health & balanced homocysteine levels
  • Cognitive support: Encouraging brain function, neurotransmitter production & neurological health
  • Complete spectrum: All B vitamins including B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B7, B9 & B12

BioActive Complete B-Complex offers a wide spectrum of benefits that different types of vitamin B can provide in just two vegetarian capsules at a much higher potency than many regular vitamin B supplements. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Get the most of one of nature’s best metabolism and energy supporters: Vitamin B. BioActive Complete B-Complex offers a wide spectrum of the benefits that different types of vitamin B can provide in just two vegetarian capsules – and that at a much higher potency than many regular vitamin B supplements. From metabolic support to supporting heart- and nerve health, the versatility of vitamin B makes it a true nutritional wonder. The product contains all of the many health benefits associated with vitamin B in a single formula.

Why it works:Your body needs B vitamins to help release energy from the foods you eat, such as carbohydrates, fat and protein. In other words, B vitamins help to optimize the conversion from foods to energy in your system. (1-3) BioActive Complete B-Complex packs a punch of different types of vitamin B, making sure that you can get all the benefits that vitamin B can provide your body. It provides a high potency at dosages that are scientifically studied and formulated with bioactive forms of every single nutrient found in BioActive Complete B-Complex, which ultimately can help inhibit vitamin B deficiency and provide you with an unparalleled product.

The science behind the product:Vitamins participate in many critical metabolic functions in the body. Folic acid and Vitamin B12 play a role in red blood cell production. (2)BioActive Complete B-complex can help to maintain proper organ function and provide other important benefits. This is why you should choose this vitamin B complex to receive the ideal dose of daily B-vitamins.BioActive Complete B-Complex contains:Thiamine (vitamin B1 converts food into usable energy for your body, playing an essential role in metabolism.Riboflavin (vitamin B2) is converted to its active form called riboflavin-5'-phosphate which the body uses for energy production. It also provides antioxidant activity.Niacin (vitamin B3) helps produce hormones and supports healthy energy transfer reactions within the cells. It also affects healthy metabolism of glucose, fat, and alcohol. Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels.Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) promotes the synthesis of hemoglobin (red blood cells), hormones, neurotransmitters, and the oxidation of carbohydrates and fatty acids.Pyridoxine HCI & Pyridoxal 5'-phosphate (vitamin B6) helps metabolize amino acid and fat. Along with vitamin B5, it produces neurotransmitters and hemoglobin (red blood cells). Additionally, B6 also plays a role in gluconeogenesis, the formation of glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.Biotin (vitamin B7) regulates gene expression and is required for the metabolism of fatty acids and carbohydrates. Moreover, it plays a role in maintaining metabolic homeostasis or the balance between your body's many unique chemical pathways and processes.Folate/folic acid (vitamin B9, or for superior absorption, 5-MTHF) is vital for cell growth, amino acid metabolism, production of red and white blood cells, healthy cell division, and proper fetal growth and development to reduce the risk of birth defects. It also helps your body make and maintain healthy DNA. Furthermore, BioActive Complete B-Complex contains the compound para-aminobenzoic acid (PABA), which can encourage the synthesis of folic acid.Vitamin B12 (cobalamin or methylcobalamin) is important for neurological function, heart health, development of red blood cells, production of DNA, and promoting healthy homocysteine levels. Methylcobalamin is the form of B12 that is biologically active in the brain. (4-7)Inositol (vitamin B8) is essential for calcium transduction and healthy blood sugar levels and may improve mood. It's actually not a vitamin, but has vitamin-like properties and is often added to higher-quality B-complex supplements.Please note: This formula has been aligned with European standards for food supplements, ensuring the maximum dosage of ingredients permitted in the Netherlands and other EU countries.

How to use:Take two (2) capsules daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Two-Per-Day Multivitaminᴱᵁ 120 capsoffers the highest nutritional potency of any science-based multivitamin that fits in two daily capsules, providing far greater availability of essential vitamins and minerals than many standard formulas. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension's Two-Per-Day Capsules have the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin formula that can fit inside two daily capsules.This gives you far greater availability of the essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients than many regular store-bought formulas. All active ingredients can support your health in a myriad of ways, and they do so at a standout economical price.

Why it works:Researchers have demonstrated that unless you are taking the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals every day, you will not fully receive their benefits, which can lead to better health and well-being.So, if you want to receive an ideal dose of vitamins every day of the year, why not take one that is worth it? The science behind the product:Most notably, the soy-free Two-Per-Day Multivitamin contains a bioactive form of the B-vitamin folate 5-MTHF, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more.Selenium – can promote heart and brain health, a healthy immune response, and help quench free radical activity. Two-Per-Day contains two forms of selenium: Se-methyl L-selenocysteine and sodium selenite. (1, 2)Bioactive quercetin – Two-Per-Day multivitamin contains 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin. Quercetin can support cellular, cardiovascular, endothelial, and immune health, and more. (3)Vitamin D – can provide significant support for healthy bone density. Vitamin D also plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, it also plays a role in immunity. Insufficient intake of vitamin D can be linked to common age-related problems. (4,5)Vitamin C – it can scavenge free radicals in the body and can protect tissues from oxidative stress. Vitamin C is a vital cofactor in the formation of collagen. Collagen is a type of connective tissue that can support arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C is also involved in supporting the immune system. This can be done by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes. These are cells that make up about 25% of all white cells in the blood. (6-8)B vitamins – your body uses several B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein – energy your cells use to carry out their daily functions. Life Extension Two-Per-Day contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more. (9)Alpha-lipoic acid – is a universal antioxidant that can also help boost glutathione levels already in the normal range. (10-12)Bioactive 5-MTHF folate – Two-Per-Day formula contains 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate that is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. (13, 14)Mixed vitamin E tocopherols – there are four forms of tocopherol vitamin E, and Two-Per-Day provides all four. For biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is better than taking either nutrient alone. The formula provides more than 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. (15)Chromium – can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. (16)Lutein and zeaxanthin for eye health – standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in our Two-Per-Day formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress.High-potency minerals, antioxidants, and extracts – a multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. The formula also delivers 100 mg of magnesium and 150 mcg of iodine, as well as trace minerals like manganese and boron. product.title: Two-Per-Day Capsules, 60 caps, EU
product.description:
• High-potency: Offers exceptional nutritional value in just two daily capsules
  • Bioactive nutrients: Features 5-MTHF folate, mixed tocopherols & ultra-absorbable quercetin
  • Cellular energy: Can promote daily energy production with B vitamins
  • Immunity & antioxidant: Supporting defense against oxidative stress & seasonal challenges
  • Bone & heart health: Can encourage optimal cardiovascular function & bone density
  • Complete nutrition: Provides vitamins, minerals, trace elements & botanical extracts

Two-Per-Day Multivitaminᴱᵁ 60 caps offers the highest nutritional potency of any science-based multivitamin that fits in two daily capsules, providing far greater availability of essential vitamins and minerals than many standard formulas. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension's Two-Per-Day Capsules have the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin formula that can fit inside two daily capsules.This gives you far greater availability of the essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients than many regular store-bought formulas. All active ingredients can support your health in a myriad of ways, and they do so at a standout economical price.

Why it works:Researchers have demonstrated that unless you are taking the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals every day, you will not fully receive their benefits, which can lead to better health and well-being.So, if you want to receive an ideal dose of vitamins every day of the year, why not take one that is worth it? The ultra-low cost of Two-Per-Day Capsules makes it a standout product on the European supplement market.Two-Per-Day Capsules pack a potent punch of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients, which can provide many different health benefits.

The science behind the product:Most notably, the soy-free Two-Per-Day Multivitamin contains a bioactive form of the B-vitamin folate 5-MTHF, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more.Selenium – can promote heart and brain health, a healthy immune response, and help quench free radical activity. Two-Per-Day contains two forms of selenium: Se-methyl L-selenocysteine and sodium selenite. (1, 2)Bioactive quercetin – Two-Per-Day multivitamin contains 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin. Quercetin can support cellular, cardiovascular, endothelial, and immune health, and more. (4)Vitamin D – can provide significant support for healthy bone density. Vitamin D also plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, it also plays a role in immunity. Insufficient intake of vitamin D can be linked to common age-related problems. (5, 6)Vitamin C – it can scavenge free radicals in the body and can protect tissues from oxidative stress. Vitamin C is a vital cofactor in the formation of collagen. Collagen is a type of connective tissue that can support arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C is also involved in supporting the immune system. This can be done by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes. These are cells that make up about 25% of all white cells in the blood. (7-9)B vitamins – your body uses several B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein – energy your cells use to carry out their daily functions. Life Extension Two-Per-Day contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more. (10)Alpha-lipoic acid – is a universal antioxidant that can also help boost glutathione levels already in the normal range. (11-13)Bioactive 5-MTHF folate – Two-Per-Day formula contains 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate that is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. (14, 15)Mixed vitamin E tocopherols – there are four forms of tocopherol vitamin E, and Two-Per-Day provides all four. For biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is better than taking either nutrient alone. The formula provides more than 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. (16)Chromium – can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. (17)Lutein and zeaxanthin for eye health – standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in our Two-Per-Day formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress.High-potency minerals, antioxidants, and extracts – a multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. Two-Per-Day provides 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands. The formula also delivers 100 mg of magnesium and 150 mcg of iodine, as well as trace minerals like manganese and boron. Please note: This formulation has been aligned with EU ingredient standards for food supplements, ensuring the highest possible ingredient potency allowed in the Netherlands and other countries of the EU.

How to use: Take two (2) capsules daily in divided doses with meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Herbal Sleep PM
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a melatonin-free sleep support formula

The active ingredients in Herbal Sleep PM can:
  • Promote healthy, restful sleep — without the use of hormones
  • Support immediate sleep by calming your mind
  • Target multiple sleep centers in the brain with lemon balm extract, apigenin-standardized chamomile, and honokiol
  • Promote relief from stress and a relaxed nervous system response

Herbal Sleep PM is a science-based formulation that can promote healthy sleep without using melatonin. The scientifically studied ingredients in this formula target the sleep centers of the brain for a healthy, restful sleep and overall physical well-being.

Health Benefits at a Glance:The Herbal Sleep PM formula contains natural calming ingredients such as lemon balm, honokiol and apigenin which is found in the chamomile plant. Using natural ingredients, Herbal Sleep PM offers a hormone-free alternative sleep support formula for high-quality sleep. Why it Works:Sleep is crucial to our overall health and well-being. But many of us experience difficulty calming down, as well as falling and staying asleep after a long and demanding day. Melatonin is a hormone known for its sleep-promoting qualities —but some people don’t like supplementing with melatonin.That’s why Life Extension® has created an alternative with the melatonin-free formula Herbal Sleep PM. This formula contains all-natural ingredients, combining lemon balm, honokiol and the chamomile compound apigenin to calm the mind and promote high-quality sleep throughout the night. That way, the ingredients in the Herbal Sleep support formula contributes actively to peaceful night-time rest and revitalization. The Science Behind the Product:Scientific studies of the ingredients in the Herbal Sleep PM formula indicate that the ingredients in this formula help people fall asleep more easily and improve sleep quality, thereby offering an alternative to a melatonin-based sleep support formula: Lemon balmLemon balm is a perennial herb in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been scientifically studied to help promote sleep and relaxation. In one study, 85% of subjects who took lemon balm extract for 15 days saw a significant improvement in healthy sleep, and the remaining 15% were much improved [1]. HonokiolHonokiol is a lignan compound that has been used in Asia for centuries. Pre-clinical research shows that honokiol supports the "calming" GABA receptors in the brain to promote sleep [2]. GABA receptors also affect the way the brain perceives discomfort [3]. In addition to this, pre-clinical models indicate that honokiol is quickly taken up into the brain [4]. This makes it an ideal ingredient to include in a formula designed to help you get your well-deserved rest. Apigenin-standardized chamomile extractFinally, our formula contains apigenin, a powerful botanical bioflavonoid found in chamomile. Chamomile tea is a popular choice for relaxation. Computer models as well as pre-clinical studies suggest apigenin might promote healthy sleep patterns similar to those caused by naturally-occurring neurologically active compounds in the body [5-6].Add Herbal Sleep PM to your nighttime routine and get the rest you need to stay fresh the following day. How to Use: Take one (1) capsule 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.One (1) additional capsule may be taken if needed.

product.title: Optimized Broccoli with Myrosinase
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a bioavailable formula of sulforaphane

Optimized Broccoli with Myrosinase can:

  • Offer a clinically studied extract combo

  • Enhance conversion of glucoraphanin to sulforaphane

  • Provide a standardized glucoraphanin-rich broccoli seed extract

Sulforaphane is a compound derived from broccoli. It is considered to offer numerous health benefits. However, it's notoriously challenging to consume in supplement form. Optimized Broccoli with Myrosinase contains a combination of broccoli seed extract and myrosinase from white mustard seed powder that is shown to increase sulforaphane formation and uptake during digestion.

Health benefits at a glance:Broccoli compounds like sulforaphane are thought to have many health benefits. However, it can be challenging to get from broccoli alone and is also notoriously difficult to take in supplement form.Optimized Broccoli with Myrosinase can offer enhanced sulforaphane bioavailability and make it easier for you to get this health-promoting nutrient.

Why it works:It’s common knowledge that eating broccoli is beneficial for your health. However, it’s not easy for the body to get the benefits of broccoli’s nutrients, such as sulforaphane, because the cooking process breaks them down.Life Extension’s advanced formula contains a clinically studied combination of a glucoraphanin-rich broccoli extract and the enzyme myrosinase from white mustard seed that has demonstrated increased conversion into sulforaphane and uptake during digestion.

The science behind the product:A clinical trial confirmed that supplementation with nutrient extracts can help enhance sulforaphane delivery to the body.Participants who took the broccoli seed extract combined with myrosinase (from mustard seed extract) showed an approximately 63% increase in the conversion of glucoraphanin to sulforaphane.Most subjects experienced more than a 50% increase, with some individuals seeing up to a three-fold increase! (1)

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 100 mg TrueBroc broccoli extract (seed) [std. to 10% glucoraphanin] 385 mg White mustard extract (seed) [providing myrosinase] 145 mg
product.ingredients: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 100 mg TrueBroc broccoli extract (seed) [std. to 10% glucoraphanin] 385 mg White mustard extract (seed) [providing myrosinase] 145 mg

product.title: Cognitex® Elite, EU
product.description:
• Mental sharpness: Can enhance focus, attention & recall for everyday tasks
  • Memory support: Promoting healthy brain cell communication & cognitive performance
  • Calm & mood: Can help manage daily stress & encourage emotional well-being
  • Brain cell health: Supporting healthy cell membranes & brain metabolism
  • Protective nutrients: Wild blueberry & sage extracts for antioxidant defense

Cognitex® Eliteᴱᵁ combines five powerful brain-supporting ingredients in vegetarian tablets. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:A healthy adult brain has an astonishing 100 billion nerve cells, each of which needs specific nutrients every day in order to perform optimally. The Cognitex® Elite formula provides a comprehensive supply of specially selected nutrients that have been clinically shown to support brain health.Together, the natural ingredients in this formula can support important cognitive abilities such as attention, focus, memory, and mood and can also counteract inflammation.

Why it works:Keeping your brain fit means that you have to keep it supplied with all the nutrients it needs to perform daily.Cognitex® Elite contains a state-of-the-art sage extract known as SIBELIUS™. This extract helps promote an essential neurotransmitter which can enhance communication between brain cells.With no less than five powerful, benificial nutrients and plant extracts, Cognitex® Elite offers a multifaceted approach to support your brain. By adding brain health-boosting nutrients to your diet such as, blueberries, phosphatidylserine and Uridine-5’-Monophosphate, you support key cognitive abilities.Supporting your brain has never been easier than with Cognitex® Elite!

The science behind the product:Containing a true treasure trove of nutrients Cognitex® Elite is an extremely advanced brain health support formula from Life Extension®. The formula offers:SIBELIUS™: SAGE extract for attention and memorySage extract is known to promote healthy levels of the essential neurotransmitter acetylcholine and other neurochemicals needed for optimal brain function. It also supports mood and cognitive performance. (1,2)Cognitex® Elite formula uses SIBELIUS™: Sage, a novel type of sage extract, which has been clinically shown to encourage healthy brain and cognitive function. In a randomized, placebo-controlled, double-blind clinical study, SIBELIUS™: Sage improved accuracy of attention, working memory, and recognition and recall. (3) SIBELIUS™: Sage has even been clinically shown to enhance feelings of calmness and contentedness. (1)Optimal support brain cell function with phosphatidylserinePhosphatidylserine, an essential component of healthy cell membranes, is critical to brain metabolism and function and supports brain-cell-to-brain-cell communication. (4,5)It can promote healthy cognitive function, healthy memory, concentration, attention and more. (6-10)Ashwagandha for mental performance and stress managementThe ashwagandha plant (Withania somnifera) is one of the most studied Indian herbs. Clinical trials indicate that ashwagandha promotes both brain and mood health. It can increase “stress resilience,” promoting calmness and making it easier to handle daily challenges. (11-13)Ashwagandha has been clinically shown to encourage aspects of healthy memory, cognition and mental performance such as attention, executive function and information processing speed. (14,15)Blueberry for enhanced brain functionBlueberry phytonutrients can help inhibit age-related decline in cognitive and motor function. (16,17) Wild blueberry extracts have been shown to inhibit oxidative and inflammatory factors in brain cells to support memory health. (18,19) Uridine-5'-Monophosphate for healthy brain functionPre-clinical studies have found that uridine-5’-monophosphate supports the essential neurotransmitters acetylcholine and dopamine, and can encourage healthy learning and memory. (20-22)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Vitamin D3, 120 softgels, EU
product.description:
• Bone density: Promotes strong bones & teeth by facilitating calcium transport
  • Immune function: Supports optimal immune system response & defense mechanisms
  • Cognitive health: Helps maintain brain function & mental clarity
  • Heart support: Encourages cardiovascular health & balanced blood pressure levels
  • 3000 IU dosage: 75 mcg vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel
  • Year-round support: Maintains adequate vitamin D levels

Vitamin D3 can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for your body to produce, especially during the winter. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D3 can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce - especially during the winter.A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.

Why it works:Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. Because of weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range may be inhibited. Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)

The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 75 µg/mcg (3000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel. Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 softgel): %RI* Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) (3000 IU†) 75 µg 1500
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 softgel): %RI* Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) (3000 IU†) 75 µg 1500

product.title: Vitamins D & K, EU
product.description:
• Bone strength: Vitamin D3 & K work together for calcium absorption & bone density
  • Arterial health: Vitamin K helps inhibit calcium buildup in arteries
  • Immune support: Vitamin D3 plays a critical role in immune function
  • Brain health: Vitamin D3 promotes cognitive function & mental clarity
  • Cardiovascular health: Encourages heart & endothelial function
  • Synergistic formula: Combines K1, K2 MK-7 & D3 for comprehensive support

Your bones need a lot of nutrients to stay strong throughout your life, and vitamin D and vitamin K are both highly important for building bone tissue and thereby maintaining health. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Your bones need a lot of nutrients to stay strong throughout your life. Vitamin D and vitamin K are both highly important for building bone tissue and thereby maintaining health. So instead of taking two different supplements, these two crucial nutrients are collected in one science-backed formula.Moreover, this formula can also support immune, heart, and brain health.

Why it works:Some of the most important nutrients for maintaining bone health are vitamin D and K. These two nutrients help you to maintain bone health, even in old age. The thing is that the older you get, the more fragile your bones can become. That’s why it makes sense adding a combination of vitamin D and K to your diet so that you can keep your bones strong and youthful.Vitamins D and K are crucial for many aspects of health, including support for arterial health (vitamin K), brain health (vitamin D3), and immune health (vitamin D3).

The science behind the product:The vitamin K and vitamin D in this formula have all been scientifically researched in order to meet their optimal dosages. Both in unison and individually, they offer many different health benefits:Vitamin K1 & vitamin K2Vitamin K helps inhibit calcium buildup in your arteries while promoting healthy calcium absorption into your bone matrix. Vitamin K1 is the most common form of vitamin K in the diet. It comes primarily from leafy green vegetables. However, there is a catch here as vitamin K1 isn’t well absorbed from these foods.Vitamin K2 is found in cheese, eggs, and fermented soybeans. It has been shown to be more bioavailable than K1 and to remain active in the body far longer. The MK-7 form of vitamin K2 was demonstrated to stay available in the body for up to 48 hours.This formula contains both forms of vitamin K.Vitamin D3Studies show that healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better cognitive function. And, together with vitamin K, vitamin D3 is necessary for facilitating the transportation of calcium into the bone matrix for strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D3 also plays a critical role in healthy immune function, which is why it is also a good idea to supplement with vitamin D3 in winter.Moreover, vitamin D supports cardiovascular health and encourages healthy endothelial function. As it goes to show, vitamin D3 is overall an important nutrient for both bone health and arterial health.Ensure you get enough of these two essential nutrients with Life Extension's Vitamins D & K.Please note: This vitamin D3 supplement has been reformulated in cooperation with Life Extension in the US to fit European supplementation guidelines, delivering 75 mcg (3000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per capsule.

How to use: Take one (1) capsule once daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 capsule): %RI* Vitamin D3 (as cholecalciferol) (3000 IU†) 75 µg 1500 Vitamin K 600 µg 800 (from vitamin K1 [as phylloquinone] 500 µg and vitamin K2 [as trans menaquinone-7] 100 µg)
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 capsule): %RI* Vitamin D3 (as cholecalciferol) (3000 IU†) 75 µg 1500 Vitamin K 600 µg 800 (from vitamin K1 [as phylloquinone] 500 µg and vitamin K2 [as trans menaquinone-7] 100 µg)

product.title: Once-Daily Health Booster, 30 gels
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for the perfect add-on to One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day multivitamin formulas, providing extra coverage with vitamins and nutrients

The ingredients in Once-Daily Health Booster:

  • Fill dietary gaps with hard-to-obtain, oil-based vitamins and nutrients

  • Help defend against oxidative stress with vitamin E

  • Support bone and arterial health with vitamin K

  • Promote vision health with MacuGuard® phospholipid blend

Once-Daily Health Booster is the ideal addition to our bestselling multivitamins One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day and brings extra nutritional support for your eyes, bones and more.

Health benefits at a glance:Once-Daily Health Booster is the perfect nutritional complement to the bestselling multivitamins One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day. Use Once-Daily Health Booster to provide additional nutrient support for your eyes, cardiovascular system, bones, and more. Once-Daily Health Booster also contains unique antioxidants which can help fight free radicals protect DNA and thereby fight the natural aging process.

Why it works:Our bestselling all-round nutritional multivitamin formulas One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day brings you all the nutrients you must-have on a daily basis.But if you really want to upscale your daily nutrient intake to get additional coverage, Once-Daily Health Booster is an extension of the supplement formulas found in Life Extension Mix and One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day.In other words, Once-Daily Health Booster contains a lot of beneficial nutrients that are not found in most multivitamin supplement formulas.Taken in combination with One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day, Once-Daily Health Booster is a highly cost-effective and perfect nutritional companion to these bestselling, multivitamin supplement and nutrient products.Bringing in a variety of nutrients, Once-Daily Health Booster is a popular add-on to our science-backed multivitamin formulas and can support your eyes, promote bone- and cardiovascular health and provide additional protection against free radicals which promote the natural aging process. Furthermore, the Once-Daily Health Booster formula can also help maintain normal DNA function, promote a healthy prostate and help maintain a healthy nervous system.

The science behind the product:Once-Daily Health Booster provides:Three kinds of vitamin KVitamin K1 is the most common form of vitamin K found in leafy green vegetables. Although they are healthy, many people do not enjoy these vegetables. In addition to this, vitamin K1 from these sources may be poorly absorbed. Once-Daily Health Booser formula contains 1,500 mcg of vitamin K1, the same dosage found to encourage heart health in a randomised, placebo-controlled trial. (1)Vitamin K2 comes in many forms, including MK-4 and -7. Although vitamin K2 is present in smaller amounts in the average diet, it is better absorbed and stays in the bloodstream longer than K1 vitamin. Moreover, vitamin K2 also has valuable heart and bone health benefits. (2)Menaquinone-4 (MK-4) promotes bone health. (3,4) This supplement delivers 1,000 mcg of MK-4.Trans-menaquinone-7 (MK-7) is a type of vitamin K which maintains bone strength and arterial flexibility. (5,6) This supplement delivers 100 mcg. Also, MK-7 is well-absorbed and has been found to remain in the bloodstream over a sustained period of time. (7,8) Once-Daily Health Booster provides a potent dose of a pure, ultra-absorbable form of MK-7, made with a bio-fermentation process.MacuGuard®MacuGuard® is a proprietary nutrient blend containing the compounds trans-zeaxanthin, meso-zeaxanthin, lutein, and alpha-carnotene, which provide support for the eyes. (9) Lutein is a carotenoid which is an important part of your macular pigment. Lutein helps protect the eyes from the effects of blue and ultraviolet light. (10-12) Furthermore, lutein also supports macular health. Lutein also defends against oxidative stress which can help to keep your eyes functioning youthfully over time. (12-14) Saffron helps maintain visual acuity. (15-17)Mixed tocotrienols: Life Extension’s Once-Daily Health Booster contains tocotrienols, which are special forms of vitamin E that provide potent benefits throughout the body. Tocotrienols can boost defences against oxidative stress, promote a healthy lipid profile, protect the brain and cognition and even support healthy hair growth. (18,19)D-alpha tocopherol is another form of vitamin E, which suppresses lipid peroxidation. (5, 6) Lycopene supports prostate health and also protects against LDL oxidation. (20-23) Chlorophyllin protects the DNA against environmental damage. (24-26)

product.title: Once-Daily Health Booster, 60 softgels
product.description:
• Eye health support: MacuGuard® with lutein, zeaxanthin & saffron protect vision naturally
  • Bone & heart: Three forms of vitamin K promote arterial flexibility & bone strength
  • Antioxidant protection: Mixed tocotrienols & chlorophyllin defend against oxidative stress & aging
  • Cardiovascular health: Lycopene & vitamin E help maintain healthy lipid profiles
  • Prostate & DNA: Lycopene & chlorophyllin protect cellular DNA & prostate health
  • Fills dietary gaps: Contains hard-to-obtain oil-based, fat soluble vitamins & nutrients

Once-Daily Health Booster, 60 softgels is the perfect nutritional complement to bestselling multivitamins One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day,

Health benefits at a glance:Once-Daily Health Booster is the perfect nutritional complement to the bestselling multivitamins One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day. Use Once-Daily Health Booster to provide additional nutrient support for your eyes, cardiovascular system, bones, and more. Once-Daily Health Booster also contains unique antioxidants which can help fight free radicals protect DNA and thereby fight the natural aging process.

Why it works:Our bestselling all-round nutritional multivitamin formulas One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day brings you all the nutrients you must-have on a daily basis.But if you really want to upscale your daily nutrient intake to get additional coverage, Once-Daily Health Booster is an extension of the supplement formulas found in Life Extension Mix and One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day.In other words, Once-Daily Health Booster contains a lot of beneficial nutrients that are not found in most multivitamin supplement formulas.Taken in combination with One-Per-Day and Two-Per-Day, Once-Daily Health Booster is a highly cost-effective and perfect nutritional companion to these bestselling, multivitamin supplement and nutrient products.Bringing in a variety of nutrients, Once-Daily Health Booster is a popular add-on to our science-backed multivitamin formulas and can support your eyes, promote bone- and cardiovascular health and provide additional protection against free radicals which promote the natural aging process. Furthermore, the Once-Daily Health Booster formula can also help maintain normal DNA function, promote a healthy prostate and help maintain a healthy nervous system.

The science behind the product:Once-Daily Health Booster provides:Three kinds of vitamin KVitamin K1 is the most common form of vitamin K found in leafy green vegetables. Although they are healthy, many people do not enjoy these vegetables. In addition to this, vitamin K1 from these sources may be poorly absorbed. Once-Daily Health Booser formula contains 1,500 mcg of vitamin K1, the same dosage found to encourage heart health in a randomised, placebo-controlled trial. (1)Vitamin K2 comes in many forms, including MK-4 and -7. Although vitamin K2 is present in smaller amounts in the average diet, it is better absorbed and stays in the bloodstream longer than K1 vitamin. Moreover, vitamin K2 also has valuable heart and bone health benefits. (2)Menaquinone-4 (MK-4) promotes bone health. (3,4) This supplement delivers 1,000 mcg of MK-4.Trans-menaquinone-7 (MK-7) is a type of vitamin K which maintains bone strength and arterial flexibility. (5,6) This supplement delivers 100 mcg. Also, MK-7 is well-absorbed and has been found to remain in the bloodstream over a sustained period of time. (7,8) Once-Daily Health Booster provides a potent dose of a pure, ultra-absorbable form of MK-7, made with a bio-fermentation process.MacuGuard®MacuGuard® is a proprietary nutrient blend containing the compounds trans-zeaxanthin, meso-zeaxanthin, lutein, and alpha-carnotene, which provide support for the eyes. (9) Lutein is a carotenoid which is an important part of your macular pigment. Lutein helps protect the eyes from the effects of blue and ultraviolet light. (10-12) Furthermore, lutein also supports macular health. Lutein also defends against oxidative stress which can help to keep your eyes functioning youthfully over time. (12-14) Saffron helps maintain visual acuity. (15-17)Mixed tocotrienols: Life Extension’s Once-Daily Health Booster contains tocotrienols, which are special forms of vitamin E that provide potent benefits throughout the body. Tocotrienols can boost defences against oxidative stress, promote a healthy lipid profile, protect the brain and cognition and even support healthy hair growth. (18,19)D-alpha tocopherol is another form of vitamin E, which suppresses lipid peroxidation. (5, 6) Lycopene supports prostate health and also protects against LDL oxidation. (20-23) Chlorophyllin protects the DNA against environmental damage. (24-26)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Prenatal Advantage
product.description:
• Comprehensive prenatal nutrition: Science-backed formula with essential vitamins, minerals & omega-3 DHA
  • Brain & eye development: Can support optimal neural & visual development for growing babies
  • DHA omega-3: Promoting healthy brain development with algae-sourced DHA, not fish oil
  • Complete vitamin coverage: Provide vitamins A, B-complex, C, D3, K & bioactive folate daily
  • Essential minerals: providing iron, iodine, zinc, selenium, copper & potassium for maternal health
  • Added nutrients: featuring choline, lutein & zeaxanthin for enhanced nervous system & eye support

Prenatal Advantage delivers science-based prenatal nutrition for women trying to conceive, during pregnancy, or while nursing.

Benefits at a glance:Women who are trying to become pregnant, are already pregnant, or who are nursing have unique nutritional needs. That’s why Life Extension® has developed a science-backed prenatal nutrition formula: Prenatal Advantage. This formula provides the latest recommended dosages of vitamins and minerals (vitamin A, B, C, D3, K, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, folate, iron, iodine, zinc, selenium, copper, potassium) as well as extra nutrients like choline, lutein, zeaxanthin and DHA omega-3, which can benefit mum and her baby.

Why it works:As a mother-to-be or a new mother, it’s extra important that you choose a prenatal formula that delivers all the daily nutrients that you and your baby need.The Prenatal Advantage formula from Life Extension® delivers a wealth of clinically studied nutrients that are perfectly calibrated to deliver the optimal prenatal nutrient formula:These include essential vitamins such as vitamin A, several kinds of vitamin B (B1, B2, B3, B5, B6 and B12), vitamin C, vitamin D3, vitamin K, and folate.Furthermore, this formula also offers important minerals such as iron, iodine, zinc, selenium, copper, potassium and more.And on top of that, this formula also packs additional nutrients such as DHA, lutein, zeaxanthin, and choline for good measure, as they add extra benefits.By packing all of these nutrients into one formula, Prenatal Advantage goes beyond standard prenatal nutrient coverage and offers comprehensive nutrient support – for both you and your baby!

The science behind the product:Aside from a wealth of vitamins and minerals, this product also contains added nutrients that enhance nutrient coverage for both of you:DHA (docosahexaenoic acid)DHA is an omega-3 fatty acid that, among other things, promotes healthy brain and visual development. Consuming the omega-3 fatty acid type DHA during pregnancy and nursing goes a long way toward promoting healthy brain and eye development. (1)Unlike most DHA, which comes from fish oil, the DHA in our Prenatal Advantage Formula is sourced from marine algae. Lutein and zeaxanthinThis innovative prenatal formula also includes carotenoids like lutein and zeaxanthin. These valuable phytonutrients support healthy eye and brain development. (2)CholineCholine is an essential nutrient. Studies show that many pregnant and nursing women don’t get enough choline from their diets. Prenatal Advantage delivers 50% of the recommended daily choline intake to help support healthy brain and nervous system development during pregnancy. (3)

How to use: Take four (4) softgels daily in divided doses with meals.
