product.title: Black Cumin Seed Oil with Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract
product.description:
For you, if you want to support immune health and help inhibit inflammation in one formula

Black Cumin Seed Oil with Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract can:

  • Help maintain healthy inflammatory & immune responses

  • Fight inflammatory factors to promote immune & whole-body health

  • Offer over 45 times more bioavailable free curcuminoids*

  • Provide 270 times better absorption of total curcuminoids *than standard curcumin

The Black Cumin Seed Oil with Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract contains black cumin seed oil, which helps maintain your body’s healthy immune and inflammatory responses. Also containing the recently introduced Curcumin Elite™ blend, an extract of turmeric, this formula contains compounds that encourage immune health and help inhibit inflammation to support heart, brain, and whole-body health.

Health benefits at a glance: Curcumin is an extract of turmeric root known to promote healthy inflammatory and immune responses.That makes it an excellent complement to black cumin seed oil, which has been shown to promote immune response and help inhibit inflammation to support whole-body health.Get your daily dose of both nutrients in this one convenient formula.

Why it works:Managing a healthy immune and inflammatory response is critical for maintaining your health. Finding a way to balance these two aspects of your physiology is a very important part of maintaining optimal health.Black Cumin Seed Oil with Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract contains both black cumin seed oil and a unique curcumin extract and has been carefully developed to deliver targeted nutrient support for immune health and the inflammatory response in equal measure. Curcumin Elite™Curcumin is an extract of the turmeric root. Native to the Indian subcontinent, it has been used in Ayurvedic treatments for centuries - and for good reasons.Curcumin is a potent nutrient packed with compounds called curcuminoids. These compounds are known to help inhibit inflammation, which in turn supports a healthy heart and joint health. It also encourages a healthy immune response.The proprietary Curcumin Elite™ turmeric extract is rooted in scientific studies and has been carefully developed to deliver 45 times more free curcuminoids and over 270 times more total curcuminoids than standard turmeric extracts. That translates to more health benefits for your entire body. Black cumin seed oilBlack cumin seed oil has been shown to support the body’s healthy inflammation response. It does so by moderating the effect of critical cell-signalling chemicals and hormone-like messengersMaintaining healthy cell signalling as you age is key to both a healthy inflammatory response and immune system function.Together, the ingredients in Black Cumin Seed Oil and Curcumin Elite™ from Life Extension® can help you maintain a healthy immune system while promoting a healthy inflammation response with a single capsule/product.Coming in two daily easy-to-swallow softgels, this formula allows you to support both of these important health aspects with a convenient supplement formula.

The science behind the product:The active ingredients in this science-backed formula have been scientifically studied to provide the optimal dosage that this formula can offer. All ingredients have been chosen for this formula to offer science-backed support for the immune system and the inflammatory response.Black cumin seed oil supports the body’s natural defences by encouraging the optimal function of a healthy immune system. It does so by helping to maintain the vital defensive activities of macrophages and helper T-cells that work together to bolster your immune system.Furthermore, curcumin promotes immune system health and supports a healthy inflammatory response.The free curcuminoids in turmeric extract, which is also part of this formula, support the body’s healthy inflammation response as well.Moreover, they also help inhibit inflammatory factors like arachidonic acid, cyclooxygenase, lipoxygenase, and cytokine compounds to support heart health, brain health, and whole-body health.

How to use: Take one (1) softgel twice daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract, 30 caps
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a curcumin formula that has very high bioavailability and absorbability

The active ingredients in Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract can:

  • Offer 45 times more bioavailable free curcuminoids than standard curcumin

  • Deliver 270 times better absorption of total curcuminoids

  • Inhibit inflammatory factors to promote joint health & organ health

  • Provide antioxidants, which protect the cells

  • Promote cardiovascular health

  • Support brain health, immune system & liver health

Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract is formulated in a way that delivers 45 times more bioavailable free curcuminoids as well as 270 times better absorption of curcuminoids than standard curcumin. The much higher bioavailability and absorption rates can enhance the many health benefits of curcumin supplementation.

Health benefits at a glance:Turmeric root contains compounds known as curcuminoids which offer a wealth of health benefits. Because this formula supports more curcuminoids and higher absorbability than standard curcumin, this formula can "amplify" the health benefits for your heart, mind, joints, cardiovascular system, immune health, and more.

Why it works:Curcuminoids are compounds in curcumin that have multiple health benefits. They help inhibit inflammation to support joint health and vital organ health, promote a healthy immune response, support cardiovascular health and encourage heart health and more. But the total amount of free curcuminoids delivered by standard curcumin supplements is low.Life Extension® has spent years searching for a superior, more available form of curcumin. Now, they have developed the powerful Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract formula, which delivers the maximum health benefits of curcuminoids.It does so, by using sophisticated technologies that protect curcuminoids during digestion and deliver more free curcuminoids per dose.The tricky part about delivering curcumin that can be used by the body is that curcuminoid compounds undergo conjugation once they enter the body.This a normal chemical reaction where one compound attaches to another. However, the conjugation of curcuminoids is problematic, because conjugated curcuminoids do not necessarily provide the same health benefits as non-conjugated ones. (1,2).This formula protects curcuminoids from conjugation by combining curcumin with a type of fiber derived from fenugreek seeds called galactomannans. That way, it enhances both the availability and absorbability of curcuminoids so that you can enjoy all of the wonderful health benefits that this turmeric extract provides.

The science behind the product:Clinical and pre-clinical data shows that combining curcuminoids with galactomannans produces 45.5 times more bioavailability and broader distribution of free curcuminoids compared to unformulated, standardised products. (3,4)In one clinical study, more than 70% of total plasma curcuminoids were still in their free form five hours after they had been ingested. (4)Several studies have shown or indicated that this type of turmeric extract can have multiple health benefits, which include:Inhibiting inflammationTurmeric extract inhibits inflammatory factors and thereby promotes joint health and vital organ health. (5,6) Moreover, it also inhibits the metabolism of several compounds that can enhance the inflammatory response. These include arachidonic acid, cyclooxygenase, lipoxygenase and cytokines. By inhibiting the activities of these compounds, this turmeric extract promotes a healthy inflammation response. (7-9)Brain health and immune system healthCurcumin extract inhibits inflammatory factors in the body and thereby promotes immune system health. (10-12) It can also benefit your mind: studies indicated that it supports brain health by supporting a healthy brain function and even offers neuro-protective benefits as well. (7,13-15)Digestive, joint health and pancreatic healthEvidence suggests that this turmeric extract helps promote healthy bowel function and joint health. (16-19) It also supports healthy pancreatic function by encouraging pancreatic islet health. (7,20)Cellular support against free radicals Curcumin also provides cellular protection by offering support from antioxidants. (5, 21-23) Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range, inhibits inflammation to promote cardiovascular health and more. (7,24)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Curcumin Elite™ Proprietary CGM Blend 500 mg providing 40% curcuminoids (200 mg) and 3% turmerones (15 mg) [from turmeric (rhizome)], 30% galactomannans (150 mg) [from fenugreek (seed)]
product.ingredients: Curcumin Elite™ Proprietary CGM Blend 500 mg providing 40% curcuminoids (200 mg) and 3% turmerones (15 mg) [from turmeric (rhizome)], 30% galactomannans (150 mg) [from fenugreek (seed)]

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Mood Improve
product.description:
For you, if you want to support natural relaxation and relieve stress

The powerful blend in FLORASSIST® Mood Improve can:

  • Support a balanced mood and brain health

  • Encourage healthy signaling between your digestive tract and brain 

  • Promote a healthy mental outlook & emotional well-being

  • Help relieve minor digestive discomfort that can come with everyday stress 

The bi-directional communication between your digestive tract (gut) and your brain plays a major role in emotional health. Human clinical trials on the probiotic comboLactobacillus helveticus Rosell-52 and Bifidobacterium longum Rosell-175 have demonstrated improvements in mood, promotion of relaxation, and reduction in perceived stress.

Health benefits with a glance FLORASSIST® Mood Improve combines innovative probiotics Lactobacillus helveticus strain R0052 and Bifidobacterium longum strain R0175 with a standardized saffron extract to support emotional health and help maintain a balanced mood.

Why it works:How you feel is closely related to digestive health because of the bi-directional communication between the gut (gastrointestinal tract) and the brain.A dual-probiotic combination has been demonstrated to influence this connection by enhancing a healthy mental outlook and promoting natural relaxation.

The science behind the product:Emotional health & probioticsClinical and pre-clinical studies indicate that gut microbes can support mood and behavior by affecting the gut-brain axis (GBA), a complex communication network that links your gut with your brain. And the two probiotics in this formula are particularly effective for your emotional health support. In two randomized controlled trials, participants taking a blend of Lactobacillus helveticus Rosell-52 and Bifidobacterium longum Rosell-175 reported significant improvements in mood, reduction in perceived stress, and emotional balance support as compared to placebo. (1,2) These strains showed relieved stress-related gastrointestinal discomfort as well. (3) Standardized saffron extract Life Extension® has developed a proprietary extract of the popular spice saffron that is standardized for the two compounds safranal and crocin because compelling research indicates saffron compounds promote mood health. Meta-analyses of up to eight trials have found that the use of saffron extract is associated with improved mood test scores relative to placebo or active controls. (4-7) The highest level of standardization in the above clinical studies was 11% for crocin and 2% for safranal. Since those concentrations are not readily available on the market, Life Extension® worked with saffron sources to create a proprietary blend specifically for this formulation.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: H2 Elite, 60 tabs
product.description:
• Powerful antioxidant: Molecular hydrogen can neutralize harmful free radicals & protect cells
  • Energy production: Can enhance mitochondrial function for improved cellular energy & vitality
  • Recovery support: Promoting balanced inflammatory response for daily resilience & wellness
  • Oxidative stress: Can combat cellular damage from environmental stressors & aging processes
  • Easy absorption: Quick-dissolving tablets turn water into refreshing, lightly fizzy hydrogen-rich drink
  • Convenient delivery: Small hydrogen molecules can easily enter cells for targeted antioxidant action

H2 Elite delivers molecular hydrogen, one of nature's most targeted antioxidants, in convenient quick-dissolving tablets.

Health benefits at a glance:H2 Elite delivers molecular hydrogen, one of nature’s most targeted and powerful antioxidants. The quick-dissolving tablet turns water into a refreshing, lightly fizzy drink that can support energy, fight oxidative stress, and encourage a balanced inflammatory response, promoting daily recovery and resilience any time you need it.

Why it works:H2 Elite is a highly bioavailable formula that can offer:Antioxidant protection, neutralizing oxidative stress and safeguarding cells from damage.Cellular boost, supporting mitochondrial function and energy production.Recovery & resilience, promoting a healthy inflammatory response for daily vitality.Rapid & refreshing, delivering high-quality molecular hydrogen in a convenient, fast-dissolving tablet. It’s an easy way to access the benefits of hydrogen therapy and support your health from the inside out.

The science behind the product:An important aspect of having a healthy body is to get rid of free radicals. Antioxidants are abundant in youthful human bodies but markedly declines with age. An imbalance between free radicals and antioxidants can lead to a general state of oxidative stress that can damage lipids, proteins, DNA, and cell mitochondria. Research even suggests that minimizing free radical activity by increasing the number of antioxidants can play a role in extending life. Certain studies have shown that people who live to be a hundred years old or more often have higher antioxidant levels in blood samples than in younger people.H2 Elite provides a potent dose of molecular hydrogen, one of nature’s purest antioxidants. Hydrogen molecules are so small that they easily enter the cells. Once inside the cells, they can inhibit specific free radicals and turn them into water. Hence, the free radicals are easily flushed out of the body.Because H2 Elite hydrogen tablets are easily dissolved in non-carbonated liquids, they are also very easy to use.

How to use:Drop tablet in any 8-12 oz non-carbonated beverage.Wait until the tablet has completely dissolved before consuming. Suggested use on empty stomach, repeat up to four times daily based on individual needs. Drink as soon as possible for best results.Do not swallow tablet.

Supplement facts: Magnesium 80 mg

product.title: NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ and Resveratrol Elite™
product.description:
• Cellular energy & vitality: Increasing NAD+ levels for ATP production & fighting fatigue
  • Healthy aging & longevity: Can promote youthful gene expression & metabolic activity
  • Cardiovascular & brain health: Helping maintain heart function, circulation & cognitive performance
  • Senescent cell clearance: Fisetin can encourage your body's natural pathways for removing aged cells
  • Enhanced bioavailability: Up to 10x better resveratrol absorption & 62x higher quercetin levels

NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ and Resveratrol Elite™ combines NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside with ultra-bioavailable trans-resveratrol, quercetin, and fisetin.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is critical to healthy cellular energy, meaning it's necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside can increase your levels of NAD+. Resveratrol may promote a variety of health and longevity mechanisms, quercetin can support heart and immune health, and fisetin can encourage your body to clear senescent cells.This formula combines ultra-bioavailable forms of all four nutrients, creating an unrivaled supplement for energy, vitality, and defense against cellular aging.

Why it works:An age-related decline in cellular metabolism and energy production can lead to a feeling of fatigue and can also negatively affect motivation. NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside found in NAD+ Cell Regenerator and Resveratrol Elite™ can increase cellular levels of NAD+, which is essential to normal cellular energy production.Increasing NAD+ levels can also encourage normal cognitive function and contribute to maintaining blood sugar levels already within the normal range.Life Extension® was among the first to point out the amazing health benefits of both resveratrol and later NIAGEN®, which is the first commercially available form of nicotinamide riboside.NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ and Resveratrol Elite™ combines NIAGEN® nicotinamide riboside with trans-resveratrol, quercetin and fisetin.Now, all of these powerful bioavailable longevity nutrients are available in a single, convenient anti-aging formula to support cellular metabolism, fight fatigue, help regulate genes that control aging, and much more.

The science behind the product:Resveratrol's anti-aging benefitsResveratrol is a polyphenol that can promote numerous health and longevity mechanisms, and it's a well-known supplement for anti-aging benefits. (1) Life Extension’s Resveratrol Elite™ formulas contain trans-resveratrol (from Japanese knotweed), the form associated with significant biological effects. (2-5>It can promote healthy insulin sensitivity, support a healthy inflammatory response, and contributes to optimal endothelial function for a healthy cardiovascular system. (4,6,7)Enhanced bioavailability of resveratrolYou’ve probably heard about research that red wine is good for you. Research has shown that grapes used to produce red wine contain resveratrol. But ordinary resveratrol has low bioavailability. This problem is solved with special delivery technologies that protect these nutrients once ingested, resulting in a massive boost in bioavailability. To maximize the absorption of trans-resveratrol, the formula also contains galactomannanfibers derived from fenugreek seeds.This combination increases the bioavailability of Resveratrol Elite™ up to 10 times, ensuring higher levels of trans-resveratrol in the bloodstream and extended circulation compared to unformulated resveratrol.Cardiovascular health and resveratrolResveratrol can promote heart health by protecting the body from oxidative stress at the cellular level. (8)By inhibiting oxidative stress in the cardiovascular system, resveratrol can support endothelial health, which is essential for a long and healthy life. (9)Brain function, glucose metabolism, and resveratrolFurthermore, resveratrol's ability to support cerebrovascular blood flow suggests benefits for brain health and healthy cognition. Clinical evidence indicates that resveratrol can help maintain youthful neurological function.Moreover, the same trial also showed that resveratrol may encourage healthy glucose metabolism, a vital aspect of overall well-being and longevity. (10)NIAGEN® for fighting general fatigueNicotinamide riboside can increase your body’s levels of the coenzyme NAD+, which is critical to healthy cellular function and essential for combating fatigue. (11)In a randomized controlled trial published in 2017, older adults taking a daily dose of 250 mg of nicotinamide riboside had a 40% increase in NAD+ levels after just 30 days. (2)Improved resveratrol support with bioavailable quercetinTo further amplify the benefits of resveratrol, this supplement includes quercetin, a powerful phytonutrient that complements resveratrol. In a randomized clinical study, researchers found that quercetin formulated with fenugreek fibers (Bio-Quercetin) achieved serum levels up to 62 times higher than standard quercetin. Levels of free (unconjugated) quercetin were 18 times higher. (12)Quercetin can promote both cardiovascular and endothelial health and support healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (13,14)It can also help combat oxidative stress, contributing to a balanced inflammatory response. Moreover, quercetin is well known for its strong immune-supporting properties. (15-17)Bio-fisetin: Next-level fisetin absorptionBy combining the phytonutrient fisetin with fenugreek fibers, it has been possible to create a formula that is up to 25 times more bioavailable than standard fisetin. Fisetin can help inhibit inflammation and induce autophagy. (18) Elevate your fight against aging at the cellular level with a best-in-class formula.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: NAD+ Gold® 30 ml
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a next-generation, powerful anti-ageing formula

The active ingredients in NAD+ Gold® can:

  • Be your next generation, liposomal age management elixir

  • Transport NMN directly into all cells to rapidly-produce NAD+

  • Support the replenishment of NAD+ with a unique blend of NMN and methyl donor TMG

  • Deliver only liposomal source of NMN

NAD+ Gold® can help reinforce the supply of the body’s age management molecule NAD+.

Refrigerate upon receipt.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.NAD+ Gold® is a unique new-generation elixir that blends NMN with the methyl donor TMG. Besides that, the formula can support replenishing and rejuvenating the cells and metabolism. A true game-changer in how to age.

Why it works:QuickSilver Scientific® unique liposomal delivery system help supports the rapid replenishment of intracellular NAD+, the body’s celebrated age management molecule.NMN is the only direct precursor to NAD+. Along with this, TMG can fully support balanced and continuous NAD+ metabolism. Natural aging brings changes in cells, tissues, and organs. Ultimately, this process also affects the entire body. Meaning, NMN and NAD+ levels fall with age. By refreshing NMN along with NAD+, you can naturally de-age your body and stimulate the brain. Endurance and energy can be improved, the blood flow may be enhanced, memory and focus can be activated. Youthful metabolism can be within your reach.

The science behind the product:QuickSilver Scientific® state-of-the-art liposomal delivery technology offers the possibility of rapid uptake into the bloodstream for fast-acting results you may feel.Utter simplicity with 21st-century delivery systems: it can be your fountain of youth in a bottle.

How to use:2 pumps by mouth and hold for 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat to desired dosage or consult with a healthcare professional.Take on an empty stomach at least 10 minutes before a meal.Use within 90 days of opening.If pregnant, consult with a physician before using.Refrigerate upon receipt.

product.title: FLORASSIST® Probiotic Liver Restore™
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a combo that promotes liver health

The active ingredients in FLORASSIST®

Health benefits at a glance:Probiotics are beneficial bacterial strains that support health, on the other hand, a prebiotic is a nutrient that encourages the growth of those health-promoting strains. Synbiotic refers to a combination of those two types of ingredients — like the seven special probiotic strains + plant-based fructooligosaccharide prebiotic you’ll find in FLORASSIST® Liver Restore.

Why it works:The liver and the digestive system are connected — literally — by a blood vessel called the portal vein. This vein brings blood from the digestive tract directly to the liver.This blood contains nutrients from food intake. But it also contains toxins and other unwanted compounds—stuff that’s often created by undesirable bacteria in the gut. The more unwanted bacteria, the more these compounds may end up filtering through the liver. (1-3)This is where FLORASSIST® Liver Restore comes in. This clinically studied combination help encourage a healthy ratio of gut bacteria by providing 7 liver-friendly probiotic strains along with a prebiotic called a fructooligosaccharide. Together, this synbiotic formula helps crowd out the unwanted bacteria that create the stuff a liver doesn’t like. (4,5)

The science behind the product:The following studies indicate confident outcomes:Study 1—overweight: in a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial, two groups of overweight subjects followed an energy-balanced diet and physical activity regimen and took two capsules of the same synbiotic blend found in FLORASSIST® Liver Restore capsules every day for 28 weeks. (6)The study measured enzymes that are commonly used to judge liver health. While statistical differences between the placebo and synbiotic groups appeared in just 7 weeks, at the end of the study, the synbiotic group had shown remarkable improvement. (6)The probiotic-prebiotic combo in FLORASSIST® Liver Restore also helped improve measurements of C-reactive protein, a biomarker produced in the liver. Healthy hsCRP levels can be consistent with liver health. (7) In this study, hsCRP measurements improved by 54% after 28 weeks. (6)Study 2—healthy BMI: a second study mimicked the first, except subjects were with a normal body mass index. The placebo group exhibited an improvement in liver enzyme biomarkers by only 3%, while the synbiotic group improved by 17% after 28 weeks of supplementation. In this study, hsCRP improved by 46% after 28 weeks. (4)

How to use: Take two capsules per day, with or without food, and/or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Synbiotic proprietary blend 360 mg
product.ingredients: Synbiotic proprietary blend 360 mg

product.title: GEROPROTECT® Stem Cell
product.description:
• Stem cell health: Helping maintain youthful stem cell function & self-renewal
  • Cellular rejuvenation: Can promote balanced stem cell differentiation for tissue maintenance
  • DNA protection: Supporting healthy DNA integrity & cellular protein quality control
  • Longevity support: Can encourage natural pathways for managing senescent cells
  • AI-identified nutrients: Features piceatannol, trans-resveratrol & garcinol backed by science

GEROPROTECT® Stem Cell combines piceatannol from passion fruit, trans-resveratrol, and garcinol from kokum fruit to promote optimal stem cell function.

Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension® has partnered up with Insilico Medicine, Inc., who used artificial intelligence to identify piceatannol from passion fruit, trans-resveratrol, and garcinol from kokum fruit from a database of ingredients tested in human cell lines to support stem cell health.

Why it works:Stem cells are invaluable to health and vitality. This is because they can transform into other kinds of cells when the body needs them, a process called differentiation. Stem cells can also create more copies of themselves, which is called self-renewal. Both of these properties are essential to tissue rejuvenation.A healthy balance between these two actions promotes healthy tissue maintenance, growth, and longevity. But aging can cause stem cells to no longer function optimally, often losing the ability to self-renew, or differentiate into other cells, or both. (1) Thus GEROPROTECT® Stem Cell can help maintain youthful stem cell function.

The science behind the product:Nutrients to encourage balanced stem cell healthGEROPROTECT® Stem Cell can promote healthy stem cell function and encourage balanced stem cell differentiation and self-renewal. It does so with nutrients that promote the cellular pathways that help maintain youthful stem cell behavior: a healthy, functional protein pool, DNA health, AMPK signaling, and more.These compounds were identified in partnership with Insilico Medicine, Inc., a machine learning company whose proprietary algorithm is based on 21st Century artificial intelligence computing techniques.Presveratrol™ proprietary blendPresveratrol™ is a proprietary blend of resveratrol and piceatannol, an extract of passion fruit. In vivo and in vitro studies indicate that piceatannol promotes stem cell differentiation as well as proteostasis, the quality control network that helps ensure the integrity of proteins within our cells. (2-4)Resveratrol is a phytonutrient with well-known benefits for longevity and health. In vivo and in vitro studies indicate that resveratrol has beneficial effects on stem cell health. (6,7)Additionally, the combination of resveratrol and piceatannol promotes DNA health as well as encourages the body’s natural pathways for managing senescent stem cells. (8)Livinol™ kokum extract (garcinol)Garcinol is a compound derived from the kokum (garcinia indica) fruit. In vitro studies indicate that garcinol helps to positively regulate healthy stem cell self-renewal and differentiation. (9-11) Garcinol inhibits an enzyme called histone acetyltransferase, or HAT. This enzyme is part of a process called histone acetylation, one of the main causes of stem cell aging and loss of function. By inhibiting this enzyme, garcinol helps restore youthful stem cell function and longevity.

How to use: Take two (2) capsules daily, with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Livinol ™ kokum extract (fruit) [std. to 20% garcinol] 500 mg Presveratrol ™ Proprietary Blend 378 mg [purple passionflower extract (seed) (std. to 3.5% piceatannol) and Japanese knotweed extract (root) (std. to 98% trans-resveratrol)]
product.ingredients: Livinol ™ kokum extract (fruit) [std. to 20% garcinol] 500 mg Presveratrol ™ Proprietary Blend 378 mg [purple passionflower extract (seed) (std. to 3.5% piceatannol) and Japanese knotweed extract (root) (std. to 98% trans-resveratrol)]

product.title: QuintEssential® Hypertonic Elixir 3.3, 30
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for hydration in a natural form, especially after exercise as it is a must-have for endurance athletes to stay hydrated

The active ingredients in QuintEssential® Hypertonic Elixir can:
  • Support electrolyte balance, normal energy metabolism
  • Help with daily mineralization
  • Help reduce tiredness
  • Support performance and recovery
  • Enhance the normal nervous system and brain function
  • Support protein synthesis and normal muscle function

Stay hydrated with natural seawater electrolytes — as this elixir is on-the-go 100% pure seawater. It's excellent for use when desiring an immediate revitalizing result for the body or to support exertion with major physical effort. Hypertonic Elixir can offer the minerals needed for cell renewal and contribute to normal muscle and digestive functions. 

Health benefits at a glance:Electrolytes are important for hydration and are needed to sustain total body water and good Ph balance. Electrolyte deficiency can cause an imbalance and may degrade health and aerobic performance. Staying hydrated, in general, and especially during exercise is vital for optimal health, performance, and recovery. Optimal health and performance require a consistent and adequate supply of these important minerals and nutrients.QuintEssential® Hypertonic Elixir, in travel-friendly packaging, helps keep you hydrated on-the-go. Using it daily can help support your body, including before, during and after any energetic activity.

Why it works:Whether you wish to promote or maintain your health, QuintEssential® delivers the perfect blend of organic ocean minerals to support whole-body health and rejuvenating rehydration, which can benefit every organ in the body.Quintessential® Hypertonic Elixir is a perfect re-mineralization supplement, by offering 100% pure seawater full of electrolytes and trace elements.It is typically used by individuals looking for an immediate revitalizing effect that can support exertion from major physical or mental tasks as it offers the minerals needed to help cell renewal and contribute to normal muscle and digestive functions. All the minerals and nutrients come without any added sugars, flavors, or dyes.

The science behind the product:QuintEssential® Hypertonic Elixir is an organic-based bioavailable and complete mineral supplement extracted from the center of a protected vortex plankton bloom in the Atlantic Ocean off the coast of France. This marine plasma is processed according to founder Rene’ Quinton’s original protocol, which has stood the test of time for over 120 years.The nutrient-rich, raw marine fluid is harvested from the depths of plankton-rich ocean blooms and cold-sterilized to retain its properties. It contains up to 78 bioavailable ionic minerals to help replenish our cells with the same mineral-rich bath that nourished life on earth for so many millions of years. Quintessential® is harvested from a permanent upwelling of nutrients metabolized by phytoplankton off the coast of France. It contains rare and organically complex minerals, nucleic acids and phytochemicals.Difference between Hypertonic and Isotonic:Quinton's Isotonic Elixir has an equal mineral concentration to blood plasma and provides gentle mineralization and hydration. Quinton's Hypertonic Elixir is a more concentrated formula providing more minerals to the body which is is especially beneficial for exercise support.

How to use: Serving size, one drinkable sachet is 10ml of liquid form. As a food supplement, take 1 sachet (10mL) a day. Additional sachets, up to a total of 3 per day, may be consumed in divided doses prior to meals and strenuous physical and mental activity.Note: Store product at room temperature.

The active ingredients in QuintEssential

It can offer profound nourishment to our cells, helping to restore balance, detoxify our bodies, support cellular communication, and encourage the healthy flow of lymphatic fluid. It contains up to 78 essential minerals and trace elements the body relies on for supporting cellular health. help support homeostasis and natural rehydration. It helps support the biological terrain, supplying ionic minerals to the extracellular fluid. A fluid is said to be isotonic when it has the same molecular concentration as blood plasma. In the case of a saline solution, this is equal to 9 parts per thousand of pure water. Therefore this isotonic concentration contains only a third of the salt content of water in oceans.QuintEssential® delivers a beneficial, comprehensive blend of sea minerals, extracted from the centre of a protected vortex plankton bloom in the Atlantic Ocean off the coast of France. This marine plasma is processed according to founder Rene’ Quinton’s original protocol, which has stood the test of time for over 120 years. Quintessential® is harvested from a permanent upwelling of nutrients metabolized by phytoplankton off the coast of France. It contains rare and organically complex minerals, nucleic acids and phytochemicals.Difference between Hypertonic and Isotonic:Isotonic, hypertonic and hypotonic are terms that describe how one solution compares to another in terms of concentration of solutes, such as salt or sugar. For instance, the fluid inside our bodily cells has the same concentration of solutes than the fluid outside our cells, and thus the fluids are isotonic. Seawater has more solutes than blood, it´s hypertonic to blood.

product.description:
For you, if you are looking to strengthen your immune defense and respiratory support

The active ingredients in Vitamin C + Elderberry can:
  • Promote immune defense
  • Support respiratory health
  • Enhance antioxidant potential
  • Support healthy barrier integrity of the airways, skin and GI tract

Vitamin C + Elderberry is a potent combination of vitamin C and black elderberry, designed to support immune defenses throughout the year to help get you over unexpected health challenges.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Vitamin C+ Elderberry offers a fast-acting tonic powered by liposomal delivery technology. This formula can promote your immune defenses throughout the year, helping you stay prepared for all seasons.Why it Works:Vitamin C This is a powerful water-soluble nutrient with antioxidant and immunity-enhancing properties that has been shown to strengthen and build resiliency in the body. Vitamin C is known as an essential component for immune health, supporting the production of white blood cells to keep common seasonal bugs in check.The lungs are highly susceptible to invaders along with the resulting elevation in free radicals. Vitamin C supports lung cell defenses to optimize respiratory health. Black elderberryThis dark purple berry has a rich history of use in traditional herbalism to support immune defenses. It's long celebrated for its ability to help promote a healthy microbial balance in the body. It can coordinate an efficient immune response by promoting cellular defenses against foreign invaders, the production of vital immune molecules.Elderberry has also been found to help impede the replication of invaders within the cell, shortening the duration of common viral infections.The Haschberg European elderberry is rich in anthocyanin flavonoids, which can block the spike proteins on the invader’s membranes that are needed to gain entry into host cells.Morover, elderberry has been found to support upper respiratory tract health.Vitamin E Vitamin E (DeltaGOLD Tocotrienols) safeguards your delicate cell membranes to reduce the negative impact caused by seasonal challenges. Together, vitamin C, black elderberry, and vitamin E support cellular antioxidant potential to diminish the effects of free radical caused by invaders.The Science Behind the Product:The Quicksilver Delivery Systems® can provide product with clear consistency only achieved with liposomes that are small (20-100 nanometers) and stable enough to pass between cells.These small vesicles begin absorbing as soon as they hit your mouth, so you can get high absorption of the product before it is altered by the harsh processes in the digestive system.How to Use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Methyl Charge+™
product.description:
For you, if you are looking to support methylation, a critical process that happens in all body cells

The active ingredients in Methyl Charge+™can:

  • Support healthy methylation & help undermethylation

  • Promote detox, DNA repair, energy & cellular regeneration

  • Designed to be paired with NAD+ boosting formulas to promote balanced NAD+ & methylation cycles

This second-generation formula can promote a balanced methyl cycle, supporting different body functions, such as nervous and cardiovascular system activity, energy production (mitochondrial function), heavy metal detoxification, and hormone balance.

Health benefits at a glance:Methylation is a biochemical process that, when optimal, has a positive impact on your overall health as it´s involved in the regulation of our cardiovascular, neurological, reproductive, and detoxification systems.Boosting NAD+ through supplementation has become a valued aspect of a healthy aging protocol; however, the need for methyl groups increases in response to NAD+ production.Pairing Methyl Charge+ with your NAD+ boosting supplement will ensure that NAD+ and methylation cycles are fully supported and balanced for optimum health.

Why it works:This liposomal blend includes vitamins B2, B6, methyl B-12, TMG, and folate to support the methylation cycle, which in turn supports NAD+ and glutathione production, detoxification, and DNA repair. Methyl Charge+™ also addresses the needs of undermethylators with its thoughtful blend of four key B vitamins.While this formulation can be a stand-alone supplement to safely increase methylation dynamics in undermethylators, it was originally developed to pair with our NAD+ Gold™ product to keep the wheels of the methylation and NAD+ cycles turning for optimum energy and health.

The science behind the product:Methyl Charge+™ represents a second-generation methylation formulation, focusing on the catalytic activity of methyltransferases, a large class of important enzymes that activate the transfer of methyl groups and thus modify DNA and gene expression.First-generation methylation supplements focused solely on raising 5-MTHF, the naturally occurring, active form of folic acid, to counter methylation issues arising from variations in the MTHFR gene.Unfortunately, imbalanced supplementation with only pro-methylation compounds often resulted in short-term benefits, which ultimately gave way to a “crash” that is now understood to be mitochondrial dysfunction in response to low NAD+ production.Methyl Charge+™ provides unsurpassed absorption: a state-of-the-art liposomal delivery offers quick uptake through the cells of the mouth and directly into the bloodstream after ingestion, for fast-acting absorption.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.
