product.title: SOD Booster
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for one of the body’s most powerful antioxidants, protecting your cells against cellular stress

The Active Ingredients in SOD Booster can:
  • Promote SOD (superoxide dismutase) production
  • Help the body inhibit cellular stress caused by free radicals
  • Promote healthy longevity and cellular function

Your cells are protected from cellular stress by antioxidants. Such as vitamin E, vitamin C, and CoQ10. However, the body doesn’t rely entirely on you for antioxidant protection: it can make several of its own antioxidants, with one of the most important of this group being superoxide dismutase — or simply SOD.

Health Benefits at a Glance:The body makes its own antioxidants: glutathione, catalase and importantly, superoxide dismutase. This powerhouse antioxidant helps protect your cells from cellular stress caused by free radicals. (1) Cellular stress can increase the process of natural aging, and levels of superoxide dismutase production have been shown to decrease with age. (2)Why it Works:SOD Booster combines plant-derived Aronia melanocarpa (chokeberry) extract with Extramel® melon concentrate to promote the production of one of the body’s critical antioxidants: superoxide dismutase.The Science Behind the Product:Chokeberry (A. melanocarpa) ExtractChokeberries have one of nature’s highest polyphenol counts, even greater than blueberries. (3) Specifically, chokeberries are packed with polyphenol compounds called anthocyanins. (4) Why does this matter? Because chokeberry anthocyanins promote SOD production.During a two-month study, participants were given 300 mg of the same chokeberry extract in SOD Booster every day. By study’s end, supplementation resulted in a 29% increase in superoxide dismutase. Interestingly, levels of glutathione — another powerful antioxidant — increased as well. (5)Extramel® melon pulp concentrateExtramel® is a concentrate of a special variety of a French melon. This melon has a long shelf-life, theorized to be in part because of high SOD activity (and therefore cellular longevity) in the living fruit.And Extramel® is specially formulated to withstand your body’s digestive juices as well, giving this novel ingredient more time to promote superoxide dismutase production. In pre-clinical models, consuming Extramel® melon concentrate increased SOD levels in various organ tissues. (6)The health benefits of Extramel® extend beyond cellular antioxidant protection and healthy aging. This ingredient appears to support overall quality of life as well.In not one, but two studies, subjects consuming 10 mg a day of this melon concentrate reported decreased feelings of general fatigue and increased feelings of wellbeing and healthy stress response. (7,8)Clinically-studied dosagesSOD Booster contains clinically studied dosages of both chokeberry extract and Extramel® melon concentrate. It is non-GMO, allergen free, gluten free and manufactured in the United States.Promote your body’s natural antioxidant defenses. Add SOD Booster to your regimen today.How to Use: Take one (1) capsule daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Aronia melanocarpa extract (fruit) [std. to 40% polyphenols] 300 mg Extramel ® melon pulp concentrate (fruit) [providing 140 IU of SOD] 10 mg
product.ingredients: Aronia melanocarpa extract (fruit) [std. to 40% polyphenols] 300 mg Extramel ® melon pulp concentrate (fruit) [providing 140 IU of SOD] 10 mg

product.title: Quick Brain Nootropic
product.description:
• Fast thinking: Can promote neural processing speed & quick cognitive responses
  • Memory & learning: Supporting working memory, recall & information retention
  • Mental clarity & focus: Can help improve concentration & filter distractions
  • Mood & calmness: Encouraging balanced mood & feelings of alertness without stress
  • Brain-eye connection: Lutein & zeaxanthin can support both visual & cognitive health

Quick Brain Nootropic combines three clinically studied ingredients for cognitive performance: lutein and zeaxanthin from marigold extract, standardized gotu kola, and BaCognize® bacopa extract.

Health benefits at a glance:We’ve all heard the term “think fast.” But what does that mean?There are measurable processes in your brain that govern retention, recall, and processing – and the right nutrients can support them all. A “nootropic” is a nutrient that helps enhance learning, cognition, and mental processing speed.

Why it works:Lutein and zeaxanthin are carotenoid compounds found in high concentrations in the macula of your eye. In fact, measuring lutein and zeaxanthin levels in your eyes is an excellent indicator of how much of these beneficial nutrients are present in your brain.That’s important because new research indicates these carotenoid compounds encourage quick thinking, memory, and cognitive function. Quick Brain Nootropic combines three clinically studied ingredients that promote neural processing speed/fast thinking, memory and concentration: carotenoid-rich marigold extract (lutein and zeaxanthin), standardized gotu kola extract, and whole-herb BaCognize® bacopa extract.

The science behind the product:Lutein and zeaxanthin carotenoidsBecause they are heavily concentrated in macular pigment, lutein and zeaxanthin are associated with eye health, but they are also found in the brain. This is significant because three, year-long, independent studies indicate that these carotenoids can also encourage improved spatial memory, reasoning skills and complex attention scores. (1-3)These positive cognitive results appeared regardless of age: healthy older adults taking lutein and zeaxanthin saw increased measurements of their ability to filter out irrelevant information while multitasking — as well as increased activity in the left prefrontal area of the brain involved in understanding verbal information, forming long-term memories, focusing on challenges and more. (1,2)Young people (ages 18 to 25) taking these carotenoid nutrients for six months also showed improved cognitive performance, as well as healthy levels of brain-derived neurotrophic factor, a neurotransmitter modulating compound essential to healthy learning and memory formation. (4)Gotu kola (Centella asiatica)Gotu kola has been the subject of extensive research. 11 different studies showed that C. asiatica can help improve both alertness and mood health. (5)However, it’s important to understand that traditional gotu kola extracts aren’t standardized—and this makes a big difference when you look at the results.A two-month study had healthy adults either take a gotu kola extract standardized to a naturally occurring compound called “asiaticoside" or a placebo.The first group showed significant improvements in their working memory, word recognition, spatial memory and alertness. They also reported feeling calmer. (6)Water hyssop (Bacopa monnieri)Bacopa monnieri extract is a very popular study aid, and for good reason. In one study, a group that ranged between 18 and 60 years old was given bacopa, daily.After only three months, they began processing visual information faster, had better learning rates and easier memory consolidation – and even reported worrying less. (7)Several studies of adults between the ages of 45 and 65 also indicated improved working memory, attention, and memory quality – in as little as four weeks. Additional improvements included visual processing speeds, verbal learning, as well as memory retention. (8-11)

How to use: Take one (1) capsule daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Gotu kola extract (whole plant) [std. to 10% asiaticosides] 250 mg BaCognize ® Ultra bacopa extract (whole herb) [std. to 25% bacopa glycosides] 150 mg Lutemax ® 2020 marigold extract ( Tagetes erecta ) (flower) [std. to 10% lutein, 2% meso -zeaxanthin and zeaxanthin] 110 mg
product.ingredients: Gotu kola extract (whole plant) [std. to 10% asiaticosides] 250 mg BaCognize ® Ultra bacopa extract (whole herb) [std. to 25% bacopa glycosides] 150 mg Lutemax ® 2020 marigold extract ( Tagetes erecta ) (flower) [std. to 10% lutein, 2% meso -zeaxanthin and zeaxanthin] 110 mg

product.title: AMPK Charge+™
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for a facilitator that aids cellular housekeeping and efficient burning of fuel by your body

The anti-aging ingredients in AMPK Charge+™ can:

  • Activate AMPK to support metabolic balance

  • Help fight aging at the cellular level (autophagy)

  • Promote a healthy inflammatory response

  • Aid energy production and utilization

  • Support normal healthy blood sugar (glucose) levels

  • Support ketone production and fat breakdown

  • Help with daily detoxification

AMPK Charge+™ is an innovative and powerful blend of well-researched fasting mimetics and other phytonutrients designed to help activate the AMPK pathway, which is a critical regulator of metabolism, body weight, healthy cell breakdown, and normal inflammatory response.

Store at room temperature.

Health benefits at a glance: AMPK is a metabolic pathway important for blood sugar balance, healthy body weight, detoxification, and longevity that can be activated by exercise, caloric restriction, and fasting mimetics. AMPK Charge+™ is an innovative and powerful blend of well-researched fasting mimetics and other phytonutrients designed to help activate the AMPK pathway. This unique formula facilitates the process by flipping your master “metabolic switch” from burning sugar for energy, to fat. It can be used alone or in concert with intermittent fasting or carb-restricted diets to support metabolic balance, healthy body weight regulation and fat breakdown, normal inflammatory responses, energy production, cellular autophagy (cell "housekeeping"), and longevity.

Why it works: Most people in the Western world live in a chronically “fed” and sedentary state, rarely entering the fasted state necessary for AMPK activation. The bioavailable, nanoemulsified AMPK Charge+™ blend can support activation of this vital pathway to promote metabolic balance and flexibility.

The science behind the product: Active AMPK helps your body access fat stores, turning fat into ketones through a process called lipolysis. AMPK Charge+ facilitates this process by flipping your master “metabolic switch” from burning sugar primarily to burning fat for energy, a cleaner-burning fuel for your body. Additionally, AMPK activation supports longevity by increasing autophagy, a “housekeeping” process that cleans out old and damaged cells to make room for new, healthy cells. The blend of AMPK Charge+™ contains: Resveratrol is a fasting mimetic phytocompound that has been shown to stimulate AMPK, activate sirtuins, and support autophagy. Resveratrol works synergistically with cellular NAD+ and mitochondrial biogenesis, supporting robust cellular energy production. Berberine is a bioactive compound, best known for supporting healthy blood sugar metabolism. Berberine supports AMPK activation and aids in safeguarding the liver by supporting healthy fat breakdown. Quercetin is a versatile fasting mimetic phytonutrient that has been shown to support several aspects of metabolism and healthy aging. It is a powerful antioxidant due to its role in AMPK activation. Research shows that quercetin supports mitochondrial biogenesis and is a powerful immune-modulating compound. It has been well studied as a senolytic supporting healthy cellular senescence. Milk thistle, or Silybum marianum, is a revered member of the traditional herbal medicine compendium. Silymarin, a group of active phytochemicals in milk thistle, supports AMPK activity and has been shown to restore healthy NAD+ levels in the liver. Diindolylmethane (DIM) is a compound derived from indole-3-carbinol, which is found in cruciferous vegetables. DIM has been shown to influence healthy gene expression by activating AMPK. It also plays a role in supporting a healthy immune response and the upregulation of detoxification pathways. Cinnamon bark oil is a warming, aromatic essential oil derived from Cinnamomum cassia bark. Cinnamon has been shown to activate AMPK, support healthy lipid levels, help regulate blood sugar, and have cardio-protective properties. Use alone or with fasting: This formula complements intermittent fasting and keto or carb-restricted diets (and may allow for more flexible fasting protocols). A patent-pending delivery technology:The formula uses Quicksilver Scientific Delivery Systems(R) to create small, stable delivery vesicles (between 20-70 nm) that begin absorbing as soon as they hit the mouth.The difference is clear: this product’s liquid transparency can only be achieved with nanoparticles that are smaller than the wavelengths of light.

How to use: Each 1 tsp serving of AMPK Charge+ contains a 415 mg proprietary and bioavailable blend of DIM, quercetin, milk thistle, resveratrol, berberine, and cinnamon The supplement is safe to take daily and complements intermittent fasting and ketogenic or carb-restricted diets.

Supplement facts: Proprietary blend: 415 mg Phospholipids (from purified soy lecithins), Diindolylmethane, Quercetin Dihydrate (from Sophora japonica flower), Milk Thistle Seed Extract (80% Silymarin), Resveratrol (from Polygonum cuspidatum root), Berberine HCL (from Phellodendrom amurense bark), Cinnamon bark oil.
product.ingredients: Proprietary blend: 415 mg Phospholipids (from purified soy lecithins), Diindolylmethane, Quercetin Dihydrate (from Sophora japonica flower), Milk Thistle Seed Extract (80% Silymarin), Resveratrol (from Polygonum cuspidatum root), Berberine HCL (from Phellodendrom amurense bark), Cinnamon bark oil.

product.title: Black Elderberry + Vitamin C
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for powerful every day immune support

The Active Ingredients in Black Elderberry + Vitamin C can:

  • Support a healthy immune response with 600 mg of standardized elderberry extract

  • Promote immune system health and provide antioxidant protection with 200 mg of vitamin C

  • Offer powerful immune support in just two daily gluten-free, non-GMO, vegetarian capsules

Black elderberry extract and vitamin C both promote a healthy immune response. This formula has combined them to give your defenses optimal nutritional support all year long.

Health benefits at a glance:This formula combines standardized black elderberry extract, which has been shown in clinical and preclinical research to support immune health, with the tried-and-true immune support benefits of vitamin C.

Why it works:This formula gives your immune system intense nutritional support for when you need it most, so you stay at your best.Unlike the 5-Day Elderberry Immune formula, Black Elderberry + Vitamin C is designed to be taken every day, all year long.

The science behind the product:Standardized elderberry extractBlack elderberry has a reputation for its ability to promote a healthy immune response, a reputation that research seems to confirm. It's also known for fast immune health support, showing natural anti-viral activity. A meta-analysis of four separate studies indicated that supplementation with a standardized elderberry extract, which is rich in anti-inflammatory and antioxidant polyphenols, reduced duration and response to an immune challenge — with results noticed in as little as 2 days in one study. (1-3)Each two-capsule serving of Black Elderberry + Vitamin C has 720 mg of elderberry extract (Sambucus nigra) standardized to anthocyanins to provide daily support for healthy immune response and respiratory health.200 mg of vitamin CAnother meta-analysis of research into vitamin C revealed that taking vitamin C helped reduce duration and response to immune challenges. (4)Vitamin C also provides potent antioxidant protection. Each two-capsule serving of Black Elderberry + Vitamin C delivers 200 mg of vitamin C.

How to use:Take two (2) capsules daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 200 mg 250 Black elderberry (Sambucus nigra) (fruit) extract [std. to anthocyanins] 720 mg **
product.ingredients: Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid) 200 mg 250 Black elderberry (Sambucus nigra) (fruit) extract [std. to anthocyanins] 720 mg **

product.title: NAD+ Platinum®
product.description:
• Cellular energy production: promoting vital ATP fuel for optimal physical performance
  • Longevity support: can help activate sirtuin proteins for graceful aging
  • NAD+ optimization: encouraging youthful levels of this essential coenzyme
  • Methylation balance: supporting crucial cellular processes throughout the body
  • Brain & cognitive function: can promote mental clarity & neurological vitality
  • Immune system health: maintaining robust defense mechanisms & cellular integrity

NAD+ Platinum® is a comprehensive liposomal formula combining highly bioavailable NMN with quercetin, resveratrol, and essential B vitamins. 

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ levels decline with age. NAD+ Platinum® is an all-in-one formula designed to power the pathways of energy and longevity. This highly bioavailable nutraceutical blend synergizes key compounds to charge healthy aging, energy currency, and cellular integrity by helping to empower three vital processes that help keep youthfulness along with NAD+ generation, sirtuin activation, and methylation.

Why it works:NAD+ is the most essential molecule found in every body cell. NAD+ is the term used in the scientific literature to describe a cellular compound called nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide. The newest addition to the healthy aging and longevity formula has included: Highly stable master phytocompounds, quercetin and resveratrol, to help supercharge the longevity proteins sirtuins and support the actions of NAD+.The precursory compound NMN to advance NAD+ production.B vitamins to support balanced methylation, the biochemical process that keeps the NAD+ cycle turning.

The science behind the product:Present in every cell in the body and a coenzyme in 500 chemical and biological reactions, NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) is a critical molecule for energy generation.NAD+, sirtuin, and methylationHealthy aging is supported by activating key pillars: NAD+ production, sirtuin activation, and methylation support. NAD+ production supports energy production and graceful aging. Methylation may help with balancing the NAD+ cycle. Sirtuin activation promotes the longevity proteins in our bodies.What is the difference between NAD+ Gold® and NAD+ Platinum®? NAD+ Gold®, also known as the next generation anti-aging elixir, is the liposome precursor of NMN that reinforces the supply of the NAD+ molecule. NAD+ Platinum® is the most complete blend that supports the body’s physical and foundational performance.

How to use: Take 1/2 tsp. and hold it in the mouth for 30 seconds before swallowing. Repeat the dosage, if needed, or as directed by a healthcare professional. Take 10 minutes before meals and on an empty stomach. Use within 90 days from opening the bottle.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (2,5 ml (1/2 tsp.)): %RI* Riboflavin (as Riboflavin-5-Phosphate) 3,6 mg 257 Vitamin B12 (as Methylcobalamin) 250 µg 10000 NMN (β-Nicotinamide mononucleotide) 50 mg ** Proprietary Blend: 60 mg ** Trimethylglycine (as Betaine), Quercetin Dihydrate (from Sophora japonica flower), Resveratrol (from Polygonum cuspidatum root)
product.ingredients: Amount per day (2,5 ml (1/2 tsp.)): %RI* Riboflavin (as Riboflavin-5-Phosphate) 3,6 mg 257 Vitamin B12 (as Methylcobalamin) 250 µg 10000 NMN (β-Nicotinamide mononucleotide) 50 mg ** Proprietary Blend: 60 mg ** Trimethylglycine (as Betaine), Quercetin Dihydrate (from Sophora japonica flower), Resveratrol (from Polygonum cuspidatum root)

product.title: Geroprotect® Autophagy Renew
product.description:
For you, if you want to boost your body’s cellular recycling process

The nutrients in GEROPROTECT®Autophagy Renew can:

  • Offer an innovative anti-aging formula

  • Support optimal function of the body

  • Encourage healthy AMPK activity

  • Promote cells to recycle waste material

  • Help keep cellular energy balance

Support living your longest, healthiest life with GEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew! This formula that can promote autophagy, which is the natural process for reusing cellular waste that can get in the way of healthy cell function.

Health benefits at a glance:As we age, our bodies become less efficient at autophagy, which is the natural process that clears out cellular waste that can interfere with normal function. Support this vital cellular clean-up process to help promote a longer, healthier life. GEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew contains the plant flavonoid luteolin and piperlongumine, an alkaloid from pepper. Both these ingredients are shown to help maintain your body’s natural renewal system.

Why it works:We all know recycling is good for the environment, but did you know it’s good for your cells too? Autophagy is the body’s natural process for clearing out intracellular waste and metabolic debris. Specialized cellular structures called lysosomes break down and repurpose this material. Why is autophagy important? Because it helps your body conserve energy and maintain optimal function, which is key to encourage a long, healthy life. Geroprotect® Autophagy Renew help you with this!

The science behind the product:Keep your cells clean and functioningWithout autophagy, our cells would become overwhelmed with waste, eventually losing their ability to function properly. The challenge is that autophagy naturally declines over time. But the right nutrients can encourage youthful, healthy autophagy at the cellular level, the hard part is figuring out which nutrients do the best job.Powered by Insilico Artificial IntelligenceGEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew was developed in collaboration with Insilico Medicine, Inc., using their extensive database of geroprotector research. Through advanced analysis they identified luteolin, sourced from the Japanese sophora flower, for its strong potential to promote autophagy. This has been further backed by several pre-clinical studies.Life Extension® has added piperlongumine, a pepper alkaloid, because of their own extensive scientific review. Together, these nutrients have the potential to encourage healthy cellular autophagy – and with it, longevity. Luteolin: The flavonoid for cellular renewalLuteolin is a natural flavonoid found in fruits, vegetables, and nutritious herbs. While we get small amounts of luteolin from our diet, it’s far from enough to promote cellular renewal. GEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew provides 165 mg of luteolin per serving. Pre-clinical studies show that luteolin promotes autophagy, leading to a variety of health benefits, particularly for brain health. (1)Luteolin can support key cellular pathways, such as AMPK signaling, that encourages autophagy. It can also help generate new lysosomes, which is the "recycling plants" inside your cells that break down waste. (2) Additionally, can inhibit the processes that discourage autophagy, such as mTOR signaling, a central regulator of cellular metabolism and proliferation. (2) Piperlongumine: A potent pepper alkaloid Piperlongumine is an biologically active compound found in certain pepper plants. Pre-clinical research shows that it helps trigger autophagy. This was indicated by increased levels of LC3-autophagosomes, tructures involved in initiating autophagy within cells. (3,4)Piperlongumine activates Beclin-1, which is a gene that plays a key role in the formation of these autophagosomes. (5) Beclin-1 dependent autophagy is shown to protect delicate mitochondria and help inhibit inflammation to support cardiovascular health. (5) This longevity supplement contains 10 mg of piperlongumine. Take alone or with Senolytic Activator While cellular housekeeping orchestrated by autophagy is a different process than the ones that govern the removal of senescent cells, they are complementary. Therefore, GEROPROTECT® Autophagy Renew can be taken alone, or in conjunction with Senolytic Activator formula.

How to use:Take one (1) capsule daily, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 capsule): %RI* Luteolin [from Japanese sophora (flower buds)] 165 mg ** Piperlongumine [from long pepper (root)] 10 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 capsule): %RI* Luteolin [from Japanese sophora (flower buds)] 165 mg ** Piperlongumine [from long pepper (root)] 10 mg **

product.title: Bloat Relief
product.description:
For you, if you want to relieve bloating, digestive discomfort & promote healthy digestion

The benefits of Bloat Relief:

  • The extract combination of artichoke leaf & ginger root can help “move food along” your digestive tract

  • Fennel seed oil can help reduce gas by inhibiting the activity of digestive tract bacteria that create uncomfortable gas

  • Extract of turmeric can help promote GI health & function

Gas and bloating can quickly ruin even the best after-dinner moment. The key is helping your body process food more efficiently and reduce gas production, so you can enjoy meals without discomfort or that overly full feeling. The active, plant-based ingredients in Bloat Relief are designed to support exactly that.

Health benefits at a glance:Gas and bloating can quickly take the joy out of a good meal, and millions of people suffer from uncomfortable gas and bloating after meals.Bloat Relief can support digestive comfort by promoting healthy motility, helping keep things moving.

Why it works:Your digestive tract stretches over 30 feet, so it’s no surprise things can slow down. When food doesn’t move smoothly, gas and bloating can follow. Bloat Relief targets the aspects of digestion that are responsible for occasional gas and bloating: Gastrointestinal motility and excessive gas production in your GI tract.Supporting your body in breaking down and moving food efficiently can help reduce gas production, so you can enjoy eating without discomfort or that heavy, overly full feeling. Bloat Relief contains plant-based ingredients such as artichoke and ginger extract, fennel seed oil, and turmeric, designed to help ease bloating and digestive discomfort while supporting healthy digestion.

The science behind the product:Artichoke leaf and ginger root extractFoods move naturally from the mouth to the stomach and down into your lower digestive tract. This is called “GI or gut motility.” The first step in relieving bloating is supporting healthy gut motility.Prodigest® is a patented blend of artichoke leaf and ginger root extracts. Ginger can help speed up gastric emptying, supporting the natural movement of food through the digestive tract by stimulating the migrating motor complex. Artichoke extract can complement this by promoting healthy bile flow from the liver, further supporting digestion.In a double-blind, placebo-controlled study, participants taking Prodigest® reported improvements in stomach comfort and reduced bloating after just 2 weeks. Another study used ultrasound to assess stomach size before and after meals, showing a significant reduction in stomach size in the Prodigest® group, indicating better gastric motility.Fennel seed oil + turmericFennel has long been used to ease occasional gas and bloating. This traditional use is supported by clinical research, showing that fennel seeds, fennel tea, and fennel seed oil, especially when combined with turmeric, can encourage digestive comfort and decrease bloating. Fennel is shown to encourage regular, healthy muscle contractions in your digestive system, and also to inhibit the activity of the digestive bacteria that produce gas during digestion.A large placebo-controlled clinical trial demonstrated significant reduction in bloating and other digestive discomforts for people taking a combination of fennel seed oil and turmeric.Not getting along with your favourite foods? Stay comfortable after you eat with Bloat Relief!

How to use:Take one (1) softgel twice daily before the heaviest meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (2 softgels): %RI* Prodigest® blend: 200 mg Artichoke extract (leaf) [std. caffeoylquinic acids, flavonoids, cynaropicrin]; 40 mg CO2 ginger extract (root) [std. to gingerols and shogaols] 712 mg ** Turmeric (rhizome) [std. to 95% curcuminoids] 84 mg ** Bitter fennel oil (seed) 50 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (2 softgels): %RI* Prodigest® blend: 200 mg Artichoke extract (leaf) [std. caffeoylquinic acids, flavonoids, cynaropicrin]; 40 mg CO2 ginger extract (root) [std. to gingerols and shogaols] 712 mg ** Turmeric (rhizome) [std. to 95% curcuminoids] 84 mg ** Bitter fennel oil (seed) 50 mg **

product.title: Immune Charge+®Throat Spray
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for an on-the-go immune supplement that can support the throat and upper respiratory tract

The active ingredients in Immune Charge+® Throat Spray can:
  • Support key immune activities in the throat
  • Provide zinc in a special form for better absorption
  • Help fortify the body in the face of external threats

This convenient zinc-based spray is designed to provide immune support for the throat. It supports zinc levels in the throat and upper respiratory tract and is an ideal option for traveling, seasonal exposures, and all-year-long immune defense fortification.

Health benefits at a glance:Immune Charge+®Throat Spray can support the key immune activities and the upper respiratory tract. It contains a unique blend of zinc and plant compounds helps fortify the body against external threats. This is a convenient on-the-go spray that can help temper airway irritation and fortifies the immune all year long.

Why it works:Zinc can be found throughout the body in all organs and tissues. It is an essential component for hundreds of enzymatic reactions and it plays a fundamental role in immune health. Quercetin aids the immune response and promotes barrier function. Studies indicate that it supports cellular health, and immune response during seasonal changes. Luteolin supports healthy airways and propolis helps to balance the microbial environment.

The science behind the product:Zinc can be difficult to absorb. The blend in Immune Charge+®Throat Spray can bind zinc to quercetin and luteolin creating an “ionophore” – an advanced way to help get zinc into cells.QuickSilver Scientific® state-of-the-art liposomal delivery technology offers the possibility of rapid uptake for fast-acting results you may feel.

How to use:Spray 3 pumps towards the back of your throat. Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a healthcare professional. If pregnant, consult a physician before useRepeat to desired dosage or advise with a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (0.54 mL (3 Pumps)): %RI* Proprietary Zinc Complex: Phospholipids (from sunflower seed lecithin), ZincAcetate, Quercetin Dihydrate (from Sophora japonica flower), Luteolin extract, Propolis extract 12 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (0.54 mL (3 Pumps)): %RI* Proprietary Zinc Complex: Phospholipids (from sunflower seed lecithin), ZincAcetate, Quercetin Dihydrate (from Sophora japonica flower), Luteolin extract, Propolis extract 12 mg **

product.title: Optimized Folate
product.description:
• Homocysteine balance: Helping maintain normal homocysteine levels for heart health
  • Cardiovascular support: Can promote optimal cardiovascular function & healthy blood vessels
  • Brain health: Supporting cognitive function & mental clarity as you age
  • Active form: Features 5-MTHF, the metabolically active folate your body uses directly
  • High potency: Delivers 1,700 mcg of bioavailable folate per vegetarian tablet

Optimized Folate provides 1,700 mcg of 5-MTHF (L-methylfolate), the metabolically active form of folate as vitamin B9.

Health benefits at a glance:Folate is a member of the B-complex family as vitamin B9 and can promote heart and brain health. Optimized Folate offers 1700 mcg of folate in the form of 5-MTHF (L-methylfolate), which is the metabolically active form of folic acid. The formula is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Why it works:The vitamin B folate helps keep homocysteine levels within a healthy range. Homocysteine is a natural byproduct of metabolism, and maintaining normal levels is important for both cardiovascular and cognitive health.

The science behind the product: Folate for homocysteine & heart healthFolate is essential for maintaining normal homocysteine levels. By helping to inhibit excess homocysteine, folate promotes healthy levels of this important cardiovascular health biomarker. (1)5-MTHF, homocysteine levels & cognitionHigh homocysteine levels are linked to an increased risk of cognitive decline. Ensuring sufficient folate intake, especially in its active form 5-MTHF, is particularly important for maintaining brain health as we age. (2,3)Flexible dosing alone or with B vitamins for enhanced effectThe recommended daily intake for folate is 400 mcg for most adults (non-pregnant). This folate supplement provides 1700 mcg of 5-MTHF. For added support, you can pair folate with vitamin B12 (methylcobalamin), vitamin B6 (pyridoxal 5’-phosphate or pyridoxine HCl), and/or riboflavin (vitamin B2).

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: BioActive Complete B-Complex, 60 vegetarian capsules
product.description:
For you, if you are looking for our most complete vitamin B formula

The B vitamins in Bioactive Complete B-Complex can:

  • Boost the body's natural energy production

  • Encourage healthy metabolism of glucose, fat, and alcohol

  • Promote organ, cellular, and cognitive/brain health

  • Help inhibit potential vitamin B deficiency

  • Offer potent, scientifically studied B-vitamin dosages

  • Provide the bioactive forms of each nutrient

BioActive Complete B-Complex offers the full spectrum of vitamin B benefits in a highly absorbable formula. These vitamin B compounds can support your energy, metabolism, heart and cognitive health.

Health benefits at a glance:Get the most of one of nature’s best metabolism and energy supporters: Vitamin B. BioActive Complete B-Complex offers a wide spectrum of the benefits that different types of vitamin B can provide in just two vegetarian capsules – and that at a much higher potency than many regular vitamin B supplements. From metabolic support to supporting heart- and nerve health, the versatility of vitamin B makes it a true nutritional wonder. The product contains all of the many health benefits associated with vitamin B in a single formula.

Why it works:Your body needs B vitamins to help release energy from the foods you eat, such as carbohydrates, fat and protein. In other words, B vitamins help to optimize the conversion from foods to energy in your system. (1-3) BioActive Complete B-Complex packs a punch of different types of vitamin B, making sure that you can get all the benefits that vitamin B can provide your body. It provides a high potency at dosages that are scientifically studied and formulated with bioactive forms of every single nutrient found in BioActive Complete B-Complex, which ultimately can help inhibit vitamin B deficiency and provide you with an unparalleled product.

The science behind the product:Vitamins participate in many critical metabolic functions in the body. Folic acid and Vitamin B12 play a role in red blood cell production. (2)BioActive Complete B-complex can help to maintain proper organ function and provide other important benefits. This is why you should choose this vitamin B complex to receive the ideal dose of daily B-vitamins.BioActive Complete B-Complex contains:Thiamine (vitamin B1 converts food into usable energy for your body, playing an essential role in metabolism.Riboflavin (vitamin B2) is converted to its active form called riboflavin-5'-phosphate which the body uses for energy production. It also provides antioxidant activity.Niacin (vitamin B3) helps produce hormones and supports healthy energy transfer reactions within the cells. It also affects healthy metabolism of glucose, fat, and alcohol. Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels.Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) promotes the synthesis of hemoglobin (red blood cells), hormones, neurotransmitters, and the oxidation of carbohydrates and fatty acids.Pyridoxine HCI & Pyridoxal 5'-phosphate (vitamin B6) helps metabolize amino acid and fat. Along with vitamin B5, it produces neurotransmitters and hemoglobin (red blood cells). Additionally, B6 also plays a role in gluconeogenesis, the formation of glucose from non-carbohydrate sources.Biotin (vitamin B7) regulates gene expression and is required for the metabolism of fatty acids and carbohydrates. Moreover, it plays a role in maintaining metabolic homeostasis or the balance between your body's many unique chemical pathways and processes.Folate/folic acid (vitamin B9, or for superior absorption, 5-MTHF) is vital for cell growth, amino acid metabolism, production of red and white blood cells, healthy cell division, and proper fetal growth and development to reduce the risk of birth defects. It also helps your body make and maintain healthy DNA. Furthermore, BioActive Complete B-Complex contains the compound para-aminobenzoic acid (PABA), which can encourage the synthesis of folic acid.Vitamin B12 (cobalamin or methylcobalamin) is important for neurological function, heart health, development of red blood cells, production of DNA, and promoting healthy homocysteine levels. Methylcobalamin is the form of B12 that is biologically active in the brain. (4-7)Inositol (vitamin B8) is essential for calcium transduction and healthy blood sugar levels and may improve mood. It's actually not a vitamin, but has vitamin-like properties and is often added to higher-quality B-complex supplements.

How to use:Take two (2) capsules daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Immune Charge+®
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in boosting your immune function and fortifying your body

The potent blend of Immune Charge+® can:
  • Promote cellular integrity and a robust immune system
  • Help balance and support a healthy inflammatory response
  • Support respiratory health and function
  • Bring rapid effect due to advanced liposomal technology

Immune Charge+® is a comprehensive, high-dose blend of immune-support vitamins C, A, D, E, K1/K2, and elderberry. The blend is designed to rapidly strengthen and support your body’s first-line defenses against unexpected health challenges.

Health benefits at a glance: During seasonal changes, but also all year round, our immune system might be out of balance, and defending it against unexpected health challenges is important.Immune Charge+® may accelerate your immunity with natural compounds from vitamins A, C, D, E, K1, K2, and the powerful botanical elderberry.

Why it works: Immune Charge+® offers a specially selected combination of six bioavailable vitamins that can work synergistically to promote respiratory strength, cellular integrity, and year-round resiliency.When combined with elderberry, known for its immune system benefits, the result can give powerful support for immune defenses.Many vitamins and herbs have poor bioavailability. The formula of Immune Charge+® combines immune-supportive vitamins and elderberry in Quicksilver Scientific's proprietary liposomal delivery system that can help provide rapid absorption of these high-dosed ingredients.

The science behind the product: The potent blend for fasting-acting support against seasonal immune challenges contains: Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) offers multifaceted support to the immune system, supporting cellular integrity, antioxidant status, and respiratory health function during viral infection. Vitamin A maintains epithelial barriers in the human body, including the epithelial lining of the lungs and the gut mucosa, where a significant portion of the immune system resides. Vitamin A deficiency compromises immunity in the lungs, rendering them more susceptible to respiratory infections. (1,2) Vitamin D has pleiotropic benefits for immunity. Vitamin D receptors (VDR) are present on most immune cells, indicating their indispensability as components of the immune system.24 Vitamin D deficiency has repeatedly been independently associated with an increased risk of viral infections. (3) Vitamin E is a fat-soluble antioxidant that protects the polyunsaturated fatty acids in cell membranes from oxidative damage, which can be triggered by microbial infections. It increases white blood cell proliferation, immunoglobulin levels, natural killer cell activity, and antibody activity, thus supporting broad-spectrum immune function. (4,5) The formula of Immune Charge+® uses a special form of vitamin E called DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols, which may offer fifty times the antioxidant activity of tocopherols, the form of vitamin E normally used. (6) Vitamins K1 and K1 are fat-soluble vitamins that work in synergy with vitamins A, D, and E to support healthy immune function. Vitamin K1 (phylloquinone) has anti-inflammatory properties through inhibition of the NF-κB pathway. (7) Vitamin K2 modulates the immune system, decreasing immune reactivity and helping to manage the inflammatory response. (8) Elderberry (Sambucus nigra) is a small dark purple berry that has been used for centuries in traditional herbalism as an aid to the immune system. This formula uses Haschberg variety European black elderberry, known for its high potency in anthocyanin flavonoids. Immune Charge+® offers a union of science and nature — an elegantly blended shot that can support respiratory health and antioxidant potential while nurturing the immune system.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Bio-Fisetin
product.description:
• Cellular longevity: Can encourage natural pathways for clearing senescent aging cells
  • Brain & cognitive health: Supporting healthy nerve cell function & mental clarity
  • Sirtuin activation: Can promote youthful sirtuin protein activity for optimal cell performance
  • Glucose metabolism: Helping maintain blood sugar levels already within normal range
  • Enhanced bioavailability: Up to 25x better absorption than standard fisetin supplements

Bio-Fisetin combines fisetin with galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds for superior bioavailability.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all – what is fisetin? Fisetin is a flavonoid! And flavonoids are the little chemicals that provide the colors to vegetables and fruits. You find fisetin, in small amounts in, for example, strawberries, apples, and onions.It has many health benefits, such as anti-aging and brain-support properties. Even though we all love sweet strawberries, you will have to eat a lot of them each day for your body to benefit from fisetin. Bio-Fisetin makes it easier to obtain an optimal amount of fisetin.

Why it works:Fisetin has loads of health benefits. But fisetin in itself is rapidly broken into various metabolites by the enzymes in your digestive system. Bio-Fisetin is fisetin combined with galactomannan compounds from fenugreek seeds. Doing so protects fisetin during digestion. Bio-Fisetin is up to 25 times more bioavailable than standard fisetin supplements. Meaning it lasts longer and works longer for your system.

The science behind the product:Fistin can promote cellular longevityWe age, and so do our cells. Senescent cells are aged cells that do absolutely nothing for you. They do not grow or divide but can cause damage to cells around them. Fortunately, fisetin can work as a senolytic. Senolytics are compounds that can destroy the senescent cells in our bodies. Fisetin can fight these aging cells by encouraging the body’s natural pathways for clearing senescent cells, which allows healthy cells to thrive (1). By that fisetin can help to improve your longevity.Another important aspect of cellular longevity is sirtuin function. Sirtuin proteins keep your cells performing at their best, but sirtuin activity declines with age. Fisetin has been shown in preclinical studies to encourage youthful, healthy sirtuin function (2-6).Keep your mind fresh with fisetinA research study shows that fisetin helps protect the brain's delicate nerve cells (7-9). It has also shown promise for encouraging healthy cognitive function in preclinical studies. The key is absorbing enough fisetin for it to matter.Support for your kidneys and eyesGlucose metabolism is essential for everything from kidney function to how your body gains or loses weight. However, maintaining a healthy blood sugar can get more challenging as we get older.Studies indicate that fisetin acts as a kind of metabolism control switch. This may help your body maintain healthy glucose levels and can positively affect your kidney health and vision health (10, 11).

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Dopamine Advantage
product.description:
For you, if you want to promote healthy cognitive function and support feeling good and focused

The innovative formula in Dopamine Advantage can:
  • Help maintain youthful dopamine levels
  • Support staying sharp and motivated
  • Promote healthy cognitive function
  • Protect your brain cells from cellular stress

Dopamine is the main brain chemical responsible for making you feel motivated. Dopamine Advantage can help ensure you have enough, thanks to a combination of two active nutrients.

Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is dopamine? It is a “feel good” neurotransmitter also essential for cognitive function and mental drive. Dopamine Advantage’ formula of phellodendron bark powder and Adenosylcobalamin B12 can help your brain maintain normal dopamine levels.

Why it works: Dopamine is a brain chemical and has many essential functions. It’s produced in your brain and released into synaptic clefts, the microscopic spaces between your neurons, to relay signaling information from one neuron to the next.Unfortunately, factors such as nutrition, aging, environmental changes and stress can though cause a decline in dopamine levels, affecting cognitive performance, motivation and even lead to a wide variety of health issues.Both of the nutrients in our brain-friendly formula of Dopamine Advantage can maintain youthful dopamine levels in the brain by actively inhibiting enzymes that break down or affect dopamine, which leaves more dopamine available to the brain.

The science behind the product: Our innovative formula can support motivation and focus, thanks to a combination of phellodendron bark powder and a special neurologically active form of vitamin B12:Phellodendron bark and MAO-B: Phellodendron amurense, commonly known as amur cork tree, has many health benefits, including neuroprotective properties. In a detailed 2016 screening study, Phellodendron amurense ranked as one of the most potent extracts for inhibiting the activity of monoamine oxidase-B (MAO-B), an enzyme involved in the metabolism of dopamine. (1)Adenosylcobalamin and LRRK2: Adenosylcobalamin is a neurologically active form of vitamin B12—it can cross the brain-blood barrier and it’s more readily available to the brain. A 2019 study showed vitamin B12 also protects the brain from oxidative stress and that it modulates Leucine-Rich Repeat Kinase 2’s (LRRK2) activity, an enzyme that regulates dopamine levels. (2-4) Add Dopamine Advantage to your daily regimen and “motivate” your brain to stay sharp and focused.Together, these nutrients can protect your brain cells from cellular stress and encourage healthy dopamine levels, promoting concentration and helping you stay focused on your task at hand.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Glucosamine Sulfate
product.description:
For you, if you want to support knee joint function and healthy joint structure

The Glucosamine Sulfate supplement capsules can:

  • Promote knee comfort
  • Help support overall joint health
  • Help maintain youthful mobility

Glucosamine is found naturally in the body. This clinically studied Glucosamine Sulfate can help you maintain and promote healthy joints and knee function.

Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is glucosamine? It is an amino sugar found in joint cartilage. This nutrient has many potential health benefits, such as maintaining the connective tissue between the bones of your joints, promoting knee joint function and freedom of movement.Not all glucosamine is the same though: you’re looking for glucosamine sulfate - the same kind used in clinical studies.

Why it works: Glucosamine has been shown in clinical studies to support healthy cartilage and joint function. (1,2)

The science behind the product: Glucosamine is an important component of cartilage, and an analysis of multiple randomized controlled trials found that glucosamine supplementation helps support healthy joint structure and encourages comfortable knee function. (1,2)In laboratory models, glucosamine has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory effects. (3,4) In addition, preclinical research suggests that glucosamine may support cartilage integrity by modulating synthesis of cartilage structural components by chondrocytes. (5)Glucosamine is often combined with chondroitin because both of these nutrients, including in combination support significant preservation of healthy joint structure and comfort. (6-9)For the convenience of our customers, we are proud to offer glucosamine as a stand-alone supplement.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore
product.description:
For you, if you want to upgrade your zinc supplement for powerful immune support and more

Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore complex can:

  • Boost zinc absorption into the body

  • Deliver it directly into the cells

  • Promote healthy inflammatory and hormone balance

  • Support gut health, immune system, brain function, vision, and more

Zinc is a vital trace mineral that is traditionally difficult to absorb, yet essential for your health. The Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore complex can provide enhanced zinc absorption.

Health benefits at a glance:Zinc is essential for overall immune function, gut health, inflammatory and hormonal balance, brain function, and more, but this vital trace mineral is traditionally difficult to absorb.Upgrade your zinc supplement: With its ground-breaking transport and delivery technologies, Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore can help increase cellular zinc levels throughout the body.

Why it works: Zinc is nature’s classic immune-supporting mineral and has many benefits, though it can’t pass through a cell membrane on its own. Cellular transporters can be less effective at getting zinc into cells due to genetic makeup and/or damage.The Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore complex can diffuse through the cell membrane without a need for a transporter. Once they are inside the cell, the complex releases the zinc so it can move freely inside the cell and go wherever it's needed. In this way zinc is delivered straight to the cells and can promote healthy gut, immune cells, hormone balance and inflammatory response in a powerful way.

The science behind the product: The exceptionally bioavailable ionophore-based formula of Immune Charge+® Zinc Ionophore easy-to-swallow capsules:Powerful delivery Inside zinc is combined with the plant compounds quercetin, luteolin, and hesperetin, forming an advanced “ionophore” complex for enhanced zinc absorption. These specific zinc-binding plant compounds can act as sophisticated “chaperones,” shuttling zinc through cell membranes for powerful direct delivery of nature’s classic immune-supporting mineral. Optimized immune system Best known for its vital, multi-pronged role in immune system function, zinc holds the potential to power frontline defences against invaders.Systemic-level zinc reinforces our most susceptible entry points – the upper respiratory and gut barriers – and can promote healthy immune cells, hormone balance, and inflammatory response. Gut protection against outside stressors Approximately 70 % of the human immune system resides in the GI tract, making it essential for optimal immune function. Zinc and quercetin can support the gut’s natural barrier integrity and safeguard the body from outside environmental stressors.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Membrane Mend™
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a supplement to support whole-body health on a cellular level

The daily formula of Membrane Mend™ can help:

  • Build and repair cell membranes and promote their health
  • Protect and support cell function in the body
  • Balance inflammation at a cellular level
  • Support the energy production by nourishing mitochondrial membranes

The active ingredients of Membrane Mend™, phosphatidylcholine, fatty acids, vitamin E and an age-defying antioxidant, can promote the crucial health of cell membranes and also balance inflammatory activity.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all – what is cell membrane? It is the biological boundary that separates the inside of the cell from its environment and lets only selected material enter and exit the cell. In other words, it keeps the interior of the cell safe so it can function properly.Unhealthy, compromised membranes can lead to whole-body dysfunction. The daily formula of Membrane Mend™ includes the master cell fortifier phosphatidylcholine (PC), essential fatty acids, vitamin E, and a powerful antioxidant – all working together to help promoting the health of membranes throughout the body.

Why it works: Modern life is rife with factors that compromise cell membranes, also referred to as “the brain of the cell”. We need this smart barrier to maintain a healthy, energy-producing environment and keep out unwanted molecules, ions, and oxidative threats. Potentially harmful inflammatory activity - a hallmark of aging - happens within our cells, too. The unique combination of powerful ingredients in Membrane Mend™ can help feed “the brain of your cells” and promote your energy potential by building and repairing the cell membranes. Also, the formula can support cellular longevity by balancing inflammation at a cellular level.

The science behind the product: The formula behind Membrane Mend™ liquid supplement: High-grade PC (phosphatidylcholine) and Ahiflower® fatty acid complex sync perfectly to help build and repair cell membranes, thereby maintaining a healthy, energy-producing environment and helping keep out unwanted molecules, ions, and oxidative threats. The mini energy factories of our cells, mitochondria, have their own biological membranes. Because these powerhouses produce ATP, the energy “currency” used by every cell and tissue in the body, we need mitochondrial membranes to remain intact and functioning well at all times. The powerful antioxidant effects of astaxanthin, vitamin E and fatty acids in this supplement work fluidly to help balance inflammation at a cellular level and in that way support longevity within your cells.The liposomes we use are so small they begin absorbing as soon as they hit the mouth.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (10 mL (2 tsp.)): %RI* Astaxanthin (from Haematococcus pluvialis extract) 14 mg ** DeltaGOLD® Tocotrienols 20 mg ** Ahiflower® (refined Buglossoides arvensis ) seed oil 300 mg ** Phosphatidylcholine (from highly purified phospholipids) 920 mg **

• Cellular energy: Can promote NAD+ levels to support ATP production & vitality
  • Nicotinamide riboside: Features patented compound that can boost NAD+ in aging cells
  • Longevity genes: Helping activate SIRT1 & SIRT3 sirtuin pathways
  • Mitochondria: Can encourage growth & efficiency of cellular energy factories
  • Cognition: Promoting neuronal health & brain function during aging

NAD+ Cell Formula features nicotinamide riboside, a patented compound that can help reverse age-related decline in NAD+ levels. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is NAD+? It's a cellular coenzyme that’s found in every cell of our bodies. NAD+ is necessary to create adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the compound the body uses for fuel. The levels of NAD+ decline with age.Many older people are experiencing fatigue and lack of motivation which might be because of an age-related decline in NAD+ levels which can impair healthy cellular metabolism. (1,2) The active ingredient in this formula can boost NAD+ which promotes systemic youthful functions and can be found in every cell in the body. (3)

Why it works:As the body undergoes natural aging, one may experience having less energy and motivation to do different everyday tasks. This may be due to declining levels of NAD (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide). NAD+ Cell Regenerator™ can promote systemic youthful functions by providing nicotinamide riboside — a patented compound which plays a role in reversing age-related decline of NAD+ levels. Found in every cell in the body, this enzyme plays a role in helping to maintain healthy cell metabolism. With the highly innovative NAD+ Cell Regenerator™, there is finally a product designed to promote higher NAD+ enzyme levels for refreshed vitality.

product.title: Daily Skin Defense
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a nutrient booster supplement for beautiful, healthy skin

The three-part nutrient booster formula of Skin Defense can:

  • Help fight the appearance of wrinkles with a novel extract blend
  • Protect your skin by bolstering its natural defenses against the oxidative stress
  • Help retain moisture and promote a healthy skin barrier with phytoceramides
  • Encourage collagen production and cell protection with vitamin C

The formula of Daily Skin Defense help supporting three vital aspects of skin health: hydration, collagen production and protection against everyday oxidative stress.

Health benefits at a glance:It’s possible to beautify and fortify your skin at the same time. Daily Skin Defense can help hydrate and keep your skin beautiful, fight the appearance of wrinkles and bolster your skin’s natural defenses against the oxidative stress caused by pollutants and UV exposure.

Why it works: Your skin is beautiful and protects you from the elements. But those protective efforts take their toll, and we’re not just talking about cosmetic changes.Maintaining youthful skin structure and function can not only keep your skin looking healthy and beautiful, but help your skin do its primary job: protect you from the everyday elements of oxidative stress around you. Daily Skin Defense was formulated to do just that.

The science behind the product: The three-part nutrient booster formula of Daily Skin Defense capsules:Zeropollution®: Four plant extracts for your skin The patented Zeropollution® blend combines rosemary and olive leaf with lemon verbena and Japanese pagoda tree. Why these four? We’ll show you:Lemon verbena and rosemary: Lemon verbena compounds as well as rosemary polyphenols both help fight free radical compounds—which reduces oxidative stress: making this combo good for your delicate skin.Olive leaf and Japanese pagoda tree: Olives are another strong source of polyphenols. So why Pagoda tree? This tree is packed with quercetin, a phytonutrient known for its cellular stress fighting properties.Over 90% improvement: In a 12-week study, a hundred women with sensitive skin were given Zeropollution® or a placebo. Measurements of oxidative stress, hydration, elasticity, firmness and smoothness were taken. The results were measurable differences in skin health, moisture, improvements in skin radiance as well as reductions in the appearance of dark spots and wrinkles. (1)Myoceram®: highly concentrated rice ceramidesCeramides help retain moisture in your skin. They also help maintain your skin’s healthy barrier function, which not only improves skin texture and appearance, but helps keep out pollutants and other elements of your environment that are best kept outside of your body.Myoceram® is a gluten and allergen free ceramide derived from rice that helps inhibit trans epidermal water loss from your skin. In a 12-week study, 123 healthy volunteers received either Myoceram® or placebo. Those getting the rice ceramide recorded significant improvements in skin hydration. (2,3)Vitamin C: the beauty vitaminThe last part of our formula is vitamin C. Vitamin C can scavenge free radicals, which can take their toll on the look and overall health of your skin. (4) Vitamin C also encourages collagen production in preclinical studies. Collagen is the most common protein in your body and one of the primary building blocks of your skin.

How to use: Try Daily Skin Defense: a once daily formula to help protect your skin from the inside out.

product.title: Mushroom Immune with Beta Glucans
product.description:
For you, if you want to enjoy the immune-health benefits of shiitake, maitake & chaga mushrooms

The unique formula in Mushroom Immune with Beta Glucans can:
  • Help maintain a well-balanced immune response
  • Promote the immune function in active individuals 
  • Provide the equivalent of nearly one and a half servings of fresh mushrooms 

Mushrooms have been famous for their immune health benefits for centuries. This formula combines shiitake, maitake and chaga mushrooms, along with a highly specialized β-glucan, to help maintain a healthy, balanced immune system.

Health Benefits at a Glance:What are beta glucans/β-glucans? They are types of fiber found in the cells of certain types of yeast, mushrooms, and cereal grains and are well-known for their ability to promote a healthy immune response. The unique combination of the different immune system-supportive mushrooms makes this formula a powerful contribution to an effective immune response.Why it Works:Mushroom Immune with Beta Glucans can provide a variety of immune-modulating natural substances including three types of mushrooms well-recognized for their immune health benefits, as well as Wellmune®—a best-in-class beta-glucan ingredient known for its immune-supportive properties. This all-in-one formula can support the balance between the different aspects of immune function—which in turn can help your body mount a balanced and effective immune system.The Science Behind the Product:Our unique formula can support an effective immune response, thanks to a combination of the:Benefits of three types of mushrooms: You probably have heard of shiitake and maitake mushrooms, but did you know that they are highly recognized for their immune benefits? We also added the lesser known but equally impressive chaga mushroom. This combination can provide the equivalent of nearly one and a half servings of fresh mushrooms to support your healthy immune response.Highly specialized β-glucan polysaccharide from yeast: β-glucans are well-recognized for their ability to promote a balanced immune response—a reputation that research now confirms. Several clinical studies have shown their immune promoting benefits.Although beta glucans are found in small amounts in foods as baker’s yeast, mushrooms, and cereal grains, it is easier to achieve clinically studied levels with a daily supplement. Our experts evaluated more than 14 β-glucan ingredients from various sources, and Wellmune® stood out because this patented β-glucan from brewer’s yeast had the most clinical support for promoting the body’s healthy immune response.Together, all these natural substances can provide a unique support to help maintain a healthy, effective and balanced immune response.How to Use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Vitamin D3, 250 softgels, EU
product.description:
• Bone density: Can promote strong, healthy bones & calcium absorption
  • Cognitive health: Supporting mental clarity & cognitive function as you age
  • Immune function: Can encourage balanced immune system activity
  • Cardiovascular support: Helping maintain blood pressure already within normal range
  • Cell differentiation: Can promote healthy cell growth & optimal cellular function
  • Whole-body health: Supporting multiple organ systems for comprehensive health benefits

Vitamin D3, 250 softgels delivers 1,000 IU (25 mcg) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel to help sustain adequate vitamin D levels year-round. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D3 can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce - especially during the winter.A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.

Why it works:Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. Because of weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range may be inhibited. Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)

The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel. Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: AMPK Metabolic Formula, EU
product.description:
• AMPK activation: Encouraging cellular energy production from stored abdominal fat
  • Metabolic support: Can target unwanted belly fat for energy conversion
  • Cardiovascular health: Promoting cholesterol levels & healthy blood vessel function
  • Cellular energy: Supporting ATP production while reducing unnecessary fat storage
  • Dual-ingredient formula: Combines Gynostemma pentaphyllum & citrus flavonoid hesperidin for enhanced benefits

AMPK Metabolic Formulaᴱᵁ features two clinically studied ingredients that can activate the AMPK enzyme in your cells. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance: The active ingredients Gynostemma pentaphyllum extract and citrus flavonoid hesperidin in AMPK Metabolic Formula can activate AMPK enzyme.This can help reduce unwanted abdominal fat, by targeting this kind of fat specifically for cellular energy production, thereby reducing belly fat.

Why it works: One might think that all body fat is the same, but in fact, specific types of body fat causes greater health concerns than others. One of the worst kinds of fat is belly fat. Belly fat can actually escalate various natural aspects of the aging process that takes place in the body. (1) This is because abdominal fat can create compounds that may cause inflammation and oxidative stress. (2)AMPK is an enzyme found in each and every cell in your body. As a result of natural aging, AMPK levels are lowered, which is a major cause of increased amounts of unwanted belly (abdominal) fat.However, studies show that increasing AMPK activity can encourage the cells to stop storing fat and start using it to produce energy instead.AMPK Metabolic Formula contains two powerful ingredients ActivAMP® Gynostemma pentaphyllum and citrus flavonoid hesperidin, which it uses to trigger the AMPK enzyme. (2,3) This, in turn, causes the body to start burning unwanted abdominal fat. (4,5)This is because the increased levels of AMPK enzyme are telling the body to stop storing belly fat and instead use it to create ATP, the main source of energy for cells.Furthermore, it can also help maintain cholesterol levels already within the normal range and also promote the vascular function.

The science behind the product: Gynostemma pentaphyllumG. pentaphyllum, or jiaogulan, is a plant used in traditional Asian medicine for longevity promotion, and is distantly related to the cucumber. (7)Today, scientists have uncovered the reason why Asian doctors prescribed G. pentaphyllum to inhibit various age-related health issues; the reason is that it promotes AMPK activation. (6, 8)Not only does G. pentaphyllum activate AMPK, but it also transports excess fats into the mitochondria, which are the “powerhouses” of the cell. Here it is utilized for energy production. (8) This results in a highly efficient cellular energy production and therefore a sharp reduction in unnecessary fat storage.Furthermore, extracts of G. pentaphyllum have other beneficial properties. This includes the ability to prolong the lives of cells which are put under pressure from stresses induced by oxidation and fat accumulation. (9,10)Studies have confirmed what researchers found in lab research: G. pentaphyllum can boost AMPK activity and also provide important longevity benefits.Citrus flavonoid hesperidinHesperidin is a flavonoid naturally found in citrus fruits. Large studies associate increased consumption of flavonoid-rich foods, such as citrus, with reduced risk for cardiovascular problems.Hesperidin has been shown to promote AMPK activation, help regulate inflammatory factors, and support blood vessel function. (11, 12) Thus, hesperidin complements G. pentaphyllum to modulate abdominal fat distribution.Hesperidin can also help maintain already-healthy cholesterol levels and encourage healthy vascular function.Try AMPK Metabolic Activator and take the fight against belly fat to the cellular level.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

(1)Pyridoxal 5’-phosphate has been shown to protect against glycation reactions (2,3), thus supporting many aspects of health.

Why it works:By inhibiting formation of advanced glycation end products (AGEs) throughout the body and working as a coenzyme in biochemical reactions, pyridoxal 5’-phosphate can support a healthy nervous system, cardiovascular and kidney function, immune and eye health, and more. (1,7,8)

The science behind the product:Glycation reactions occur when sugar in the blood reacts with proteins and lipids in the body. These reactions are a natural consequence of aging and result in the formation of AGEs throughout the body. AGEs accumulate with time and contribute to some of the effects of aging. (4,5) Pyridoxal 5’-phosphate has been shown to protect lipids and proteins against glycation reactions. (2,3) Inhibiting the formation of AGEs can thus help support many aspects of your health. (6)In addition to this standalone product, Life Extension offers pyridoxal 5’-phosphate in two premier formulations: Mitochondrial Energy Optimizer with PQQ.

Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols provides gamma tocopherol, a critically important form of vitamin E which can quench some of the most common free radicals. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:The Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols formula provides gamma tocopherol, a critically important form of vitamin E which can quench some of the most common free radicals. For an enhanced antioxidative effect and anti-ageing support, sesame lignans have been added to the formula to elevate the tissue levels of vitamin C and E, which both have antioxidative qualities.

Why it works:Most commercial vitamin E supplements contain very small amounts if any gamma tocopherol (a specific type of vitamin E) at all. Special for this type of vitamin E is that it´s highly effective against one of the most dangerous free radicals in the body: peroxynitrite. This free radical is a big culprit in encouraging age-related decline why using gamma tocopherol to inhibit this type of free radical can help counteract the aging process.Life Extension has fortified its Gamma E Tocopherol supplement with standardized sesame lignans. Sesame lignans have been shown to promote antioxidative activity in tissues by increasing the levels of two antioxidative vitamins, vitamin C and E. In combination with tocopherols this provides a dual defense against free radicals. The Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols formula provides a potent dose of gamma tocopherol along with an extract from sesame lignans to help defend against free radicals, protect cells and inhibit the aging process.

The science behind the product:Gamma tocopherol is considered very important because gamma tocopherol and not the ubiquitary alpha-tocopherol scavenges a particularly serious type of free radical called peroxynitrite. Human studies demonstrated that a combination of gamma tocopherol with sesame lignans was 25% more effective than gamma tocopherol/tocotrienols in suppressing tissue measurements for free radical and inflammatory response. Tocotrienols, another member of the vitamin E family, are recognized as nature’s most potent antioxidants.

How to use:Take one (1) softgel once or twice daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is MSM? Methylsulfonylmethane or dimethyl sulfone (MSM) is a sulfur-containing molecule present in different plants and some body tissues. This natural compound has been studied for years. Over time, post-workout discomfort can start to detract from the healthy benefits of staying in shape. MSM has been shown to help relieve muscle and joint discomfort and promote healthy muscle structure after exercise. (1-3)

Why it works: MSM is a crucial building block of joint tissue, cartilage, skin, hair, and nails. It is also an efficient source of sulfur which is used by many of the structural molecules in the body. (4) As you age you may experience decreased joint mobility and flexibility as well as increased joint stiffness and pain. Clinical research has shown that MSM can help counter all of these joint health issues and increase joint comfort for better movement, joint flexibility, and mobility and thereby help sustain the quality of life.

In clinical trials, MSM has helped maintain comfortable muscles and joints and promote healthy muscle structure after exercise. It does this, in part, by defending against the effects of exercise-induced oxidative stress. (1-3)Promoting joint health and comfortMSM is well-known as a supplement that can support joint comfort and promote joint mobility and function, and this has been shown in clinical trials. (5-7) One clinical study even demonstrated that the addition of MSM to the traditional joint health compounds glucosamine and chondroitin resulted in additive benefit. (8) In preclinical studies it helped inhibit inflammation to promote joint health. (9)
