product.title: EU Ultra Binder
product.description:
• Toxin elimination: Can help bind & remove heavy metals, pesticides & unwanted compounds 
  • Comprehensive cleansing: Supporting the body's natural detoxification processes
  • Gut health support: Promoting comfortable digestion & encouraging balanced intestinal function 
  • Safe detoxification: Can enhance the body's ability to eliminate environmental contaminants 

Ultra Binder®ᴱᵁ combines multiple binders to capture and removetoxins, heavy metals, and mold from your gut. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance: All bodies contain toxins, and a big part of detoxifying the body takes place in the gut. Many kinds of toxins reside here, including metals and endotoxins. Binders are compounds that are used to target specific types of toxins. Ultra Binder EU Formula, however, is a proprietary combination that combines the abilities of individual binders to target multiple kinds of toxins. This formula searches the gut for toxins and binds them, whereafter they are disposed of by being transported out of the body.

Why it works: Detoxifying the body is a multi-step process where toxins are transported out of the body. Very often, these toxins reside in the gastrointestinal tract because they have been eliminated from other tissues via the liver or were present in the diet. Without a binding compound that can capture the toxins present in the gut, many of these will be absorbed or reabsorbed into the body. This can lead to increased levels of toxicity in the body. There are many binders out there that target specific types of toxins such as heavy metals, endotoxin (LPS), etc. The best kind of binder is a mixture that combines the utilities of each individual binder in a “multipurpose” toxin binder compound. Ultra Binder EU Formula has a unique optimized formula consisting of a combination of multiple binders to safely cleanse the body of many contaminants and support the body's purification processes.

The science behind the product: Toxins are heavy metals, pesticides, herbicides, drug residues, food additives, mold, and bacterial metabolites. Ultra Binder EU Formula contains an optimal blend of the following ingredients to target the toxins: Activated charcoal – can bind LPS, pesticides, herbicides, persistent organic pollutants, and also mold toxins. Sodium Bentonite clay – can both bind aflatoxin and other mold toxins BiAloe® (Aloe vera) – has a soothing effect on the gastrointestinal mucosa, and minimizes gastric side effects which can occur when binders are taken alone. Chitosan – can bind to the bile and toxins which are being secreted together with it. This also includes heavy metals, BCPs (polychlorinated biphenyls), phthalates, as well as BPA. Fibregum™ (Acacia Gum) – supports the health of the gastrointestinal mucosa, supports the growth of a “good” bacterial flora, and promotes normal gastrointestinal function. Fibregum™ (Acacia Gum) is a low FODMAP-friendly prebiotic fiber. Modified citrus pectin – can bind to mercury and other heavy metals and help eliminate them from the body, without disrupting essential minerals Ultra Binder EU Formula can optimize the natural removal of debris and toxins such as heavy metals, endotoxin (LPS), and other unwanted microbial by-products located in the intestines.

product.title: Skin Supporting Ceramides, EU
product.description:
• Skin hydration: Can boost moisture retention for softer, more supple skin
  • Wrinkle appearance: Encouraging smoother-looking skin & reducing the visibility of fine lines
  • Skin barrier: Promoting a resilient protective layer for optimal skin health
  • Youthful complexion: Can support healthy, radiant skin texture from within
  • Clinically studied formula: Contains ultra-pure wheat ceramides validated by scientific research

Skin Supporting Ceramides features clinically studied phytoceramides from wheat oil extract that can help maintain moisture balance and promote smoother-looking skin. Made in EU.

What are ceramides? When it comes to healthy, supple, youthful-looking skin, moisture is key. Ceramides are natural lipids (fats) that make up over 50% of your skin's barrier. They are the "glue", helping to bind skin cells together. (1,2) These cells are essential for healthy and smooth skin, helping to retain moisture and protect it against external stressors. (3) However, as we age, ceramide levels naturally decline, leading to dryness, roughness, and fine lines. (4) Clinically studied ceramides for smoother, supple skinIn a double-blind, placebo-controlled study, healthy women who took 350 mg of wheat oil extract (rich in ceramides) once daily for 12 weeks. They reported (5):Visible reduction of wrinklesImproved skin hydrationHealthier-looking skinAnother placebo-controlled clinical trial found that 51 women taking 350 mg of wheat oil extract daily for 3 months showed measurable enhancements in skin hydration on arms and legs, along with smoother, more supple skin. (6) A third clinical evaluation showed significant improvements in skin roughness, scaling, and overall comfort in the ceramide group versus placebo. Electrochemical analysis also confirmed better skin hydration. (7) Nourishing healthy skin from withinSkin Restoring Ceramides is made with the exact same ultra-pure ceramide wheat oil as the studies. Add Skin Restoring to your daily beauty routine to support your skin from within.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 Capsule): %RI* Ceratiq® wheat ( Triticum vulgare ) oil extract (providing glycolipids, phytoceramides and glycosylceramides) 350 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 Capsule): %RI* Ceratiq® wheat ( Triticum vulgare ) oil extract (providing glycolipids, phytoceramides and glycosylceramides) 350 mg **

product.title: Zinc Caps, EU
product.description:
• Immune defense support: Can help maintain immune function throughout aging
  • Highly absorbable formula: Combining OptiZinc® & zinc citrate for enhanced mineral uptake
  • Antioxidant protection: Promoting cellular defense through superoxide dismutase enzyme activity
  • Hormone & metabolism: Can encourage balanced insulin production & thyroid function
  • Neurological & vision health: Supporting brain health & optimal eye function as you age

Zinc Caps delivers 15 milligrams of bioavailable zinc mineral per vegetarian capsule for immune system resilience and healthy inflammatory response. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Zinc supplementation can effectively support the aging immune defense.Zinc Caps provides a highly absorbable zinc formula containing a 15-milligram dose in each capsule.Moreover, Zinc Caps is a vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO zinc supplement.

Why it works: Zinc is well known for its immune health benefits, supporting your body’s natural immune response.Unfortunately, research shows that zinc deficiency is widespread. (1,2) This can contribute to aging-related decline in immune function. Adding a zinc supplement to the daily routine can promote the aging immune systems as well as a healthy inflammatory response. (2-5)

The science behind the product:Other crucial properties of zincThe benefits of zinc go beyond immune support:Zinc plays a key role in superoxide dismutase, one of your body's most powerful natural antioxidant enzymes.This mineral is required for the activity of over 300 enzymes that carry out essential biochemical reactions in your body. (2,6,7) Furthermore, zinc is essential for hormone production and regulate protein and DNA synthesis, insulin production, as well as thyroid and bone metabolism. (6,8)Zinc also promotes neurological health and vision, especially for older people. (7,9,10) A bioavailable formulaThe absorption of zinc can be limited, and specific compounds in plant sources and grains can inhibit absorption even more. (11)Zinc Caps contains a combination of highly bioavailable OptiZinc® and zinc citrate to provide a 15 milligram dose of zinc. OptiZinc® is a bioavailable form of zinc. (12,13)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Low Dose Vitamin K2, EU
product.description:
• Arterial health: Countering calcification of arteries for cardiovascular wellness
  • Bone density: Can promote calcium transport from the bloodstream into bones
  • Calcium regulation: Helping calcium-regulating proteins function optimally 
  • Long-lasting activity: Vitamin K2 remains biologically active in the body longer
  • Matrix Gla-protein: Supporting MGP activation to help inhibit arterial calcification
  • Low-dose formula: Gentle yet effective 45 mcg per softgel

Low Dose Vitamin K2 can help contribute to countering calcification of the arteries, thereby promoting a balanced cardiovascular system. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin K found in Low-Dose Vitamin K2 can help contribute to counter calcification of the arteries thereby helping to maintain a healthy cardiovascular system. Vitamin K2 is also vital in transporting calcium from the bloodstream into the bone.

Why it works:Calcification of the arteries can be a natural consequence of the aging process. Luckily, vitamin K can contribute to counter this phenomenon. Without adequate vitamin K levels, calcium in the blood can bind to the arterial wall resulting in calcification. As people age, even a minor deficiency of vitamin K can pose risks to the vascular system. An abundance of clinical data also reveals that vitamin K plays a role in maintaining normal and healthy bone density; vitamin K helps this by facilitating the transport of calcium from the bloodstream into the bones. Furthermore, vitamin K also helps calcium-regulating proteins function better in the arteries. Inadequate levels of vitamin K can also result in increased circulating levels of undercarboxylated osteocalcin which is associated with an increased bone loss in postmenopausal women.Vitamin K2 remains biologically active in the body longer than other K forms.

The science behind the product:Human clinical studies report that vitamin K has an important role to maintain healthy bone density. This is done by facilitating the transport of calcium from the bloodstream into the bone. Matrix Gla-protein (MGP) is a vitamin K-dependent protein and has to be carboxylated to work effectively. Insufficient amounts of vitamin K can result in inactive uncarboxylated MGP which can accumulate at sites of arterial calcification. Since MGP can potentially inhibit arterial calcification, MGP plays a role in the aging cardiovascular system. Insufficient vitamin K in our body can lead the calcium in the blood to bind to the arterial wall resulting in calcification of the arteries.Researchers in Rotterdam conducted a large clinical trial study on heart health, about vitamin K2. 4,800 study participants were enrolled in the seven-year-long study. Study participants who received the highest amount of vitamin K2 in their diet experienced better cardiovascular condition. Studies report that proper intake of vitamin K can block the progress of further calcium accumulation. Furthermore, it was also shown to trigger up to 37% regression of preformed arterial calcification.

How to use: Take one (1) softgel daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 softgel): %RI* Vitamin K2 (as trans menaquinone-7) 45 µg 60
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 softgel): %RI* Vitamin K2 (as trans menaquinone-7) 45 µg 60

product.title: Gamma E with Tocopherols & Tocotrienols, EU
product.description:
• Complete spectrum: All eight forms of vitamin E for comprehensive antioxidant protection
  • Gamma tocopherol: Quenches peroxynitrite free radicals linked to aging
  • Tocotrienols: Supports arterial health & balanced triglyceride levels
  • Neuroprotection: Alpha-tocotrienol promotes brain & nervous system health
  • Immune support: Enhancing immune function & cellular defense mechanisms
  • Eye health: Promoting retinal health & visual wellness

Vitamin E is not a single vitamin but a family of eight related, lipid-soluble antioxidants present in different parts of plants. Hergestellt in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin E is not a single vitamin but a family of eight related, lipid-soluble, antioxidants that are present in different parts of plants. Unlike most vitamin E supplements, Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols & Tocotrienols contains all eight forms of vitamin E, providing the full impact of vitamin E’s free radical fighting antioxidant power. It can also inhibit cell aging, promote immune health, nervous system health, eye health, cognitive health, and more.

Why it works:The tocopherol and tocotrienol subfamilies are each composed of alpha, beta, gamma, and delta fractions having unique biological effects.Along with other nutrients, tocopherols and tocotrienols are concentrated in the bran layers of the rye grain and are only present at low levels in the flour endosperm. Tocopherols are also present in algae, mint teas, and other foods. (1-4)Gamma E Mixed Tocopherols & Tocotrienols is an oral formula that provides a full spectrum vitamin E for potent antioxidant protection that can fight free radicals.

The science behind the product:As a family of antioxidant compounds that fight free radicals, vitamin E is one of the most researched and most important nutrients to consume daily. One or more members of the vitamin E family may:Maintain cell membrane integrity and reduce cellular aging (5-7)Act as a free radical scavenger (8-11)Maintain healthy platelet aggregation (12-15)Promote a healthy nervous system and retina of the eye (16-19)Maintain healthy cognitive function (20-25)Enhance immune function (26-29)Gamma Tocopherol – fights free radicals implicated in agingPrestigious scientific journals have highlighted gamma tocopherol as one of the most critically important forms of vitamin E for those seeking optimal health benefits. In fact, studies show the combination of alpha- and gamma-tocopherol supplementation appears to be superior to either supplementation alone on biomarkers of oxidative stress and on inflammatory factors. (30,31) Most commercial vitamin E supplements contain little, if any, gamma tocopherol. They instead rely on alpha-tocopherol as the primary ingredient. However, it is gamma tocopherol (not the alpha form) that quenches peroxynitrite, the free radical that plays a major role in the development of age-related decline. (32)Tocotrienols – support arteries and nervesTocotrienols have shown superior action in maintaining arterial health. (33-36) In 2010, a team of Asian scientists demonstrated that this class of nutrients, which are difficult to obtain in sufficient quantities through dietary sources alone, may provide superior support in maintaining triglyceride levels already within the healthy range in aging individuals. Just 120 mg per day of gamma-delta tocotrienols (provided in 3-4 softgels) induced a 28% decline in triglyceride levels in the blood after just one month. This wonder nutrient is so effective because of its structure of double bonds in the isoprenoid side chain, making it a great scavenger of free radicals. (37)Research has shown that tocotrienols display potent neuroprotective properties and in particular, alpha-tocotrienol is being touted as the most potent neuroprotective form of vitamin E. (38-42)

How to use: Take one (1) softgel once or twice daily with food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.The natural separation of active ingredients may occur.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 softgel): %RI* Vitamin E (from D-alpha-tocopherol and 360 mg mixed tocopherols) 44,8 mg 373 Palm fruit extract with tocotrienols 145 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 softgel): %RI* Vitamin E (from D-alpha-tocopherol and 360 mg mixed tocopherols) 44,8 mg 373 Palm fruit extract with tocotrienols 145 mg **

product.title: Super Enzymes, EU
product.description:
• Digestive comfort: 10 vegetarian enzymes can help break down foods & ease discomfort
  • Plant-based diet support: Alpha galactosidase digesting legumes, cruciferous vegetables & fiber
  • Protein digestion: Protease enzymes can breake down proteins at different pH levels
  • Fat breakdown: Lipase enzyme can help digest dietary fats efficiently
  • Dairy tolerance: Lactase can support digestion of lactose from dairy products
  • Nutrient absorption: Promoting nutrient uptake from foods

Super Enzymes can help support digestive comfort with a formula providing 10 vegetarian enzymes that help digest plant-based diets (leafy greens, legumes, and more) as well as macronutrients such as protein, dairy, starches, and fat. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Do you often experience digestive discomfort after eating?Digestive enzymes help you break down the foods you eat, as well as help you stay comfortable after meals. But your body doesn’t produce the enzymes you need to digest plant fiber – bad news for vegans, vegetarians, or anyone trying to up their intake of hard-to-digest veggies, legumes, fruit, or leafy greens.Super Enzymes can help support digestive comfort. This digestive health formula provides 10 vegetarian enzymes that help digest plant-based diets (leafy greens, legumes, and more) as well as staple macros such as protein, dairy, starches, and fat.

Why it works:Research has shown that supplementing with digestive enzymes can promote optimal digestion and absorption of nutrients from the foods you eat. (1-3)Not every enzyme works on every nutrient. Super Enzymes contains alpha galactosidase that can help digest legumes and cruciferous vegetables (notorious for causing occasional abdominal bloating and discomfort), protease 3.0 that can help digest proteins, and lipase that can help digest fat.These digestive enzymes work in a variety of pH conditions. This is important because different parts of your gastrointestinal tract (stomach, intestines, etc.) have different pH levels, which can also affect digestion.

The science behind the product:This innovative vegetarian and non-GMO formula can promote healthy digestion of hard-to-digest starches, sugars, and cellulose from vegetables, as well as proteins, fats, carbohydrates, and lactose. (2,3)It contains powerful digestive enzymes like alpha-galactosidase, protease 3.0, and lipase, as well as a 10-plant-based enzyme blend: Plant-derived sugar & starch – Alpha-galactosidase promotes carbohydrate digestion and supports GI comfort by breaking down oligosaccharides found in foods such as legumes (beans) and cruciferous vegetables such as cauliflower, broccoli, cabbage, and others which are notorious for causing occasional abdominal bloating and discomfort.Dietary fiber – Hemicellulase, xylanase, and pectinase help break down plant cell components to promote optimal digestion and nutrient absorption.Protein – Protease 3.0 helps digest proteins at acidic pH, like in the stomach. This enzyme helps break down stubborn protein and promotes the digestion of gliadin (a compound found in wheat). Protease SP helps break down most soluble proteins into smaller molecular weight peptides and free amino acids.Fats – Lipase is an enzyme that helps break down dietary fats.Dairy – Lactase is essential for digesting lactose from dairy products..

How to use: Take one (1) capsule one to two times daily before the heaviest meals, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance, EU

• Digestive comfort: Promoting optimal digestion, nutrient absorption & waste elimination
  • Immune support: Encouraging a balanced immune response throughout the body
  • Whole-body wellness: Helping modulate cellular signaling pathways for overall vitality

This formula features a proprietary blend of seven probiotic strains from Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium families, delivering 15 billion colony forming units per vegetarian capsule. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:All healthy people have billions of beneficial bacteria in the gastrointestinal tract (gut) that are essential for healthy digestion, nutrient absorption, and waste removal. Probiotics supply specific strains of these beneficial microbes through foods or supplements.The probiotic supplement FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance provides a powerful proprietary blend for maximum digestive health support.

Why it works:FLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance delivers 15 billion CFUs of friendly bacteria to your gut, containing seven probiotic strains of Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium to promote optimal digestion and whole-body health.

The science behind the product:Benefits for the entire body People usually use probiotics just for digestive health, but scientific research is making it increasingly clear that they have other health benefits as well. For example, probiotics can modulate cell-signaling pathways and promote healthy immune and inflammatory responses. (1-3)Diets high in foods that contain probiotics have been shown to promote health and longevity. But we often don’t get enough probiotics from diet alone.A proprietary blend of probioticsFLORASSIST® PROBIOTIC Balance delivers: B. breve Bbr8L. plantarum 14DB. animalis ssp. lactis BLC1L. paracasei IMC 502L. rhamnosus IMC 501L. acidophilus LA1B. longum ssp. longum SP54These probiotic strains are especially acid-resistant, which gives them the best chance of getting past the stomach.

product.title: Whole Food Multivitamin
product.description:
For you, if you want minerals and sustainably sourced vitamins perfect for plant-based diets

The healthy nutrients in Whole Food Multivitamin can:

  • Offer a full array of essential vitamins plus minerals to complement a plant-based diet

  • Fight oxidative stress and support bone, heart, and brain health

  • Promote cellular health and a healthy immune response (and more)

  • Deliver phytonutrient equivalent to three servings of vegetables and two servings of fruits

Whole Food Multivitamin can help keeping your body healthy by providing health-promoting nutrients found in fruits and vegetables, providing 100% of the daily value of vitamins.

Health benefits at a glance: If you are looking for a vegetarian multivitamin, the searching can stop here. Whole Food Multivitamin was created for people who follow vegetarian and vegan diets. This potent formula combines a healthy dose of minerals with sustainably sourced, plant-derived vitamins to provide the nutrients your body needs to keep you healthy – without compromising your food choices.

Why it works: As a child, you were probably told to eat your fruits and vegetables, and you still need to. To stay healthy, your body needs nutrients from fruits and vegetables, but it can be challenging to eat enough of them. Whole Food Multivitamin can help you fill the nutritional gaps by providing a healthy dose of minerals, phytonutrients, and vitamins taken from 13 plant-derived powders and extracts that can deliver 100% of the daily value of vitamins.

The science behind the product: Everyone should be getting the most out of their multivitamin. Whole Food Multivitamin complements your plant-based diet, and you don't have to compromise your food choices. VITAMINS Vitamins from 13 plant-derived powders and extracts deliver the nutrition your body needs, from A to E: Vitamin A – this vitamin can support vision, healthy cell division, and a healthy immune response. (1) This formula contains a form of vitamin A derived from mixed carotenoids from African oil palm (fruit) extract, beta-carotene. African oil palm fruit is high in carotenoids, including alpha-carotene and beta-carotene. Vitamin C – this nutrient is considered a free radical scavenger and can help protect against oxidative stress, which is why it is associated with immune system health. Your body also uses vitamin C for collagen production, and the health of connective tissue found in arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. (2-4) Vitamin C is added from amla fruit extract, which is one of the richest plant-derived sources of vitamin C. Vitamin D3 – "The sunshine vitamin" is essential for maintaining cognitive health and performance. (5-8) It is also crucial for supporting calcium absorption into the bone matrix, promoting strong, healthy bones and teeth. (9) Vitamin D is also involved in heart health and in maintaining already-healthy blood pressure. (6,9) Vitamin E – is famous for offering antioxidant protection and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, and it is crucial for heart, brain, and immune health. (10,11) D-alpha tocopherol is added from sunflowers. It is a non-synthetic and highly bioavailable form of vitamin E for maximum whole-body health benefits. B-Complex – B-vitamins can help you maintain youthful metabolism. They help your body release the energy stored in the foods you eat to support the many biological processes that keep you healthy. (12-14) There is more than one "vitamin B", and because they are metabolically codependent, B vitamins work together to maintain overall health. This multivitamin formula features a B complex from quinoa sprouts. The formula also contains additional bioavailable forms of B vitamins like riboflavin 5'-phosphate, folate in the form of L-5-methyltetrahydrofolate calcium, and methylcobalamin for maximum "B" benefits. (15) MINERALS A multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. Whole Food Multivitamin provides: 150 mcg of iodine, 11 mg of zinc, 50 mg of magnesium, 55 mcg of selenium, as well as trace minerals like manganese, chromium, and molybdenum. Magnesium – is a helper cofactor or molecule in hundreds of enzyme systems that support different biological processes in the body. It can help maintain protein synthesis, muscle and nerve function, as well as support already-healthy blood sugar and already-healthy blood pressure levels. (16) The formula contains magnesium oxide, a form of magnesium that is high in elemental magnesium. Zinc – is an essential trace mineral your body uses for cellular metabolism and healthy immune function. (17) Eating a healthy diet, plus taking a multivitamin, should give you all the zinc your body needs. Selenium – can support heart and brain health, promote a healthy inflammatory and immune response, and encourage longevity. It can also help quench free radical activity. (18) The selenium in our multivitamin comes from selenium yeast. This form of selenium has been shown to increase the activity of specialized proteins that play an important role in protecting cells from oxidative stress. (19,20) PHYTONUTRIENTS This multivitamin includes phytonutrients equivalent to three servings of vegetables and two servings of fruit.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Theanine XR™ Stress Relief
product.description:
• All-day stress support: Extended-release technology providing calm for up to six hours
  • Wakeful relaxation: Can promote mental calmness without drowsiness or fatigue
  • Brain wave activity: Supporting alpha brain waves associated with relaxed alertness
  • Neurotransmitter balance: Can help modulate glutamate & promote optimal GABA levels
  • Oxidative stress protection: Helping protect brain areas involved in stress response

Theanine XR™ Stress Relief delivers 400 mg of L-theanine from green tea using immediate- and extended-release technology.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is L-theanine? It’s a naturally occurring amino acid that has been shown to support a healthy stress response. (1)Action-packed days demand a lot from our bodies. Over time, unmanaged stress can leave us feeling frazzled. (2) And most people are familiar with the notion “it’s just one of those days”.Green tea is rich in L-theanine, and for many, drinking a freshly brewed cup of green tea can help soothe the mind when life is hectic. A green tea break isn’t always an option though, and that’s why Life Extension created Theanine XR™ Stress Relief.Theanine XR™ Stress Relief can provide all-day stress support with extended-release technology, so you can stay calm and collected all day long – without drowsiness.

Why it works: Theanine XR™ Stress Relief formula provides 400 mg of green tea’s amino acid L-theanine over a six-hour period. This is to promote a prolonged state of wakeful relaxation and in that way helping the body manage daytime stress. (1,3) L-theanine is shown to significantly increase brain wave activity that can help promote a state of wakeful rest. (4) It can also help decrease glutamate signaling, effectively calming the mind – even during those days where you feel you have too much on your plate. (1,3,6)

The science behind the product:L-theanine and a relaxed mind Studies indicate that L-theanine can cross the brain-blood barrier, positively affecting the brain’s pathways associated with mental relaxation and calmness. It has been shown to help protect brain areas associated with your stress response from oxidative stress. (4) It can also help modulate the activity of excitatory neurotransmitters like glutamate and increase levels of GABA (5), another neurotransmitter that helps keep the mind calm and relaxed, especially when you’re having “one of those days.” (1,3,6) Formula with extended-release of l-theanine Your body metabolizes L-theanine quickly. You would need to drink several cups of green tea during the day or take multiple doses of regular L-theanine to maintain a steady supply of L-theanine, and green tea by itself contains very low levels of theanine. Using an immediate- and extended-release technology, scientists have found a way to allow L-theanine to stay in the body for up to six hours. One study in moderately stressed adults found that a single dose of this form of L-theanine led to a greater increase in indicators of relaxation compared to placebo. (7)This unique technology allow Theanine XR™ Stress Relief to provide a steady supply of the stress-modulating amino acid. Each vegetarian tablet is gluten-free and non-GMO.This supplement can be the perfect complement to your busy, modern lifestyle.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula
product.description:
• Extended release: Provides vitamin C benefits for up to 24 hours
  • Superior absorption: Liposomal delivery system can enhance nutrient uptake
  • Immune support: Encouraging a robust immune response for daily wellness
  • Antioxidant protection: Can fight free radicals & oxidative stress throughout the body
  • Skin health: Promoting collagen production for youthful, vibrant skin
  • Cardiovascular wellness: Can support healthy blood flow & arterial function

Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula features an innovative delivery system combining liposomal vitamin C with fenugreek hydrogel for extended-release benefits.

Health benefits at a glance: Vitamin C is one of the most popular vitamins for a reason. It is a powerful antioxidant that can support immune health, fight free radicals and oxidative stress, help keep your skin healthy, and more. Humans are unable to synthesize vitamin C, and many people take high doses of this important nutrient to maximize its benefits. The primary objective, however, is not big doses but to achieve higher and sustained vitamin C levels in the bloodstream and cells. There is only so much vitamin C your body can absorb and use simultaneously. If you take a high-dose vitamin C supplement, some or much of it may be going to waste, literally, your body will flush out what it can’t use right away. Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula contains fenugreek hydrogel to protect vitamin C once ingested. The result is better absorption and vitamin C benefits that will remain longer for optimal effects.

Why it works: The liposomal vitamin C is encased in sunflower-derived lipid spheres that support absorption. This vital nutrient is further protected by a hydrogel made from fenugreek fibers, so it remains active in your body longer than a conventional vitamin C supplement. Therefore, Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula can be a great way to maximize your vitamin C.

The science behind the product: Protected vitamin C for an optimized result Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ Formula can give your body more than 24 hours to make use of the essential nutrient vitamin C. To accomplish this Life Extension has combined 350 mg of vitamin C with an innovative liposomal delivery system: a lipid sphere made from sunflower oil that can support absorption. After that this liposomal vitamin C is infused into a hydrogel made of galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds. The liposomal coating and galactomannan fibers can allow vitamin C to be absorbed over a prolonged period. Health benefits for 24-hour Because your body will have time to absorb the liposomal vitamin C at a steady rate, your system can always have vitamin C on hand — for up to 24 hours. This can result in 7 times greater total plasma levels than a standard vitamin C supplement. This means your body can enjoy the benefits of vitamin C all day long. Vitamin C and your health Immune health: Vitamin C has a well-deserved reputation for immune support; it can help encourage a healthy immune response, so you can have more days feeling your best. (1-4) Cardiovascular health: Several clinical studies show that vitamin C can help promote healthy circulation, supporting everything from healthy arterial blood flow to healthy blood vessel function. (5-7) Respiratory health: Vitamin C may also support healthy lung function. In one clinical study, daily vitamin C intake encouraged breathing quality after exercise. (8) In another, vitamin C helped maintain healthy breathing when experiencing an immune response to a respiratory challenge. (9) Skin & cellular health: Vitamin C can help scavenge free radicals, which can take their toll on the appearance and overall health of your skin. (10) Daily vitamin C intake encouraged free radical scavenging in the skin — in fact, the benefits were dose-dependent, so the more vitamin C you absorb, the better. Vitamin C has also been shown in pre-clinical studies to encourage the production of collagen, one of the primary building blocks of your skin, tendons, and more. (11) Obviously, there are plenty of reasons to take a daily vitamin C supplement. And if you are going to do so, Vitamin C 24-Hour Liposomal Hydrogel™ is a good way to maximize your vitamin C.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 tablet): %RI* Vitamin C [as calcium ascorbate from Lipo-Cmax™] 350 mg 438 Lipo-Cmax™ [providing calcium ascorbate, galactomannans from fenugreek (seed), sunflower lecithin] 1000 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 tablet): %RI* Vitamin C [as calcium ascorbate from Lipo-Cmax™] 350 mg 438 Lipo-Cmax™ [providing calcium ascorbate, galactomannans from fenugreek (seed), sunflower lecithin] 1000 mg **

product.title: Joint Mobility
product.description:
For you, if joint discomfort keeps you from achieving the health benefits of daily physical activity

The powerful ingredients in Joint Mobility can:
  • Clinically studied to help you walk faster and further
  • Help relieve occasional knee discomfort
  • Promote healthy range of motion and knee flexibility
  • Help inhibit inflammation to support joint health

The combination tamarind and turmeric (TamaFlex™) has been clinically studied to reduce minor joint and knee discomfort, resulting in a better range of motion and increased walking speed.


Health benefits at a glance: Does your joint discomfort keep you on the sidelines? Over 30% of adults experience joint discomfort, especially knee discomfort and challenges in everyday activities. For a healthy knee flexion (the term for the measurable degree to which your knee can bend) the Joint Mobility formula uses TamaFlex™, a clinically studied combination of tamarind seed and turmeric rhizome extracts. It’s shown to relieve minor knee and joint discomfort and improve range of motion. Why it works Aside from making sitting, standing, and other everyday activities uncomfortable, knee discomfort can slow you down, literally. Life Extension created the Joint Mobility formula in order to get you moving and back in the game. Tamarind and turmeric both may help inhibit inflammation to support joint comfort. Joint Mobility contains a powerful combination of these extracts, TamaFlex™, to help reduce discomfort in joints and knees, resulting in a better range of motion and increased walking speed and distance.

The science behind the product: Joint Mobility uses a clinically studied combination of tamarind seed and turmeric rhizome extracts to help inhibit inflammation to support joint mobility and comfort: Turmeric (Curcuma longa) is a spice with a long history of traditional use. It’s shown to promote a healthy inflammatory response as well as whole-body health. Tamarind (Tamarindus indica) is a kind of tree native to tropical regions in Africa. It can produce edible fruit and is also prized for its health benefits. Relief from discomfort The first step to staying active is to encourage joint comfort. In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical study, people taking a turmeric-tamarind combination for 90 days showed significant improvements in knee and joint comfort compared to placebo. (1) Joint mobility and activity Staying active is a big part of staying healthy, and regular exercise has benefits for your mind, body, and mood. But it can be hard to stay active if your knees are giving you trouble. The group taking the combination of the turmeric and tamarind extracts had significantly better walking speeds and distance compared to those taking a placebo supplement. (1) Walking speed is relevant because it’s one of the most basic forms of human mobility, and higher walking speed is a good health indicator. A study found that men who were over 70 and able to walk at over 3 mph were less likely to die. (2) We can’t say Joint Mobility will help you live longer, but living an active, healthy lifestyle with plenty of regular exercise will help you. That’s why Life Extension created this unique formula. Knee flexion (range of knee motion) If your knees aren’t comfortable or flexible, you will have a hard time for instance lifting your knees. Joint Mobility may help with that. In the same 90-day study, people taking a turmeric-tamarind combination reported improved knee flexion. (1)

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Iron is also an integral part of many proteins and enzymes that maintain good health, plus important for helping maintain cell growth and differentiation. product.title: Testosterone Elite
product.description:
• Testosterone levels: Encouraging optimal free & total testosterone in men
  • Physical strength: Can promote muscle mass & athletic performance naturally
  • Sexual health: Supporting healthy libido & male vitality
  • Mood support: Can maintain balanced mood & overall well-being
  • Hormonal balance: Inhibiting excess estrogen conversion for optimal ratios

Testosterone Elite is a science-backed formula designed to promote youthful testosterone levels in men through a proprietary blend of pomegranate extract, cacao, and luteolin.

Health benefits at a glance: Testosterone is an essential hormone the body uses to maintain sex drive, bone mass, muscle mass and strength, and more.Age, poor nutrition, and stress are factors that can cause the body to produce less of this important hormone, and the result is less testosterone than your body needs. Men need testosterone to build muscles and maintain sexual health, but levels decline over time.Are you a man looking for a way to feel like yourself again? Life Extension Testosterone Elite formula combines high-quality nutrients to support different mechanisms of action associated with healthy testosterone levels.

Why it works: Maintaining healthy testosterone levels can help support a man’s mood, healthy weight, and sexual health. Testosterone Elite offers a proprietary blend of pomegranate and cacao extracts with luteolin. These nutrients can complement each other’s impact, supporting healthy testosterone production and promoting youthful free and total testosterone levels.

The science behind the product: Testosterone Elite can be ideal for men looking to support youthful testosterone levels: Why are men’s testosterone levels declining? There are a couple of reasons men may experience a decline in testosterone levels. Aging is the most common reason; the testes don’t produce the same amount of testosterone as they did before. (1-3) Another reason is the increased activity of SHBG (sex hormone-binding globulin), a testosterone binding protein that has been shown to increase with age. (1-3) The activity of the enzyme aromatase is also something that can affect testosterone levels. This enzyme converts testosterone into estradiol (estrogen). Estrogen is necessary for male health, but an excess conversion can deprive the body of needed testosterone and leave it in an estrogen-dominant state. Life Extension testosterone-friendly formula – what is in it?Tesnor®: This proprietary blend of pomegranate and cacao seed extracts has been shown to promote testosterone production in laboratory studies. A clinical study indicated that it encouraged healthy levels of free and total testosterone and supported physical strength and other benefits of healthy testosterone levels.Luteolin: Is a flavonoid or plant compound that’s well known for its powerful antioxidant properties, which can support a healthy inflammatory response, and protect against cellular stress. (4) In a preclinical study, luteolin was shown to help inhibit the activity of the aromatase enzyme, and it was indicated to promote testosterone production by promoting the conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone, the precursor hormone for testosterone production.This convenient, once-daily formula is gluten-free and non-GMO, a perfect complement to a testosterone-friendly lifestyle.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Rest & Renew
product.description:
For you, if you want to sleep like a baby and wake up refreshed and restored

The ingredients of Rest & Renew can:
  • Encourage restorative sleep with clinically studied Shoden® ashwagandha
  • Help you fall asleep quickly and sleep all night with a dual-melatonin blend
  • Support you feeling refreshed and ready for a new day

    Health benefits at a glance:An estimated 45 million people in Europe have problems with sleeping. (1)Even if you do get to bed at a decent hour, it's not always easy to get the quality sleep you need for your body to restore itself for the coming day. The amount of sleep you get is important, but the quality of your sleep plays an important role in your health as well. Poor sleep quality can affect cognitive health, metabolic health, and more.The Rest & Renew formula combines a clinically-studied ashwagandha extract with a dual-melatonin to help you get restorative and restful sleep, so you can wake up well-rested.

    Why it works: Not all sleep is the same. Sometimes getting the recommended hours of sleep isn’t enough. The quality of your sleep is just as important as the quantity. Shoden® ashwagandha has been clinically studied to support restorative sleep, cognitive function, energy, and vitality. (2) Immediate and extended-release melatonin can help you fall asleep quickly and stay asleep all night. So, when you wake up in the morning, this unique combination can support that you not only feel well-rested but also mentally attentive, with a more positive perspective, and ready for the day.

    The science behind the product: Restorative sleep — what is that? Do you experience that even though you get enough sleep, you’re still struggling to maintain focus and energy throughout your day? Your body goes through a restorative process during sleep, and if the various stages of sleep are interrupted, you may experience general fatigue as well as stress, lack of focus, and energy. Shoden® Ashwagandha Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) has been used in India for centuries. Shoden® ashwagandha has been shown to support several aspects of healthy sleep, such as how long it takes to fall asleep, how long you remain asleep, and the ultimate goal of restorative sleep. (2) Life Extension Rest & Renew formula includes the clinically studied dose of Shoden® ashwagandha (120 mg). MicroActive® Melatonin Our bodies naturally produce melatonin (also called the sleep hormone) to keep our day/night rhythm in tune. But if you struggle with sleep, it’s possible your body isn’t producing enough. Each capsule of Rest & Renew contains 1.5 mg of MicroActive® Melatonin. This novel blend of immediate- and extended-release melatonin can help you fall asleep quickly and stay asleep all night long. It’s time to feel refreshed. It’s time for Rest & Renew.

    How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

    Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Shoden® ashwagandha extract (root and leaf) [std. to 35% withanolide glycosides] 120 mg ** Melatonin [as MicroActive® Melatonin] 1,5 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Shoden® ashwagandha extract (root and leaf) [std. to 35% withanolide glycosides] 120 mg ** Melatonin [as MicroActive® Melatonin] 1,5 mg **

product.title: One-Per-Day Tablets
product.description:
• High-potency nutrition: Delivering essential vitamins, minerals & nutrients in one daily tablet
  • Bioactive ingredients: Featuring 5-MTHF folate, mixed tocopherols & ultra-absorbable quercetin phytosome
  • Cellular protection: Can support antioxidant defenses & healthy inflammatory response throughout the body
  • Energy production: Promoting metabolism with comprehensive B-vitamin complex & alpha-lipoic acid
  • Heart & immunity: Can encourage cardiovascular health & robust immune system function
  • Outstanding value: science-based multivitamin formula at an economical price for everyday wellness

One-Per-Day Multivitamin provide the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin that fits in just one daily tablet.

Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension's One-Per-Day Tablets have the highest nutritional potencies of any science-based multivitamin formula that can fit inside one daily tablet. This gives you far greater availability of the essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients than many regular store-bought formulas. All active ingredients can support your health in a myriad of ways, and they do so at a standout economical price.

Why it works:Researchers have demonstrated that unless you are taking the ideal dose of vitamins and minerals every day, you will not fully receive their benefits, which can lead to better health and well-being.So, if you want to receive an ideal dose of vitamins every day of the year, why not take one that is worth it? The ultra-low cost of One-Per-Day makes it a standout product on the European supplement market. One-Per-Day Tablets pack a potent punch of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients which can provide many different health benefits.

The science behind the product:Most notably, the soy-free One-Per-Day Multivitamin contains a bioactive form of the B-vitamin folate 5-MTHF, quercetin, zinc citrate, vitamin E as mixed tocopherols, and more.Selenium – supports heart and brain health, promotes a healthy inflammatory and immune response, and helps quench free radical activity. One-Per-Day has three forms of selenium (200 mcg total): SelenoExcell®, Se-methyl L-selenocysteine, and sodium selenite. (1, 2)Apigenin – is a powerful bioflavonoid present in many vegetables and fruits, which can increase cell protection. (3)Bioactive quercetin – One-Per-Day multivitamin contains 5 mg of quercetin that is up to 62 times more bioavailable than standard quercetin. Quercetin can support cellular, cardiovascular, endothelial, and immune health, and more. (4)Vitamin D – can provide significant support for healthy bone density. Vitamin D also plays a crucial role in regulating healthy cell division and differentiation. Furthermore, it also plays a role in immunity. Insufficient intake of vitamin D can be linked to common age-related problems. (5, 6)Vitamin C – it can scavenge free radicals in the body and can protect tissues from oxidative stress. Vitamin C is a vital cofactor in the formation of collagen. Collagen is a type of connective tissue that can support arterial walls, skin, bones, and teeth. Vitamin C is also involved in supporting the immune system. This can be done by increasing glutathione levels in human lymphocytes. These are cells that make up about 25% of all white cells in the blood. (7-9)B vitamins – your body uses a number of B vitamins to release energy stored in carbohydrates, fat, and protein – energy your cells use to carry out their daily functions. Life Extension One-Per-Day contains bioactive forms of vitamin B1, riboflavin (B2), vitamin B12, vitamin B6, and more. (10)Alpha-lipoic acid – can promote liver health, nerve health and more. This universal antioxidant can also help boost glutathione levels already in the normal range. (11-13)Bioactive 5-MTHF folate – One-Per-Day formula contains 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF), a form of folate that is up to seven times more bioavailable than folic acid. This is particularly important for those with certain inherited enzyme variants that make folate metabolism less efficient, since 5-MTHF is already in a metabolically active form. (14, 15)Mixed vitamin E tocopherols – there are four forms of tocopherol vitamin E, and One-Per-Day provides all four. For biomarkers of oxidative stress and promoting a healthy inflammatory response, evidence shows that combining alpha- and gamma-tocopherols is better than taking either nutrient alone. The formula provides more than 80 mg of mixed alpha, beta, delta, and gamma tocopherols. (16)Crominex® 3+ biologically active chromium – chromium helps maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. Crominex® 3+ is a highly stable and biologically active form of chromium optimized with Capros® amla Indian gooseberry extract to promote endothelial health and PrimaVie® shilajit for supporting cellular energy. (17)Lutein and zeaxanthin for eye health – standardized for both trans-lutein and trans-zeaxanthin, the marigold extract in our One-Per-Day formula promotes ocular health and helps inhibit oxidative stress.High-potency minerals, antioxidants, and extracts – a multivitamin is not complete without the minerals and other nutrients essential to healthy living. One-Per-Day provides 10 times more biotin and twice as much zinc as many standard brands. The formula also delivers 100 mg of magnesium and 150 mcg of iodine, as well as trace minerals like manganese and boron.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Mega Green Tea Extract, EU
product.description:
• Antioxidant protection: Powerful EGCG can neutralize free radicals for cellular defense.
  • Brain health: Can promote neuroprotection & encourage cognitive function as you age.
  • Cardiovascular support: Encouraging healthy cholesterol, LDL & triglyceride levels already within normal range.
  • Metabolic wellness: Helping maintain healthy glucose levels already within normal range.
  • Cellular health: Can support cellular renewal & mitochondrial function.
  • Weight management: Promoting healthy body weight & metabolism.

Mega Green Tea Extract delivers 725 mg of concentrated green tea extract per capsule, equivalent to more than three cups of green tea. Made in EU.

Polyphenols Compounds & EGCGGreen tea is loaded with plant compounds called polyphenols, the most well-characterized of which is EGCG. EGCG forms a powerful antioxidant, which has been subjected to extensive scientific research and found to be much more potent than vitamins C and E. Among the abundant health-promoting properties of EGCG is healthy cell reproduction, (1) metabolic function, and cardiovascular health support. (2)EGCG can also help protect brain health, (3) benefit immune system function, and help promote a healthy body weight. (4,5)One cup of green tea provides roughly 150-300 mg of polyphenols (6) and has antioxidant effects that are greater than a serving of broccoli, spinach, carrots, or strawberries. Each capsule of Decaffeinated Mega Green Tea Extract provides 725 mg of green tea extract, which is the equivalent of more than three cups of green tea. This 98% green tea extract is standardized to provide high antioxidant potency, using the most important polyphenol of green tea. Moreover, green tea powdered extracts have been shown to absorb 60%-90% better into the bloodstream and to be far more bioavailable than drinking green tea. The Benefits of Green TeaGreen tea has been shown to provide many benefits including: Protects against oxidation: Green tea polyphenols are capable of directly neutralizing destructive free radicals and are also thought to boost the body's own internal oxidative stress defenses. They've also been shown to inhibit oxidative stress. (7-9)Cellular health support: Green tea supports healthy cellular proliferation. (1) In fact, the green tea polyphenol EGCG has a remarkably broad array of cellular health benefits, exerting a positive influence on mitochondrial health, intracellular signaling pathways, intracellular messengers, transcription factors, healthy gene expression and more. (10)Cholesterol management: Green tea, green tea extracts and EGCG can help maintain already-healthy blood cholesterol, LDL and triglyceride levels. (11,12)Neuroprotection and metabolic health: Green tea and its polyphenols, including EGCG, help protect nerve cells and nerve function, have been shown to help preserve metabolic health, and help maintain already-healthy glucose levels. (13-15)Also: Fluid-stabilising properties, promoting weight loss, boosting the effectiveness of enzymatic phase II detoxification, and enhancing immune function. An Advanced ExtractDecaffeinated Mega Green Tea Extract has been concentrated and dual standardised to ensure the highest quality, consistency and biological activity. This advanced extract contains 98% total polyphenols and 45% epigallocatechin-3-gallate (EGCG).

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Green tea decaffeinated extract (leaf) [std. to 98% polyphenols, 45% EGCG (326.25 mg)] 725 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Green tea decaffeinated extract (leaf) [std. to 98% polyphenols, 45% EGCG (326.25 mg)] 725 mg **

product.title: Body Trim and Appetite Control
product.description:
For you, if you want to tame your hunger hormones and get help to stick to a healthy eating plan

The formula of Body Trim & Appetite Control can:

  • Help control appetite with

    Health benefits at a glance:Losing weight and keeping it off is a process and a lot about making healthy choices. Body Trim & Appetite Control can support you in achieving a healthy weight, by helping you master your appetite and avoid overeating.Clinical research shows that the (1) combination of lemon verbena and hibiscus extracts can help you feel satisfied, so you can walk away from the dinner table without wanting another portion.

    Why it works:A global study from 2021 carried out across 30 countries, finds that 45% of people globally say that they are currently trying to lose weight. (2)They are right to do so because research shows that a 5% reduction in your total body weight can lead to significant health benefits.Fewer calories, healthier foods — the formula for losing weight The simple fact is; you need to burn more calories than you get from the food you eat, every day. This is called a caloric deficit. When you achieve this daily, your body turns to burn stored fat to make up the difference. Why is achieving and maintaining weight loss hard? Your body is used to eating a certain amount every day. So, when it’s not getting its usual number of calories, it will send you signals to keep eating. Maintaining a caloric deficit can also be difficult, and for many, the numbers increase again on the scale after reaching the goal weight. The answer has less to do with “dieting” and more to do with the choices that you make, every day – and you might need a little help. That’s where Metabolaid® can help you; by helping control your appetite. Metabolaid® is a proprietary formula of hibiscus flower and lemon verbena leaf extracts.This clinically studied combination is shown to help promote satiety, the feeling you get when you’re “full”. This can make it easier to keep your weight-loss plan.

    The science behind the product:Clinical research shows that a little encouragement to stick to a healthy eating plan goes a long way towards lasting weight loss.Studies with Metabolaid® lemon verbena and hibiscus extract In a real-world study, men and women took the Metabolaid® extract combination for 90 days and tracked their food intake and weight loss progress on a mobile app. 85% of the participants reported a weight reduction, and they averaged also lost over 12 pounds in 3 months. (1) Clinical research can back up this finding: in two separate studies following overweight women, 500 mg of Metabolaid® produced a significant reduction in body weight, BMI, and body fat percentage compared to placebo. (3,4)The next step is keeping the weight loss, and this is where most “diet plans” fail. Once you’ve lost some pounds/kilos, it can be easy to go back to the old habits of eating too much, not getting enough exercise, or just choosing the wrong foods. By helping “tame the hunger hormones”, the supplement can facilitate achieving a long-term result in maintaining a healthy weight.

    How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.

    Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Metabolaid® [Lemon verbena (leaf) extract, hibiscus (flower) extract] 500 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Metabolaid® [Lemon verbena (leaf) extract, hibiscus (flower) extract] 500 mg **

product.title: B12 Elite
product.description:
For you, if you want to ensure your B12 levels with two bioactive forms of this essential vitamin 

The novel formula of B12 Elite can:
  • Provide two bioactive forms of B12

    Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is B12 (also called cobalamin)? It’s a water-soluble vitamin that plays a vital role in the health of your nervous system, blood cells, and your DNA (B12 helps protect delicate parts of your chromosomes). Life Extension B12 Elite can deliver 500 mcg each of adenosylcobalamin and methylcobalamin: two neurologically active forms of B12 that can help protect your brain at the cellular level.

    Why it works: What causes B12 deficiency since many people don’t get sufficient amounts of this crucial vitamin? Reasons range from age-related insufficiency to dietary intake. B12 comes primarily from animal sources, so those following a vegetarian diet may not get enough. The formula B12 Elite combines two bioactive forms of cobalamin, and they are both essential for proper bodily and neurological function. These “active” forms make it possible for the body to use them right away, in other words; they make it easier for your body to absorb and access the health benefits of vitamin B12.

    The science behind the product: The combination of methylcobalamin and adenosylcobalamin in B12 Elite can offer optimal cognitive support and promote brain health and function. The benefits of these two bioactive forms of B12 are: Adenosylcobalamin This active form of cobalamin B12 helps preserve neuronal function. Leucine-Rich Repeat Kinase 2 (LRRK2) is a type of enzyme that modifies other proteins by adding phosphate groups. (1) Inhibiting the activity of this enzyme has been associated with helping to preserve neuronal tissue. (2) A series of preclinical studies indicate that the adenosylcobalamin form of B12 can inhibit the activity of multiple LRRK2 variants in neurons by decreasing phosphorylation (the addition of phosphate groups to amino acids). (3) These studies found that adenosylcobalamin helped regulate the healthy release of dopamine, a neurotransmitter that plays an important role in cognitive functions such as motor control, arousal, reinforcement, and reward. (3-6) Adenosylcobalamin is also a cofactor for energy metabolism. It’s active in the mitochondria, the powerhouses of your cells. It’s required as a cofactor for the synthesis of succinyl-CoA, a compound that supports cellular energy metabolism. (7-9) Methylcobalamin This is another neurologically active form of B12 (though in different ways than adenosylcobalamin) that is important for cellular health and much more. Methylcobalamin supports the central nervous system, and it’s essential for the replication and growth of cells. (10) It also helps to maintain already healthy homocysteine levels. (11-14) A key to maintaining healthy cardiovascular and neurological function is inhibiting excess levels of homocysteine. Please note, that Life Extension also offers BioActive Complete B-Complex formula: a wide spectrum of B vitamins for whole-body health.

    How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

    Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 lozenge): %RI* Vitamin B12 (as adenosylcobalamin, methylcobalamin) 1000 µg 40000
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 lozenge): %RI* Vitamin B12 (as adenosylcobalamin, methylcobalamin) 1000 µg 40000

product.title: Essential Youth L-Ergothioneine
product.description:
• Cellular protection: Defending cells from oxidative stress & free radicals
  • Healthy aging: Can promote telomere health to support longevity & youthful vitality
  • Cognition: Supporting brain health & protect against age-related cognitive decline
  • Vision: Can encourage eye health through cellular protection mechanisms
  • Heart health: Promoting heart & overall cardiovascular function

Essential Youth L-Ergothioneine provides this food-derived amino acid that declines with age and can help maintain optimal ergothioneine levels to support healthy aging, cognitive function, and cellular protection. Non-GMO.

Health benefits at a glance: First of all – what is ergothioneine? It’s an amino acid present throughout your body, but the levels have been shown to decline as we age. (1) You must get ergothioneine through your diet as the body can’t produce it, and it’s found in a variety of food sources, but the highest concentrations are in certain types of mushrooms. This food-derived amino acid is thought to play a crucial role in supporting long-term health through its cell-protective benefits and inhibition of free radicals. (2)

Why it works: Ergothioneine has the interest of the scientific community due to its properties that contribute to cell protection and its great promise in supporting healthy aging. A new proprietary fermentation method has made it possible to provide supplementation of this nutrient. Studies have shown that the body has a specific mechanism to transport the amino acid ergothioneine into cells, indicating it’s crucial for overall health. (3,4) Life Extension’s innovative formula can help maintain healthy ergothioneine levels to help ensure your body gets enough of this cell-protecting amino acid.

The science behind the product: Healthy aging and longevity Studies indicate that ergothioneine can delay telomere shortening due to oxidative stress. (5) Your telomeres are like protective caps at the end of your chromosomes. As time goes by, these telomeres shorten naturally, in step with your aging process. In a preclinical study, L-ergothioneine had a protective effect on telomere length and slowed the rate of telomere shortening under oxidative stress conditions, and in that supporting longevity. (5) Cognitive and vision health Low levels of ergothioneine in older adults have been linked with cognitive decline. In preclinical studies, ergothioneine showed beneficial neuroprotective properties from oxidative stress, supporting overall cognitive health. (1) The cell-protecting properties of ergothioneine have also been linked to vision health. (6) Supporting heart health A 2020 clinical study found that higher ergothioneine levels were associated with healthier diets and with heart health. (7) If mushrooms aren’t for you, you can still get the longevity-promoting benefits of ergothioneine with the innovative Essential Youth L-Ergothioneine formula. One daily capsule provides as much L-ergothioneine as 2 to 5 cups of white button mushrooms.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* ErgoActive® (L-Ergothioneine) 5 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* ErgoActive® (L-Ergothioneine) 5 mg **

product.title: Brain Fog Relief
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in relaxing and thereby strengthening your mind

The innovative formula in Brain Fog Relief can:

  • Encourage relaxation of the nerves

  • Provide clinically studied nutrients

  • Offer support with all-natural ingredients

Brain Fog Relief is an innovative, fast-acting, and caffeine-free formula. It combines clinically studied nutrients such as polyphenol-rich mango leaf extract and standardized peppermint oil.

Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is brain fog? Brain fog is often described as mental fatigue, lack of mental clarity, poor concentration, a feeling of being scatterbrained, and an inability to focus.The causes of brain fog can vary from stress and nervous tension, poor sleep, hormonal changes, diet, medication, and medical conditions.Nootropics are substances that can support mental endurance and performance. Caffeine is undoubtedly the most widely used nootropic, but this is a short-lived stimulant.This innovative formula is caffeine-free and specially designed to be fast-acting and relax the nerves.

Why it works:You aren’t productive when your mental focus is thrown off, for whatever reason. Your cup of morning coffee may offer a temporary energy boost, but running on caffeine comes with an inevitable energy decline, dragging your focus and attention along with it.Brain Fog Relief can help relax and thereby strengthen the nerves. How? This product provides 300 mg of polyphenol-rich mango leaf extract and 100 μl of standardized peppermint oil.

The science behind the product:Brain Fog Relief formula combines powerful, clinically studied nutrients. Polyphenol-rich mango leaf extractMango leaves, extracts, and teas have long been used in Asian and African countries. Mangiferin is a compound found in mango leaves that is believed to be largely responsible for reported effects.Scientists conducted several controlled human trials to evaluate the effects of a special mango extract found in Brain Fog Relief. (1-4)Standardized peppermint oilThe herb peppermint has been traditionally used for its supportive properties, including as a digestive aid and to promote calming.Its oil contains a high concentration of monoterpene compounds, including menthol and menthone. Various studies have shown peppermint's beneficial effects on the nervous system. (5-8)Let Brain Fog Relief be part of your daily routine – take one a day!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 softgel): %RI* Zynamite® mango extract (leaf) (std. to 60% mangiferin) 300 mg ** Peppermint essential oil (std. to 60% monoterpenes) 90 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 softgel): %RI* Zynamite® mango extract (leaf) (std. to 60% mangiferin) 300 mg ** Peppermint essential oil (std. to 60% monoterpenes) 90 mg **

product.title: Waistline Control™
product.description:
For you, if you want to target your weight and circumference around your mid-section

The blend in Waistline Control™ can:

  • Support slimming down your waistline (with diet and exercise) 

    Health benefits at a glance: Are you ready to lose those love handles but wonder how to get a smaller waist? Clinical studies show that a patented blend of two herbal extracts can help control your waistline. The Meratrim® blend in the Waistline Control™ formula can help you reduce your waist size and achieve a healthy weight — when combined with a healthy diet and regular exercise.

    Why it works: We accumulate fat in different places, but we typically care most about the fat around our middle, wishing for a little reduced size and circumference around our waist and hips. The good news is that a healthy diet, regular exercise, and the patented blend of Sphaeranthus indicus flower and Garcinia mangostana (mangosteen) fruit rind extracts in Waistline Control™ can help you do just that. In clinical studies, people who took this blend of extracts lost 5% or more of their total weight, along with significant reductions in waist and hip circumferences. The patented blend Meratrim® is shown to produce both weight loss and waistline reduction in clinical studies when combined with diet and exercise. How does it work? In cell cultures, this combo of herbal extracts is indicated to inhibit the expression of proteins that trigger adipogenesis (fat cell growth). It is also shown to promote multiple pathways that encourage fat breakdown. The results are a slimmer waist and a healthy weight.

    The science behind the product: Clinical study of waist reduction Participants took one 400 mg capsule of the Sphaeranthus indicus flower and Garcinia mangostana (mangosteen) extract combo 30 minutes before breakfast and dinner. This was repeated for 16 weeks and combined with a structured diet and regular exercise. (1) The results showed over 3 inches down in waist circumference and just over 4 inches down in hip circumference. In both measurements, the Meratrim® combo outperformed the placebo group, so it wasn’t just the diet and exercise. (1) Mechanisms of fat metabolism and weight loss The goal isn’t just a slimmer waist and hips but also achieving a healthy weight. In the same study as mentioned, the Meratrim® group lost an average of 11 pounds compared to the placebo group by the end of week 16, with noticeable results beginning just four weeks after the study’s inception. (1) Bonus: the Meratrim® group also recorded healthier lipid profiles than they had at the beginning of the study. (1) Meratrim® may support weight loss by targeting the different mechanisms of fat metabolism. In vitro studies show that the S. indicus and G. mangostana (mangosteen) extract combo reduced the expression of proteins associated with adipogenesis (fat production). (2) It also promoted fat breakdown. (2) When it comes to your mission to slim down around the middle you’re no longer alone; add our Waistline Control™ formula to your healthy weight loss regimen today.

product.title: Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin
product.description:
For you, if B12 lozenges are a convenient way to ensure optimal levels of this crucial vitamin

The formula of B12 Methylcobalamin can:
  • Support healthy homocysteine levels (a marker of cardiovascular & neurological health)

    Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin B12, also called cobalamin, is a water-soluble vitamin. It is important for nerve and blood cell health and also plays a role in DNA synthesis.What causes B12 deficiency? Vitamin B12 is present in foods of animal origin, including dairy products and eggs, but digestive challenges that can come with aging can affect absorption. Vegetarians and the elderly are therefore the groups tending to be most challenged with maintaining healthy levels of this essential vitamin. (1-2)The lozenges of Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin can be dissolved in your mouth or chewed – making them a convenient way to ensure optimal levels of B12.

    Why it works:There are eight B vitamins, each with their own set of important roles in maintaining health throughout the body.Methylcobalamin is a form of vitamin B12 that is active in the central nervous system. It is essential for cellular health, to the growth and replication of cells.Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin can supply 1000 µg of methylcobalamin and help support healthy homocysteine levels, brain health, and cognition.

    The science behind the product:Vitamin B12, or cobalamin, works synergistically with vitamin B6 and folate to convert homocysteine into the amino acid methionine. (3) This helps to maintain healthy levels of homocysteine, an emerging marker of neurological, cardiovascular health, and general health. (4)Vegetarians and the elderly are especially susceptible to deficiency of this important nutrient, which may be caused by low dietary intake, inadequate bioavailability, or poor absorption of B12. (1,2) The age-related decrease in hydrochloric acid production can also affect B12 bioavailability. (5,6)Recent research shows that supplementing with B12, even at moderate doses, can improve both B12 and folate status in older individuals. (7)Please note, that Life Extension also offers BioActive Complete B-Complex formula: a wide spectrum of B vitamins for whole-body health.

product.title: Calm-Mag
product.description:
• Stress management: Can help the brain promote a healthy response to stress
  • Mental calmness: Supporting feelings of relaxation & emotional tranquility
  • Brain-ready magnesium: Enhanced bioavailability crosses the blood-brain barrier effectively
  • Neurotransmitter support: Can promote serotonin & GABA activity
  • Daily stress relief: Encouraging over 300 biochemical reactions in the body

Calm-Mag contains magnesium acetyl taurinate, a patented form of magnesium with enhanced bioavailability that can readily cross the blood-brain barrier.

Health benefits with a glance:First of all, why can magnesium help you stay calm? This powerful mineral supports more than 300 biochemical reactions in the body and plays a role in managing stress. Yet, not all forms of magnesium are as readily bioavailable to your brain. Calm-Mag contains a special form of magnesium with enhanced bioavailability that’s easy for your brain to use. Life Extension’s Calm-Mag may therefore help the brain promote a healthy response to stress.

Why it works:;Many of us have experienced that busy schedules can affect our well-being. It’s common to turn to magnesium supplements to help the body fend off the effects of daily stress. But unless this mighty mineral goes where it’s needed – aka your brain – it won’t help the body manage stress. Magnesium acetyl taurinate in Calm Mag is a patented form of magnesium that is well absorbed and can access the brain where it works with the brain to support stress management, encouraging relaxation and feelings of calmness. The science behind the product Magnesium is an important essential mineral in the body, and stress and magnesium levels are correlated. People suffering from stress-related symptoms often have low blood levels of magnesium. (1)Magnesium acetyl-taurinate supports magnesium levels in the brain A preclinical study compared how magnesium levels in brain tissue were affected by different magnesium compounds: magnesium glycinate, magnesium acetyl-taurate, magnesium citrate, and magnesium malate. The results of this study showed that magnesium brain tissue levels were significantly increased by magnesium acetyl-taurate. (3) Life Extension’s Calm-Mag Magnesium Acetyl Taurinate is designed to help calm your mind by delivering this special form of magnesium that can readily cross the blood-brain barrier and positively impact the brain pathways associated with stress management. Magnesium has been shown to help support the activity of neurotransmitters like serotonin and GABA. (4)Supporting the feelings of tranquility and relaxation A clinical trial of 19 women with an inadequate dietary intake of magnesium showed improved feelings of relaxation and emotional calmness after supplementing with magnesium acetyl-taurate. (5) Studies show unmanaged stress leads to increased levels of stress hormones and low levels of magnesium, making it more difficult for the body to manage healthy stress response. (2) Supplementing with magnesium can therefore be very helpful to combat the effects of stress, but it has to be a form of magnesium that can brain can use.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.
