product.title: Kidney Care
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in promoting filtration of toxins and kidney protection

The ingredients in Kidney Care can:

  • Promote healthy kidney function

  • Help stimulate lymphatic drainage for enhanced detoxification

  • Offer protective & regenerative kidney support

  • Provide a highly bioavailable formula for fast-acting absorption

  • Deliver a soy protein-free and vegan supplement

Kidney Care contains a proprietary blend of botanicals and nutraceuticals such as astragaloside IV extract, zhu ling, goldenrod, dandelion leaf, he shou wu root, fu ling, and ferulic acid to support healthy kidney function, drainage, and improved detoxification.

Health benefits at a glance: The liver and the kidneys are some of the most essential and hardworking organs in the body. They carry out numerous functions, one of which is filtering the toxins we are exposed to throughout our lives.Our delicate kidneys are highly susceptible to damage throughout our lifetime and can be difficult to repair. However, supporting kidney health is often an overlooked aspect of detoxification, putting our kidneys at risk of irreparable damage.Kidney Care contains a blend of botanicals and nutraceuticals and is developed to target kidney health and regeneration.

Why it works:The kidney filters an astounding 150 quarts of blood daily to clear harmful contaminants and byproducts from the body. The filtration is done by very specialized blood vessels, and vitamins, amino acids, glucose, hormones, and other vital substances are returned to the bloodstream.Quicksilver Scientific’s potent proprietary blend includes astragaloside IV extract, zhu ling, goldenrod, dandelion leaf, he shou wu root, fu ling, and ferulic acid to support healthy kidney function, lymphatic drainage, and improved detoxification.Kidney Care contains nanoemulsified liquid, offering a highly bioavailable formula for fast-acting absorption.

The science behind the product:The intentionally targeted blend of botanicals and nutraceuticals offered in Kidney Care contains: Regenerative & protective ingredients Astragaloside IV extract (Astragalus membranaceous root) is shown to help reduce oxidative stress in renal tubular cells, protect podocytes from damage (damaged podocytes are a hallmark of kidney disease), and have a protective and regenerative effect on the kidneys by upregulating the Klotho pathway. (1) Ferulic acid is an antioxidant phytochemical found in various fruits and vegetables. It’s found to combat oxidative damage, inflammation, and damaging levels of autophagy in the kidneys. (2,3) Draining ingredients Dandelion leaf extract is considered an anti-toxin herb. It acts as a diuretic and can support kidney drainage. This extract is rich in phytochemicals, including β-sitosterol, α-amyrin, stigmasterol, quercetin glycosides, chicoric acid, and sesquiterpene lactones. (4,5) Goldenrod extract (Solidago aerial parts) can support drainage through diuretic activity. It’s historically used for kidney stones, UTIs, and an overactive bladder. It contains quercetin. (6) Fu ling (poria cocos) sclerotium extract is an eastern medicine fungus that grows around the roots of pine trees. It acts as a diuretic and is shown to have kidney-protective and reparative properties. (7,8) Zhu ling (polyporus umbellatus) fruiting body extract comes from edible mushroom species that grow on old beech or oak trees. In traditional Chinese medicine, it’s used to address urinary and kidney dysfunction. It’s a diuretic that is shown to regulate transmembrane proteins that act as molecular water channels in the kidneys. This extract may also protect against kidney injury and fibrosis by regulating fatty acyl metabolism. (9) Citrus and juniper berry essential oils are diuretics. Nurturing ingredient He shou wu (fo-ti) root extract is a big tuberous root with tonifying and kidney protective properties. It can support the liver, kidneys, and blood. (10)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 teaspoon (5 ml)): %RI* Astragaloside IV extract (Astragalus membranaceus root): 5 mg Ferulic Acid: 20 mg ** Proprietary blend: Dandelion (Taraxacum officinale) leaf extract, Goldenrod (Solidago gigantea aerial parts) extract, Fu Ling (Poria cocos) sclerotium extract, Zhu Ling (Polyporus umbellatus) fruiting body extract, He Shou Wu (Fo-ti) root extract (Polygonum multiflorum), Citrus and juniper berry essential oils 1100 mg **

product.title: Performance Cardio+
product.description:
For you, if you want to support healthy blood flow and oxygenation for optimized health

The advanced formula of Performance Cardio+ can:

  • Promote whole-body blood circulation

  • Encourage athletic performance & energy

  • Promote healthy cognition

  • Aid nitric oxide production

  • Support normal coagulation of blood

  • Help inhibit blood stagnation

  • Support longevity & healthy aging

  • Help maintain healthy sexual function

Performance Cardio+ is a vegan, fast-acting liquid supplement to optimize health. This proprietary blend of Western modern nutraceuticals and Eastern time-honored herbs and botanicals is designed to support healthy whole-body blood circulation and cardiovascular function.

Health benefits at a glance:Healthy circulation is key to vitality! Your heart has an important job in keeping your body running; it pumps blood through your circulatory system to nourish organs and tissues in the body.Supplementing for circulation is not just for the elderly or “at-risk groups,” though. Food choices, lack of exercise, genetic makeup – and aging – all play a role in impeding healthy macro and microcirculation and oxygenation in the body, putting the cardiovascular system at risk.Performance Cardio+ is an advanced whole-body circulation formula designed to promote healthy blood flow and optimize your overall health using Quicksilvers-delivery system technology for optimal absorption.

Why it works:Quicksilver Scientific’s proprietary blend contains an array of time-honored Eastern herbs/botanicals and modern Western nutraceuticals that are found to improve macro and microcirculation throughout the body and support cardiovascular function.This power-packed formula may thus support energy, athletic performance, cognition, longevity, and healthy sexual function.Moreover, the product uses proprietary Quicksilver Delivery Systems® technology to create small, stable delivery vesicles (between 20-70 nm) that begin absorbing as soon as they (the liquid supplement) hit the mouth.

The science behind the product:Performance Cardio+ is a vegan cardio- and cerebrovascular tonic that consists of targeted ingredients shown to promote nitric oxide levels, healthy blood flow, and circulation to every tissue in the body. These circulatory herbs/botanicals and nitric oxide building nutraceuticals are: Dan sheen root extract (Salvia miltiorrhiza) Salvia is the most frequently and widely used blood vitalizing herb in traditional Chinese medicine (TCM). It’s known to increase capillary vascular net, inhibit coagulation of blood and activate fibrinolysis, lower blood pressure and cholesterol, and support blood flow and microcirculation (capillary). (1-3) Ginseng plus panax notoginseng root extract This botanical (TCM) is shown to support microcirculation to remove stagnant blood and improve circulation (including cerebral circulation) and inhibit chronic cellular senescence. It’s also a strong antioxidant with anti-inflammatory benefits. (4,5) Hawthorn berry extract (Crataegus monogyna/Fructus crataegi) In Western herbalism, Hawthorn is considered the “king” of heart herbs. It may improve micronutrition to the heart and surrounding capillaries via microcirculation, support the dilation of arteries, improve blood flow to the heart, and lower blood pressure and serum cholesterol. (6) Ginkgo leaf extract (Ginkgo biloba) This herb contains an array of phytochemicals (including bilobalide, ginkgolide A, ginkgolide B, and ginkgolide C) indicated to exert beneficial effects on the circulatory system. Studies show that this extract can support memory and cognition, the cardiovascular system, healthy blood, venous integrity, healthy tissue fluid levels, and promote antioxidant activity for nerves and tissue. (6,7) He shou wu root extract (Fo-ti) This is considered a great longevity herb in TCM and contains a powerful phytochemical called tetrahydroxystilbene 2-O-β-D-glucoside (TSG) with cardioprotective effects. It’s known as a diuretic and has been shown to lower blood cholesterol. (9-11) Boswellia resin extract/Boswellia serrata root extract (frankincense, mastic, olibanum) This herbal extract is used in Indian Ayurvedic medicine to treat chronic inflammatory illnesses. Often combined with Myrrh to improve blood circulation. It’s known to be analgesic, emmenagogue, and antiseptic. (12) Myrrh resin extract (Commiphora myrrh gum/resin)Research indicates that myrrh protects the cardiovascular system from damage during inflammatory events by activating anti-inflammatory and antioxidant signaling pathways. It’s shown to lower blood cholesterol and prevent plaque deposition. Moreover, myrrh is known to be analgesic and emmenagogue, and to increase peristalsis. (13,14) Cinnamon bark oil Studies show that cinnamon supports cardiovascular health by lowering blood lipids, suppressing vascular smooth muscle growth, and platelet aggregation. It’s also known to be antibacterial, antiviral, and anti-fungal, and to improve digestive function. (15) L-citrulline The organic compound citrulline is an α-amino acid. Its name is derived from citrullus, the Latin word for watermelon. L-citrulline is known to increase levels of nitric oxide, protect against the progression of atherosclerosis and against endothelial senescence, and restore telomerase activity under normal glucose conditions. (16)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (5 ml [1 tsp.]): %RI* L-Citrulline 100 mg ** Proprietary blend Dan Shen root extract (Salvia miltiorrhiza), Hawthorn berry extract (Crataegus monogyna), He Shou Wu (Fo-ti) root extract (Polygonum multiflorum), Ginkgo leaf extract (Ginkgo biloba), Myrrh resin extract (Commiphora myrrha), Ginseng Plus® Panax Notoginseng root extract, Boswellia resin extract (Boswellia serrata), Cinnamon bark oil 775 mg **

product.title: D3K2 EU
product.description:
• Bone health support: Can help maintain optimal bone density & calcium deposition
  • Cardiovascular wellness: Promoting arterial health & discouraging tissue calcification
  • Immune function strength: Supporting robust immune responses & overall body defense
  • Mood & energy: Can enhance mental well-being & daily vitality
  • Superior absorption: Nanoemulsified delivery for maximum bioavailability & rapid uptake

This liquid formula combines vitamin D3 and K2 to support bone strength,heart health, and immune function. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance: Vitamin K and vitamin D deficiency can lead to less calcium being deposited in the bone matrix and the calcification of tissue. D3K2 contains two super-absorbable forms of vitamin D and vitamin K, which can work together to support normal, healthy bones and counteract calcification of tissues. This liquid supplement contains 2,500 international units (IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per spray and 90 µg of vitamin K2.

Why it works: Vitamin D3 for the immune system, bones, muscles & teeth Vitamin D is one of the most important vitamins in the body and is essential for overall health and mood. It contributes to the normal function of the immune system, supports muscle function, and helps maintain healthy bones and teeth.It is also essential for the absorption and utilisation of calcium and phosphorus, which in turn contribute to normal blood calcium levels. Vitamin D also plays an important role in cell division . Vitamin K2 complements vitamin D3 Vitamin K is a group of fat-soluble vitamins that contribute to maintaining healthy bone density, promoting arterial health, and supporting heart health . Both vitamins are essential for the body, and they are also dependent on each other to function optimally. A deficiency in vitamin K and vitamin D has been linked to the calcification of soft tissue and reduced bone mineral density. This is because vitamin D promotes the absorption of calcium, while vitamin K plays a role in directing calcium into the bones. D3K2 by Quicksilver Scientific offers an effective way to replenish these vitamins. By using an advanced nanoemulsion system for maximum absorption, this formulation combines ideal ratios of vitamin D (cholecalciferol D3) and vitamin K2 (menaquinone MK-7) to support and maintain healthy levels year-round.

The science behind the product: Vitamin D is mostly recognized as being essential to the function of the human immune system and to maintaining healthy bones. However, the health benefits of vitamin D stretch much further than covering these two areas of concern. Vitamin D receptors can be found in at least 36 types of body tissue and can also influence the gene expression of thousands of genes. Some of these genes include those that are associated with detoxification enzymes in the body. Research has indicated that vitamin D3 is better at raising the body’s serum 25(OH)D concentration than vitamin D2 (calciferol).Liposomal delivery bypasses GI absorption barriers and begins circulating the body as soon as it hits the tongue.

How to use:Take 1 to 2 pumps by mouth once daily.Hold in the mouth 30 seconds before swallowing.Repeat to desired dosage or as directed by a healthcare professional.Take on an empty stomach, at least 10 minutes before meals.Use within 6 months of opening.If pregnant, consult a physician before use.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (0,5 ml [1 pump]): %RI* Vitamin D (as cholecalciferol [D3]) (2500 IU^) 62,5 µg 1250 Vitamin K (as menaquinone-7 [K2]) 90 µg 120

product.title: Thermo Weight Control
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a red chili extract that stokes your fat metabolism 

The formula of Thermo Weight Control can: 

Health benefits at a glance:“Consume fewer calories and lose weight” — that’s the conventional wisdom. While calorie deficit is key to weight loss, it’s not that simple. You have maybe reduced your daily calorie intake but can’t seem to reach your weight goals. One reason is that your body compensates by saving calories for a “rainy day”, which can be very frustrating if you’re trying to get rid of them.Life Extension’s Thermo Weight Control can promote healthy fat-burning. This novel formula offers Capsifen®, which is a patented red chili extract that can help “keep your fires burning”. The capsules are vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Why it works:Reducing caloric intake isn't always enough to reach your weight loss goals. Calorie restriction can slow energy expenditure, which makes maintaining a healthy weight more difficult. So how do you keep your body burning fat? You have to encourage thermogenesis — the metabolic process where stored fat is turned into energy. Capsaicin is a compound in red chili that can help burn energy by activating a type of body fat called brown adipose tissue. This makes it an ideal companion to a healthy diet and exercise regimen.

The science behind the product: Increase caloric expenditure and burn fat For the body to continue burning fat, you have to promote and maintain the metabolic process of thermogenesis, where your cells turn stored fat into energy. The compound capsaicin in red chili does exactly this: it can encourage your body’s existing pathways for burning fat for energy by activating brown fat (brown adipose tissue). This special type of fat burns calories and stores energy, among other, and essentially it signals your body to keep on burning fat instead of “save some for later”. Digestive comfort for the stomach Capsaicin is the key factor when it comes to “spicy” food. Therein lies the obvious problem; getting enough capsaicin to trigger and maintain your body’s fat burning machines can be challenging. Thermo Weight Control formula has combined a standardized capsaicin red chili extract with special galactomannan fibers, which are carbohydrate (soluble fiber) fractions representing 45–60% of the fenugreek seed. The combination can protect your delicate digestive system from the potentially harsh effects of concentrated red chili extract and slows the digestion of capsaicin. This again can give your body more time to utilize and absorb the active compounds in Thermo Weight Control. Studies show results of healthy weight results A galactomannan-red chili combination was tested in a small clinical study over a period of 28 days and compared with placebo. The study participants who took 200 mg a day exhibited a significant reduction in body weight. (1) Moreover, they displayed a reduction in body mass index. (1) In addition, unlike other harsher forms of capsaicin-based supplements, there was little to no stomach discomfort reported by those taking the galactomannan-red chili combo. Weight management with the science behind The Thermo Weight Control supplement is created to help you continue to burn fat, even when you’re consuming fewer calories. Each serving delivers 4 mg of capsaicinoids combined with galactomannan fibers for digestive comfort — the same dose observed to be effective in the clinical study mentioned above. So, spice up your approach to weight management now and boost your metabolism!

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts.This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program. Individual results are not guaranteed, and results may vary.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (2 capsules): %RI* Capsifen® [std. to ≥ 2% capsaicinoids from cayenne pepper (fruit) extract] 200 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (2 capsules): %RI* Capsifen® [std. to ≥ 2% capsaicinoids from cayenne pepper (fruit) extract] 200 mg **

Andrographolide can help fight cellular stress, supporting healthy lung tissue and function.

product.title: EpiAge epigenetic age test
product.description:
• Biological age: Can reveal true cellular age through DNA analysis, not chronological years
  • Scientific accuracy: Triple method analyzes 13 specific CpG islands for precise results
  • Easy home test: Simple saliva collection kit with all materials & return envelope included
  • Expert analysis: Biotech laboratory provides state-of-the-art evaluation
  • Lifestyle insights: Results can confirm healthy habits or motivate meaningful lifestyle changes
  • Next-generation technology: Illumina NGS sequencing previously reserved for advanced biochemical research

EpiAge epigenetic age test is a next-generation home test designed to determine biological age based on cutting-edge epigenetic science. 

Health benefits at a glance:First of all – what is chronological vs biological age? Chronological age is years in number, but we don't just age chronologically. Biological years is the age of the cells that make up your body based on various properties and biomarkers that have been researched to correlate with aging and decline.Biological age is thus an important benchmark on your way to a long and healthy life. But many factors, such as daily habits or stress levels, affect it.If you want to know your true age and are wondering what impacts your lifestyle choices have had on your biological age, you can first take a reliable and accurate biological age test.epiAge™ is a next-generation epigenetic age test for home use designed to determine our biological age. Using the latest research findings in biotechnology, it enables the detection of how fast you have aged so far.Based on a simple saliva test, you will receive the result of your epigenetic age within just a few weeks. epiAge™ collaborates with the biotech laboratory of Professor Dr. Moshe Szyf, one of the world's leading epigeneticists at McGill University in Montreal. Your sample is analyzed in his research laboratory according to the latest scientific and technological standards.The test result, your calculated epigenetic age, will either confirm that you are on the right track or provide momentum to do meaningful lifestyle changes.

Why it works:Aging is a complex biological process, and sometimes people may age at an accelerated or slower rate as compared to the actual number of years they have lived. This means that their biological age is different from their chronological one.The influence we have over our biological age can in other words be a positive impact, but also a negative one if we are not making healthy lifestyle choices, as many unhealthy choices are correlated with higher biological ages.epiAge epigenetic age test EU/UK offers an easy-to-use DNA analysis kit to calculate your scientifically precise years. Its patented test procedure uses the methylation markers on your DNA to determine your actual biological/epigenetic age – with utmost scientific accuracy.Methylation changes are associated with age, but the good news is that studies suggest that methylation processes are generally reversible. With the advantage of cutting-edge scientific expertise from a biotech laboratory, you have the possibility to plan new health-promoting and anti-aging strategies as well as regularly monitor their effectiveness.

The science behind the product:Laboratory with Prof. Dr. Moshe SzyfThe HKG epiTherapeutics laboratory analyses your samples according to state-of-the-art research findings.The estimation of your epigenetic age is based on your saliva test, and you will receive it within a few weeks. Your biological age is calculated from your epiAge™ score in relation to a representative control group. Deliberately, you are not being asked about your chronological age during test registration to avoid any bias. Please note, that the genetic data is not collected.Next-generation sequencing (NGS)The methodology for determining epigenetic age developed for epiAge epigenetic age test EU enables a precise evaluation based on exactly 13 specific so-called CpG islands on your DNA.The test uses Illumina® Next Generation Sequencing, DNA sequencing diagnostic technique previously reserved for biochemical scientific research.Triple Sequencing Method (TSM)Another special feature of the epiAge™ test is the triple analysis of your DNA. Relative deviations in the reading of the DNS are technically unavoidable.With triple sequencing, the DNA is analyzed three times separately and the average value is determined from the individual results in order to present as accurate a picture as possible of the methylations of your genome, which correlate with age.The procedures increase the accuracy of the analysis of your DNA methylations to determine your epigenetic age and enable very precise results with 2 decimal places. Utmost technical accuracyepiAge epigenetic age test EU performs three independent tests on your saliva sample.To compensate for relative deviations, your epiAge score (from which your biological age is derived) is determined from the average of these three test cycles.If your biological age is significantly higher than your chronological ageA significantly higher biological age is an abnormality suggesting that it may be advisable to implement certain changes in your lifestyle. But please keep in mind that epigenetic age is also subject to fluctuation. If you had a bad cold a few weeks ago, it may suffice to influence the test result.If your biological age is lower than your chronological ageA lower biological age may suggest that you have done some things right in the past. You should see this as an incentive to maintain your health routines and possibly even expand them.Depending on whether your biological age is higher or lower than your chronological age, you can evaluate your own lifestyle, and if needs be, draw conclusions for changes. With sustainable health routines, you can influence your aging process step by step and develop positively.Your own well-being will certainly confirm whether you are making progress. In addition, changes can be accurately determined with a follow-up test after a few months.Your age is more than a number – change it! Day by day and year by year.

How to use: The age test comes with a detailed manual in English, all materials required to collect the saliva sample, and a return envelope (postage not included ) for the saliva sample. Upon registration of the test kit with the included secure ID via the epiAge website, you will be informed by email when your test result is available, usually after 4 weeks. If you have questions about your test result, our team of health advisors will be happy to assist you. A sample test result can be found here.Note:epiAge epigenetic age test EU test is not a medical health analysis and should not be construed as a medical examination, diagnosis, treatment, preventative, measure, or risk assessment of disease. The test is solely intended to determine epigenetic age and is based on the analysis of the DNA methylations around your DNA.

product.title: Easy Fiber
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in a glucomannan fiber supplement with no artificial sweeteners

The glucomannan from konjac root in Easy Fiber can:

  • Encourage regularity (3 scoops a day)

  • Promote satiety (1/2 scoop before meals)

  • Support heart health (3 scoops a day)

  • Help maintain already-healthy blood sugar (up to 3 scoops a day)

  • Offer a dose-adjustable fiber powder with no artificial flavors, colors, or sweeteners

Easy Fiber is a plant-based glucomannan fiber powder from konjac root that can promote regularity, digestive and cardiovascular health, and support the feeling of fullness. It’s vegetarian, sugar-free, gluten-free, and has a natural orange flavor.

Health benefits at a glance:Easy Fiber is a plant-based glucomannan fiber supplement from konjac root and an easy way to meet your daily dietary fiber needs. It can provide similar benefits to psyllium husk fiber — with a lower daily dose. This powdered fiber mix has a lightly orange-flavored taste. Unlike other fiber supplements, Easy Fiber contains no artificial flavors, colors, or sweeteners. Furthermore, it’s plant-based / vegetarian, sugar-free, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Why it works:“Get more fiber” is age-old advice that is still going strong! (1) A fiber-rich diet is important for the digestive health process!Fiber is probably the best digestive health supplement for regularity; soluble fiber gets broken down in the gut to help move things along at a healthy rate. The fiber helps with bowel movements by absorbing water into the stool (making it easier to pass). It might seem contradictory, but fiber also bulks stool so it's not "loose".Moreover, fiber can also work as a prebiotic to feed healthy gut bacteria, probiotics — helping them aid everything from digestion to immune defenses and in this way promote overall digestive health. But fiber goes beyond gut health and digestion. Easy Fiber powder contains a glucomannan low-dose dietary fiber that moves through the digestive tract like other fibers with some other great health benefits. It can support satiety, healthy blood sugar levels, and heart health.

The science behind the product: Adjustable dose & konjac rootMany fiber supplements are made with psyllium husk, but this form of fiber tends to be bulkier and requires a larger daily dose to achieve the same benefits as Easy Fiber. Life Extension’s formula contains konjac root (Amorphophallus konjac), a form of fiber often used in Asian cuisine. Konjac can deliver the same benefits (including regularity, satiety, heart, and gut health) as other fibers, but at a lower dose. (2) Clinical trials, regularity, digestion & satiety Easy Fiber can help promote regularity and support your digestive health partially through its role as a prebiotic. Healthy regularity and a prebiotic effect were observed in clinical trials that provided supplemental glucomannan fiber to adults on a low-fiber diet. (3,4) Another reason people take fiber is to promote satiety — the feeling of fullness and being satisfied after eating. And if you’re not hungry, you’ll eat less. Glucomannan fiber from konjac root excels at promoting satiety. (2,5)Blood sugar levels & already-healthy cholesterol Glucomannan soluble fiber is also known for its heart health benefits. In a meta-analysis of 12 randomized controlled trials, consumption of two or more grams of glucomannan fiber daily for three to 12 weeks helped to maintain already-healthy LDL and HDL cholesterol levels. (6)In a group of 25 healthy middle-aged men, adding glucomannan to rice before eating it helped maintain healthy blood sugar levels, compared to simply eating rice by itself.Furthermore, when study participants increased the amount of glucomannan ingested it produced even better results. (7) So, get help keeping things moving in the right direction with Easy Fiber – and all the other benefits!

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program.Individual results are not guaranteed, and results may vary.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (5,6 g powder): %RI* Glucomannan [from umbrella arum (Amorphophallus konjac)] (root) 3000 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (5,6 g powder): %RI* Glucomannan [from umbrella arum (Amorphophallus konjac)] (root) 3000 mg **

product.title: Glucosamine/Chondroitin Capsules, EU
product.description:
• Joint comfort & function: Can promote comfortable knees, hips & hands for daily movement.
  • Cartilage support: Encouraging optimal cartilage structure & healthy joint cushioning.
  • Joint mobility: Can support better flexibility & ease of movement as you age.
  • Fluid balance: Helping maintain healthy joint fluid for smoother mobility.
  • Long-term joint health: Promoting preservation of joint structure over time.

Glucosamine/Chondroitin Capsules can support comfortable joint function and optimal cartilage health. Made in EU.

Glucosamine & Chondroitin benefitsGlucosamine and chondroitin are major components of cartilage that support the joints. They have been shown in clinical studies to support healthy cartilage and joint function. (1-3)GlucosamineGlucosamine is an important component of cartilage and a key element for joint function and repair. It is naturally produced by our bodies, but the amount decreases as we age. As a result, cartilage in areas such as the knees, hips, and hands begins to dry out, until it hardens. That, in turn, creates joint discomfort and stiffness. An analysis of multiple randomized controlled trials found that glucosamine supplementation helps support healthy joint structure and encourages comfortable knee function. (2)ChondroitinChondroitin is a major natural component of cartilage. It contains essential building blocks for healthy comfortable cartilage and helps to stimulate its production. Acting as a carrier of liquid nutrient to the joints, it supports healthy fluid balance for better joint movement and mobility.Similarly, a comprehensive review of studies on chondroitin supplementation found that it also helps maintain healthy joints and supports joint comfort. (4)Results from a six-year trial using the combination of glucosamine and chondroitin showed that in those who used the combined supplement for greater than two years, there was a significant preservation of healthy joint structure. (5)

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 Capsule): %RI* Glucosamine sufate 500 mg ** Chondroitine sulfate 400 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 Capsule): %RI* Glucosamine sufate 500 mg ** Chondroitine sulfate 400 mg **

product.title: Magnesium (Citrate), EU
product.description:
• Bone strength: Can promote bone mineral matrix & calcium metabolism
  • Heart health: Supporting steady heart rhythm & cardiovascular well-being
  • Nerve function: Can encourage healthy nerve signals throughout the body
  • Muscle support: Helping maintain normal muscle function & comfortable movement
  • Energy metabolism: Participates in over 300 enzymatic processes for cellular energy.
  • Blood sugar balance: Can support glucose levels already within normal range.

Magnesium (Citrate), EU provides one of the body's most important minerals in highly absorbable citrate form. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:If you are looking for a supplement that covers and supports a wide range of organs vulnerable to the aging process, look no further. Magnesium in Magnesium Citrate can promote heart- and vascular health, contribute to strengthening your bones, help maintain normal muscle and nerve function, and much more. Simply put, magnesium is one of the body’s most important minerals – so let magnesium help you take charge of the aging process! (1,2)

Why it works:As your body ages, your bones may begin to lose strength. It’s also common that your cardiovascular system can experience a certain level of fatigue and that nerve function is not as speedy as before.Because magnesium citrate supports bone strength, cardiovascular- and nerve function, it’s exactly where Magnesium Citrate comes into the picture.In fact, magnesium supports over 300 hundred bodily functions, including enzymatic processes within cells, helping to keep them strong and healthy. Moreover, it can also help keep your heart rhythm steady and help support a healthy immune system. (3)Magnesium can also contribute to maintaining blood sugar and blood pressure levels already within normal range and is known to be involved in energy metabolism and protein synthesis. (1,2)All of these support functions play a role in fighting the natural aging process, because they combat many different age-related woes at the same time.

The science behind the product:Magnesium can positively support bone mineral matrix and its ability to metabolize minerals which are necessary for repair and rebuilding. (4,5)Scientists reported that people need to get sufficient amount of minerals including calcium and magnesium. They are essential for your body and therefore, they can help to maintain strong and healthy bones.Additionally, studies reported that dietary magnesium intake and supplementation indeed can improve the metabolic profile. It was shown that magnesium can positively influence insulin resistance, serum lipid profiles, inflammation, endothelial function, oxidative stress. (6-9)

How to use: Take one (1) capsule one to two times daily with or without food, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Can be taken all at once or in divided doses.

product.title: Vitamin D3, EU
product.description:
• Bone density: Can encourage strong, healthy bones & calcium transport
  • Cognitive function: Promoting mental clarity & cognitive ability as you age
  • Immune support: Can support balanced immune system activity for overall well-being
  • Heart health: Helping maintain blood pressure already within normal range
  • Cell health: Supporting healthy cell differentiation throughout the body
  • Year-round levels: Maintaining optimal vitamin D levels even during winter months.

Vitamin D3 delivers 1,000 IU (25 mcg) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel to help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin D3 can help sustain adequate vitamin D levels throughout the year, which can be difficult for the body to produce - especially during the winter.A supplement of vitamin D3 can promote healthy bone density, improve cognitive health, encourage healthy cell differentiation, and support immune function for better health.

Why it works:Vitamin D3 can be synthesized by humans in the skin upon exposure to ultraviolet-B (UVB) radiation from sunlight. Because of weather conditions during the winter season and sunblock, the body’s ability to produce vitamin D levels within the normal range may be inhibited. Here's why you should be making sure you get enough of this essential vitamin every day:Cognitive healthVitamin D is important for maintaining cognitive health and function as you age. Healthy serum vitamin D levels have been shown to correspond with better scores on cognitive health tests and better maintenance of cognitive ability in aging individuals. (1-4)Bone and immune healthVitamin D (along with vitamin K and essential minerals) is essential for facilitating the transport of calcium into the bone matrix. (5) This is an important step in maintaining strong, healthy bones and teeth. Vitamin D also plays a critical role in healthy immune function. (5,6)Heart health & blood pressure supportVitamin D helps to regulate the body's calcium balance while facilitating calcium absorption into the bloodstream, promotes a healthy inflammatory response in the cardiovascular system and encourages healthy endothelial function. (7,8) Vitamin D may also help inhibit excess renin levels. Healthy renin levels help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range. (9)

The science behind the product:This vitamin D3 supplement delivers 25 mcg (1,000 IU) of vitamin D3 as cholecalciferol per softgel.Current levels of vitamin D are very low in humans. Life Extension recommends that healthy adults supplement each day with at least 2,000 IU of vitamin D. Elderly adults may benefit from higher doses such as 5,000 IU daily up to 10,000 IU daily. For most people, a 1,000 IU potency is insufficient to attain optimal vitamin D blood levels. It's suggested that you take a 25-hydroxy vitamin D blood test after 3 months to assess and adjust your dosage. Your optimal blood levels should be 50–80 ng/ml year-round.Please note, that vitamin D is contained in the multi-nutrient Life Extension Mix and the multivitamin Two-Per-Day.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 Softgel): %RI* Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) (1000 IU†) 25 µg 500
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 Softgel): %RI* Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) (1000 IU†) 25 µg 500

Mega EPA/DHA provides essential omega-3 fatty acids that can promote cardiovascular and brain health while helping inhibit inflammatory factors. Made in EU.

Caught in a marine mammal-friendly fishery, these fish are processed in a facility located close to the fisheries to preserve freshness.This pure, fresh fish oil provides the omega-3 fatty acids you need in easy-to-swallow softgels.

Why it works:There are two common omega fatty acids in our diets: omega-3s and omega-6s. They’re both essential to health, but balancing the two is even more important, especially since Westerners generally eat foods high in omega-6s and don’t get enough omega-3s.That makes omega-3 supplementation essential. For optimum health, the ratio of omega-6 to omega-3 fatty acids should be between 1:1 and 4:1. (1) Each two-softgel serving of Mega EPA/DHA contains 720 mg of EPA (eicosapentaenoic acid) and 480 mg of DHA (docosahexaenoic acid), making it an affordable and convenient way to get your daily omega-3s.

(3-5) Omega-3s also inhibit inflammatory factors to support joint health. (6) That makes taking an omega-rich fish oil supplement an important part of any joint health regimen.

Health benefits at a glance:The health benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids are manyfold and include support for heart health, brain function, and balancing of the inflammatory response. Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract adds sesame lignans and olive extract to the essential fatty acids EPA and DHA from fish oil for enhanced health benefits.The product provides 240 easy-to-swallow softgels.

Why it works:The health benefits of eating cold-water fish are robust. However, concerns remain about contaminants found in wild and farm-raised fish in public. This ought not to stop consumers from including fish in their diet. The longevity advantages of consuming cold-water fish instead of foods like beef are remarkable.Omega-3 derived from fish oil supports heart health, brain function, and helps to balance the inflammatory response. There is no debate about the broad-spectrum benefits of omega-3 fatty acids.The fish oil in this formula is made with Pure+™, a wild fish oil concentrate derived from South Pacific Ocean anchovy. Processed in Chile within hours of harvest, you can be confident that you’re getting an exceptionally fresh fish oil formula.The high quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid the fishy aftertaste some people experience when taking omega-3 supplements.

The science behind the product:IFOS™ 5-star-rated formulaLife Extension's Super Omega-3 is using a fish oil concentrate made from South Pacific anchovy. Caught off the coast of Chile in a marine mammal-friendly fishery, this fish oil is processed within hours of harvest for exceptional freshness. The fish oil in the Super Omega-3 formula has earned the highest, 5-star rating from IFOS™, an independent organization that sets the standard for fish oil purity, potency and freshness.High-quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants that are present in the fish itself. The enhanced molecular distillation method utilizes redundant processes to gently remove detectable environmental toxins.Enriched with olive extract & sesame lignans There are literally hundreds of fish oil supplements on the market. Only the formula in Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract product incorporates omega-3, olive fruit extract, and sesame lignans to enhance the health benefits of the omega-3 fatty acids. product.title: Cortisol-Stress Balance
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in keeping your day-to-day stress under control

The formula of Cortisol-Stress Balance can:

  • Encourage a healthy biological response to daily stressors

  • Help sustain already-healthy levels of cortisol

  • Inhibit inflammation to promote a healthy stress response

Cortisol-Stress Balance provides two innovative blends of plant extracts and compounds derived from green tea to help you maintain already-healthy levels of the stress hormone cortisol, promoting a healthy response to everyday stress.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is cortisol? It's a steroid hormone produced by your adrenal glands. Your body releases cortisol in response to a wide variety of stress factors. When you under stress, your body may produce elevated cortisol levels, affecting your blood pressure, mood, sleep patterns, and also weight management. To support healthy cortisol levels, the scientists at Life Extension combined two stress-fighting extract blends, formulating Cortisol-Stress Balance. The supplement offers a once-daily vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO formula.

Why it works:Millions of people just accept stress as a typical aspect of our modern lives. Yet, stress can have a measurable negative effect on your body.Cortisol-Stress Balance can help maintain already-healthy cortisol levels, inhibit factors that promote cortisol release, calm your body, and encourage a healthy response to stress with two innovative blends.

The science behind the product:The proprietary blends in Cortisol-Stress Balance deliver:Relora® magnolia & phellodendron extractThe bark of magnolia and phellodendron trees (also known as Amur cork) contain compounds that promote a beneficial response to stress. Research indicates that Relora® influences salivary cortisol levels. (1) The active ingredients in this blend can bind to neurochemical receptors that support mood and stress, leading to improved mood scores measured through standardized testing. (2)Oligonol® lychee fruit & green tea extractsNumerous individuals attest to the soothing effects of tea. Oligonol® combines lychee fruit extracts with green tea-derived compounds. In a randomized, placebo-controlled study, Oligonol® demonstrated its ability to inhibit the proinflammatory IL1β and IL6 cytokines, promoting a positive stress response and maintaining already-healthy cortisol levels (3). Cortisol-Stress Balance combines not one but two proprietary extract blends into a single, groundbreaking stress-support supplement. Life keeps moving forward, and stress doesn't take a break. Empower your body to respond healthily with once-daily Cortisol-Stress Balance.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 capsule): %RI* Relora® [proprietary blend of magnolia (bark), phellondendron (bark) extracts] 500 mg ** Oligonol® [proprietary blend of lychee (fruit), green tea (leaf) extracts] 100 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per Day (1 capsule): %RI* Relora® [proprietary blend of magnolia (bark), phellondendron (bark) extracts] 500 mg ** Oligonol® [proprietary blend of lychee (fruit), green tea (leaf) extracts] 100 mg **

product.title: Men's Vitality Packs
product.description:
• Testosterone support: Can promote youthful testosterone production for vitality & strength
  • Sexual health: Encouraging male vascular function, performance & satisfaction
  • Prostate wellness: Can support prostate function & urinary comfort
  • Hormonal balance: Helping maintain healthy testosterone & estrogen metabolism
  • Convenient format: Single-serve packets for easy daily supplementation on the go
  • Science-backed ingredients: Combines pomegranate, cacao, black ginger & saw palmetto

Men's Vitality Packs provide comprehensive support tailored specifically for men's unique health needs.

Health benefits at a glance:Men’s Vitality Packs provide tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of men’s health. Each box of product contains 30 servings of Male Vascular Sexual Support, Testosterone Elite*, and PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol. Moreover, these daily servings come in convenient single-serve packets, perfect to take on the go.*This supplement is intended to promote testosterone levels but does not contain testosterone.

Why it works:The physiology of men requires customized nutrition to function optimally. To address this, Men's Vitality Packs combine three science-based formulations to support sexual health, testosterone levels, and prostate and urinary function. With a single day’s dose of these three formulas in each packet, you’re free to take your man-centered nutrition with you on the road, to the gym, or to work without the need to carry multiple bottles.

The science behind the product:Men’s Vascular Sexual SupportK. parvifloraThis supplement contains K. parviflora, also known as Thai Black Ginger. Although K. parviflora has been used to promote male sexual health for years, only recently has the ingredient has been studied in the Western world. The results have been remarkable: two clinical studies show promise for male sexual function, response, performance, and satisfaction, with results seen after 30 days. (1,2)K. parviflora works by enhancing nitric oxide synthesis; relaxing blood vessels and enabling healthy flow, which is key to healthy male sexual response. (3,4) Additionally, it can promote a healthy brain response to sexual stimuli and help inhibit an enzyme that can affect male sexual function. (2,5)Testosterone Elite*Pomegranate peel & cacao seed extractAccording to a clinical study, a blend of pomegranate and cacao seed extracts can encourage healthy levels of free and total testosterone and support physical strength and other benefits of balanced testosterone levels. (6)LuteolinLuteolin is a flavonoid or plant compound well known for its powerful antioxidant properties. In preclinical studies, luteolin was shown to inhibit the activity of the aromatase enzyme and promote testosterone production by promoting the conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone, the precursor hormone for testosterone production. (7-9)*This product is intended to promote testosterone levels but does not contain testosterone.PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-SitosterolExtracts of the saw palmetto berry The extracts of the saw palmetto berry (Serenoa repens) in this supplement have been found to support men’s urinary flow and comfort. (10,11)Beta-sitosterol from palmetto and pineThe saw palmetto berry is rich in the bioactive compound beta-sitosterol, which has also been found to help promote a healthy urinary stream in men. (12,13)PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto with Beta-Sitosterol combines high-potency saw palmetto extract with beta-sitosterol (from pine). Boron and rosemary extractThe mineral boron has been added to support healthy hormonal metabolism, and a small amount of rosemary extract provides antioxidant activity. (14)FAQ:What’s included in the Men’s Vitality Packs?Men's Vitality Packs are convenient single-serve packets that include Testosterone Elite for promoting youthful testosterone production; Male Vascular Sexual Support, which can support male sexual function; and PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol to help maintain prostate function and healthy urinary patterns.What ingredients are in the Men’s Vitality Packs?Each formula within the Men's Vitality Packs contains nutrients that have been scientifically studied for their effectiveness in supporting men's health. Testosterone Elite combines pomegranate, cacao, and luteolin. Male Vascular Sexual Support primarily features black ginger extract. PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol combines saw palmetto, beta-sitosterol, and other beneficial nutrients.When should you take Men’s Vitality Packs — before or after a meal?This product can be taken at any time of the day, with or without food, depending on personal preference. It’s important to always follow the directions on the product label.When can I expect to see results?For testosterone support, the best effects were observed after eight weeks. Regarding male sexual health and function, some effects were noticeable as early as four weeks, with the best results seen after eight weeks. For prostate function and healthy urinary patterns, the optimal effects were seen after 12 weeks. However, individual response time may vary due to unique biochemistries and lifestyles.Will this supplement interact with my medications?There is no indication that the nutrients within these formulas would have negative interactions with prescription medications. However, if you are taking any prescription medications and have concerns about potential interactions when taking this supplement, it’s advisable to consult with your physician.Is this product suitable for seniors?The Men's Vitality Packs can be taken by men of all ages who wish to support youthful testosterone production, prostate health, and urinary health. Are there any major allergens in this product? The three products within the Men's Vitality Packs do not contain any of the major 9 allergens. This means they are free of milk, eggs, nuts, fish, crustaceans, shellfish, wheat, soy, and sesame. Where is this product manufactured? Men’s Vitality Packs are manufactured in the USA. Is this product suitable for vegetarians? While Testosterone Elite and Male Vascular Sexual Support are vegetarians, PalmettoGuard® Saw Palmetto and Beta-Sitosterol is not. The softgel of the latter contains bovine gelatin. Can this product be taken by other than men? This product was designed and intended for adult men. The studies for these products were done exclusively on men. If you are a woman and interested in the nutrients in this product, please consult with your primary care provider to discuss the best methods for supporting your health.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus
product.description:
• Stress management: Promoting a calm, relaxed state during daily challenges
  • Emotional well-being: Can help maintain a balanced mood & relief from occasional irritability
  • Focus & attention: Supporting sharp concentration & mental clarity without caffeine
  • Memory support: Can enhance working memory, reaction time & short-term recall
  • Cortisol balance: Encouraging optimal stress hormone levels throughout the day

This formula combines clinically studied ashwagandha and spearmint extracts for stress relief and mental focus.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is ashwagandha? It's an exotic herb, also known as Indian ginseng or winter cherry, that has been used for thousands of years to promote health. The herb ashwagandha is an adaptogen, which means it can help the body adapt to stress and provide well-being.It’s hard to manage the to-do list when you have a lot on your mind. However, you don’t have to be caught up in the hustle and bustle. Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus can help you stay cool under pressure. The combination of clinically studied ashwagandha and spearmint extracts can help you relax and at the same time sharpen your focus, so you'll have the presence of mind to tackle every task.

Why it works:Staying on top of your game requires focus. But how do you remain attentive to your goals in a world filled with so many distractions? That’s why Ashwagandha Plus Calm and Focus was created. Studies indicate that ashwagandha can promote a calm, relaxed state of mind while encouraging emotional well-being. Other research shows that spearmint works with the brain to support attention and concentration, without any of the nervousness that people can experience with caffeine.Life Extension combines ashwagandha and spearmint extracts into one formula to help you stay calm and focused, so you can concentrate on what’s important.

The science behind the product:Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus contains a powerful combination that can support you in dealing with the demands of everyday life: Ashwagandha helping to relieve stressSeveral clinical trials indicate that ashwagandha can provide multiple benefits and help balance the body’s response to the pressure of day-to-day living. Ashwagandha has in fact become one of the most desired botanicals for stress management. Human and animal research shows that it can encourage a healthy response to stress, cognition and memory, overall well-being, and more. (1-6)In a 60-day clinical trial, 130 adults took ashwagandha extract once or twice daily, or placebo. After 60 days, all stress-related parameters were significantly improved in the groups receiving ashwagandha. (1) Ashwagandha Plus Calm and Focus delivers 250 mg of ashwagandha extract per dose. The ashwagandha extract also helped balance biological markers of stress and promoted a healthy balance of stress-related hormones such as cortisol.Ashwagandha for mood and cognitive healthStress may affect memory, concentration, and mood. (7) In the 60-day study, at each dosage ashwagandha showed improved self-rated scores of mood and cognition. (5) Ashwagandha especially helped relieve feelings of everyday stress, occasional irritability, and promoted healthy concentration. Moreover, clinical studies suggest that ashwagandha can encourage healthy cognitive function. (6) Spearmint for concentration and memorySpearmint contains special phenolic compounds in spearmint extract that have been shown to support working memory, as well as reaction time, concentration, and short-term memory. (8-10) Ashwagandha Plus provides 900 mg of a type of spearmint extract standardized for these phenolic compounds.In a placebo-controlled, double-blind trial, participants taking a high-phenolic spearmint extract for 90 days, expressed better and more accurate working memory than placebo groups did. FAQ:What is in Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus?Ashwagandha Plus combines two clinically studied ingredients:Sensoril® ashwagandha extract to support healthy cortisol levels and a healthy mood.Neumentix™ patented extract of spearmint to promote alertness and attention. This formula can encourage a calming effect besides a stimulant-free boost in cognitive function. Does this product contain caffeine?No. The spearmint extract in this formula can support attention and memory recall, but it does not contain caffeine, which means it can keep you alert and focused without nervousness.When should I take Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus, before or after a meal? This product can be taken any time of the day, with or without food depending on your preferences. Always take any product as directed on the label.Do you take two capsules at once or in divided doses?It’s recommended to take two capsules once per day rather than individually throughout the day because scientific research indicates this is the best way to benefit from this supplement.When can I expect an effect?Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus is designed to be taken for a sustained period of time.Effects on focus were seen as quickly as 2,25 hours, but the best effects were achieved after 90 days.The calming effects were seen as early as 30 days, with the best effects seen after 60 days.However, due to our unique biochemistries and lifestyles, the time it takes to notice the benefits can vary from person to person.Will this supplement interact with my medication negatively?There is no indication that the nutrients within these formulas would negatively interact with prescription medications.Nevertheless, if you take any prescription medications and want to know more about potential interactions when taking this supplement, it’s suggested to discuss the decision with your physician.Has this product been tested for heavy metal contamination?Yes. All of the raw materials go through stringent testing to meet Life Extenion’s high-quality standards.Testing is performed for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, potency, and quantity of active ingredients in the finished product.Raw materials are released for production only when they meet Life Extension’s specifications.Are there any major allergens in this product?This product does not contain any of the major 9 allergens. This means it’s free of milk, eggs, nuts, fish, crustaceans, shellfish, wheat, soy, and sesame.Where is this product manufactured?Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus is manufactured in the USA. Is this product vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18. Please consult with your child’s physician before giving them any supplements.How is Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus different from Optimized Ashwagandha?Optimized Ashwagandha is a standalone ashwagandha formula (without other extracts) that uses the same clinically studied extract as Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus.While they both include the same amount of ashwagandha per capsule, the suggested serving size for Ashwagandha Plus Calm & Focus is two capsules once per day compared to one capsule twice daily for Optimized Ashwagandha.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

This two-product detox kit supports liver cleansing and toxin removal from your body. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance: Inadequately designed detox protocols can result in toxin recirculation throughout the body. PushCatch® Liver Detox is a simple and effective two-step liver cleanse that can help “push” toxins to the gut and “catch” them with binding agents for safe removal from the body. This cleansing system consists of Dr. Shade's Liver Sauce®, a comprehensive botanical formula that can support all stages of liver detoxification (1-3), along with EU Ultra Binder®, a broad-spectrum binder that can help capture toxins in the gut and facilitate their elimination through the stool.

product.title: Melatonin, 1 mg, EU
product.description:
• Sleep support: Balancing circadian rhythm for easier falling asleep naturally
  • Antioxidant: Can scavenge free radicals, protecting cellular DNA and cognitive health
  • Immunity: Activating T-helper cells to regulate the immune response
  • 1 mg dose: Medium-level melatonin dosage suitable for regular nighttime use by adults

Melatonin, 1 mg contains a medium dose of this naturally occurring hormone that can support your circadian rhythm and sleep patterns. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Your sleep patterns are regulated by your circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports.Natural production of this hormone declines with age. (1-3) This can disturb your circadian rhythm and, as a result thereof, your quality of sleep. (4-6) Research shows that it does not only support natural sleep but offers a range of other benefits as well. These benefits include antioxidant support, DNA protection, immune system support, and support for cognitive health.

Why it works:Melatonin is a hormone that is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock”. (7,8) Melatonin is primarily synthesized in your pineal gland and is released mostly at night to make falling asleep easier. Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, studies show that it also has many other health advantages: Sleep support The body’s own production of melatonin is reduced with the natural aging process. That’s why supplementation with this hormone can be a natural solution for people in advanced age who have trouble sleeping. Supplementing with this hormone can help people who deal with sleep trouble and help them balance their circadian rhythm. Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl), and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it also supports other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it provides protection against a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11) Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin can therefore support the immune system as a whole. (12,13) Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20)

The science behind the product:Melatonin can be delivered in a variety of ways, from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery.This melatonin product contains a medium level 1 mg dose of melatonin.

How to use:Take one (1) capsule 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Melatonin is naturally secreted from the pineal gland at night, and should be taken at night for optimal results.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders).Use caution if combining with alcohol.This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant.Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Melatonin 1 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Melatonin 1 mg **

product.title: Vitamin B12, EU
product.description:
• Nerve function: Methylcobalamin form active in central nervous system for optimal support
  • Red blood cells: Can promote healthy blood cell formation & oxygen transport
  • DNA synthesis: Essential for cell growth, replication & maintenance at cellular level
  • Homocysteine levels: Working with B6 & folate for cardiovascular, neurological & general health
  • Brain health: Can support cognitive function & mental clarity as you age naturally
  • Easy absorption: Lozenge format dissolves quickly in mouth for convenient bioavailable B12 delivery

Vitamin B12 contains 500 mcg of methylcobalamin, the bioactive form of vitamin B12 that works directly in the central nervous system. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Vitamin B12, also called cobalamin, is a water-soluble vitamin that supports nerve function, red blood cell formation, and DNA synthesis.There are eight B vitamins, each with its own set of important roles in maintaining health throughout the body. Methylcobalamin is a form of vitamin B12 that is active in the central nervous system. It is essential to the growth and replication of cells. This formula supplies 500 mcg of methylcobalamin per lozenge.

Why it works:Vitamin B12 is naturally found in animal-based foods, including dairy products and eggs. However, vegetarians and older adults are especially at risk for B12 deficiency, often due to:Low dietary intake, poor absorption of B12 (digestive challenges), or inadequate bioavailability. (1,2) With age, the body produces less hydrochloric acid, which can also affect B12 absorption. (3,4)Life Extension's Vitamin B12 lozenges can be quickly dissolved in your mouth or chewed as a convenient way to ensure optimal B12 levels.

The science behind the product:To overcome obstacles to vitamin B12 absorption, the Institute of Medicine recommended in 1998 that older adults meet their B12 needs through fortified foods or dietary supplements. (5) More recent studies confirm that even moderate B12 supplementation can enhance both B12 and folate status in aging individuals. (6)Vitamin B12, or cobalamin, works together with vitamin B6 and folate to convert homocysteine into the amino acid methionine. (7) This helps to maintain healthy levels of homocysteine, which is a recognized marker of cardiovascular, neurological, and general health. (8)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Super R-Lipoic Aci delivers 240 mg of the biologically active R-form of alpha-lipoic acid per capsule. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:R-lipoic acid is a truly unique antioxidant that safeguards the cells against free radicals, supports healthy mitochondria, and promotes energy production. (1)This means that Super R-Lipoic Acid allows cells to produce energy and function under better-than-normal conditions, providing your body with the power it needs while protecting the cells for better cell function. The product is non-GMO, gluten-free, and vegetarian.

Why it works:Alpha lipoic acid is an important part of cellular energy production and maintenance. Super R-Lipoic Acid is a cellular energy health support supplement. The active “R” form of lipoic acid is an antioxidant powerhouse, far more than conventional alpha-lipoic acid products. This bestselling lipoic acid product provides a powerful 240 mg dose of this “active” form of alpha lipoic acid (R-lipoic acid) in each capsule.

The science behind the product:Two different forms of alpha-lipoic acidAlpha-lipoic acid consists of two different forms of isomers (R and S) have greatly different properties: The “R” form is the biologically active component that is amenable for lipoic acid’s phenomenal antioxidant effect. The “S” form is produced from chemical manufacture. Alpha-lipoic acid supplements typically consist of the "R" and "S" form in a 50/50 ratio.The "R" form of lipoic acid is normally produced and used by the human body. R-lipoic acid plays a role in, scavenging free radicals. Furthermore, it has been shown that “R” form of lipoic acid is more potent than the combined "R" and "S" forms that ordinarily comprise alpha-lipoic acid supplements. (1-11)Next generation antioxidantResearch has indicated that a newer form of R-lipoic acid has been found. This sodium-R-lipoate can be seen as the "next-generation" antioxidant powerhouse. R-lipoic acid already has shown better bioavailability, stability, and provide a vast majority of health benefits. It was shown that the newer lipoic acid formulation reached higher peak blood levels and it also achieves them sooner, assuring rapid uptake from the plasma into the tissues. (12)

How to use:Take one (1) to two (2) capsules daily as tolerated, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.Take capsules at the same time, preferably on an empty stomach.Suitable for vegetarians.

Superior absorption with natural vitamin EThe Super Vitamin E features the non-synthetic form of alpha-tocopherol, which your body absorbs and utilizes more efficiently than synthetic alternatives. Specialized carrier proteins in the liver selectively bind to this natural form of vitamin E, transporting it through the blood to your cells. These carrier proteins only recognize a portion of synthetic vitamin E, ignoring the rest. product.title: Adrenal Energy Formula, 120 caps
product.description:
• Stress adaptation: Four adaptogenic botanicals can help your body adapt to daily stress
  • Homeostasis support: Promoting balanced physiological systems for optimal wellness & resilience
  • Energy & vitality: Can help maintain healthy energy levels even on stressful days
  • Cognitive health: Supporting memory, focus, learning & mental clarity during stress
  • Oxidative defense: Can protect against oxidative effects from nervous tension
  • Comprehensive formula: Holy basil, cordyceps, bacopa & ashwagandha work synergistically together

Adrenal Energy Formula, 120 caps combines four clinically studied adaptogenic botanicals to help your body maintain homeostasis and adapt to stress.

Health benefits at a glance: The body naturally strives for homeostasis, which is a balanced state across its physiological systems. Maintaining this equilibrium is vital for health, but stress can disrupt the body’s ability to maintain homeostasis. This formula provides four botanical adaptogens shown to help the body adapt to stress and relieve its physical effects. Why it works Adrenal Energy Formula brings together four stress-balancing botanicals, such as: Holy basil (Ocimum tenuiflorum) is a plant used as an adaptogen because it can support your body in adapting to the effects of stress. Cordyceps (Paecilomyces hepialid) is a type of fungus long and an adaptogen. Bacopa Bacopa monnieri is known for supporting memory, focus, learning, and stress resilience. Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) is an Indian herb that can help inhibit some of the oxidative effects generated by nervous tension. These complementary botanical compounds can help support a healthy stress response.

The science behind the product: The importance of maintaining homeostasis Up to 80% of visits to primary care physicians may be linked to stress-related effects. (1) One key reason to seek help is that stress can challenge the body’s ability to maintain homeostasis (balance and resilience), which is essential for health and well-being. Helping the body maintain homeostasis can therefore promote a healthy physiological response to stress. Adaptogenic botanicals for stress-relief Each of the four potent stress-modulating extracts, holy basil, cordyceps, bacopa, and ashwagandha, is clinically studied for the ability to support homeostasis, even on the most stressful days. (2-8) Combined, they can complement each other to provide comprehensive adaptogenic stress defense, easing the effects of stress. The benefits of balancing the stress response Stress has been linked with shorter telomeres, the protective caps on chromosome ends, suggesting a connection between stress and aging. (9) Stress impacts neurotransmitter production. In pre-clinical research, it was shown to reduce neural plasticity, which is the capacity of neurons to build new connections in response to experiences. (10) Therefore, reducing stress may help maintain cognitive health. If you are seeking relief from the effects of stress, Adrenal Energy Formula is a comprehensive and potent supplement for maintaining healthy energy and overall vitality.
