product.title: Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management
product.description:
• Abdominal fat targeting: Can help reduce waist & hip measurements naturally
  • Moro orange extract: Encouraging fat cell management
  • Non-stimulant formula: Promoting weight goals without added caffeine or stimulants
  • Sugar-free gummies: Delicious blueberry flavor with no added sugar or guilt
  • Clean ingredients: Vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO 

Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management can support optimal body composition with just 2 tasty gummies per day.

Health benefits at a glance: Are you looking for a solution to lose weight in a healthy way? Take 1 (or 2) bites at a time with Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management and get good support. These gummies can help combat fat cell size and accumulation, especially abdominal fat.Gummy supplements often contain extra sugar for the sake of tasting good. Although adding sugar would defeat the point of a formula designed to help you achieve a healthy weight. Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management has no added sugar. These non-stimulant gummies come with a great blueberry flavor, and they are vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Why it works: Healthy weight loss takes time. A blood orange extract (Citrus sinensis) found in Mediterranean Weight Management is shown to help you lose belly fat by reducing both visceral and subcutaneous fat. In a six-month study, persons taking this extract combined with diet and exercise lost weight, and 35% of them lost 5% or more of their body weight. Moreover, by month three, those taking the extract had lost significantly more total and abdominal fat than those in the placebo group.

The science behind the product: The story behind Mediterranean Weight Management The Mediterranean diet is healthy for the whole body, focusing on a limited intake of red meats and a higher intake of herbs and spices, lean proteins such as fish and poultry, a lot of vegetables, whole grains, nuts, legumes, and not to mention nutrient-packed fruits such as oranges and other citrus fruits. While Life Extension cannot squeeze the healthy benefits of an entire diet plan into a single supplement, the inspiration from the diet is applicable. That is the story behind Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management gummies. The “secret” ingredient to target fat cells – Moro red oranges “Fat” is a type of cell, similar to other cells in your body. A fat cell is called an adipocyte, and its primary job is to store fuel from the food you eat in case you run out of calories to consume. Running out of food is fortunately rarely a problem in this part of the world — which means we often end up accumulating more fat than we would prefer, especially around the waist. Life Extension’s gummies are made using an extract derived from Moro red oranges. This is a kind of blood orange with a deep red color due to the high level of anthocyanins found in it. These blood oranges were shown to reduce fat accumulation as well as fat cell size in preclinical studies — with convincing results! The studies demonstrated a nearly 50% reduction in abdominal fat mass, along with reduced fat cell size. (1) Morosil® – a patented extract with clinical studies To imitate the results of the preclinical studies mentioned, you would need fresh-squeezed Moro blood orange juice, which not only takes a lot of effort, but orange juice is pretty high in calories. These new gummies are an easier and more sensible solution – and come with effective clinical research of their own. They contain Morosil®, a patented extract of Moro blood oranges, that has been clinically studied to help reduce hip and waist circumference in both long and short-term studies. In one study, 60 overweight volunteers took 400 mg of this patented Moro blood orange extract once a day for twelve weeks. There were no changes to either their 1,500-2,000 calorie-a-day diets or their exercise routines, but there was a change in their waistlines. Those taking Moro blood orange extract lost 7 centimeters off their waists and nearly 6 centimeters off their hips, which is significantly more than the placebo group. (2) The key to healthy weight management over time Long-term healthy weight loss takes time, and Moro blood orange extract shows great results there as well. Over 100 volunteers took Moro blood orange extract for six months in a randomized, double-blind study. This was combined with a calorie-restricted diet and 30 minutes of walking, three times a week. Not only did the Moro blood orange group show significant weight loss at four months compared to the placebo group, but at six months their results were even better: losing fat (especially abdominal fat) without losing lean muscle mass. They also recorded reduced waistlines. (3)Reduction of the visceral fat Moro blood orange extract also helps reduce visceral as well as subcutaneous fat. (3) Visceral fat is the fat that wraps around your abdominal organs deep inside your body. It differs from what we typically think of as belly fat (called subcutaneous fat because it lies just underneath the skin) because it’s behind your abdominal wall. And while no one wants excess fat in either place, visceral fat is concerning because it can affect arterial health and blood sugar management. (4) Tasty gummies with no added sugar Gummy Science™ Mediterranean Weight Management has no added sugar but comes with a tasty blueberry flavor. In addition, the gummies are also vegetarian, gluten-free, and contain no genetically modified ingredients. Please note, that they are not low-calorie food. See nutrition information for sugar and calorie content.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts. This supplement should be taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and regular exercise program.Individual results are not guaranteed, and results may vary.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (2 gummies): %RI* Morosil® [orange (fruit) extract] 400 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (2 gummies): %RI* Morosil® [orange (fruit) extract] 400 mg **

product.title: Serene Sleep
product.description:
For you, if you want an ashwagandha and black cumin supplement for restful nights

Serene Sleep can:

  • Support overall sleep effectiveness and quality to help you wake up well-rested

  • Promote a calm state of mind before you go to bed

  • Encourage already-healthy cortisol levels

  • Provide standardized, clinically studied ashwagandha and black cumin extracts

  • Offer a gluten-free, once-daily, non-GMO product

Welcome, sleep of your dreams, and goodnight, restless nights! This supplement offers an herbal combo for relaxation and restorative sleep: Shoden® ashwagandha extract and BlaQmax® black cumin seed extract. Both ingredients have been clinically studied. They are shown to help your body manage stress, so you can ease yourself into a restful night’s sleep and wake up refreshed. For occasional sleeplessness.

Health benefits at a glance:Life Extension’s Serene Sleep is an herbal formula to support restorative sleep and a healthy stress response, so you can wake up refreshed.The product contains a combination of the clinically studied Shoden® ashwagandha extract and BlaQmax® black cumin seed extract. Each ingredient is demonstrated to help support sleep onset, duration, and efficiency.

Why it works:Serene Sleep provides a melatonin-free way to “drift into dreamland”. This dual-herb formula offers extracts (ashwagandha and black cumin seed) renowned for clinical effectiveness in encouraging stress relief and sleep quality.The combo can help promote calm before bedtime and a night of restful sleep, so you can be ready to take on the day the next morning!

The science behind the product:Restorative sleep, what is that?Do you feel that you’re not getting "adequate sleep"? It’s not just about the quantity of hours you rest, but also the quality.As you sleep, your body undergoes a rejuvenating process. If these different stages of sleep are disrupted, you might feel overall tiredness and stress.Ashwagandha extract, clinically studiedAshwagandha (Withania somnifera) has a long history of use in India. This supplement features a unique type of ashwagandha known to support several aspects of healthy sleep, including the time it takes to fall asleep, the duration of sleep, and achieving restorative sleep. (1) Two clinical studies of this unique ashwagandha extract demonstrated to improve restorative sleep by 72%, reduce stress by 62%, and lower levels of cortisol (the "stress hormone") by 67%.Additionally, Life Extension’s formula uses the same dose of ashwagandha (120 mg) as used in clinical studies.Black cumin seed extract, standardizedIn clinical research, a particular standardized black cumin extract has been evaluated for its impact on sleep.This study, which was randomized, double-blind, and placebo-controlled, involved healthy participants taking either 200 mg of this standardized black cumin extract or a placebo over a 90-day period. (2)By day 7, 70 percent of those in the black cumin group noted increased satisfaction with their sleep patterns, which increased to 79% by day 14.The black cumin seed extract was shown to improve sleep efficiency by 74% and reduce the time needed to fall asleep by 56% – leading to better daytime functioning. Moreover, the black cumin group showed a healthy response to stress and there were beneficial effects on the natural (internally produced) levels of melatonin, orexin, and cortisol in the black cumin group as compared to the placebo group. (2) So, put to bed and say goodnight to restless nights: welcome to the sleep of your dreams!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQWhen should you take Serene Sleep, before or after a meal?For optimal results, take this product 20-30 minutes before bedtime, with or without food, according to personal preference. Remember to always take any product as directed on the label.Is it okay to take two softgels?This is a once-daily formulation, and it is advised to take only one softgel daily to promote restorative sleep.Will Serene Sleep make me drowsy? Unlike certain sleep formulas, Serene Sleep is not designed to make you drowsy. This product was formulated to promote a calm state of mind before bedtime to help you better ease into a restful night’s sleep, rather than immediately induce sleepiness.When can I expect an effect?Studies indicate that improvements in sleep parameters with BlaQmax® black cumin seed extract were observed as early as 7 days, with optimal effects seen after 90 days. Shoden® ashwagandha studies showed some effects as early as 22 days, with the best results after 6 weeks. However, individual responses may vary.How is Serene Sleep different from Rest & Renew, melatonin, and other sleep supplements?Rest & Renew is a restorative sleep formula that combines Shoden® ashwagandha extract with immediate- and extended-release melatonin. Serene Sleep uses the same Shoden® ashwagandha extract as Rest & Renew, but instead of melatonin, it’s combined with BlaQmax® black cumin seed extract. This makes it a great alternative for those who are sensitive to formulas containing melatonin.What’s the difference between the Shoden® ashwagandha used in Serene Sleep and Sensoril® ashwagandha used in some of your other formulas? Can they be taken together?Shoden® and Sensoril® are both trademarked ashwagandha extracts that are standardized differently and used for different primary purposes. Shoden® ashwagandha is intended to help support restorative sleep, while Sensoril® ashwagandha is meant to help support a healthy response to stress and overall well-being. Serene Sleep can be used in conjunction with our other ashwagandha formulas.Will this supplement negatively interact with my medication?There is no indication that the nutrients in this formula will negatively interact with prescription medications. If you have concerns, consult your physician.Has this product been tested for heavy metal contamination?Yes, rigorous testing ensures that raw materials meet the high-quality standards of Life Extension before production. Testing is performed for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, potency, and quantity of active ingredients in the finished product.Are there any major allergens in this product?Serene Sleep is free of the 9 major allergens specified by the FASTER Act of 2021, including milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product manufactured?Serene Sleep is manufactured in the USA.Is this product vegetarian?No. This product contains bovine gelatin.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.

product.title: Glutathione, 500 mg
product.description:
For you, if you want to actively inhibit oxidation at the cellular level

The formula of Glutathione can:

  • Protect the cells from oxidative stress

  • Help in breaking down substances adding to oxidative stress

  • Function as a cofactor for multiple essential enzymes

  • Provide a gluten-free, vegetarian, non-GMO product

Glutathione is a compound in the body referred to as the “master antioxidant”. It has a very important job: helping protect your cells from oxidative stress. This powerful antioxidant exists in two different forms, including the oxidized and reduced states. In your body, the reduced (aka active) form of glutathione excels at scavenging for free radicals, effectively fulfilling its role as an antioxidant. The formula provides 500 mg per dose.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all; what is glutathione? It’s an antioxidant compound in the body made up of three amino acids.It’s a natural detoxifier and is nicknamed the “master antioxidant” – with good reasons! In your body, glutathione safeguards cells against oxidative stress and contributes to many other biochemical reactions.This supplement offers 500 mg per dose of the requested reduced version of glutathione, which is the active form.

Why it works:Glutathione holds many anti-aging benefits and is one of the most powerful antioxidant compounds in your body.However, glutathione levels decrease as you age, and natural production can also be slowed because of disease, medications, stress, trauma, infections, a poor diet, pollution, and radiation.The reduced form of glutathione functions best as a free radical scavenger in your body, effectively fulfilling its role as an antioxidant.So, if you want to protect yourself against oxidative stress and all its negative consequences, this reduced form of glutathione is a perfect complement to a wellness-oriented lifestyle.

The science behind the product:The antioxidant benefits of glutathioneYour body produces glutathione with three amino acids: glycine, cysteine, and glutamate. (1)The reason it’s considered the body’s master antioxidant is that:Glutathione protects cellular activity from within the cells. (1-3)It regenerates/restores the activity of other antioxidants, helping them get back to their active forms, so they can continue their antioxidant functions. (1-3)This antioxidant acts as a cofactor for many essential enzymes. (1-3)Glutathione is also involved in the metabolism of certain compounds that can increase free radical activity, helping break down these compounds (that can cause oxidative stress). (4)The inactive versus active form (reduced glutathione)In the body, glutathione exists in two forms: reduced and oxidized states. (5)When it’s in its reduced form, glutathione actively scavenges for free radicals.When it’s oxidized, glutathione is inactive and cannot fulfill its role as an antioxidant.Life Extension’s glutathione formula with 500 mg provides the active form of glutathione, meaning the reduced glutathione.What are free radicals and antioxidants?In our daily lives, the body generates molecules known as free radicals, which circulate within. While they are normally the result of stress, various environmental factors such as smoke and pollutants can also trigger their formation.When the body produces too many free radicals, it can cause oxidative stress – unwanted cellular reactions – which negatively impact the body and its cells.Antioxidants are substances that inhibit cellular-level oxidation. They function by neutralizing free radicals.Glutathione is outstanding at scavenging free radicals before they can cause cellular stress, thereby protecting the cells so they can function optimally.How to use and FAQ:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.What is the dosage of this product?This product provides 250 mg of reduced glutathione per capsule, and it’s suggested to take two capsules a day.When is the best time to take Glutathione, 500 mg?This product can be taken any time of the day, with or without food, based on your preference.Will this supplement interact with my medication?There is no indication that the glutathione in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications.However, if you take any prescription medications and want to know more about potential interactions when taking this supplement, you should discuss supplementing with your physician.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Opitac® L-glutathione (reduced) 500 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Opitac® L-glutathione (reduced) 500 mg **

Furthermore, vitamin C promotes the immune system health, helps regenerate other antioxidants (including vitamin E9), and more. The Liposomal Vitamin C formula contains no gluten and is tested vegan, soy protein-free, and non-GMO.

It falls to less than 50 percent at doses greater than 1 gram, diminishing the benefits of this essential nutrient. This has made it difficult to achieve therapeutic levels of vitamin C in the body. However, the liposomal delivery of this supplement can improve the bioavailability of vitamin C, enhancing the absorption of this critical nutrient to cells. Moreover, Liposomal Vitamin C contains a buffered form (liquid) of vitamin C, which is often better tolerated by people with gastrointestinal sensitivity. Each 5 mL serving delivers 1000 mg in the form of sodium ascorbate, with each bottle providing 24 servings.

The transparency of the product speaks of its quality because only liposomes small enough to navigate between cells can achieve such a clear consistency. Benefits of the body's master detoxifierGlutathione is our most powerful internal antioxidant, and it's present in almost every cell of the body with high concentrations in the liver. It's produced in the body from the three amino acids cysteine, glutamic acid, and glycine and serves as the body's main detoxification compound. Liposomal encapsulation protects glutathione from destruction by digestive enzymes, and the tiny particles of Quicksilver Scientific's advanced delivery system provide exceptionel absorption.

Buffered to help minimize any GI discomforts associated with vitamin C.The benefits of r-lipoic acid R-lipoic acid is a potent molecule that can support healthy mitochondrial function, glutathione production, and may help the body remove metals, stimulating the bodily defense and detox system.A fully functional glutathione system synergistically supports the avtivity of vitamin C. Unsurpassed absorptionThe absorption of conventional oral vitamin C diminishes rapidly as the dose increases and only a small amount makes it into your cells where it's needed most.Liposomal Vitamin C with R-Lipoic Acid combines the power of pharmaceutical-grade vitamin C with a proprietary fast-acting liposomal delivery.

product.title: Liposomal Melatonin, EU
product.description:
• Sleep quality support: Can help balance your body's circadian rhythm for restful sleep 
  • Cellular health protection: Promoting antioxidant defense & encouraging cellular DNA integrity 
  • Immune system balance: Supporting T-helper cell activation & optimal immune responses 
  • Cognitive wellness: Can help protect brain cells & maintain mental clarity 
  • Fast absorption: Liposomal delivery enhancing bioavailability & cellular uptake efficiency 

Liposomal Melatoninᴱᵁ can support healthy sleep patterns,antioxidant protection, and immune health. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:A good night’s sleep is essential to bodily health, mental revitalization, and overall physical well-being. However, many people have trouble falling asleep as well as staying asleep. Melatonin is a hormone that is naturally produced in the body. It is derived from tryptophan and is primarily known to offer support for the circadian rhythm, also known as your “body clock” (1,2) Although it is mostly known for its sleep-promoting qualities, research shows that it also has many other health benefits. These include support for the immune system, cognitive health, and even cell DNA.

Why it works:Research shows that melatonin offers a range of health benefits:Sleep support:Sleep patterns are regulated by out circadian rhythm, which melatonin supports. Natural production of this hormone declines with age. This can disturb the circadian rhythm and as a result thereof our quality of sleep. (3-8) Supplementation with the hormone melatonin can help balance the circadian rhythm and support sleep.Antioxidant protection & cell DNA supportResearch shows that melatonin has strong antioxidant properties. It scavenges the body for some of the most common free radicals (hydroxyl and peroxyl) and it does so more efficiently than other antioxidants. Furthermore, it can support other antioxidants, helping to raise overall antioxidant protection in the body in general. (9)It is also important for supporting cellular DNA. This is because it helps inhibit a certain kind of free radical (peroxynitrite) that attacks DNA strands inside the cells. This therefore helps inhibit oxidative damage to the cells. (10,11)Immune healthMelatonin helps to activate T-helper cells. T-helper cells regulate the immune response of other cells. This means that these cells help other cells respond to invasions of foreign molecules. By activating T-helper cells, melatonin thereby supports the immune system as a whole. (12,13)Cognitive healthCognitive decline is a normal consequence of the natural aging process. But it is little known that the onset of age-related cognitive health issues might be correlated to the level of melatonin in the body. (14-16) This is because melatonin offers support to the brain’s own antioxidant protection system and helps inhibit factors in the brain that can spur on age-induced cognitive decline, such as free radicals in the brain. (17-20)

The science behind the product:Scientific research has in recent years demonstrated that there is more to melatonin than it merely being helpful in promoting high-quality sleep. What is also interesting about melatonin, is that it can be delivered in a variety of fashions, ranging from traditional capsule form with normal or extended release to liposomal delivery.Quicksilver Delivery Systems® utilizes modern science to unleash the curative power of nature. With the highly advanced phospholipid delivery system, Quicksilver Scientific supplements can help to nourish your cells with effective ingredients both faster and more efficiently. That means that with liposomal melatonin you can optimize cellular uptake and effectiveness.

How to use:Take 1 pump by mouth, hold for 30 seconds before swallowing, or as directed. May be stirred into a small amount of water. Once opened, use within 180 days. Store at room temparature, away from light.Caution:Consult your healthcare provider before taking this product if you are being treated for a medical condition (especially autoimmune or depressive disorders).Use caution if combining with alcohol. This product is not intended for children, pregnant or lactating women, or women trying to become pregnant. Do not attempt to drive or operate heavy machinery after taking this product.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (0,2 ml [1 pump]): %RI* Melatonin 1 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (0,2 ml [1 pump]): %RI* Melatonin 1 mg **

product.title: Hip + Joint for Dogs
product.description:
For you, if you want to remedy your dog's arthritis, hip dysplasia, and/or growing pains

Petz Park's Hip + Joint for Dogs can:
  • Promote joint health & improve mobility
  • Reduce inflammation & relieve pain
  • Provide a formula suitable for any age, size & breed

Hip + Joint for Dogs contains glucosamine, chondroitin, MSM, vitamin C, grape seed extracts, manganese, L-glutathione, and vitamin E. This dog supplement is fun and easy to use: it comes as a powder that can be sprinkled over the dog's favorite food and has a roast beef flavor.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Hip + Joint for Dogs is a powerful formula designed by veterinarians for dogs experiencing joint-related issues.This fun and easy-to-use powder supplement can be sprinkled over your dog's favorite food and has a roast beef flavor. Moreover, it can be combined with other supplements, it's grain-free, fun and is suitable for dogs of any age, size, and breed. Why it Works:This Pets Park dog supplement formulated to help with common joint-related problems such as arthritis, hip dysplasia, and growing pains. Every scoop is grain-free and provides a perfect balance of active ingredients known to improve and maintain joint health in puppy, adult, and senior dogs. By keeping their joints lubricated, you can boost your dog's mobility and strength. This supplement has shown benefits to dogs displaying signs of joint diseases such as:Difficulty getting up after lying downLameness in one or more legsDifficulty climbing stairsUnwillingness to exerciseIrritation when touched or petted The Science Behind the Product: Pets Park’s Hip + Joint for Dogs provides the best ingredients known for joint pain relief and to promote joint health: MSMThis supplement includes high quantities of MSM (methylsulfonylmethane), which is a natural anti-inflammatory and analgesic (painkiller). Reduction of inflammation in the dog’s joints can help relieve pain from their joint-related issue.GlucosamineGlucosamine is a natural compound and a part of cartilage. Glucosamine for dogs used in this product is known to lubricate dogs’ joints and repair cartilage that has been worn down because of aging, arthritis, hip dysplasia, or even trauma.ChondroitinChondroitin, also a component of cartilage, is known to naturally promote water retention and elasticity in cartilage. Because of that, it can help lubricate joints and build and repair the tissue lining these joints. How to Use:For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your dog's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your dog's food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 11 kgs 11-27 kgs 27-26 kgs Over 36 kgs Dosage ½ scoop daily 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily 3 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last? Dog's weight 45 scoops 0-11 kgs 13 weeks 11-27 kgs 6 weeks 27-36 kgs 3 weeks 36 kgs+ 2 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from dog to dog. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your dog.Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your dog.Do you have any feeding tips or tricks?Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try adding your powder to a spoonful of yogurt, mixing it in with banana or even peanut butter – whatever your dog's favorite treat is.You can always try adding a small amount of powder to their food too and slowly building to the recommended dosage. Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.Are joint supplements good for dogs?A joint supplement for dogs may minimize the existing symptoms and prevent further deterioration of joints.Unfortunately, many dogs develop joint problems long before showing any signs. Start with supplements early on to keep your dog healthy and moving.What supplement can I give my dog for arthritis?Pet owners can use different joint supplements for dogs to boost their mobility and improve joint health. A joint supplement for dogs should include active ingredients such as glucosamine, chondroitin, MSM, vitamin C, manganese, L-glutathione, and vitamin E, to name a few. Petz Park's Hip + Joint for Dogs offers a unique formula for dogs with joint-related problems such as arthritis and hip dysplasia.Do supplements for dogs with arthritis work?Dog arthritis supplements are an essential, drug-free part of helping your furry companion fight arthritis. This product acts as a natural anti-inflammatory agent and helps protect cartilage. Start with supplements that contain MSM and glucosamine.Are all the ingredients listed per scoop?Yes, all ingredients and their amounts listed are PER SCOOP.Where is this product produced?Hip + Joint for Dogs is manufactured in Australia. This powerful formula is suited to dogs of all ages, breeds, and sizes and is grain-free.

product.title: Probiotic for Cats
product.description:
For you, if you want to balance your cat’s microflora to promote their health in many ways

The formula of Petz Park’s Probiotic for Cats can:
  • Maintain gut health and relieve digestive issues
  • Prevent and reduce problems with hairballs
  • Soothe allergies and promote immune health
  • Help reduce excessive grooming (overgrooming)

Probiotics for Cats features a powerful blend of both prebiotics and probiotics that can help promote a healthy gut for your kitty. This digestive formula comes as an easy-to-give powder that can be sprinkled over your pet's wet or dry food. It offers 1,3 billion CFU per scoop and is suitable for any age and breed.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Probiotics for Cats is a product designed by veterinarians featuring a powerful blend of prebiotics and probiotics for your kitty. It can help promote a healthy gut and immune system plus provide support against allergies. This fun, grain-free, and easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s favorite wet or dry food. Moreover, it can be combined with other supplements and is suitable for cats of any age or breed. Why it Works:The targeted ingredients in Petz Park’s digestive formula can help:Promoting digestive and immune healthA healthy microflora (beneficial gut bacteria) is essential for well-functioning digestion, and probiotics play an important role in promoting a healthy balance of intestinal flora in the small and large intestines.Moreover, 70% of cats’ immunity is in the digestive tract, which means that their immune system is dependent on a healthy gut. Incorporating Probiotics for Cats into your pet's daily nutrition can help them achieve optimal digestive health and maintain a strong immune system to fight diseases.Preventing hairball problemsCommon signs of hairballs in cats include decreased appetite, retching, and gagging (which usually precedes the actual vomiting of the hairball).However, probiotics can help prevent cat hairballs from forming. As probiotics help improve cat digestion, they also help to pass any undigested food attached to the hair sitting on the digestive tract easily before it even becomes a hairball.Reducing allergies and overgroomingAllergy symptoms in cats include scratching, rubbing, or shaking their head, wheezing, sneezing, coughing, gas, bloating, diarrhea, or vomiting.Cats groom themselves to relieve itching. Overgrooming occurs when your kitty starts grooming excessively – licking their fur so much that it causes skin inflammation, sores, or hair loss. In extreme cases, a cat might even start to bite areas of skin. Excessive grooming often occurs as a result of allergies. The mix of Probiotics for Cats can strengthen your cat's immune system and their first line of defense against allergies to help reduce overgrooming. Product quality ensured by encapsulationPetz Park employs micro-encapsulation to ensure the probiotic strains' stability and viability, allowing them to survive stomach acid and maintain their effectiveness.The micro-encapsulation of Probiotics for Cats’ content protects its bacteria from heat, moisture, and light and is created to become active in the small intestine. This makes the formula extremely potent. The Science Behind the Product:Probiotics for Cats provides 1,3 billion CFU (colony forming units) per scoop of powder and contains:ProbioticsBacillus subtilisBacillus coagulansSaccharomyces cerevisiae boulardiiBifidobacterium longumPrebioticsBeta-glucansOrganic pea fiberOrganic green banana fiber How to Use:If this is your first time using Petz Park Probiotic, please start with half a scoop and slowly increase over a few days to the recommended dosage.For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your cat's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your cat's wet or dry food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 4 kgs Over 4 kgs Dosage 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last?? Weight 60 scoops Up to kgs 8 weeks Over 4 kgs 4 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from cat to cat. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your cat. Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your cat. Do you have any feeding tips or tricks? Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try starting with just a pinch of powder in your cat's food and gradually build up to the recommended dosage over several days.Every day add an extra pinch of powder. You can also try scooping your supplement into your cat's bowl first and adding food on top. Another suggestion is to try adding the cat’s favorite treat! Does it contain any fish or meat?The fish flavors included in our products are just that, a flavor! No animals have been hurt or used in Petz Park’s flavors, making it suitable for those with meat or fish allergies. Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.Are human probiotics safe for cats?No, human probiotics are not safe for cats. Cat digestive system and dietary needs differ from humans, so it's best to provide them with cat probiotics.How to get rid of cat allergies naturally?To naturally alleviate cat allergy symptoms, try keeping their environment clean and free of dust and allergens. Use hypoallergenic bedding, vacuum regularly, and provide a well-balanced diet.You can also consider using natural remedies like coconut oil, herbal supplements, and probiotics for cats to help reduce allergy symptoms.How to build immunity for cat allergies?To build a cat's immune system to allergies, provide a balanced diet, ensure proper hydration, minimize exposure to allergens, and keep a clean environment.Regular veterinary check-ups and vaccinations can help strengthen their immune system.

product.title: Urinary + Kidney for Cats
product.description:
For you, if your cat needs help against UTIs, bladder stones, incontinence & kidney disease

The formula of Petz Park’s Urinary + Kidney for Cats can:
  • Optimize kidney health
  • Promote healthy urinary tract function
  • Balance the cat’s pH levels
  • Reduce swelling from urinary tract infections

Urinary + Kidney for Cats is a supplement that includes important ingredients such as extracts of nettle, cranberry, dandelion root, and marshmallow root, and D-mannose to maintain the health of your cat's urinary tract and kidneys. This easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s wet or dry favorite food. It comes with a tasty fish flavor and is suitable for cats of any age or breed.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Urinary + Kidney for Cats is a powerful formula designed by veterinarians for cats experiencing urinary tract infections, bladder stones, incontinence, and kidney disease.This fun, grain-free, and easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s favorite wet or dry food.Moreover, it comes with a tasty fish flavor, can be combined with other supplements, and is suitable for cats of any age or breed. Why it Works:The targeted ingredients in Urinary + Kidney for Cats can help:Promoting urinary tract healthThe cat’s urinary tract includes kidneys, ureters, bladder, and urethra. Urinary tract infections (UTIs) can be painful for cats, particularly if they happen repeatedly. This supplement can help:Decrease crystal formation and bacterial infectionsAnd by that prevent recurring urinary tract infectionsPromote a well-functioning, healthy urinary tractEncourage a proper mineral balanceSupport a normal flow of urineOptimizing the kidney function and healthPreventing infections from entering the urinary tract, can also help protect the kidneys from developing kidney disease over time or slow deterioration if kidney disease is already present.However, renal failure is a common problem for cats and incidences increase with the cat’s age. This powder supplement uses a blend to help promote healthy kidney function as your cat ages. Furthermore, it can increase circulation in the kidneys and in general provide superior kidney support.The Science Behind the Product:The active ingredients in Petz Park's formula are:Nettle seed extract has mild anti-inflammatory benefits known to reduce swelling of the urinary tract. The ingredient is an antimicrobial, meaning it helps to slow the spread of bacteria and viruses.Marshmallow root extract is used for the protection of the lining of the urinary tract from bacteria.Cranberry extract is a native American wetland fruit that is known for stopping infections such as E. coli from entering the urinary tract and causing UTIs. Using cranberry makes it harder for bacteria to stick to the wall of a cat's bladder, which means that bacteria can be flushed out of a cat's system more quickly.D-mannose is the main nutrient in cranberries, and it can help fight UTIs. When consumed, D-Mannose becomes part of the urine where it can collect bad bacteria out of the bladder. The bacteria bind to the D-mannose rather than the lining of the urinary tract and are safely eliminated.Dandelion root extract is a mild diuretic that can help protect against kidney problems.Sodium citrate anhydrous: The salt used in this urinary tract supplement can help to keep the urine pH alkaline. Infections such as E. coli often create a more acidic environment in the urinary tract. How to Use:For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your cat's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your cat's wet or dry food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 4 kgs Over 4 kgs Dosage 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last? Weight 60 scoops Up to kgs 8 weeks Over 4 kgs 4 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from cat to cat. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your cat. Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your cat. Do you have any feeding tips or tricks? Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try starting with just a pinch of powder in your cat's food and gradually build up to the recommended dosage over several days.Every day add an extra pinch of powder. You can also try scooping your supplement into your cat's bowl first and adding food on top. Another suggestion is to try adding the cat’s favorite treat! Does it contain any fish or meat?The fish flavors included in our products are just that, a flavor! No animals have been hurt or used in Petz Park’s flavors, making it suitable for those with meat or fish allergies. Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.How to prevent crystals in the cat’s urine?To prevent crystals in cat urine and any cat symptoms of UTI, ensure your cat stays hydrated by providing fresh water and a balanced diet. Avoid feeding them exclusively dry food and consider incorporating wet food into their diet. Regular veterinarian check-ups and monitoring of their litter box can help detect and address any kidney disease in cats early on. What causes kidney disease in cats?Various factors, including aging, infections, high blood pressure, toxins, and certain medications can cause cat kidney disease. Additionally, underlying conditions like diabetes or high blood pressure can contribute to the development of kidney disease or kidney failure in cats.

product.title: Stress + Anxiety for Cats
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in natural ingredients to calm your cat

The ingredients in Stress + Anxiety for Cats can:
  • Calm fear, nerves, and anxiety
  • Bring stress relief, focus, and clarity
  • Promote restful sleep

Stress + Anxiety for Cats is a grain-free and non-drowsy calming cat supplement. The easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s wet or dry food and comes with a tasty fish flavor. The formula is suitable for cats of any age or breed and contains active nutrients such as catnip, valerian root extract, magnesium, passion flower, L-tryptophan, Withania somnifera, and chamomile.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Stress + Anxiety for Cats is a product designed by veterinarians featuring a powerful blend of catnip, valerian root extract, magnesium, passion flower, L-tryptophan, Withania somnifera, and chamomile.This fun, grain-free, and easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s favorite wet or dry food. Moreover, it comes with a tasty fish flavor, can be combined with other supplements, and is suitable for cats of any age or breed. Why it Works:This calming cat powder formula is very popular in Australia, where it’s manufactured. It can assist in:Reducing fear, nerves, and anxietyThe most common anxieties in cats include fear, like socialization and new people, separation, and aging. Being left alone, loud noises/noisy environments and new routines can impact your cat's anxiety levels.Stress + Anxiety for Cats features catnip, which is an ingredient known to help reduce anxiety, stress, and depression. This formula can promote a happier cat by helping alleviate the feelings your cat associates with situations that cause them stress.Encouraging restful sleepThis powder formula contains natural ingredients to help ease the cat’s insomnia which can come from stress or aging. Help your pet settle down and sleep through the night, and enjoy them waking up in a good mood.Combating stress-related UTIs Cats often experience urinary tract infections (UTIs) as a result of stress. Combining this supplement with Urinary + Kidney for Cats can help combat recurring UTIs once and for all by addressing the root cause. Bringing focus and clarityPaying attention when learning new skills is important. If your cat struggles with this, Stress + Anxiety for Cats can help your cat focus and listen better. In this way, you can make training more desirable and tasks less overwhelming for your kitty. Enjoy a non-drowsy supplement This supplement contains an herbal blend and other natural ingredients that can provide a non-drowsy calming formula. It takes effect in as little as 30 minutes. The Science Behind the Product:The important active ingredients in Stress + Anxiety for Cats are:Valerian root is a plant widely known for its sedation benefits. It can help alleviate insomnia, curve stress plus anxiety.Camomille flower is used to create a calming infusion due to its relaxing properties.Catnip is an herb that can help cats relax and engage in play, both of which can help reduce stress.Passion flower is a climbing vine and a natural sleep aid that can reduce stress and relax the body and the mind.Withania somnifera is an adaptogenic herb that can promote normal hormone balance, which is essential for focus and balance. L-tryptophan is a natural amino acid that is involved in producing the stress reliever serotonin.Vitamin B1 helps in keeping the brain healthy and ensuring optimal cell function.Magnesium plays an important role in the nervous system and helps support healthy brain function. How to Use:For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your cat's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your cat's wet or dry food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 4 kgs Over 4 kgs Dosage 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily When to feed the calming supplement:Separation anxiety: Feed 30 minutes before you leave each time.General anxiety: Feed with morning food.Social anxiety: Feed 30 minutes before socializing.Illness: Feed when your cat is showing signs of pain anxiety.Insomnia: Feed with evening food or before bed. FAQ:How long will a pouch last? Weight 60 scoops Up to kgs 8 weeks Over 4 kgs 4 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from cat to cat. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your cat. Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your cat. Do you have any feeding tips or tricks? Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try starting with just a pinch of powder in your cat's food and gradually build up to the recommended dosage over several days.Every day add an extra pinch of powder. You can also try scooping your supplement into your cat's bowl first and adding food on top. Another suggestion is to try adding the cat’s favorite treat!Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results. Does it contain any fish or meat?The flavors included in our products are just that, flavor! No animals have been hurt or used in Petz Park flavors, making it suitable for those with meat or fish allergies. How to calm down a cat? To minimize anxiety in cats, you can create a quiet and comfortable space, provide familiar scents, use soothing music or white noise, provide cat calming products, and engage in gentle play or petting. Avoid sudden movements or loud noises and give your cats time to relax and adjust to their surroundings. Can cats get anxiety?Yes, cats can experience anxiety. Common causes include environmental changes, separation from their owner, or traumatic experiences. Signs of anxiety in cats may include excessive grooming, hiding, aggression, or inappropriate elimination. Combining a calming supplement for cats and cat stress relief methods is a good solution to get things under control.Where is this product produced?Just like all Petz Park supplements, this formula is manufactured in Australia using high-quality ingredients, totally grain-free.

product.title: Hip + Joint for Cats
product.description:
For you, if you want to help your cat’s arthritis, hip dysplasia, joint trauma & deterioration

Petz Park's Hip + Joint for Cats can: 
  • Promote joint health & improve mobility
  • Reduce inflammation & relieve pain
  • Provide a formula suitable for any age & breed

Hip + Joint for Cats contains glucosamine, chondroitin, MSM, vitamin C, grape seed extracts, manganese, L-glutathione, and vitamin E. This fun and easy-to-give cat powder supplement can be sprinkled over the cat's favorite wet or dry food and has a tasty fish flavor.

Health Benefits at a Glance:Hip + Joint for Cats is a strong food supplement formulated by veterinarians for cats experiencing joint-related issues. It can also help aging cats with general deterioration in their joints.This fun, grain-free, and easy-to-give powder can be sprinkled over or mixed with your cat’s favorite wet or dry food. Moreover, it comes with a tasty fish flavor, can be combined with other supplements and is suitable for cats of any age or breed. Why it Works:The product is designed to help with common joint-related diseases such as arthritis, hip dysplasia, and joint trauma: Promoting health & restoration of jointsThe active ingredients in Hip + Joint for Cats include glucosamine for cats, MSM, chondroitin, vitamin C, grape seed extracts, manganese, L-glutathione, and vitamin E in a highly concentrated way to deliver optimal results.These essential nutrients are known to maintain and promote healthy bones and joints. Glucosamine for cats can help restore joints and deter discomfort caused by arthritis and other joint problems.Support against inflammation & growth stimulationHigh quantities of MSM make Hip + Joint for Cats unique and effective. MSM gives signals to the body to produce more cortisol, and this can help to lower inflammation in the joints.And by reducing inflammation, you can help your cat stay pain-free from joint-related issues. Chondroitin, on the other hand, can help to stimulate cartilage growth and elasticity, ensuring sufficient shock absorption and nourishment to the joints. The Science Behind the Product:This Pets Park cat formula provides the best ingredients known for joint pain relief and to promote joint health:MSMThe sulfur compound MSM (methylsulfonylmethane) is a natural anti-inflammatory and analgesic (painkiller) supporting the reduction of inflammation (thereby pain) in the cat’s joints.GlucosamineGlucosamine is a natural compound and a part of cartilage. It’s used by the body to make other chemicals involved in building tendons, cartilage, ligaments, and synovial fluids to strengthen cat joints.Glucosamine for cats in this product is known to lubricate cats’ joints and stimulate cartilage repair that has been worn down because of aging, arthritis, hip dysplasia, or trauma. ChondroitinChondroitin is also a major component of joint cartilage and known to naturally promote water retention and elasticity in cartilage. Because of that, it can help lubricate the joints and build and repair the tissue lining these joints. How to Use:For optimal results, we recommend closely following the recommended dosage according to your cat's weight. Sprinkle your powder on top of your cat's wet or dry food or mix it in if they prefer. Weight Up to 4 kgs Over 4 kgs Dosage 1 scoop daily 2 scoops daily FAQ:How long will a pouch last? Weight 60 scoops Up to kgs 8 weeks Over 4 kgs 4 weeks How long will it take to see results? This varies from cat to cat. Some owners see results within a couple of days, others in a couple of weeks. A factor of this could depend on the severity of their issues; another could be the size of your cat. Always allow 4-6 weeks before expecting to see improvements in your cat. Do you have any feeding tips or tricks? Since all of Petz Park’s supplements are in powder form, you can use them in lots of different ways. Try starting with just a pinch of powder in your cat's food and gradually build up to the recommended dosage over several days.Every day add an extra pinch of powder. You can also try scooping your supplement into your cat's bowl first and adding food on top. Another suggestion is to try adding the cat’s favorite treat! Is glucosamine good for cats?Glucosamine is commonly used as a joint supplement for cats, especially those with arthritis or joint issues. It can help improve joint health and mobility in cats. Consult with a veterinarian before giving any cat joint supplements to your cat to ensure proper dosage and suitability for their specific needs.Is glucosamine safe for cats?Glucosamine supplements are generally safe for cats, but it's important to consult a veterinarian before administering any drugs.They can provide the appropriate dosage for your cat's specific needs and ensure no underlying health conditions could be affected by glucosamine. The majority of these supplements also contain chondroitin for cats as an active ingredient.How long can a cat live with arthritis?Cats with arthritis can live for many years, but the severity of the condition and the effectiveness of treatment will determine their quality of life. With proper care, joint supplements, pain management, and medication, cats with arthritis can lead comfortable lives well into their senior years.Does it contain any fish or meat? The fish flavors included in our products are just that, a flavor. No animals have been hurt or used in Petz Park’s flavors, making it suitable for those with meat or fish allergies.Can I use more than one supplement at a time?All the Petz Park supplements can be used alongside each other without any problems. Please follow the recommended dosage for each product that you use for optimal results.

product.title: Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract 60, EU
product.description:
• Cardiovascular health: EPA & DHA omega-3s can promote heart function
  • Brain function: Can encourage cognitive health & neurological support
  • Balanced inflammation: Helping maintain optimal inflammatory responses throughout the body
  • Olive polyphenols: Equivalent to 4+ tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil per serving
  • Sesame lignans: Protecting omega-3s from oxidation & enhancing beneficial pathways
  • IFOS 5-star rated: Highest purity & freshness from sustainably sourced South Pacific anchovy

Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract adds sesame lignans and olive extract to the essential fatty acids EPA and DHA from fish oil for enhanced health benefits. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:The health benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids are manyfold and include support for heart health, brain function, and balancing of the inflammatory response. Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract adds sesame lignans and olive extract to the essential fatty acids EPA and DHA from fish oil for enhanced health benefits.

Why it works:The health benefits of eating cold-water fish are robust. However, concerns remain about contaminants found in wild and farm-raised fish in public. This ought not to stop consumers from including fish in their diet. The longevity advantages of consuming cold-water fish instead of foods like beef are remarkable.Omega-3 derived from fish oil supports heart health, brain function, and helps to balance the inflammatory response. There is no debate about the broad-spectrum benefits of omega-3 fatty acids.The fish oil in this formula is made with Pure+™, a wild fish oil concentrate derived from South Pacific Ocean anchovy. Processed in Chile within hours of harvest, you can be confident that you’re getting an exceptionally fresh fish oil formula.The high quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants.

The science behind the product:IFOS™ 5-star-rated formulaLife Extension's Super Omega-3 is using a fish oil concentrate made from South Pacific anchovy. Caught off the coast of Chile in a marine mammal-friendly fishery, this fish oil is processed within hours of harvest for exceptional freshness. The fish oil in the Super Omega-3 formula has earned the highest, 5-star rating from IFOS™, an independent organization that sets the standard for fish oil purity, potency and freshness.High-quality fish oil is distilled to eliminate synthetic and natural contaminants that are present in the fish itself. The enhanced molecular distillation method utilizes redundant processes to gently remove detectable environmental toxins.Enriched with olive extract & sesame lignans There are literally hundreds of fish oil supplements on the market. Only the formula in Super Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Sesame Lignans & Olive Extract product incorporates omega-3, olive fruit extract, and sesame lignans to enhance the health benefits of the omega-3 fatty acids. Polyphen-Oil™ olive extract (fruit and lead): 2 softgels supply the polyphenol content equivalent to that of more than 4 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil. Research indicates that a combination of fish oil and olive oil can support a healthy inflammatory response better than fish oil aloneSesame lignans and natural lemon flavor: The role of sesame lignans is to augment the benefits of fish oil by several mechanisms such as guarding the unsaturated fatty acids in the body against oxidation and directing them towards pathways that help with inflammatory reactions. A natural lemon flavor is added to avoid the fishy aftertaste some people experience when taking omega-3 supplements.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract, 60 caps, EU
product.description:
• Superior absorption: Delivers 45.5x more bioavailability than standard curcumin formulas
  • Joint comfort: Can promote flexible, comfortable joints & optimal mobility
  • Cardiovascular health: Encouraging heart function & healthy cholesterol levels already within range
  • Brain support: Promoting cognitive function & neuroprotective benefits for mental clarity
  • Immune function: Can help maintain balanced inflammatory response & seasonal resilience
  • Cell protection: Provides powerful antioxidant defense against free radical activity

Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extractᴱᵁ features an advanced formulation that combines curcuminoids with galactomannans from fenugreek seeds for maximum bioavailability and health benefits. Made in EU.

Health benefits at a glance:Turmeric root contains compounds known as curcuminoids which offer a wealth of health benefits. Because this formula supports more curcuminoids and higher absorbability than standard curcumin, this formula can "amplify" the health benefits for your heart, mind, joints, cardiovascular system, immune health, and more.

Why it works:Curcuminoids are compounds in curcumin that have multiple health benefits. They help inhibit inflammation to support joint health and vital organ health, promote a healthy immune response, support cardiovascular health and encourage heart health and more. But the total amount of free curcuminoids delivered by standard curcumin supplements is low.Life Extension® has spent years searching for a superior, more available form of curcumin. Now, they have developed the powerful Curcumin Elite™ Turmeric Extract formula, which delivers the maximum health benefits of curcuminoids.It does so, by using sophisticated technologies that protect curcuminoids during digestion and deliver more free curcuminoids per dose.The tricky part about delivering curcumin that can be used by the body is that curcuminoid compounds undergo conjugation once they enter the body.This a normal chemical reaction where one compound attaches to another. However, the conjugation of curcuminoids is problematic, because conjugated curcuminoids do not necessarily provide the same health benefits as non-conjugated ones. (1,2).This formula protects curcuminoids from conjugation by combining curcumin with a type of fiber derived from fenugreek seeds called galactomannans. That way, it enhances both the availability and absorbability of curcuminoids so that you can enjoy all of the wonderful health benefits that this turmeric extract provides.

The science behind the product:Clinical and pre-clinical data shows that combining curcuminoids with galactomannans produces 45.5 times more bioavailability and broader distribution of free curcuminoids compared to unformulated, standardised products. (3,4)In one clinical study, more than 70% of total plasma curcuminoids were still in their free form five hours after they had been ingested. (4)Several studies have shown or indicated that this type of turmeric extract can have multiple health benefits, which include:Inhibiting inflammationTurmeric extract inhibits inflammatory factors and thereby promotes joint health and vital organ health. (5,6) Moreover, it also inhibits the metabolism of several compounds that can enhance the inflammatory response. These include arachidonic acid, cyclooxygenase, lipoxygenase and cytokines. By inhibiting the activities of these compounds, this turmeric extract promotes a healthy inflammation response. (7-9)Brain health and immune system healthCurcumin extract inhibits inflammatory factors in the body and thereby promotes immune system health. (10-12) It can also benefit your mind: studies indicated that it supports brain health by supporting a healthy brain function and even offers neuro-protective benefits as well. (7,13-15)Digestive, joint health and pancreatic healthEvidence suggests that this turmeric extract helps promote healthy bowel function and joint health. (16-19) It also supports healthy pancreatic function by encouraging pancreatic islet health. (7,20)Cellular support against free radicals Curcumin also provides cellular protection by offering support from antioxidants. (5, 21-23) Furthermore, it supports healthy cholesterol levels already within normal range, inhibits inflammation to promote cardiovascular health and more. (7,24)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Curcumin Elite™ Proprietary CGM Blend Turmeric rhizome extract and oil providing 40% curcuminoids (200 mg) and 3% turmerones (15 mg), fenugreek seed fibers providing 30% galactomannans (150 mg) 500 mg **
product.ingredients: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* Curcumin Elite™ Proprietary CGM Blend Turmeric rhizome extract and oil providing 40% curcuminoids (200 mg) and 3% turmerones (15 mg), fenugreek seed fibers providing 30% galactomannans (150 mg) 500 mg **

Health benefits at a glance:Hair, Skin & Nails Collagen Plus Formula is a truly unique nutritional supplement.It contains a variety of nutrients that can help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and it also provides proteins and other compounds responsible for rejuvenating healthy hair and skin.

(9)Another study confirmed that Verisol® can promote skin elasticity, most profoundly for women over age 50. product.title: Aged Black Garlic, 30 capsules
product.description:
For you, if you are interested in garlic’s clinically studied health benefits

The formula Aged Black Garlic can:

  • Encourage already healthy blood pressure

  • Support normal cholesterol and triglyceride levels

  • Promote overall heart health

Aged Black Garlic is an ideal addition to a heart-healthy lifestyle and contains a clinically studied dose of 500 mg of aged black garlic extract to enhance overall cardiovascular health and function. This formula provides an odorless extract in a once-daily, vegetarian, non-GMO, gluten-free supplement.

Health benefits at a glance:With Life Extension’s Aged Black Garlic, you can discover garlic’s great cardiovascular benefits. Aged black garlic is shown to help maintain healthy blood pressure, cholesterol, and triglyceride levels. Each dose provides 500 mg of this clinically studied ingredient, containing 2.5 mg of S-allyl-cysteine.Moreover, the formula provides an odorless extract in a once-daily, vegetarian, non-GMO, gluten-free product.

Why it works: Garlic not only enhances the flavor of meals, but it’s also very beneficial for your heart. This is due to a compound and powerful antioxidant called S-allyl-cysteine (SAC) – and it gets better with age! Extract of aged garlic extract, which is rich in SAC, has been clinically studied for its cardiovascular health benefits. However, it’s not found in significant amounts in raw garlic. The unique aging process can not only boost the SAC levels but also reduce or eliminate the strong “garlic” odor found in some other garlic supplements.

The science behind the product: Results of clinical research In a placebo-controlled, randomized study, healthy adults were given 500 mg of garlic extract standardized to contain 2.5 mg of S-allyl cysteine (SAC). The participants’ blood lipids such as cholesterol and triglycerides were measured, as well as blood pressure and fasting blood sugar levels. After 12 weeks, the group taking the SAC-enriched garlic extract experienced help in maintaining normal levels of triglycerides, LDL cholesterol, and total cholesterol. The ratio of total cholesterol to HDL was reduced by 20.8%, compared to 0.4% for placebo. (1)Support for normal blood pressure and fasting glucose levels was likewise reported. (1) Demonstrate that some things get better with age – try Aged Black Garlic!

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ:What is in Aged Black Garlic?This supplement contains 500 mg of a trademarked aged garlic extract standardized to 2.5 mg of S-allyl-cysteine (SAC). SAC can support cardiovascular health and is an active compound naturally occurring in aged black garlic. While raw garlic typically has low levels of SAC, the aging process significantly boosts its concentration per serving.How is the garlic in this product aged?Raw garlic undergoes a 15-to-90-day aging process with heat and humidity treatments to increase SAC content. This method provides almost twice the SAC amount compared to standard garlic formulations.How does this formula promote heart health?The aged black garlic in this supplement, standardized to 0.5% SAC, has been clinically studied to support healthy blood pressure, cholesterol, triglyceride levels, HDL, and fasting blood glucose.Does this garlic supplement have a strong odor or taste?No. The aging process used for this extract reduces garlic's natural odor and taste, compared to standard garlic formulations. There might be a stronger smell when first opening the bottle due to odor accumulation in the free space, but it should diminish with continued use.

product.title: Vegan Pro Collagen, 189 g
product.description:
For you, if you want a great vegan alternative to support healthy collagen production

Vegan Pro Collagen can:

  • Help to reduce skin aging & the appearance of wrinkles

  • Deliver the same amino acid profile as type I collagen

  • Offer clinically studied ingredients to support healthy-looking skin

  • Promote collagen formation in the body

Vegan Pro Collagen is a gluten-free powder supplement that provides a clinically studied blend of the same amino acid profile as type I collagen, the most common type in the skin. It’s combined with vitamin C, plus gotu kola and ginseng root extracts. This vegan combination can support the natural production of collagen in the body and promote youthful, healthy-looking skin.

Health benefits at a glance: Are you following a vegetarian or vegan diet? Many collagen supplements aren't suitable for that. However, there is no need to choose between a plant-based lifestyle and beautiful skin! There's a new vegan alternative: Vegan Pro Collagen.The ingredient blend in this formula is demonstrated to promote healthy collagen formation in the body and promote youthful and radiant-looking skin.This powder supplement is gluten-free, plant-based, and offers a natural orange flavor.

Why it works: Type 1 is the main collagen found in the skin, making up 80%-90% of the subsurface layer of the skin by weight. Starting around age 25, collagen production decreases about 1-1.5% per year, leading to wrinkles, roughness, and dry, sagging skin. (1,2)Vegan Pro Collagen delivers the identical amino acid building blocks that your body uses to create type I collagen, which is the most common type in the skin. The amino acids are combined with vitamin C and botanical ingredients that can promote the body's collagen synthesis.This blend has been clinically studied to help reduce common signs of skin aging and the appearance of wrinkles.

The science behind the product:The nutrient combination of this Life Extension formula has been scientifically formulated to provide the same skin benefits as other collagen supplements.Encouraging clinical studiesIn placebo-controlled, pilot randomized study, participants took the amino acids and collagen-boosting ingredients in the Vegan Pro Collagen supplement for four weeks.The vegan collagen group experienced an increase in collagen density and a reduction in the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. (3,4)In a second pilot study, the vegan collagen group observed improvements in skin texture and hydration after four weeks. (4)In a larger placebo-controlled trial, this vegan collagen blend was compared to traditional fish-derived collagen. The vegan collagen group reported similar improvements in collagen density, wrinkle appearance, and overall skin hydration and health.Remarkably, the results for the vegan collagen group were nearly identical to those of the marine collagen group. (2) Moreover, of those showing wrinkle reduction in the collagen group, most (63%) had a remarkable average 33% reduction in the size of the wrinkles. (2)Stimulating collagen productionAlthough this vegan collagen can deliver the right amino acids in the right proportions, the scientists needed to make sure that the body would optimally gather these building blocks into collagen.Therefore, a blend of three triggering compounds has been added to further stimulate the body's own collagen production:Vitamin CGinseng root extractGotu kola (Centella asiatica) leaf extractIn a cell study, human skin fibroblasts (primarily responsible for collagen synthesis) were treated with this blend of amino acids and triggering compounds.After 48 hours, collagen levels in the fibroblasts increased by 135%, demonstrating that this combination could stimulate new collagen production. (3) Add Vegan Pro Collagen to your dietary regime and support your beauty naturally!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. These ingredients are shown to help reduce the appearance of wrinkles.What form of collagen is in this product?While this product doesn't contain actual collagen, it includes amino acids in the same ratio found in human type I collagen, the most prevalent form of collagen in the skin. Vegan Pro Collagen can promote the body's natural collagen production.Who is Vegan Pro Collagen intended for?Vegan Pro Collagen is ideal for individuals looking to maintain healthy skin and minimize signs of aging. It serves as a vegan substitute for traditional collagen supplements.How does Vegan Pro Collagen support skin health?The blend of amino acids and botanical extracts in Vegan Pro Collagen can stimulate normal collagen production and provide targeted support for reducing wrinkles and other common signs of skin aging.Can I take Vegan Pro Collagen to support my joints?The nutrients in Vegan Pro Collagen are specifically studied for skin health. This supplement is not intended for joint health.When can I expect an effect?In studies, participants noticed improvements in their skin's appearance after 4-8 weeks of taking Vegan Pro Collagen.Does this product have a flavor? Are there any added sugars or sweeteners?Vegan Pro Collagen is orange-flavored, contains no added sugars, and is sweetened with stevia. How should I take Vegan Pro Collagen? Dissolve one scoop of Vegan Pro Collagen in any cold or room-temperature drink of your choice. It can be taken at any time of day, with or without food.Has this product been tested for heavy metal contamination?All raw materials undergo rigorous testing for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, and active ingredient quantity to meet Life Extension's high-quality standards. Testing is performed for microbes, heavy metals, disintegration, and the quantity of active ingredients in the finished product.Are there any major allergens in this product?Vegan Pro Collagen does not contain any of the 9 major allergens. This includes being free of milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product manufactured?Vegan Pro Collagen is produced in the USA.

product.title: SAMe+ 200 mg
product.description:
• Mood & emotional well-being: Can promote balanced mood with neurotransmitters like dopamine & serotonin
  • Joint comfort & mobility: Supporting healthy cartilage for comfortable movement
  • Liver support: Can produce glutathione, a powerful antioxidant for liver protection
  • Complete formula: Includes vitamins B6, B12 & folate to optimize SAMe metabolism
  • Premium European SAMe: Features Adonat® with highest biologically active (S,S) isomer content
  • Slow-release protection: DRcaps™ can shield sensitive ingredients from stomach acid for optimal absorption

SAMe+ 200 mg can support your mood, joints, and liver health with premium European SAMe combined with essential B vitamins. Made in EU with no unnecessary additives, only natural fillers such as acacia fiber.

What is SAMe?S-adenosyl-methionine (SAMe) is an amino acid-like substance that is present in virtually all living organisms and is one of the most important compounds in metabolism.Your body naturally produces SAMe from the amino acid methionine. While all body cells can create SAMe, the liver accounts for most of the endogenous production, which requires cofactors such as folate and vitamin B12. Besides folate and vitamin B12, the SAMe metabolism also involves vitamin B6. These nutrients are required to keep the SAMe cycle running and generate the amount of SAMe your body requires.A deficiency of vitamin B6, B12, and folate, as well as dietary methionine, can affect the production of SAMe and impact its many essential functions. Different factors, such as oxidative stress, can interfere with SAMe metabolism, and lower levels have been found in various health conditions.While the diet contains only a small amount of SAMe, which is also unstable, supplementation has been proven to be an effective way to restore SAMe levels.What are the functions of SAMe?SAMe assists the body in producing a variety of essential substances, such as mood-related neurotransmitters, the liver-protective antioxidant glutathione, and proteoglycans, which are cartilage elements that keep our joints healthy.In addition, SAMe plays a central role in epigenetics, which is the modification of our genetic material DNA. Such modifications are intimately linked to aging, and healthy aging depends on healthy epigenetic processes, such as healthy DNA methylation.SAMe fulfills these functions mainly by donating a chemical entity called a methyl group to other compounds in the body, thereby enabling biochemical reactions such as the production of dopamine, serotonin, and glutathione, as well as epigenetic DNA-methylation.How is Vitalized SAMe+ unique? SAMe+ is a vegan, gluten-free, and non-GMO. A complete formulaSAMe metabolism depends on vitamins B6, B12, and folate. For optimal results, and to make it easier for you, these ingredients are already included in Vitalized SAMe+.*Folate, vitamins B6 and B12 contribute to normal psychological function and normal function of the nervous system. Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of cartilage.Premium SAMeVitalized uses branded SAMe material of European origin: Adonat® Premium SAMe from the French company Gnosis, which has 30 years of expertise producing high-quality SAMe.Adonat® Premium SAMe offers the highest content of biologically active SAMe, in the form of (S, S) isomer for a better beneficial effect and a more reliable experience. Slow-release capsulesDRcaps™ protects the sensitive ingredient from stomach acid for optimal bioavailability.By choosing Vitalized SAMe+, you're investing in a superior product that can deliver exceptional benefits for your health and well-being.

Supplement facts: Amount per Day (1 capsule): %RI* S-Adenosyl-Methionine (Adonat®) 200 mg ** Vitamin C 50 mg 63 Vitamin B6 0.5 mg 36 Folic acid (Quatrefolic®) 50 µg 25 Vitamin B12 5 µg 200

Lactoferrin+ 200 mg can promote immune function with a clinically studied 200 mg dose of premium Biotis® lactoferrin, a multifunctional protein naturally found in milk. Made in EU, no unnecessary additives, only natural fillers such as acacia fiber.

What is lactoferrin & how does it work?Immune proteinLactoferrin is a multifunctional protein made by the body. It has been researched in numerous human studies and is well-known as a natural part of the immune system.This immune protein is present in/on body fluids such as milk, saliva, tears, and mucosal surfaces. It also interacts with bodily structures and foreign organisms.Iron balanceA major immune support mechanism of lactoferrin is the binding of iron, which is an important mineral for the body. Lactoferrin can support healthy iron levels by promoting iron absorption.** The name indicates its origins and properties: "lacto" signifies "milk," while "ferrin" represents "iron".Why choose Vitalized Lactoferrin+?Outstanding qualityVitalized uses Biotis® lactoferrin from Friesland Campina. With 25 years of experience, this company is a pioneer in lactoferrin production. Their lactoferrin was the first to be approved by EFSA. It’s made from fresh Dutch milk and processed quickly and carefully to preserve its excellence. Biotis® scores very high in functional efficacy among lactoferrin sources and contains among the lowest levels of unwanted endotoxins. This lactoferrin contains 96% protein of which 95% is pure lactoferrin, which is among the highest purity levels in the market! The iron binding capacity is approximately 80%.Scientific studies confirm that 200 mg is an effective dose. Moreover, special DRcaps® can protect the sensitive ingredient from stomach acid, ensuring it reaches its target in the body intact.Sustainable practiceFriesland Campina promotes environmentally friendly farming using mostly grass-fed and free-range cows. Enhanced immune supportTo deliver additional immune benefits, Vitalized has included 80 mg of vitamin C in this formulation, providing 100% of the nutrient reference value (NRV), which is a recommended daily nutritional intake. Unlike regular vitamin C, this vitamin is derived from plants and not created synthetically. That makes this product entirely natural, aligning with the growing demand for non-synthetic supplements.Enjoy these renowned ingredients in an immune-supporting product with remarkable quality! *Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system. **Vitamin C increases iron absorption.
