product.title: Omega-3 Vegan
product.description:
• Heart health: Can promote cardiovascular function & maintain optimal triglyceride levels
  • Brain function: Supporting cognitive performance, memory & mental clarity throughout life
  • Eye health: Encouraging optimal vision & retinal health with essential DHA
  • True vegan alternative: 1.5:1 EPA/DHA ratio matching high-quality fish oil benefits
  • Premium French algae: Cultivated indoors with minimal environmental impact & superior purity
  • No fishy aftertaste: Clean, plant-based formula without unpleasant fish oil burps

Omega-3 Vegan delivers 900 mg of EPA and DHA per serving from premium French algae, offering a genuine plant-based alternative to fish oil with the same proven cardiovascular and cognitive benefits. Made in EU, no unnecessary additives, only natural fillers such as acacia fiber.

What are the benefits of omega-3?Omega-3 fatty acids are healthy fats that offer many advantages for your:Heart healthBrain functionEyes and retinaCirculation EPA and DHA are two of the most important omega-3 fatty acids:EPA (Eicosapentaenoic acid) is a component of cell membranes and can be converted by the body into several important bioactive compounds involved in various functions, including the regulation of inflammatory processes. Together with DHA, EPA supports healthy heart function, triglyceride levels, and blood pressure. DHA (Docosahexaenoic acid) is the predominant omega-3 fatty acid in the brain and the eye. It’s a structural constituent of nerve and retinal cells and plays an important role in the function of membranes. It’s also involved in the normal development of the brain and eye and supports healthy vision and cognitive function. Why choose Vitalized Omega-3 Vegan?A true vegan alternative to fish oilVegetarian alternatives from algae have become more available in recent years, but they rarely deliver the full benefits of fish oil, as they mainly consist of DHA. The clinically documented benefits of fish oil relate to the combination of EPA and DHA, with EPA typically prepondering. Vegetarians and vegans are therefore often excluded from these proven benefits, and customers may also be concerned about the sustainability of fish oil.Vitalized now brings a real and unique vegan alternative to fish oil to the market made from algae, with a typical ratio of EPA and DHA of high-quality fish oil, 1,5:1! Moreover, studies show that omega-3 fatty acids from algae have the same bioavailability as those from high-quality fish oil. This means you can achieve the same blood levels of EPA and DHA with algae oil as you would with fish oil.Environmental responsibility and purityOmega-3 Vegan is made from algae cultivated indoors with a much lower impact on the environment.Vitalized uses a premium French algae material which is treated gently to preserve freshness. This patented technology yields a highly stable and clean vegan alternative to fish oil, with no compromise on bioavailability.A potent formula and dosageEach capsule of Omega-3 Vegan provides 450 mg of EPA/DHA combined, closely mirroring the benefits of high-potency fish oil. Two capsules per day will provide you with 900 mg of EPA/DHA, supporting heart health and overall wellness. No fish oil burp!Avoid the fishy aftertaste: With this product, you never have to worry about tasting fish the rest of your day when taking a capsule in the morning.Vitalized Omega-3 Vegan offers a premium product worth the investment for both your health and the environment!

product.title: Collagen Caps
product.description:
• Skin elasticity: Can promote firmer, more hydrated skin & visibly reduce wrinkles
  • Hair & nails: Supporting strong, healthy hair growth & nail structure with zinc
  • Joint comfort: Encouraging flexible, comfortable joints & cartilage health with type II
  • Multiple collagen types: Types I, II, V & X from marine & eggshell sources
  • Enhanced formula: 100 mg absorbable vitamin C for normal collagen formation function
  • Sustainable sourcing: Ethically sourced from free-range chickens & responsibly harvested fish

Collagen Caps delivers clinically proven marine collagen and eggshell membrane in a convenient two-capsule serving, providing multiple collagen types that can enhance skin beauty and joint mobility. Made in EU, no unnecessary additives, only natural fillers such as acacia fiber.

What is collagen?Connective tissue is found everywhere in the body, in organs, blood vessels, the skin, bones, cartilage, tendons, and ligaments. It provides structure and strength to the body. Besides cells and ground substances, connective tissue contains protein fibers, and collagen makes up a large proportion of these fibers. Most of the collagen in your body is type I, II, or III:Type I collagen makes up 90% of your organic bone mass and 80% of your skin without cells, and is also found in your tendons and ligaments.Type II collagen represents 90% of all collagen in cartilage, it supports your joints. Likewise, it’s present in your spine and the clear gel inside your eyes.Type III collagen accounts for 10-15% of your skin without cells and is found in vital organs like the lungs, liver, and spleen. Other types of collagen: Type V collagen collaborates with type I to build and stabilize collagen fibrils (small filaments or fibers) in the skin, hair, and more.Type X collagen provides structural support in articular cartilage, helping cushion joints and maintain smooth movement.What are the benefits of collagen supplements?The production of collagen in the body declines with age. This affects tissue integrity, which is visible in the skin as fine lines and wrinkles. Collagen is an increasingly popular ingredient for promoting beauty from within. Research-backed branded collagen has been shown to:Improve skin elasticity, firmness, and hydrationVisibly reduce wrinkles and fine linesOffer absorbable fragments of the collagen that make up skin and jointsThese benefits make collagen a perfect supplement for skin care and well-being! Why choose Vitalized Collagen Caps?Different collagen types & more benefits Collagen Caps provides a blend of different collagen types, mainly I and II, from two clinically proven ingredients:Marine collagen: mainly type II collagen, which is found in cartilageEggshell membrane: type I, which is found in the skin, plus types V and X collagenAdditional nutrientsVitamin C is required for collagen formation in the body. A daily dose delivers 100 mg in a highly absorbable form of vitamin C.The mineral zinc is involved in keratin production and supports hair and nail health. Sustainably sourced & cleanOne of the standout features of Vitalized’s collagen is the commitment to responsibility and purity. Unlike most collagen products on the market, which are often derived from less eco-friendly bovine and porcine sources, Vitalized uses collagen from sustainably harvested fish and from eggshell membranes.The eggshell membrane provider, Eggnovo, is dedicated to farm animal welfare throughout their supply chain and chooses suppliers locally in Spain to ensure a low-carbon footprint.These suppliers are meant to adhere to cage-free, organic, and free-range production practices. Most of the eggshells used for Ovomet®/Ovoderm® are coming from free-range chicken eggs.Furthermore, Collagen Caps contains only acacia fiber as a natural filler and has no unnecessary additives such as sweeteners, flavors, and colors.Convenient collagen formatMost collagen products come as messy, inconvenient powders for drinks or ready-made shots full of unwanted ingredients. Some of these may also have an unpleasant aftertaste. product.title: Greens & Protein
product.description:
• Energy support: Vitamin C can reduce tiredness & fatigue throughout your day
  • Muscle & bone health: Protein contributes to growth & maintenance of muscles & bones
  • Vegetable intake boost: 6 g green superfoods blend from 7 nutrient-dense plant sources
  • Complete plant protein: 8 g bioavailable vegan protein from fava beans, rice & chickpeas
  • Natural detox support: Chlorella can help eliminate heavy metals from the body
  • Convenient sachets: Single-serve 14 g sticks for easy daily use & travel

Greens and Protein combines 6 grams of premium green superfoods with 8 grams of complete plant protein in convenient single-serve sachets. Made in EU, no unnecessary additives, only natural fillers such as acacia fiber.

Why the need for greens and protein? Greens combined with protein can help keep you feeling fuller for longer and provide the energy you need to get through the day. The nourishing power of greens Here are three strong reasons for embracing the advantages: Fruits and vegetables are essential for a healthy diet, and a lack of them is linked to poor health. They provide a rich mix of vitamins, minerals, dietary fiber, and beneficial compounds like flavonoids and antioxidants. Eating a variety of them ensures you get a broad range of essential nutrients. The WHO recommends eating over 400 grams of fruits and vegetables daily to support better overall health. However, official statistics show there is still a long way to go to reach the minimum recommendation of fresh fruit and vegetables per day. The powdered blends of green leafy vegetables are gaining traction and are celebrated for helping increase vegetable intake, enhancing vitality*, and supporting detoxification naturally**. Protein for muscles and bones Protein energizes your cells and strengthens your body: Muscle mass Protein contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscles. So, whether you're pushing your limits at the gym or managing everyday activities, protein works consistently to promote muscle development. Over time, protein helps preserve muscle mass, keeping you active, resilient, and strong as you age. Bone strength Protein helps maintain normal bones, providing the structure they need to stay healthy. Depending on your need, adding even a little protein to your diet by supplementation can offer essential nutrients for your strength, recovery, and overall well-being. Why choose Vitalized Greens & Protein? Vitalized Greens & Protein is a unique formula and an excellent food source for energy* and detox** support. It combines first-class powdered green superfoods with a suitable dose of bioavailable plant protein. Leafy greens blend and fruit extract Vitalized's 6 grams mix of greens nourishes your body with premium ingredients that can help with your vegetable intake: Barley grass is a good source of many nutrients, including chlorophyll, fiber, polyphenols, flavonoids, enzymes, and vitamins A, C, and E. Spinach contains carotenoids such as lutein and zeaxanthin, vitamins A, C, and K1, folic acid, iron, and calcium. It’s also high in insoluble fiber. Broccoli offers important nutrients such as vitamins A, C, and E, potassium, calcium, and iron. It´s also a rich source of antioxidants and bioactive compounds such as glucosinolates, sulforaphane, and indole-3-carbinol Spirulina is a blue-green and highly nutritious algae containing protein, copper, iron, and B vitamins. A main component is called phycocyanin, which is an antioxidant that also gives it its unique color. Wheatgrass is an excellent source of chlorophyll, antioxidants, enzymes, and many important nutrients, including vitamins A, B, C, and E and iron, magnesium, calcium, and amino acids. Kale delivers antioxidants, fiber, vitamins K, C, A, riboflavin/B2, and minerals such as potassium, manganese, magnesium, and calcium. Chlorella provides many nutrients including protein, B vitamins, iron, vitamin C, antioxidants, magnesium, zinc, copper, potassium, calcium, fiber, and omega-3 fats. Acerola fruit extract is a rich source of vitamin C and contains beta-carotene, lutein, and B vitamins. Branded plant protein with optimal bioavailability Greens & Protein provides a moderate yet impactful amount of protein per serving. It’s perfect for greens-only lovers and for those seeking a bit of additional protein. With 8 grams of protein, the serving is comparable to a protein bar and can very well replace a snack or light meal. The formula contains superior vegan protein from fava beans, rice, and chickpeas. This branded blend of vegan protein sources, Vital Pro XP™, provides the same bioavailability and completeness of protein as whey protein!All-natural with a pleasant taste This vegan and non-GMO supplement contains no unnecessary ingredients or fillers. It’s not gluten-free (because of barley and wheat grass) or organic but thoroughly tested and controlled for contaminants. The powder is optimized with a little natural flavor and sweetened with stevia for a fresh and enjoyable taste. Convenient serving sizes To avoid the mess with 420 grams of green dusty powder, the product comes with handy single-serve sachets/sticks of 14 grams, which makes it: Easy to take every day Suitable for travel Protected, preserving the quality compared to an opened bottle Enjoy Vitalized Greens & Protein and help make healthy living simpler and more effective! *Vitamin C contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue. **Chlorella helps eliminate heavy metals from the body.

product.title: Iron+ / Eisen+ 15 mg
product.description:
• Energy production: Can help reduce tiredness & maintain optimal energy levels daily
  • Oxygen transport: Iron contributes to hemoglobin formation for carrying oxygen throughout the body
  • Immune function: Supporting normal immune system performance & cellular health
  • Superior absorption: Lipofer® microcapsules offer 3.5x better bioavailability than standard iron forms
  • Gentle on stomach: Microencapsulated iron doesn't irritate the digestive tract like traditional supplements
  • Enhanced formula: Vitamin C, B2 & copper work synergistically for optimal iron support

Iron+ / Eisen+ 15 mg delivers microencapsulated Lipofer® iron with superior bioavailability and exceptional digestive tolerance. Made in EU and no additives except natural acacia fiber as filler.

What are the benefits of iron?The mineral iron is a crucial component of many proteins and enzymes that maintain good health. It’s essential for making hemoglobin, a protein in red blood cells that carries oxygen from the lungs to the rest of the body.Healthy iron levels support the body’s energy production, immune function, and proper cell growth and development. On the other hand, an iron deficiency can lead to a range of health issues, including anemia, weakened immune function, impaired cognitive development, and reduced muscle performance. However, it's important to manage your iron intake carefully because consuming too much can be toxic and pose health risks. Why choose Vitalized Iron+ / Eisen+ 15 mg? Microencapsulation – designed to deliverLipofer® microcapsules can deliver iron with superior bioavailability. Research has demonstrated that the iron source is 3,5x more bioavailable than ferric pyrophosphate and 2,7x than ferrous sulfate.Additionally, this state-of-the-art micronized iron is highly tolerable and does not irritate the digestive tract, which is a frequent complaint for iron products.Important & complementary ingredientsVitalized’s formulation also features nutrients that work synergistically with iron: Vitamin C, which is demonstrated to promote the absorption of iron.Vitamin B2: Mild vitamin B2 (riboflavin) deficiency might be more common in developed countries than previously thought. A deficiency in vitamin B2 can affect iron metabolism, such as iron utilization for the synthesis of hemoglobin. Improving riboflavin levels has been shown to help increase hemoglobin in the blood.Copper: Nutritionally, copper is an essential trace mineral that occurs naturally in certain foods. Copper is necessary for normal iron metabolism and the production of healthy red blood cells. A copper deficiency can cause anemia, similar to iron lack. High iron intake may, in turn, reduce copper absorption and lead to a shortage of copper. An ideal, balanced doseVitalized Iron+ / Eisen+ offers a flexible dose of 15 mg of iron per capsule, which is a good, moderate dose for the prevention of iron deficiency. Additionally, the supplement contains 100 mg of vitamin C, 0,5 mg of vitamin B2, and 0,15 mg of copper. A pure formulaThis EU-made supplement is vegan/vegetarian, non-GMO, and gluten-free. Furthermore, it doesn’t contain additives except natural acacia fiber as filler. Experience for yourself the benefits of this clever combination for effective iron support!

product.title: Spermidine & Resveratrol
product.description:
• Cellular renewal: Can promote the body's natural cellular housekeeping & cleanup processes
  • Active aging: Encouraging vitality & optimal cell function for longevity as you age
  • Antioxidant protection: Zinc contributes to protecting cells from oxidative stress throughout the body
  • Synergistic formula: 3 mg spermidine & 150 mg resveratrol work together for cellular health
  • Premium quality: Veri-Te™ resveratrol offers 98% trans-resveratrol through natural yeast fermentation

Spermidine and Resveratrol combines two clinically studied nutrients that can support cellular processes and healthy aging for adults 40 and over. Made in EU and no additives except natural acacia fiber as filler.

Supporting the process of cellular renewalWhat is autophagy?The name comes from the Greek words "self" and "eating”, and autophagy can be viewed as your cells' built-in housekeeping system. That means it’s your body’s way of cleaning and renewing its cells, removing damaged proteins and parts of the cell to make room for new, healthy ones.With time, autophagy tends to decrease, and maintaining a healthy cellular function is essential for overall well-being as we grow older. Both spermidine and resveratrol have been extensively researched for their role in cellular processes and active aging. What is spermidine?Spermidine is a polyamine, an organic compound with two or more amino groups. It was first identified in human seminal fluid (hence its name), but this fascinating cellular nutrient is also widespread throughout nature. It’s found in foods such as wheat germ, soybeans, mushrooms, and aged cheese, but in varying levels. As spermidine levels naturally decline with age, taking a quality supplement daily can complement your dietary intake, helping to maintain optimal levels.What is resveratrol?Resveratrol is a polyphenol, which is an antioxidant found in small amounts in foods like grapes, berries, and certain nuts. This clinically studied nutrient has been examined for its ability to support healthy aging.Why choose Vitalized Spermidine & ResveratrolOptimal cell function for longevity & active agingVitalized combines two remarkable naturally occurring compounds, making up an advanced supplement that goes beyond the benefits of the studied spermidine and resveratrol alone. These popular nutrients are shown to work synergistically and complementarily to promote the body's cellular processes.Spermidine & Resveratrol is created specifically for adults 40+ who are actively supporting their longevity journey. As part of a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle, this formula can provide nutritional support for those looking to maintain vitality as they age.Premium, pure & clinically validatedBoth spermidine and resveratrol are found naturally in certain plant foods, but in small or inconsistent amounts. Vitalized’s formula delivers a consistent daily dose of concentrated nutrients:Spermidine: 3 mg from gluten-free soybean extract.Resveratrol: 150 mg, which is a science-backed dose per day. The formula features Veri-Te™ resveratrol, which is European and represents the gold standard in purity and quality assurance, offering 98% of nature-identical trans-resveratrol. It’s produced by using innovative natural yeast fermentation and is supported by many clinical trials and research studies.Zinc: This essential trace mineral is added for antioxidant and cellular renewal support. *No additives: This vegan, non-GMO supplement is free from unnecessary ingredients and contains only natural acacia fiber as filler. The carefully selected ingredients in this formula reflect Vitalized’s commitment to evidence-informed nutrition that can complement your daily wellness routine. Vitalized Spermidine & Resveratrol – an advanced approach to promote optimal health! *Zinc has a role in the process of cell division and contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress.

product.title: Cardio Peak™, 30 capsules
product.description:
For you, if you want help to support and keep your heart strong

The active ingredients in Cardio Peak can:

  • Encourage cardiovascular endurance

  • Promote heart muscle health

  • Help reduce physical fatigue during exercise

  • Support the heart’s capacity to pump blood 

Your heart is the most important muscle in your body, and it’s vital to keep it strong! Cardio Peak™ contains standardized Terminalia arjuna bark extract, and its active compounds have been clinically studied to support several aspects of cardiovascular health. The formula is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Health benefits at a glance: Stay young at heart with Cardio Peak™! The formula contains 400 mg of a standardized Terminalia arjuna bark extract. This clinically studied ingredient is shown to support several aspects of cardiovascular health. Cardio Peak™ is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Why it works:The arjuna bark in Cardio Peak™ is rich in polyphenols and glycosides and has been used to support cardiovascular health for centuries. This ingredient has been clinically studied to promote a strong, healthy heart and encourage a healthy cardiac output: the strength and efficiency of your heart’s ability to pump blood. Moreover, research shows that arjuna can help reduce physical fatigue and enhance exercise performance for active adults.

The science behind the product:Ways to measure heart healthOne approach to measure heart health is to observe cardiac output, or how well your heart performs its primary function – pumping blood. Another is to evaluate cardiovascular endurance, which reflects how long you can exercise before reaching exhaustion. The active compounds in Terminalia arjuna bark extract are shown to support both these aspects of cardiovascular health. Cardiovascular studies of arjunaLeft ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) is a test used to measure the efficiency of the heart’s left ventricle, which is the largest chamber responsible for pumping oxygen-rich blood throughout the body. Both older adults and active younger men took 400 mg of arjuna extract daily for eight weeks in randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled studies. In both groups, LVEF measurements and physical fatigue scores improved for those taking arjuna extract compared to placebo. (1,2) Support keeping your heart strong and resilient – it’s the most crucial muscle you have!

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQWhat sets this product apart from the previous formulation? Life Extension has updated the formula by replacing the arjuna bark extract with a standardized Terminalia arjuna extract that has been clinically studied for its cardiovascular health benefits. Additionally, hawthorn has been removed to allow for a more convenient once-daily dosing.What does Cardio Peak™ contain?Cardio Peak™ features 400 mg of arjuna bark extract, standardized to deliver 30% polyphenols and 15% glycosides.Who is Cardio Peak™ intended for?The formula is ideal for individuals seeking to support heart muscle health, cardiac endurance, and output. It’s also suitable for young, active adults looking to enhance their exercise performance.Can I use this for fatigue?Clinical studies show that arjuna bark extract not only supports heart muscle health but also helps reduce physical fatigue.How does this Cardio Peak™ work?The arjuna bark extract in Cardio Peak™ has been shown to promote the volume of oxygen-rich blood pumped from the heart to the body each time it contracts. This process is known as cardiac output.When can I expect results?In a study on individuals taking the arjuna bark extract used in Cardio Peak™, improvements in cardiac output were observed after 56 days (8 weeks). However, everyone is different, so the time to notice benefits may vary.When is the ideal time to take Cardio Peak™? Should I take it with food or on an empty stomach?Depending on your preference, you can take this product at any time of the day, with or without food.Could this supplement interact with my medication?There is no indication that arjuna bark extract in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it’s recommended that you inform your physician about any supplements you are taking. Where is this product manufactored?Cardio Peak™ is produced in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”). Is this product suitable for children?This product is specifically designed for adults aged 18 and older. Always consult your child’s physician before giving them any supplements. Is this product tested for heavy metals, contaminants, and potency?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet the company's high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this product contain any major allergens?Cardio Peak™ is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.

product.title: Estrogen Balance Elite, 60 tablets
product.description:
• Hormone balance: Encouraging natural estrogen production with clinically studied fenugreek.
  • Relief from discomforts: Can ease hot flashes, night sweats & vaginal dryness.
  • Mood & sleep: Promoting restful sleep patterns and balanced emotional well-being.
  • Botanical blend formula: Combines fenugreek with red clover, chaste tree & black cohosh.
  • Plant-based & hormone-free: Can support women's health naturally without synthetic hormones.

Estrogen Balance Elite can promote women's wellness with a clinically researched fenugreek seed extract that helps maintain the body's natural estrogen production.

Health benefits at a glance:Estrogen is essential for maintaining a woman's overall well-being. Estrogen Balance Elite contains a clinically studied fenugreek seed extract that has been shown to help the body maintain estrogen production and relieve discomfort. Fenugreek is an herb native to the Mediterranean region, known for its health-supporting properties and hormone-like plant compounds.

Why it works: Achieving optimal women’s health starts with balanced estrogen production. Fenugreek is shown to be a powerhouse for supporting female well-being.A standardized extract of this well-known botanical has been demonstrated to boost natural estradiol production (endogenous estrogen) and help relieve discomforts such as hot flashes, night sweats, vaginal dryness, and more. This, in turn, can encourage healthy sleep patterns and a balanced mood. Estrogen Balance Elite is a hormone-free, plant-based formula that offers this researched extract of fenugreek seed. The formula also includes red clover, chaste tree, and black cohosh extracts to promote the health of women as they age.

The science behind the product: Fenugreek and its role in estrogen productionFenugreek seeds contain active compounds like trigonelline, a phytoestrogen, and protodioscin, a flavonoid structurally similar to DHEA. DHEA is a precursor (building block) to estrogen and other sex hormones. (1)Clinical studies have shown that the standardized fenugreek seed extract in Estrogen Balance Elite effectively promoted estradiol production, the primary form of estrogen produced by the ovaries. Results demonstrated a statistically significant increase in estradiol levels compared to both baseline measurements and placebo groups. (2-4)Fenugreek and hormone balance reliefFenugreek has also been shown to help ease many hormone-related discomforts. In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial involving 29 women aged 45 to 58, participants who took the standardized fenugreek seed extract found in Estrogen Balance Elite reported relief from symptoms like hot flashes, night sweats, vaginal dryness, and leg discomfort. They also reported improved sleep quality and mood support compared to those taking a placebo. (5) Botanical extracts for comprehensive supportLike fenugreek (seed), the red clover powder (leaf) in Estrogen Balance Elite is rich in phytoestrogens. This formula also includes highly valued extracts of black cohosh (rhizome) and chaste tree (berry), offering well-rounded support for women’s health.Enjoy a powerful botanical blend for hormonal support & overall vitality.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. No, this product does not contain estrogen. However, fenugreek in the formula can help support the body’s natural estrogen production. Who is Estrogen Balance Elite for?This formula is intended for women seeking to:Support healthy estrogen productionRelieve hormone-related discomfortsPromote a balanced mood and healthy sleep patternsWhat hormone-related discomforts does it help relieve? The clinically studied fenugreek seed extract can help ease: Hot flashesNight sweatsVaginal drynessLeg discomfortCan men take this product?No, Estrogen Balance Elite is specifically formulated to support estrogen production in adult women. It is not recommended for men.When can I expect an effect?In clinical studies, participants who took the fenugreek extract used in Estrogen Balance Elite experienced improvements in hormone-related discomforts after 6 weeks of consistent use. However, results may vary from person to person.When is the best time to take Estrogen Balance Elite? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? Dosage: Take two (2) tablets in the evening.With food: Yes, it’s recommended to take it with food for optimal absorption.Always read the full label and follow the directions carefully.Will this supplement interact with my medication?There is no indication that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we recommend consulting your healthcare provider before starting any new supplement.Who should not take Estrogen Balance Elite?As stated on the product label, please consult your healthcare practitioner if you have a history of estrogen-dependent tumors or related health conditions.Is this product tested for heavy metals, contaminants, and potency?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this product contain any major allergens?Estrogen Balance Elite is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product made?Estrogen Balance Elite is produced in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this supplement vegetarian?Yes, this formula is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free and non-GMO?Yes, Estrogen Balance Elite is gluten-free and Life Extension-verified non-GMO.

product.title: Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase (DAO), 60 vegetarian delayed release capsules
product.description:
• Digestive comfort: Can ease occasional gas & stomach upset after meals
  • Histamine metabolism: Supporting optimal breakdown of intestinal histamine from foods
  • Food sensitivity relief: Promoting comfort when enjoying histamine-rich foods like cheese & wine
  • Plant-based DAO enzyme: Derived from pea sprouts, not animal sources
  • Everyday freedom: Encouraging relief from occasional gastrointestinal discomfort

This formula is designed to ease non-allergy digestive discomfort linked to dietary histamine sensitivity. It provides 20,000 HDU of diamine oxidase (DAO), the primary enzyme responsible for breaking down intestinal histamine.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is food sensitivity? The short answer is that food sensitivity, sometimes referred to as a food intolerance, is when the body responds to compounds in the food you eat. It’s not an allergic reaction, but it can lead to gastrointestinal discomfort and is often challenging to identify.Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase is formulated to ease non-allergy digestive discomfort linked to dietary histamine sensitivity. The formula is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Why it works: Stay comfortable after you eatNon-allergy food sensitivities are more common than you might think: Nearly 20% of people in Westernized countries experience some form of food intolerance. (1)Histamine is a compound present in foods like cured meats, cheese, oily fish, certain fruits and vegetables, fermented foods, and wine – and not everyone can digest these treats comfortably. Histamine-rich foods are often associated with sensitivities such as occasional gas, stomach upset, and other digestive discomforts.The plant-based DAO in this product can support a healthy breakdown of intestinal histamine to help alleviate occasional gas and stomach upset and promote digestive comfort. Moreover: many DAO formulas utilize enzymes derived from animals, usually pork. Food Sensitivity Relief uses diamine oxidase from pea sprouts.

The science behind the product:Clinical studies with diamine oxidaseDiamine oxidase (DAO) is the primary enzyme responsible for breaking down intestinal histamine, promoting healthy digestion and comfort. In a randomized clinical study, participants who took DAO supplements 20 minutes before a main meal for eight weeks reported relief from occasional gastrointestinal discomfort. (2)Research also highlights the effectiveness of DAO supplementation in reducing both the frequency and severity of discomfort due to occasional food sensitivities linked to dietary histamine. (3,4)Plant-based DAOWhile many DAO products are sourced from pig kidneys, Life Extension’s formula delivers DAO derived from pea sprouts. It has the same histamine-breaking capacity as animal-based DAO (demonstrated in clinical studies)! Experience digestive comfort again – and freedom to enjoy your meals!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ:What is histamine?Histamine is a compound involved in the body's immune response. It is naturally released in the body and can also be produced by gut bacteria. Additionally, histamine is present in many foods and drinks or may be increased by them. High levels of histamine in the gut can lead to occasional gastrointestinal discomfort, such as gas and bloating. The body relies on specific enzymes to break down this compound.What foods are high in histamine?Histamine-rich foods and drinks are quite common. Examples include cured and deli meats, various cheeses, fermented foods, alcoholic beverages such as wine and beer, oily fish, and certain fruits and vegetables like citrus fruits, tomatoes, and strawberries.Is histamine sensitivity the same as an allergy?No, histamine sensitivity is not considered an allergy. It is a reaction to histamine from foods, often classified as a food sensitivity or intolerance. They may manifest in the form of occasional gastrointestinal discomforts.Does this product break down histamine throughout the body?No, this product is specifically designed to support the breakdown of intestinal histamine related to non-allergy histamine food sensitivity.What is diamine oxidase (DAO)?Diamine oxidase (DAO) is an enzyme naturally produced by the body to break down histamine, primarily in the gastrointestinal (GI) tract. Its activity is measured in histamine degrading units (HDU). It can be more difficult for people with low levels of DAO to maintain a healthy balance of histamine.What does Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase (DAO) contain?Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase provides 20,000 HDU of the enzyme diamine oxidase (DAO), sourced from pea sprouts. HDU, or histamine degrading units, is a measurement of the enzyme's activity.Who is Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase for?This product is designed for individuals who need support in breaking down and metabolizing histamine in the gut, helping to relieve occasional discomfort related to dietary histamine sensitivity.When will I expect an effect?In a study, individuals who took DAO immediately after consuming histamine-rich foods experienced benefits right away. Longer-term effects were observed after daily use for 4–8 weeks. However, as everyone is different, the time it takes to notice benefits may vary.When is the best time to take Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach?It is suggested to take one capsule before your heaviest meals, up to three times daily.Will this supplement interact with my medication?There’s no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we always recommend informing your physician about any supplements you are taking.Are there any precautions associated with this product?Food Sensitivity Relief with Diamine Oxidase comes with the following precaution: While this product helps break down histamine, it does not prevent severe allergic reactions or gluten-related (celiac) responses. Avoid consuming foods you are allergic to.Is this product tested for heavy metals, contaminants, and potency?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. product.description:

This formula combines 5 g of creatine monohydrate and 2 g of acetyl-L-carnitine in an unflavored, gluten-free powder. 

Health benefits at a glance: Do you want to feel more energized? Both creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine support cellular energy function. Creatine is renowned for enhancing exercise performance and improving body composition. Acetyl-L-carnitine has been shown to promote both mental and physical energy as well as cognitive function. Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus combines these two compounds in a convenient, unflavored, gluten-free powder. Both these ingredients are derived from amino acids and play key roles in supporting the body's energy production processes.This powerful combination can help you to stay mentally and physically refreshed and is a great solution for energy and performance, whether you are at the gym, in the office, or on the go.

The science behind the product:Potent duo for energy supportBoth creatine and acetyl-L-carnitine help brain and body cells generate ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the primary energy source essential for numerous biological processes that maintain your health. (1,2) Creatine and carnitine content in muscle is lower in vegetarians and the elderly. (3-5) CREATINE: Exercise performance & lean musclesIt is naturally present in muscles, the brain, and other high-energy-demand cells. Creatine forms a compound inside cells that provides the power required to ‘recycle’ ATP. Creatine is essential for an active lifestyle: it fuels exercise performance, endurance, and recovery. The creatine in Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus can help maintain lean muscle mass, strength, and power and help improve body composition with regular exercise. (2,6)CARNITINE: Healthy function of the brain & nervesCarnitine supports the transport of fatty acids into mitochondria (the tiny powerhouses in every cell), boosting ATP production. Research shows that carnitine helps fight both mental and physical fatigue, supports healthy cognitive function, and promotes efficient cellular energy metabolism. (7) Creatine & Acetyl-L-Carnitine Energy Plus can therefore help keep your mind as strong as your body. Enjoy mind and muscle power support in one convenient formula!

That’s why you need a supplement that tackles a range of symptoms for all-around relief.

The science behind the product:What is premenstrual discomfort?Premenstrual syndrome (PMS) refers to physical and emotional discomforts that occur during the luteal phase of the menstrual cycle. (1-4)Ginger extract for physical reliefA randomized controlled study of 50 women aged 18 to 35 found that ginger extract supplementation significantly reduced premenstrual discomforts, such as menstrual cramps, lower back pain, tiredness, and PMS-related nausea compared to a placebo.   • Mental clarity: Supporting clear thinking & cognitive performance throughout the day

Liposomal Magtein™ combines magnesium L-threonate with phosphatidylcholine to support brain health and stress management.

Health benefits at a glance:Liposomal Magtein™ can promote immediate, short-term brain function and long-term mental clarity by reducing stress and supporting neurotransmitter regulation.The formula comes with exceptional bioavailability and absorption due to Quicksilver Scientific’s liposomal delivery technology. Why it works:This brain supplement contains patented magnesium L-threonate (Magtein) and 450 mg of highly purified phosphatidylcholine (PC) per serving.An overstimulated nervous system floods the body with stress hormones, disrupting focus, sleep, and calm. The studied Magtein is shown to work by calming the overactive side of the brain, encouraging the body to transition from a fight-or-flight response into a more relaxed state.PC is a well-known phospholipid for supporting neuronal membranes and healthy neurotransmission, supercharging the brain function.Together, these effective nutrients can support balanced brain signaling and stress management, helping to create optimal conditions for:Cognitive power: Sharper memory, focus, and learningStress relief: Calmer nervous system, quality sleep, and general well-being

The science behind the product:Clinically proven “smarter" magnesiumThe mineral magnesium is essential for brain health, playing a key role in nerve cell communication, memory, and protecting against overstimulation. However, not all magnesium supplements are readily absorbed into the central nervous system.Magtein, as magnesium L-threonate, is developed from MIT research and is the only scientifically validated magnesium to cross the blood-brain barrier.Increased magnesium level in the brain supports its natural balance and synaptic plasticity (the brain's ability to change), neural connections, and neurotransmitter balance. This again can promote optimal brain health and peak performance. Liposomes & superior deliveryIngredient absorption and bioavailability are essential for achieving real health results. Liposomes can provide efficient uptake, but not every liposomal supplement is created equal.Quicksilver Scientific’s liquid liposomes have a clear consistency, which can only be achieved with nanoparticle sizing between 20-100 nanometers. These small liposomes allow absorption of ingredients as soon as they hit the mouth.The advanced delivery of Liposomal Magtein® can provide a formula with fast-acting benefits.

For you, if you really want to protect and strengthen your health

Ergo-Thione+ contains the antioxidants ergothioneine (found in mushrooms), glutathione, vitamin C, and selenium. Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is ergothioneine? It’s a sulfur-containing amino acid found naturally in certain foods like mushrooms, black beans, and oat bran.Ergothioneine is an adaptive antioxidant that has its own dedicated transporters in the body. This allows the nutrient to concentrate in tissues and then go where it’s needed the most. However, this extraordinary nutrient is difficult to absorb in its pure form. The advanced liposomal delivery of Ergo-Thione+ improves upon the absorption of ergothioneine and the formula's other antioxidants for fast-acting effects. This supplement is vegan, sugar-free, and tested non-GMO, allergen-free, soy protein-free, and gluten-free.

Ergo-Thione+ also includes glutathione, vitamin C, and selenium for synergistic support. This unique blend can neutralize free radicals and work intelligently within the body's antioxidant network to:Restore glutathione levelsProtect cells from oxidative stressEncourage a healthy inflammatory responsePromote mitochondrial functionProvide detoxification supportActivate key longevity pathways for optimal health

The science behind the product:Immediate action & ongoing resilienceThe ergothioneine in Ergo-Thione serves as a hub that connects the other antioxidants and has an extremely unique ability to deliver “on-demand” antioxidant action, concentrating in damaged tissues.Moreover, the concentration of ergothioneine in cells can provide a reserve of antioxidant support useful for long-term wellness.Liposomal delivery for exceptional absorptionQuicksilver’s proprietary technology can ensure high bioavailability and absorption of the ingredients to achieve maximum benefits and impact of this innovative formula.By encapsulating the antioxidant blend within protective liposomes, the ingredients are secure from the harsh environment of the digestive tract and can easily pass through cell membranes to reach their cellular targets intact. The liposomes allow the uptake of ingredients as soon as they hit the mouth.

Regular, healthy bowel movements are essential for healthy digestion. Constipation can disturb the gut’s natural balance, leading to an unhealthy microbiome. The capsules are vegan, sugar-free, gluten-free, and tested allergen-free.

Why it works:Lack of regularity, a chain reactionA healthy digestive system and balanced gut microbiome start with regularity and consistent elimination.Natural binders such as charcoal and bentonite clay may slow down digestion, which can cause constipation.Moreover, constipation can disturb the gut’s natural balance, leading to an unhealthy microbiome.Again, an imbalanced gut can trigger unwanted immune responses and contribute to various health issues.Constipation reliefMagnesium hydroxide is a well-established compound for supporting relief from constipation by promoting smooth and healthy bowel motility.

The science behind the product:Natural binders such as activated charcoal, bentonite clay, and zeolite can cause constipation, especially when used without adequate hydration.If you are taking Ultra Binder (for instance), adding 1–2 capsules of magnesium hydroxide can promote regularity and encourage effective toxin elimination through the gastrointestinal tract (GI tract).Unlike stimulant laxatives, magnesium hydroxide works by drawing water into the intestines, helping to soften stool and increase its volume, which can encourage natural elimination. Moreover, using such a mild osmotic agent can help maintain the microbiome’s natural balance and contribute to long-term gastrointestinal health.

product.title: Hair Growth for Men
product.description:
• Hair growth support: Can promote fuller, thicker hair with clinically researched botanicals.
  • Reduced shedding: Helping maintain normal DHT levels to minimize hair loss.
  • Improved thickness & volume: Supporting hair follicle health for denser-looking hair.
  • Clinically proven results: 95% showed positive hair regrowth in expert assessments.
  • Dual botanical formula: Featuring ActriSave® (black rice & prickly pear) and Vispo® (saw palmetto).

Hair Growth for Men can support your hair's thickness, fullness, and growth with two clinically studied extract blends.

Health benefits at a glance:Are you struggling with thinning hair? Research shows that specific plants can promote hair health. Hair Growth for Men combines two clinically researched extracts shown to support hair growth, thickness, and overall appearance. This supplement is gluten-free and non-GMO.

Why it works:Supporting hair growthThis formula is designed for men’s thinning hair and can promote hair fullness, thickness, and volume. It delivers two standardized hair-supporting extract blends: ActriSave®: A duo of black rice and prickly pearVispo®: Featuring saw palmettoReducing hair lossHealthy hair growth starts at the roots, and supporting hair follicles, the hair root cells, is essential for hair health. The hormone DHT is involved in sustaining the condition of hair follicle health, and an increase in DHT is associated with hair loss and decreased hair growth. Hair Growth for Men can help reduce shedding by maintaining normal levels of DHT.

The science behind the product:An extract combo of black rice & prickly pearIn a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial, 86 men aged 18 to 55 took 250 mg of the combination of black rice and prickly pear extracts daily for 6 months. The results were measured using participant questionnaires and phototrichogram analysis, a clinical scoring of hair growth by an expert.Photographic assessments reviewed by experts showed positive results in 95% of hair regrowth scores for those taking this extract combination, versus only 34% in the placebo group. (1)The questionnaire also revealed positive feedback; 75% of participants in the extract group were satisfied with their hair after six months. Over 63% reported seeing results within the first two months of taking the black rice and prickly pear combo. (2) Standardized extract of Saw PalmettoIn a randomized, double-blind study, either a special, standardized saw palmetto extract or a placebo was given to participants between 18 and 50 years old.The results were measured at both the 8- and 16-week marks, using expert-administered hair counts (including hair comb and hair pull tests), self-evaluation, and photographic analysis.Expert assessments of the saw palmetto group showed promising results in both the hair-comb test (measuring loose hairs after combing) and the hair-pull test. (2)The self-evaluation questionnaire gathered appearance-related scores, with 50% of the saw palmetto group reporting a visible improvement in hair thickness. Impact on DHT (dihydrotestosterone)In the same 4-month study, researchers sought to measure saw palmetto’s effect on DHT. The outcome showed that the saw palmetto extract helped achieve DHT levels within the normal range compared with the placebo group, helping to minimize hair loss. (2)

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQWhat is in Hair Growth for Men?This formula combines standardized black rice extract, prickly pear flower extract, and saw palmetto oil extract to support healthy hair.How does this supplement work?The blend of extracts can help nourish the health of hair follicles, which are the root cells responsible for activating and supporting new hair growth. In a clinical study, men taking this combination spent more time in the growth (anagen) phase of the hair cycle, helping reduce hair thinning. The formula also includes standardized saw palmetto oil extract that can help maintain already normal dihydrotestosterone (DHT) levels.Who is Hair Growth for Men for?This product is designed for men who want to support their hair’s health, thickness, fullness, density, and growth. When can I expect an effect?In studies of people who took the nutrients in Hair Growth for Men, effects on hair thickness and hair growth were seen in 3-4 months, with the best effects seen after 6 months of consistent use. When is the best time to take it? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? The suggested use is one (1) softgel daily after dinner. Always follow the instructions on the supplement label. Can I take this if my hair isn’t thinning?This formula can help support the hair health of both those who are experiencing thinning hair and those who are not.Can women take this product?This product was intended to be used by men to support their hair growth.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Hair Growth for Men is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?No, this product is not vegetarian. It was made with bovine-derived gelatin softgels.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.

  • Gentle on digestion: Well-tolerated magnesium that can help reduce gastrointestinal discomfort.

Magnesium Glycinate delivers 105 mg of elemental magnesium in a highly bioavailable form that your body can easily absorb and use.

Health benefits at a glance:Magnesium is crucial for a strong heart, steady nerves, flexible muscles, and resilient bones. These body systems use magnesium in different ways, and magnesium glycinate is a highly bioavailable form that allows the different parts of your body to make use of it.Life Extension’s Magnesium Glycinate offers 105 mg of elemental magnesium, which means the effective, absorbable dose you're getting. The formula is gluten-free and vegan/vegetarian.

Why it works:Just like you need the right tool for a specific task (a screwdriver for screws and a hammer for nails), your body needs different nutrients to perform various functions. It can even make use of the same nutrient (such as magnesium) in multiple ways, depending on the job.What makes magnesium glycinate so unique? It combines this essential mineral with the amino acid glycine. The result is a gentle, well-absorbed type of magnesium that your body can effectively use, making it a smart choice for daily magnesium intake.

The science behind the product:Magnesium & glycine: Highly absorbable typeMagnesium glycinate is a form bound to two glycine amino acids, which is why it’s technically called magnesium bisglycinate. This combination creates a type of magnesium that can be easily absorbed and used by the body. (1) Maintaining healthy magnesium levels is important for overall well-being, and taking a dietary supplement is an easy way to support that.When choosing a magnesium supplement, consider the following:Concentration of elemental magnesium per doseGastrointestinal tolerance: how well your body tolerates it These individual factors can help you find the form of magnesium that works best for you. The two key benefits of magnesium glycinate:Superior absorption: Magnesium glycinate is known for its excellent bioavailability. (1)Gentle on the GI-tract: Magnesium glycinate delivers a lower amount of elemental magnesium per dose, which can help reduce gastrointestinal discomfort that some people experience when taking magnesium. (1)Magnesium supports your entire bodyMagnesium plays a role in over 300 biochemical processes, including:Bone health: Magnesium promotes strong bones and teeth by helping regulate calcium balance, which is vital for maintaining healthy bone density. (2)Muscles & nerves: Magnesium supports the communication between nerve and muscle cells, helping to maintain a healthy nervous system and proper muscle function and control. (2)Cardiovascular health: Magnesium encourages a steady heartbeat, normal blood pressure levels, and healthy function of blood vessels and the endothelium. (2)FAQWhat does magnesium do in the body?Magnesium is involved in over 300 vital processes that keep your body running smoothly, from supporting your muscles and nerves to maintaining strong bones and a healthy heart.What’s inside Life Extension’s Magnesium Glycinate?Each capsule delivers 105 mg of elemental magnesium from the highly absorbable form of magnesium bisglycinate. What makes magnesium glycinate so well-absorbed?In magnesium glycinate, the magnesium is bound to glycine, which is a non-essential amino acid. This unique structure allows it to be absorbed through amino acid pathways in the body, making it a more bioavailable and gentle form of magnesium.Who is Magnesium Glycinate for?This form is ideal for anyone seeking this popular, well-tolerated, highly absorbable magnesium supplement to help maintain healthy magnesium levels.I’m already taking another magnesium, should I switch?The best magnesium for you depends on your personal needs. There are several effective forms, but magnesium glycinate stands out for its absorption and digestive tolerance. Regardless of the type you choose, what matters most is taking this important mineral consistently and at the right dosage to support your overall health.How is magnesium glycinate different from magnesium citrate?The key difference lies in which compound the magnesium is bound to. Magnesium glycinate is paired with the amino acid glycine, known for its calming properties, while magnesium citrate is combined with citric acid. Both are bioavailable and support bone and whole-body health, but your choice may depend on personal preference and goals.When should I take Magnesium Glycinate, and with or without food?You can take one capsule one to three times daily, at any time, morning or night, with or without food. Just be sure to follow the dosage and usage guidelines on the label for best results.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There’s no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Magnesium Glycinate is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?Magnesium Glycinate formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian/vegan?Yes, this product is vegetarian/vegan and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is it non-GMO?Yes, all ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.Are there other magnesium forms?Yes, there are, and they can be combined for different purposes, which can be found in these products and forms: Neuro-Mag®: Magnesium threonate capsules is perfect for short-term memory, quick thinking, and cognitive support. Brain health, memory, cognition.Calm-Mag: Magnesium taurate can support a healthy stress response, which helps to calm your mind. Heart health, calming effects.Magnesium Hydroxide: Healthy bowel motility and GI regularity.Liposomal Magtein®: Liquid magnesium L-threonate with superior absorption.Magnesium Caps: Whole-body health: Delivers 3 forms of magnesium: oxide, citrate (whole-body, well-absorbed), succinate (energy metabolism, high absorption).Magnesium Glycinate: This popular form of magnesium is well-absorbed, so it's easy for the body to use it. Sleep, stress, muscle recovery, and long-term use.

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.

product.title: Hair Growth for Women
product.description:
• Fuller, denser hair: Can promote improved hair volume & thickness with phytoceramides.
  • Reduced shedding: Helping maintain normal DHT levels to minimize hair loss.
  • Stronger hair growth: Supporting healthy hair follicles for optimal growth from the roots.
  • Clinical results: Up to 90% reported less shedding & healthier hair after 12 weeks.
  • Dual botanical formula: Featuring Ceramosides™ (wheat phytoceramides) & Vispo® (saw palmetto).

Hair Growth for Women can help you achieve fuller, healthier hair from the inside out with two clinically researched plant extracts.

Health benefits at a glance:Hair loss and thinning can affect women at any age, impacting confidence and well-being. Hair Growth for Women combines two clinically researched plant extracts demonstrated to promote fuller hair and help prevent hair loss, supporting the roots of the hair. This supplement is gluten-free and non-GMO.

Why it works:Supporting hair growthHair Growth for Women is specially developed for women who are seeking a solution for strong and healthy hair. The product provides two scientifically studied plant extracts shown to stimulate the hair to grow faster: Ceramosides™ Oil Neutra: Phytoceramide extract (wheat polar lipids, seed) Vispo®: Featuring saw palmetto extract (fruit) Healthy hair starts at the roots; therefore, it’s important to support the hair follicles, which are the hair root cells. DHT is a hormone that helps regulate hair follicle health, and elevated levels of DHT are linked to hair loss and reduced growth.This hair supplement can help keep existing hair and reduce shedding by maintaining normal levels of DHT.

The science behind the product:Healthy hair growth cycle with phytoceramides Ceramides are essential lipids that play a key role in cellular structure, development, and renewal, including hair cells. They also help preserve collagen integrity, which is a vital building block for strong, shiny hair.The wheat phytoceramide extract in Hair Growth for Women is clinically studied to promote hair health. In a trial, 24–64-year-old women took either 30 mg of extract or a placebo daily for 84 days. (1)Hair examinations were done on days 56 and 84 through expert tests, including a pull test for hair fall, clinical scoring of density and volume, participant questionnaires, hair cycle analysis, measurements of hair diameter and growth, and scalp sebum evaluation.Expert reports showed that up to 64% in the wheat phytoceramide group experienced improved hair density and volume compared to baseline. Self-reported results revealed that up to 90% reported less shedding, improved hair growth, and healthier hair after 12 weeks. Both pre- and postmenopausal women experienced similar benefits.Saw palmetto for visibly thicker hairIn a study, participants took either a special, standardized saw palmetto oil extract or a placebo. Analysis found that the saw palmetto extract group showed reduced hair shedding and hair loss, as measured by the hair comb test (counting loose hairs after combing) and the hair pull test. (2)Results were measured at intervals of 8 and 16 weeks, using hair counts done by experts (including hair comb and hair pull tests), self-evaluation, and photographic analysis. In the self-evaluation questionnaire, participants in the saw palmetto group reported increased hair thickness.Saw palmetto effects on DHTIn the same study, researchers examined how saw palmetto influences dihydrotestosterone (DHT). They discovered that supplementation helped stabilize DHT levels, keeping them within the normal range throughout the trial. (2)Renew your hair care from within Hair Growth for Women and enjoy your hair again!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQWhat is in this product?Hair Growth for Women is a nutritional supplement formulated with a combination of standardized saw palmetto oil extract and wheat phytoceramides to support healthy hair growth and overall hair health.Who is Hair Growth for Women intended for?This formula is for women of all ages who want to promote fuller, denser hair, encourage healthy growth, and minimize shedding.How does Hair Growth for Women work?This formula can help maintain collagen integrity with wheat phytoceramide extract. It also includes saw palmetto extract, which has been shown to influence dihydrotestosterone (DHT) levels, a hormone that plays a key role in hair follicle health.When will I see results?In studies on the nutrients in Hair Growth for Women, improvements in hair thickness and growth were observed after two months, with the most noticeable results after four months of consistent use.When is the best time to take it? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? The suggested use is one softgel at any time of day, with or without food. Always follow the instructions on the supplement label. Can I take this if my hair isn’t thinning?Yes, this formula can help support hair health regardless of hair status.Can men take this product?This product was intended to be used by women to support their hair growth.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Supplements are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Hair Growth for Women is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?No, this product is not vegetarian. It was made with bovine-derived gelatin softgels.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over 18.

product.title: GABA (Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid)
product.description:
For you, if you want to get a quick, natural relief from stress when you need it most

GABA (Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid) can:

  • Support relief from occasional stress

  • Promote a healthy stress response in only 30 minutes

  • Support a relaxed state of mind & balanced mood

  • Encourage healthy sleep

GABA is perfect for stressful moments like an important meeting or event. This naturally occurring amino acid works right when you need it, faster than traditional stress support supplements. This formula is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is GABA? It is a naturally occurring amino acid, clinically studied for its ability to relieve occasional stress while promoting a relaxed state of mind. Doctor’s visits, public speaking, and job interviews all share one thing: they can stir up stress or worry. Unlike standard stress relief supplements, GABA can promote a calm response to stress in as little as 30 minutes.The supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Why it works:Gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) is produced in the body and serves as the brain’s main inhibitory neurotransmitter. It helps regulate the brain’s “let’s go” (excitatory) and “slow down” (inhibitory) signals, keeping communication between neurons in balance. By maintaining healthy GABA levels, the brain is better equipped to handle life’s stressors.Life Extension’s GABA (Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid) can ease tension, promote relaxation and calm, a balanced mood, and healthy sleep without that drowsy feeling the next day.

The science behind the product:Help your body respond to anticipated stressDemanding situations like job interviews, medical appointments, public speaking, upcoming travels, etc., can bring on stress that impacts your well-being. This high-quality supplement with clinically studied GABA, derived from Lactobacillus hilgardii K-3 fermentation, can promote a healthy response to such occasional stress.Occasional stress and GABAIn a placebo-controlled clinical trial, healthy participants with a self-reported fear of heights took 100 mg of GABA before crossing a suspension bridge. (1) Researchers evaluated their stress response by measuring levels of salivary immunoglobulin A (IgA), an immune protein that typically decreases during stressful situations. (2-5) Results showed that those who took GABA maintained normal salivary IgA levels compared to placebo. (1)GABA and challenging tasksStressful mental tasks can be demanding. In a single-blind, randomized, crossover, placebo-controlled study, participants faced a combined stress load: A 10-minute arithmetic test plus a 5-minute auditory target detection task (DT). Three sessions were conducted at approximately 10, 40, and 70 minutes after participants took either 100 mg of GABA or a placebo. (6)Then a subjective survey evaluated six dimensions of stress, including tension and anger. Researchers also recorded participants’ brainwave activity. (6)Those who took GABA reported feeling less strained after completing the tasks compared to placebo. Brainwave data also indicated a healthy physiological stress response in the GABA group. (6)“Fight-or-flight” reaction and heart rateIn another randomized, double-blind, crossover, placebo-controlled study, also using an arithmetic stress test, heart rate was measured to determine sympathetic and parasympathetic nervous system activity after GABA intake. (7) The results showed that GABA produced a quick return to a healthy baseline following the stress response.GABA for better sleep support*GABA can also influence sleep. In a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trial, healthy adults aged 24–57 took 100 mg of GABA 30 minutes before bedtime. (8) Over one week, multiple sleep quality index scores were collected. Individuals in the GABA group reported falling asleep more quickly than those taking a placebo, and they did not experience next-day drowsiness. (8)*For occasional sleeplessnessTake it slow with GABA when you need it most!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQWhat is inside GABA?Each capsule delivers 100 mg of PharmaGABA®, a clinically studied, trademarked form of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA).What is GABA, and how does it work?Gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) is a key inhibitory neurotransmitter that helps balance excitatory (“start”) and inhibitory (“stop”) signalling between brain cells. By supporting this balance, GABA promotes a sense of calm. Life Extension’s formula provides clinically studied GABA, derived from the natural fermentation of Lactobacillus hilgardii K-3, to help ease occasional stress, support mood balance, and promote healthy sleep.Who is GABA for?This supplement is ideal for anyone looking for quick relief from occasional stress. GABA can also encourage a relaxed state of mind and provide sleep support.When can I expect results?In clinical studies, GABA supported a healthy stress response within just 30 minutes, while sleep benefits were observed after one week of use. Individual experiences may vary, as everyone responds differently.When is the best time to take GABA? Should it be with food or on an empty stomach?If you expect a stressful situation, take one capsule as needed, any time of day, with or without food, up to twice daily. Always follow the directions on your supplement label for proper use.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it is always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Life Extension’s GABA is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This supplement is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this product vegetarian?Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this product gluten-free?Yes, this supplement is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This formula was designed for adults over the age of 18. Always consult with your child’s physician before giving them any supplements.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (2 capsules): %RI* Gamma-aminobutyric acid (from PharmaGABA®) 200 mg **
