product.title: Creatine Powder
product.description:
For you, whenever you need to stay at the top of your game

Creatine Powder can:

Promote lean muscle mass & strength

  • Boost exercise performance

  • Encourage faster exercise recovery

  • Support cellular energy metabolism

  • Offer easy-mix, unflavored powder

Creatine monohydrate can promote muscle strength, support energy, and increase exercise performance and recovery. Available in an unflavored, convenient, and easy-to-mix powder form. This supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Health benefits at a glance:First of all, what is creatine? It is produced naturally in the body from glycine and arginine, helped by S-adenosylmethionine. Creatine is crucial for maintaining muscle health and is a foundation for an active life. However, the natural creatine levels decrease over time.This powder supplement is pure, unflavored, and easily absorbed. Add it to eight ounces of water, smoothies, or your favorite drink. Moreover, the formula is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Why it works:Strong muscles are not enough; you also need lasting energy for demanding activities, such as powerlifting, resistance training, or even moving furniture.Creatine is one of the best researched nutrients for supporting lean muscle mass, strength, and power.Each scoop of Creatine Powder offers 5 grams of clinically studied creatine monohydrate to promote muscle health, cellular energy, exercise, and recovery – making it simple to improve your performance at work, in the gym, or wherever you need it the most.

The science behind the product:Creatine is mainly produced in the liver and kidneys from the amino acids arginine and glycine, with support from S-adenosylmethionine. It circulates through the bloodstream to supply energy to cells across the body, though natural levels decline with age. (1)Exercise performance, recovery & lean muscleCreatine is one of the most studied nutrients for building lean muscle mass and boosting strength and power. It’s widely used by both professional and amateur athletes, making it a must-have for nearly any exercise routine. (2,3)Energy at the cellular levelCreatine plays a key role in producing ATP (adenosine triphosphate), which is the cell’s primary energy source. By recycling ATP in the body, creatine helps provide the energy cells need to support multiple biological processes, essential to keep us healthy.Creatine for womenNaturally, women have 70–80% lower internal creatine stores than men and often get less from their diet. During hormone-related changes, creatine metabolism in the body may also change. Creatine supplementation can help support strength and exercise performance in both pre- and postmenopausal women. (4,5)Creatine & healthy agingMany clinical studies show that creatine can promote upper- and lower-body strength, physical and muscular performance, and body composition in older adults, especially when paired with resistance training. The most notable results are often seen after about 12 weeks. (3, 5-7)For strength and stamina, both inside and outside the gym, think creatine!

How to use:Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.FAQ:What is in Creatine Powder?Each scoop of Creatine Powder contains 5 grams of creatine monohydrate, an amino acid derivative studied for muscle strength and recovery support.Who is Creatine Powder for?It’s designed for anyone looking to support muscle function, exercise performance, and energy metabolism by fueling ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the body’s primary energy source.Can women benefit from creatine monohydrate?Yes, studies indicate that creatine can increase strength and performance throughout hormone-related changes in pre- and postmenopausal women.Creatine monohydrate vs. micronizedBoth forms of creatine promote muscle strength, stamina, performance, and recovery. The difference lies only in particle size: Micronized creatine has smaller particles that may dissolve more quickly, but research shows no added effectiveness over standard creatine monohydrate. Creatine Powder is unflavored and mixes smoothly in 8 ounces of water or your preferred beverage.When will I notice results?In studies, creatine users experienced improvements in physical and mental energy within 10–12 weeks. Since everyone is unique and results can vary, we recommend following the study duration to evaluate effectiveness.When and how should I take Creatine Powder?You can take this product any time of day, with or without food, whatever works best for you. Mix one scoop into 8 ounces of water, juice, a shake, or a smoothie.What does Creatine Powder taste like? Are there any added sugars?This powder is unflavored and does not contain added sugars.Can this supplement interact with my medication?There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it’s always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking.Has this product been tested for quality and safety?All Life Extension’s raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension’s specifications.Does this supplement contain allergens?Creatine Powder is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans.Where is this product produced?This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards (“good manufacturing practices”).Is this formulation vegetarian?Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients.Is this supplement gluten-free?Yes, this product is gluten-free.Is this product non-GMO?Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO.Can children take this product?This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child’s physician before giving them any supplements.

product.description:
• Fast-acting sleep support: Advanced liposomal technology for quicker absorption
  • Flexible dosing: 500 mcg per spray allows personalized melatonin intake
  • Ultimate convenience: No water needed, spray directly before bedtime
  • Botanical enhancement: Enriched with calming lemon balm extract

Melatonin+ Liposomal uses cutting-edge TINYsphere® technology that can deliver melatonin up to 3 times faster than standard supplements. Each spray provides 500 mcg of melatonin plus 1.25 mg of lemon balm extract for comprehensive sleep support. Made in EU.

WHAT IS MELATONIN?Melatonin is a natural hormone produced by your pineal gland in response to darkness. It‘s called the "sleep hormone“ and plays a crucial role in regulating your body's circadian rhythm, which is your internal biological clock.Your body naturally produces melatonin in the evening hours, signaling that it's time to prepare for sleep. But factors like age, stress, and irregular schedules can disrupt your natural melatonin production and affect sleep quality and duration.Additionally, exposure to blue light from screens and devices can suppress melatonin release, making it harder to fall asleep.WHY CHOOSE LIPOSOMAL MELATONIN?Do you struggle with melatonin supplements that take too long to work? Traditional melatonin forms often have limited bioavailability and slow absorption, requiring you to take them 30-60 minutes before your intended sleep time.Liposomal delivery changes everything by encapsulating melatonin in liposomes (lipid spheres) that protect it during digestion and facilitate direct cellular uptake. This cutting-edge technology can provide quicker action and more efficient absorption compared to standard tablets or capsules.The handiness of a spray means you can take it right in your bedroom without needing water or worrying about timing your dose perfectly.WHY CHOOSE VITALIZED MELATONIN SLEEP SPRAY?Revolutionary TINYsphere® technologyMelatonin+ Liposomal uses clinically studied TINYsphere® technology:Up to 3 times faster absorption compared to standard melatoninImproved bioavailability with exceptional cellular uptakeThe effects start in minutes rather than hoursProtected delivery that bypasses digestionPersonalized, flexible dosingAre you looking for personalized melatonin support? Each spray delivers exactly 500 mcg of melatonin, allowing you to adjust your dose according to your individual needs. Start with one spray and optimize as needed. With 200 sprays per bottle, you have a long-lasting supply.Enriched with lemon balmThe formula includes 1.25 mg of lemon balm extract (Melissa officinalis) per spray. It‘s a traditional herb that can promote relaxation and healthy sleep. This botanical nutrient works synergistically with melatonin to support your transition to restful sleep.Simple & practical formatThe unique spray format is very convenient:No water needed – perfect for bedside useDirect absorption in the mouthPortable and travel-friendlyPrecise dosing with every sprayA clean, premium productThis EU-made supplement is vegan, non-GMO, and gluten-free. Furthermore, it does not contain alcohol, preservatives, artificial colors, flavors, or sweeteners.HOW TO TAKEPlease follow the dosage guidelines outlined in the Supplement facts or consult your healthcare practitioner for recommendations.

Active Vitality & Strength can:

  • Support overall health & quality of life

With just one capsule a day, this supplement can promote muscle strength and endurance fitness – key pillars of vitality. Maintain your physical independence and overall quality of life with Active Vitality & Strength. It’s gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Health benefits at a glance: The word "vitality" refers to your overall sense of how alive and energized you feel, and this feeling may decrease as you age. The clinically studied nutrients in this once-daily formula work alongside regular exercise to support muscle strength and functional fitness, which are foundations of long-term vitality. Active Vitality & Strength can help you feel stronger, steadier, and more ready for everyday movement. This supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Why it works: Research shows that more than 55% of adults aren't getting enough physical activity, and maintaining muscle strength and vitality becomes increasingly important with age.This product is formulated to complement regular exercise. It contains a patented combo of Sphaeranthus indicus and Mangifera indica extract that has been shown to promote vitality, physical strength, and functional fitness – keeping you able for the things you love. Whether you're keeping up with the kids, carrying groceries, or enjoying a good moment, Active Vitality & Strength can support you to live life on your terms.

The science behind the product: As we age, physical and functional changes can affect muscle strength, daily mobility, independence, and overall quality of life. (1)Benefits and support for older adults In a randomized, placebo-controlled study, men and postmenopausal women took 650 mg of a patented S. indicus and M. indica extract blend. They reported improvements in vitality and functional fitness. These benefits included better muscle strength, hand-grip strength, aerobic performance, and muscle endurance compared to the placebo group.Participants also completed a simple at-home routine three times per week, performing body-weight resistance exercises in three sets of 10 repetitions for both upper- and lower-body movements. The researchers measured results at the start of the study and again at weeks 4, 8, and 12.The researchers measured results at the start of the study and again at weeks 4, 8, and 12: General vitality: The participants were asked a series of questions to measure perceived vitality, such as whether they felt "full of life," as well as questions about energy levels and fatigue. By the end of the study, those taking the S. indicus and M. indica extract blend experienced notable improvements in these areas compared to placebo. Strength of leg muscle: The individuals also showed better results in leg extension strength of 3.22%, 4.86%, and 6.86% at weeks 4, 8, and 12, compared to the placebo group. (2) Muscle endurance: The women showed a stronger response to the S. indicus and M. indica extract blend than men, but both groups experienced improved muscle endurance compared to the placebo. (2) Strength of hand grip: The patented S. Indicus and M. indica extract blend also showed enhancements in hand grip strength by 6.10%, 8.56%, and 9.21% at weeks 4, 8, and 12 compared to the placebo group. (2) Test: Six-minute walk: The participants taking the patented S. indicus and M. indica extract blend increased their average walking distance over the 12-week study. (2) Test: Sit to stand: Those in the extract blend group also improved their number of sit-to-stand repetitions over the course of the study. (2) With Active Vitality & Strength, you can go for the gold in your golden years, keeping your liveliness, energy, and physical independence.

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ What is in Active Vitality & Strength? Active Vitality & Strength provides 650 mg of STRENGTHERA™, a trademarked blend of East Indian globe thistle (S. Indicus) flower and mango tree (M. Indica) bark. These extracts are standardized to deliver consistent levels of their key active compounds, 7-hydroxy frullanolide and mangiferin. Who is the supplement intended for? Active Vitality & Strength is made for adults who want to support vitality, maintain muscle strength, and promote everyday endurance and performance as they age, all in one convenient, once-daily supplement. Vitality, what is it? Vitality refers to how "alive" you feel, the overall sense of energy and balance, both physically and mentally. Supporting vitality helps you stay strong, handle daily demands with ease, and feel your best at every stage of life. How does the product work? Active Vitality & Strength can promote vitality, endurance, and muscle strength through two non-stimulant plant extracts shown to promote healthy blood flow, defend against everyday oxidative stress, and support the body's natural resilience. When can I expect to notice an effect? In a clinical study using this ingredient blend, participants began experiencing support for endurance, muscle function, and overall well-being after about 4 weeks, with the most pronounced benefits appearing around 12 weeks. Individual responses may vary, so your experience may differ. For the best evaluation, we recommend following the full study duration. When is the best time to take the supplement? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? Please follow the instructions on the product label. We suggest taking one capsule daily with food, at whatever time of day fits naturally into your routine. Will Active Vitality & Strength interact with my medication? There is no evidence that the nutrients in this supplement negatively interact with prescription medications. Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? product.title: Biological Aging Defense
product.description:
For you, if you want to nurture a healthy biological aging

Biological Aging Defense can:

  • Promote healthy biological aging by targeting the main hallmarks of aging

  • Help maintain DNA methylation age, a key aging biomarker

  • Support healthy telomere length, a crucial indicator of biological aging

Biological Aging Defense can help you upgrade your healthy aging strategy with a formula designed to support two essential biomarkers: telomere length and DNA methylation age. The supplement contains a standardized extract of the increasingly popular scarlet beebalm together with a lemon balm extract.

Health benefits at a glance Chronological age is fixed, but biological age is shaped by lifestyle and nutrient intake. Biological Aging Defense once-daily formula contains a standardized extract of scarlet beebalm (Monarda didyma) and a lemon balm extract (Melissa officinalis) to help maintain telomere length and DNA methylation age, two key biomarkers of how aging affects the body's cells, tissues, and organ systems. The formula is vegetarian, gluten-free, and non-GMO.

Why it works: A variety of factors influence the natural aging process, including the gradual buildup of oxidative stress in the body. (1-3) Aging can be viewed in two distinct ways: Chronological age Chronological age is simply the number of years you've lived, the age marked by birthdays, experiences, memories, personal milestones, and wisdom accumulated throughout your lifetime Biological age Biological age offers a different perspective, a laboratory-based estimate that reflects how your cells and systems are functioning over time. It tells whether your body is aging faster or slower than your chronological age and can support you in lifestyle changes to keep you young at the cellular level. (4,5) This supplement is designed to support healthy biological aging by targeting two core mechanisms that influence how cells age.

The science behind the product: Preserving the length of the telomeres Your telomeres function like protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes. Over time, they naturally shorten, and as they do, cells lose their ability to divide and perform optimally, contributing to normal aging. In a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study, the individuals taking a standardized scarlet beebalm extract maintained notably longer telomere length compared with placebo by the end of the study. (6) Supporting healthy DNA methylation What is DNA methylation? The biological process of DNA methylation plays a powerful role in how your body functions. It helps regulate gene activity, acting as an on/off switch for certain genes through epigenetics, which is the processes that influence gene expression and overall health. Because DNA methylation patterns shift as we age, researchers use this biomarker to estimate biological age and evaluate healthy aging at the cellular level. In the same clinical study, those taking standardized scarlet beebalm extract showed a lower DNA methylation age compared with the placebo group. (6) Life quality support Participants in this study also reported improvements in overall quality of life while taking standardized scarlet beebalm extract. (6) Time moves forward, but Biological Aging Defense can support healthy biological aging

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ What is in Biological Aging Defense? Biological Aging Defense features a standardized scarlet beebalm extract along with a lemon balm extract providing at least 4% didymin (4 mg). Scarlet beebalm is rich in active compounds, including didymin, that promote healthy aging and overall well-being. Lemon balm serves as a complementary botanical for additional support. Who is Biological Aging Defense for? This supplement is ideal for adults who want to support healthy aging from within. It is especially suited for those seeking to maintain important markers of biological age, including youthful gene expression (epigenetics) and telomere length. What is biological age? Biological age indicates how well your cells and body systems are functioning, offering a deeper view than chronological age, the number of years you have lived. Lifestyle, genetics, nutrition, and environmental factors all influence biological age, meaning your body can age faster or slower than your actual chronological age. Epigenetics is the way your body controls which genes are active and which are not — without changing your DNA. What is DNA methylation & epigenetics? DNA methylation is a natural process that helps regulate healthy gene expression (through epigenetics), influencing whole-body health and cellular function. As we age, DNA methylation changes, which can affect how genes are expressed and how efficiently cells operate. Scientists measure these methylation patterns as biomarkers to estimate biological age and assess how the body is aging at the cellular level. Epigenetics is the whole set of gene-control mechanisms, the overall system your body uses to turn genes "on" or "off" without changing your DNA. It includes several mechanisms that influence how your genes behave. DNA methylation is one of those mechanisms used to measure biological ageng. What are telomeres? Telomeres are protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes that help safeguard DNA stability. Longer telomeres are associated with youth and longevity. Telomere length, together with epigenetics, plays a central role in how your cells age and function over time. When can I expect an effect? In a clinical study using a scarlet beebalm extract standardized to 4% didymin, participants showed a more youthful biological age and longer telomere length after 12 weeks compared with placebo. Individual responses may vary, but following the study's 12-week duration is a good benchmark for evaluating the product's effectiveness.When is the best time to take Biological Aging Defense? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach?We suggest taking one capsule daily with food. Can this supplement interact with my medication? There is no evidence to suggest that the nutrients in this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it's always recommended to inform your healthcare provider about any supplements you are taking. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Does this supplement contain allergens? Biological Aging Defense is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this formulation vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

product.title: Bee Immune Propolis Capsules
product.description:
For you, if you want to “bee” your healthiest self year-round

Bee Immune Propolis Capsules can:

  • Promote a healthy immune response in the respiratory system

  • Help reduce frequency & duration of respiratory immune challenges

  • Offer a formula standardized to active propolis compounds

  • Provide year-round immune support

Bee Immune Propolis Capsules contains standardized bee propolis to support a healthy immune response, upper respiratory tract health, and overall daily wellness. The supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Health benefits at a glance: Honeybees produce propolis, also called bee glue, from plant compounds to build, seal, and help protect the health of their hive. As it turns out, propolis offers similar benefits for your health, too. Bee Immune Propolis Capsules can provide reliable, year-round support for everyday respiratory challenges. The supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Why it works: Bee propolis has been used for generations to fight respiratory challenges by promoting a balanced immune response in the respiratory system. But, because honeybees create propolis from the plants around them, its polyphenol content can vary from hive to hive. As a result, raw propolis or traditional propolis supplements may not always provide consistent results. (1) That is why Life Extension uses a standardized bee propolis with the same polyphenol content in every dose, along with clinically studied support for immune response and respiratory health. The bee propolis in this formula is found to reduce the frequency and duration of everyday respiratory challenges.

The science behind the product: Beneficial standardized propolis Promunel™ is a clinically studied brown propolis ingredient standardized to 12% polyphenols, with a consistent and stable profile of active compounds. This means you get the same amount of useful propolis compounds in every serving. (2,3) Promunel® & higher propolis level In a clinical trial (double-blind, crossover), individuals who consumed 400 mg of standardized propolis had higher levels of propolis phenolic biomarkers in their blood plasma and urine than those taking a placebo. This shows improved bioavailability of these propolis compounds, which means they are well absorbed and available in the body. (4) Respiratory immune challenges & Promunel® In another study (randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled), participants taking 200 mg of standardized bee propolis twice daily reported a 31% decreased chance of experiencing respiratory discomfort compared to those taking a placebo. The participants also observed 29% fewer seasonal respiratory discomfort episodes and a shorter duration of symptoms, 34% decrease, compared to the placebo group. (3) Don't let an unprepared immune defense "sting" you – support your respiratory immune health every day and "bee" ready all year!

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What is in Bee Immune Propolis Capsules? Each daily serving provides 400 mg of Promunel® bee propolis extract, clinically studied and standardized to 12% polyphenols (48 mg). These bioactive compounds have been researched for their role in supporting respiratory and immune health. What is propolis and its function? Propolis is a resin-like substance honeybees make from plant saps and waxes. Bees use it to seal and protect their hive and maintain colony health. In humans, polyphenols in propolis have been studied for their ability to support a healthy immune response, upper respiratory tract health, and overall daily wellness. Who is this product for? Bee Immune Propolis Capsules is designed for adults looking to support immune function, respiratory health, and wellness. What sets Bee Immune Propolis Capsules apart from other propolis products? Raw and traditional propolis products can vary widely depending on region and season. This formula uses Promunel®, produced with a patented extraction process and standardized to 12% polyphenols, ensuring consistent quality and potency. Clinical studies show that Promunel® has 72% bioavailability and identified 72 phenolic compounds in the blood and 85 in the urine after ingestion, demonstrating good absorption from the GI tract. When can I expect results? In a clinical study of people who took Promunel®, respiratory comfort and support were observed after 12 weeks of use. Individual results may vary, and we recommend following the study duration for the best evaluation of product efficacy. When is the best time to take it? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? We suggest taking one capsule twice daily, any time of day, with or without food. Can this product be taken as needed? For ongoing respiratory and immune support, daily use is recommended. Will this supplement interact with my medication? There is no indication that the nutrients within this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we always suggest that you inform your physician of any supplements you are taking. Can it be combined with other immune supplements? Yes, Bee Immune Propolis Capsules can be taken alongside other immune-supporting supplements. There is no indication that this formula interacts with other ingredients. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Who should not take Bee Immune Propolis Capsules? As stated on the product label, avoid this formula if allergic to bees or bee products. Does this supplement contain allergens? Bee Immune Propolis Capsules is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this formulation vegetarian? Yes, Bee Immune Propolis Capsules is vegetarian. It is not suitable for vegans, as propolis is a product made by bees. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

product.title: Bio-Luteolin™
product.description:
For you, if you want to maximize the effect of luteolin

Bio-Luteolin™ can:

  • Promote cellular function & healthy aging

  • Offer up to 14x increased bioavailability (shown in clinical study)*

  • Provide innovative fenugreek fiber coating to improve absorption

*Than regular luteolin, defined as 98% pure powder luteolin

Are you occupied with aging well? Healthy aging begins with your cells. Luteolin is known to support autophagy (cellular "clean-up") and longevity, but is difficult to absorb. Bio-Luteolin™ is up to 14 times* more bioavailable than standard luteolin supplements. The product is gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegetarian.

Health benefits at a glance: First of all, what is luteolin? It is a naturally occurring plant-derived flavonoid with well-studied antioxidant properties. Luteolin is gaining growing attention in scientific research and popularity among healthy aging enthusiasts for its many potential cellular benefits. However, like many health-promoting flavonoids, it is difficult to absorb. Bio-Luteolin™ combines luteolin with galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds to significantly improve bioavailability and maximize its effects.

Why it works: The function of the cells is the foundation for aging well. Luteolin is known for supporting cellular health, such as autophagy (cellular "housekeeping"). But, in most forms, it is poorly absorbed, limiting its potential health benefits. (1,3)The encapsulated coating of galactomannan fibers in Bio-Luteolin™ protects and helps luteolin pass through the digestive system intact, allowing more of it to circulate in the body. The result is up to 14× higher bioavailability and up to 10x free luteolin than compared to regular forms of luteolin. (3)

The science behind the product: Study of luteolin absorption In a study (randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled), participants received luteolin either in its standard form or with the fenugreek fiber coating used in Bio-Luteolin™. Blood plasma levels of both total and free luteolin were measured and found to be significantly higher with the formulated version than with regular luteolin. (3) Promising clinical evidence In another trial (randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled), Bio-Luteolin™ demonstrated clinical efficacy. These results suggest that better absorption allows luteolin to have stronger, more noticeable effects. (4)Include in your healthy aging plan today: Bio-Luteolin™, designed for absorption

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What does Bio-Luteolin™ contain? Each capsule provides 100 mg of the Bio-Luteolin™ Proprietary Blend, including 20 mg of luteolin from Japanese sophora extract and 25 mg of galactomannans derived from fenugreek seed. How does Bio-Luteolin™ work? As we age, the body's natural cellular "clean-up" process, known as autophagy, becomes less efficient. Luteolin has been shown to support components in autophagy, such as AMPK and mTOR, to activate this process and allow for healthy cell clean-up and function. Bio-Luteolin™ delivers luteolin in a form that is up to 14× more bioavailable than standard luteolin, helping the body make better use of it. What makes this supplement more bioavailable? Many flavonoids, including luteolin, are broken down in the digestive system before the body can fully use them. Bio-Luteolin™ includes galactomannans from fenugreek seed, which form a protective matrix around luteolin. This helps slow its breakdown and elimination, allowing higher absorption. As a result, the 20 mg of luteolin in Bio-Luteolin™ can provide exposure comparable to up to 280 mg of unformulated luteolin. Who is Bio-Luteolin™ for? Bio-Luteolin™ is designed for those who want to promote healthy aging with a more absorbable and bioavailable form of luteolin. When is the best time to take Bio-Luteolin™? Take one capsule daily, at any time of day. It can be taken with or without food, depending on your preference. Will this supplement interact with medications? There is no indication that the ingredients in this formula negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we recommend informing your healthcare professional about any supplements you are taking. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Does this supplement contain allergens? Bio-Luteolin™ is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this product vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

That is why Bee Immune Propolis Spray uses the bee propolis Promunel®, which contains the same polyphenol content in every dose. This standardized form is clinically studied to support your upper respiratory tract and a healthy immune response.

The science behind the product: Benefits of standardized propolis & supportive nutrients Bee Immune Propolis Spray delivers an evaluated daily dose of 2,070 mg of Promunel®, a brown propolis extract, standardized to provide 12 mg of polyphenols. This is to ensure a consistent and stable profile of active compounds, which means you get the same amount of beneficial propolis in every dose. (1,2) The oral spray also contains 0,21 mg of riboflavin and 1,5 mg of zinc – nutrients studied for their support of immune and respiratory health. Support for respiratory health & comfort In a study (double-blind, placebo-controlled), participants with respiratory complaints using the standardized bee propolis spray (12-24 mg of propolis polyphenols) 3 times a day for 5 days experienced improvements two days faster compared to the placebo group. (1) Promunel® & higher plasma levels In a clinical trial (double-blind, crossover), individuals who consumed 400 mg of a standardized propolis supplement had significantly higher plasma and urine levels of propolis phenolic compounds biomarkers than those taking a placebo. (3)

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What is in Bee Immune Propolis Spray? The product contains a clinically studied daily dose of 2,070 mg of Promunel® bee propolis, standardized to deliver 12 mg of polyphenols. It also includes 0,21 mg riboflavin and 1,5 mg zinc. These ingredients have been studied for their support of respiratory and immune health. What is propolis and its function? Propolis is a resin-like substance honeybees make from plant saps and waxes. Bees use it to seal and protect their hive and maintain colony health. In humans, polyphenols in propolis have been studied for their ability to support a healthy immune response, upper respiratory tract health, and overall daily well-being. Who is this product for? Bee Immune Propolis Spray is designed for adults of all ages who are seeking fast-acting throat comfort and respiratory immune support. What sets Bee Immune Propolis Capsules apart from other propolis products? Raw and traditional propolis products can vary widely depending on region and season, making it difficult to achieve consistent benefits. This formula uses Promunel®, which uses a patented extraction process resulting in an extract standardized to provide 12 mg of polyphenols daily, and a reproducible fingerprint of polyphenolic markers. Laboratory testing following ingestion of this propolis demonstrated effective gastrointestinal absorption, with 72 phenolic compounds identified in the blood and 85 detected in urine. When can I expect results? In a clinical study of people who took Promunel®, respiratory comfort and support were observed after 12 weeks of use. If you use it three times daily, you may see results in your respiratory health and comfort in as early as 3 days. This was reported for most of the participants in the Promunel® bee propolis group of the clinical study (2 days faster than the placebo group). The most significant effects were noted after 5 days. Individual results may vary, and we recommend following the study duration for the best evaluation of product efficacy. When is the best time to take it? Should it be taken with food or on an empty stomach? For each dose of Bee Immune Propolis Spray, spray 5 times into the mouth and swallow. It's suggested to take 3 doses per day (for a total of 15 sprays daily) for 5 consecutive days. The spray can be taken either with food or on an empty stomach. How does the Bee Immune Propolis Spray compare to the Bee Immune Propolis Capsules? [link] Both products contain Promunel® propolis, undergoing a patented extraction process designed to preserve the full polyphenolic complex found naturally in raw propolis. However, these products should be taken for different uses, dosages, and time periods, based on their clinical studies on immune and respiratory health: For fast-acting immune and respiratory support: The Bee Immune Propolis Spray should be taken for 5 days. For year-round support: Take Bee Immune Propolis Capsules daily, long-term. What does the Bee Immune Propolis Spray taste like? This oral propolis spray has an earthy taste with manuka honey overtones. Will this supplement interact with my medication? There is no indication that the nutrients within this formula would negatively interact with prescription medications. However, it's always recommended that you inform your physician of any supplements you are taking. Can it be combined with other supplements? Yes, Bee Immune Propolis Spray can be added to your existing supplement regimen and can be taken alongside other immune support supplements. There is no indication that this product interacts with other ingredients. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Who should not take Bee Immune Propolis Spray? As stated on the product label, avoid this formula if allergic to bee products. Does this supplement contain allergens? Bee Immune Propolis Spray is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this product vegetarian? Yes, Bee Immune Propolis Spray is vegetarian. However, it is not suitable for vegans as propolis is a product made by bees. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is there added sugar? It contains manuka honey. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. How is the propolis harvested? The resin-like propolis is scraped from the hives without harming the bees. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (5 sprays): %RI* Promunel® bee propolis extract (4 mg of polyphenols) 690 mg **

product.title: Biosil® 60 liquid capsules
product.description:
• Collagen production: ch-OSA® can help your body generate its own natural collagen
  • Skin, hair & nails: promoting smoother skin, fuller hair, and stronger nails from within<
  • Elastin & keratin: can encourage natural production of two key structural proteins
  • Joint comfort: can help maintain comfortable, flexible joints with daily use
  • Fast absorption: liquid-filled capsules for efficient delivery of active ingredients

Biosil® 60 liquid capsules delivers the patented ch-OSA® compound in easy-to-swallow capsules, designed to stimulate collagen formation and protect existing collagen. This supplement is non-GMO, 100% vegan, and clinically proven to support skin, hair, nails, and joints.

Health benefits at a glance: The only active ingredient in this supplement is ch-OSA®, which is a patented and uniquely effective compound. The two other ingredients are purified water and microcrystalline cellulose (plant fiber). Quick benefits of Biosil®'s liquid capsules: Supporting natural collagen production while protecting existing collagen A tasteless formula – no fishy aftertaste The supplement is clinically proven, 100% vegan & non-GMO Convenient daily use with just 1 capsule twice daily

Why it works: Unlike traditional collagen supplements, the Biosil® formula does not contain collagen. Instead, it can help your body produce its own collagen, making it a perfect vegan-friendly alternative. And not only that, but ch-OSA® can also help generate elastin and keratin naturally. This science-backed supplement has been shown to promote smoother skin, stronger nails, fuller, healthier-looking (shinier) hair – and even joint comfort.

The science behind the product: 20-week study: Smoother, tighter skin This randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial involved 50 women (aged 40-65) and took place at Vrije Universiteit Brussel, Belgium. Compared to the placebo group, the women taking ch-OSA® reported: 30% reduction in depth of fine lines & wrinkles 89% improvement in skin elasticity Hair & nail brittleness were rated to be significantly improved 9-month trial: Stronger, thicker hair Another randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study of 48 women (aged 18-65) took place at the University of Cincinnati, USA. Compared to the placebo group, the women taking ch-OSA® were measured to have: 12,8% thicker hair fiber diameter (thickness) 13,1% increased strength (higher break load) 12 weeks: More joint comfort Yet another randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, multi-center study of 166 people, led by researchers at the University of Hasselt, Belgium. This research showed a significant improvement in men taking ch-OSA® compared to men in the placebo group: 26% less knee discomfort 35% less knee stiffness 25% better daily function

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What is in Biosil® liquid capsules This supplement is vegan and GMO-free. It does not contain soy, dairy, egg, corn, wheat, gluten, fish/shellfish, peanuts/nuts/tree nuts, animal-derived ingredients, ingredients from genetically modified organisms, artificial colors, artificial preservatives, or any flavors or sweeteners. Who can benefit from taking Biosil®? Biosil® can benefit anyone wanting to support healthy collagen levels. Natural collagen production typically peaks in early adulthood (21 years old) and gradually declines with age, although the rate can vary depending on genetics and lifestyle. Over time, this decline may become noticeable in the skin, hair, nails, bones, and joints. BioSil can support collagen formation to help maintain these collagen-dependent tissues at any age. † When can I expect results with Biosil®? After 1 month: Faster-growing nails are often one of the first noticeable changes. After 2 months: Hair may appear fuller, shinier, and healthier looking. After 3 months: Some people report brighter, more radiant-looking skin. Clinical research also showed improvements in joint comfort, mobility, flexibility, and cartilage condition within this timeframe. After 4–5 months: Clinical studies have shown visible improvements in skin elasticity, wrinkles, and fine lines. After 4–6 months: Research has shown reduced nail brittleness, along with smoother-looking nails and fewer vertical ridges over time. After 9 months: Clinical studies reported stronger, thicker, and more elastic hair. After 12 months: Research showed increased bone collagen production and improved hip bone density. † However, individual results may vary. Can I trust these clinical studies? The effects of Biosil® for skin, hair, nails, bones, and joints are supported by randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled human clinical trials published in peer-reviewed medical journals – considered the gold standard in clinical research. It's also important to understand the difference between "clinically tested" and "clinically proven". Many products can be clinically tested, but only products that demonstrate statistically significant results in well-designed studies can claim to be clinically proven. Biosil® has demonstrated such results in placebo-controlled, double-blind human clinical trials. † How is Biosil® different than supplements that contain collagen? Biosil® does not contain collagen; it helps your body produce its own collagen. When collagen is consumed, the body breaks it down into amino acids and digests it like any other source of protein, such as meat, fish, or poultry. In that sense, many collagen supplements function similarly to a protein shake. Biosil® works differently. By supporting the body's natural collagen-producing cells, called fibroblasts, in the skin and osteoblasts in the bones. As these cells become less active with age, collagen production gradually declines. Clinical studies have shown that Biosil® can help stimulate collagen formation by supporting these cells and helping them function more efficiently. It can also help protect both newly formed and existing collagen from damage. † Is Biosil® evaluated and approved by authorities? Biosil® has been available in the USA since 1994 and is manufactured according to strict quality and safety standards that meet or exceed FDA requirements for dietary supplements. The manufacturing facility in Belgium is inspected by the FDA. In Europe, the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) has evaluated and approved ch-OSA®, confirming its safety and bioavailability. EFSA is widely recognized for its rigorous scientific review standards. In Canada, Biosil® products have also been evaluated under Health Canada's regulatory framework and granted Natural Product Numbers (NPNs) following review of their safety, scientific support, and claim substantiation. †These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.

product.title: AmpliQ CoQ10™ 100 mg
product.description:
• Heart & cellular health: Advanced CoQ10 can promote cardiovascular function and cellular vitality.

  • Superior absorption: Delivers up to 3x vs. standard ubiquinol and up to 24x vs. standard ubiquinone.

  • Energy & fatigue: Can help encourage healthy energy production and reduce general fatigue.

  • Antioxidant & aging: Offering antioxidant protection, supporting healthy aging from within.

  • Blood sugar & inflammation: Can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar and a balanced inflammatory response.

AmpliQ CoQ10™ 100 mg delivers FenuMat® patented technology for next-generation CoQ10 absorption, supporting your heart, cells, and energy levels. A gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO formula with no unnecessary additives.

Health benefits at a glance: First, what is CoQ10? It's a vital, naturally occurring, fat-soluble antioxidant and coenzyme (found in nearly every cell in the body) that supports cardiovascular health, powers the cells' energy production, and helps defend against oxidative stress. However, its natural levels decline as we age. Bioavailability has long been the defining challenge in CoQ10 supplementation, but the advanced AmpliQ CoQ10™ changes that. It's clinically backed to deliver higher circulating CoQ10 levels throughout the body, ensuring you get the full benefit of every dose. This supplement is gluten-free, vegetarian, and non-GMO.

Why it works: CoQ10 has multiple functions throughout the body. As a key component of cellular energy production, this coenzyme is crucial to the heart, kidneys, liver, muscles, and other energy-demanding tissues. The challenge is getting as much CoQ10 to those cells as possible. AmpliQ CoQ10™ combines CoQ10 with fenugreek fibers for increased absorption. This patented delivery technology can deliver up to 24x greater bioavailability than standard ubiquinone and up to 3x greater bioavailability than standard ubiquinol.

The science behind the product: Heart health and CoQ10 CoQ10 is especially important for the heart, one of the body's most energy-demanding organs. Studies have shown that CoQ10 supplementation can support cardiovascular health, particularly in people with lower CoQ10 levels or increased needs. Research has shown in numerous studies that CoQ10 can support healthy cholesterol levels already within the normal range and promote endothelial health, the inner lining of blood vessels. (1,2) CoQ10 and antioxidant protection CoQ10 can protect cells from oxidative stress and support the activity of other antioxidants in the body, including vitamins E and C and SOD (superoxide dismutase). (3,4) Fighting fatigue with CoQ10 CoQ10 can help relieve general fatigue. (5) It's vital for mitochondrial energy production, helping cells generate ATP, which is the body's primary source of energy. (6) A balanced inflammatory response Studies suggest that CoQ10 can help inhibit inflammatory factors to promote whole-body health and well-being. (7) Glucose health and CoQ10 Clinical research demonstrates that CoQ10 can help maintain already-healthy blood sugar levels. (8)

How to use: Please take according to the dosage and use guidelines under the supplement facts, or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner. FAQ: What is in AmpliQ CoQ10™ and why should I use it? AmpliQ CoQ10™ is Life Extension's most advanced coenzyme formula. It provides 50/100 mg of CoQ10, combined with galactomannan fibers from fenugreek seeds to enhance bioavailability, supporting higher circulating CoQ10 levels. The result is a next-generation CoQ10 supplement for heart health, cellular energy, and beyond. What makes AmpliQ CoQ10™ more bioavailable? Exclusively from Life Extension, AmpliQ CoQ10™ uses a patented FenuMat® technology that can increase CoQ10 levels in the bloodstream. This means up to 24x better bioavailability than standard ubiquinone and up to 3x better bioavailability than standard ubiquinol. What does CoQ10 do for the body? Coenzyme (CoQ10) is present in every cell and essential for cellular energy production, particularly in organs with high energy demands such as the heart, kidneys, and liver. It also supports healthy aging, cardiovascular health, a healthy inflammatory response, and healthy blood sugar metabolism. Who is AmpliQ CoQ10™ meant for? AmpliQ CoQ10™ has been studied in adults aged 30 to 73 and shown to increase circulating CoQ10 levels. Whether you're looking to support heart health, cellular energy, or healthy aging, this advanced formula is designed to help at every stage of life. How and when should I take AmpliQ CoQ10™? We recommend taking one capsule daily with food. AmpliQ CoQ10™ can be taken at any time of day, making it easy to fit into your routine. Why doesn't AmpliQ CoQ10™ contain ubiquinol? AmpliQ CoQ10™ was developed to deliver exceptional bioavailability without the need for ubiquinol. Its patented delivery technology has been shown to increase circulating CoQ10 levels, allowing us to offer advanced CoQ10 support in a more cost-effective formula for the customers. When is the best time to take AmpliQ CoQ10™? Take one capsule daily, at any time of day. It can be taken with or without food, depending on your preference. Will this supplement interact with medications? There is no indication that the ingredients in this formula negatively interact with prescription medications. However, we recommend informing your healthcare professional about any supplements you are taking. Has this product been tested for quality and safety? All Life Extension's raw materials and finished products undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet their high-quality standards. This includes testing for heavy metals, microbes, disintegration, potency, and active ingredient content. Products are only approved for production after meeting Life Extension's specifications. Does this supplement contain allergens? AmpliQ CoQ10™ is free from milk, eggs, fish, crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, sesame, and soybeans. Where is this product produced? This formula is manufactured in the USA in a facility that complies with GMP standards ("good manufacturing practices"). Is this product vegetarian? Yes, this product is vegetarian and does not contain any animal-derived ingredients. Is this product gluten-free? Yes, this product is gluten-free. Is this product non-GMO? Yes, this product and all its ingredients are Life Extension verified non-GMO. Can children take this product? This product was designed for adults over the age of 18 and is not intended for children. Always consult with your child's physician before giving them any supplements.

Supplement facts: Amount per day (1 capsule): %RI* AmpliQ CoQ10™ proprietary blend [providing 20% ubiquinone (100 mg), 25% galactomannans (125 mg) from fenugreek (seed)] as FenuMat® CoQ10 500 mg **
